name: Wesley Bell (personal)
subject: Word is quickly spreading about my run for Congress, but I still need your help
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
Peter,

I'll keep this one short.

Word is quickly spreading about my run for Congress. But here's the thing: words don't win elections; leadership does. At a time when the people of MO-01 are struggling and looking for strong, effective leadership, I'm ready to step up and be the person to build a path forward that brings the people of MO-01 together, BUT I need your help to do that.

Before tonight's midnight deadline, ensure we reach our first fundraising deadline of my congressional campaign by chipping in $5 or more to help hit our goal → [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bell-eoq4-23 &refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73434208/438480277/1029727644?refcode=em23_231115_mm3_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231115_mm3_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=a41fe115-1384-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTQxZmUxMTUtMTM4NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GqymEa34sc3CyQQuW7EUKG8ly_pDazq15RFeCzdjHHk=)

Thank you,

Wesley Bell

subject: I stand by my oath
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ElectGabeEvans
body:
| | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=21efebdc2cbd4fcb995b6a0ecfb1b42e&_e=DrtGq6c4VLcyHk1WBJD_QRj0Z0uHaMwO9CZE9OHZ7Wk_N7b1WRKE15bTjd8HksH0zx8kzAwMsHPr-f-qg0Lh_S5P3Q5NAJkB1BxdhrKqerN1jXUW7VJmK5SvqqA0Pb71BuBuhfcvBX9OpCUwskxCpXj9u4kEGTvNJA4W7LNVD_UkPGwlVMrVRMf5vx6gBSDXSuXnqerdHNPBHYI-pgZ1m4em3JlGhcqTTQmzHwykQ0zjJSpSVXlMcdq6B-cb8X66G6HoVdTwp2NfTZcmuincWt8IGIAOm0fUlwCfuW-A5KKbxzsII9cBMafk7XoPITolERhws5IscLBMvblUHmwvbK8YezXJFEv7yNeQhJkvQXobTpLkCk4ievL8O82JBc3CZUzEXvGcgf9JFsqustvZnznuiSdKFLzn9gE2m90nsMg%3D)
---
Friend,

"I, Gabe Evans, do solemnly swear that I will support and defend the Constitution of the United States against all enemies, foreign and domestic..."

Those words begin the oath you take when you enlist in the U.S. Army. They are words that I continue to live every single day.
You see, I didn't leave my service at the door when I retired my military uniform.

It's something I've incorporated into everything I've done since - from my service as a police officer to representing my constituents in the Colorado State House.

**Now, I want to renew my oath to America in Congress.**
---
[**JOIN MY TEAM**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=21efebdc2cbd4fcb995b6a0ecfb1b42e&_e=DrtGq6c4VLcyHk1WBJD_QRj0Z0uHaMwO9CZE9OHZ7Wk_N7b1WRKE15bTjd8HksH0zx8kzAwMsHPr-f-qg0Lh_S5P3Q5NAJkB1BxdhrKqerN1jXUW7VJmK5SvqqA0Pb71BuBuhfcvBX9OpCUwskxCpXj9u4kEGTvNJA4W7LNVD_UkPGwlVMrVRMf5vx6gBSDXSuXnqerdHNPBHYI-pgZ1m4em3JlGhcqTTQmzHwykQ0zjJSpSVXlMcdq6B-cb8X66G6HoVdTwp2NfTZcmuincWozkqtZdeT-X_OOUb6grnDhcckHUAiqYlbdToZnAJl9RZPxr--IVuvv6rLBAkEQ_O1a3rUwA1vif9FPoY3Q5pckXGLEP9pLaOu1SclvttD4p5fTeRacKUlcLgVeAXkRiLe7T4Uzaioo-I4wttqcvBZc%3D)
---
American freedom is at risk. We've all seen how the radical Left tramples on the Constitution and targets conservatives. I'm running for Congress to protect and defend our Constitution and create a better future for our children and grandchildren. ** ** **Will you help me renew my oath?**
---
[**JOIN MY TEAM**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=21efebdc2cbd4fcb995b6a0ecfb1b42e&_e=DrtGq6c4VLcyHk1WBJD_QRj0Z0uHaMwO9CZE9OHZ7Wk_N7b1WRKE15bTjd8HksH0zx8kzAwMsHPr-f-qg0Lh_S5P3Q5NAJkB1BxdhrKqerN1jXUW7VJmK5SvqqA0Pb71BuBuhfcvBX9OpCUwskxCpXj9u4kEGTvNJA4W7LNVD_UkPGwlVMrVRMf5vx6gBSDXSuXnqerdHNPBHYI-pgZ1m4em3JlGhcqTTQmzHwykQ0zjJSpSVXlMcdq6B-cb8X66G6HoVdTwp2NfTZcmuincWqfUHHNt3vLHDpyFAgsBBvO7jKNeMHjXKT4-v0rVJIP7edDmnlQD9245NpZ_xqWz6rC7IvE_FV0XfdZ6enFZPvR5X7nTtTUoZKbEyq3bzgPbtxYiajknNaTYR3FjpneFOrhZn_DV3YGMDIdfYU9fehU%3D)
---
**[This is going to be one of the toughest campaigns in America, and just like during my time in the Army, I need a top team by my side if we're going to win. Will you join our team today and save America from the radical Left?](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=21efebdc2cbd4fcb995b6a0ecfb1b42e&_e=DrtGq6c4VLcyHk1WBJD_QRj0Z0uHaMwO9CZE9OHZ7Wk_N7b1WRKE15bTjd8HksH0zx8kzAwMsHPr-f-qg0Lh_S5P3Q5NAJkB1BxdhrKqerN1jXUW7VJmK5SvqqA0Pb71BuBuhfcvBX9OpCUwskxCpXj9u4kEGTvNJA4W7LNVD_UkPGwlVMrVRMf5vx6gBSDXSuXnqerdHNPBHYI-pgZ1m4em3JlGhcqTTQmzHwykQ0zjJSpSVXlMcdq6B-cb8X66G6HoVdTwp2NfTZcmuincWllGhO4c3rEtpd1m0O1A-c1_U_WrZR8PlqjDX1iu0QpawLRsVLkgo7cIhpfUMRQv2PUPz-rhnqoh5B4zeeU3OFhmWRCLwJUL9VrdUvzt6kbZNkTARTPuQMHzZSBSOSYsRg7y7ZderaSuu_hDmy5Mz7c%3D)**

Representative Jed Davis Uncovers Legislative Scheme to Ensure Electoral Victories (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/11/alert-representative-jed-davis-uncovers-legislative-scheme-to-ensure-electoral-victoriesalert.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=21e852d0ef-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_06&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Representative Jed Davis on the Illinois House Floor (Provided by Rep Davis)

We have an important update regarding a recent decision that could reshape the future of our educational system and the political landscape in Illinois.

During the recent veto session, a pivotal vote was cast concerning the public elections of the Board of Education for Chicago Public Schools. Representative Jed Davis has raised significant concerns about the timing of these elections, highlighting a potential legislative strategy that might unfairly influence electoral outcomes.

Why This Matters: Unlike other areas in Illinois, Chicago's school board elections are now aligned with general elections. This move, Davis argues, is a deliberate attempt to sway the balance of power in favor of one party, potentially altering the state's political fabric.

Davis's bold statement on this issue is a call to action: "This is corruption right in the open, and it’s a fight for electoral fairness."

🔹 Get Informed: What does this mean for the people of Chicago and the state of Illinois?

🔹Join the Conversation: Representative Davis is pushing back against this legislation and needs your input.

Don't miss out on the full story. Click below to read more about Representative Davis's stance and what this means for you.

Together, we can ensure that our elections are fair and representative of all voices.

name: Bob Lorinser
subject: Ab out Hunter's wage
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
Hunter, my newly hired field director, deserves a livable wage!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/Hunter.png]
I know that campaigns are won on the ground, talking directly one-on-one to voters, so I need eager, energetic, and experienced organizers in the field coordinating our volunteers.
Only through your donations is that possible. Friend, help me pay my team livable wages. [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
CONTRIBUTE [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Friend,
Great news. My team is expanding. I have hired an experienced field director, Hunter Evans to help me succeed in organizing volunteers and canvassing our massive rural district.
Hunter started his political career at just 16, and now, after nearly a decade in the field, his experience in political organizing makes him a great fit.
He is passionate about healthcare and political organizing, and most recently worked at a non-profit that helped rural youth obtain insurance.
Hunter understands the importance of Medicare for All, and it motivated him to get involved as a volunteer collecting petition signatures for me.
He has quickly become a valued member of my team.
I am running for Congress to fight for livable wages and family sustaining jobs , because everyone in our community deserves the opportunity to thrive.
My staff works tirelessly to help me spread my message and connect with voters, and it's crucial that they are properly compensated for their hard work.
That is why I am asking for your help today.
Because our grassroots campaign is funded entirely through donations of individuals like you, your generosity helps me provide Hunter with the resources he needs to do his job well.
Friend, please consider chipping in whatever so we can continue paying great staffers like Hunter. $5, $50, or $500, every dollar makes a huge difference.
Thank you,
Bob
Dr. Bob Lorinser, MD, MSW, MPH
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01
CONTRIBUTE [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]
Or send a check to:
"Friends of Dr. Bob"
PO Box 936
Marquette, MI 49855

name: Letitia James
subject: Peter, I’m about to fall short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
---
**Peter, my mid-month fundraising numbers will be locked in at 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT – and we’re STILL $3,193 short of our $10,000 goal.**

The moment my fundraising deadline closes, the most powerful and wealthy forces in the country will be poring over the numbers to see if we’ve finally lost momentum. And if we give them any indication that I have, they will spend the rest of the year attempting to _bury_ our work.

**Peter, we cannot let this happen. subject: my only hope
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
turning to you in the final hours
| | |
---
Friend, it's Debbie Mucarsel-Powell. In a minute, I'm going to ask you to **[chip in to help me defeat Rick Scott](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73434920/438484358/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk324-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTYzZmZmYzQtMTM4NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MHng6S3vjPLqFE5Koov8s7U_rQo9IRA8yoTJOTCmqXc=) **— but first, let me explain why it's so important:
A recent poll showed me statistically _**tied**_ with Rick Scott, which means we can win this race, flip Florida blue, and help defend our Democratic Senate majority!
And last week, Rick Scott spent **$3 million** airing attack ads in Florida to spread misinformation and slander Democrats like me.
**Now, I'm still 12% short of my $100,000 mid-month goal with only a few hours left ahead of my midnight deadline. If I don't close this gap, I won't be able to respond to GOP attacks — and Rick Scott could pull ahead in the polls.**
**So I'm turning to you, friend. This grassroots team is my only hope of reaching this goal before the end of the night.**
**[If everyone reading this chips in $5 now, I know I can reach my mid-month goal, keep up my momentum, and flip Florida blue. Can I count on you to join me in this fight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73434922/438484360/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk324-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTYzZmZmYzQtMTM4NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MHng6S3vjPLqFE5Koov8s7U_rQo9IRA8yoTJOTCmqXc=)**
Thanks for your help,

Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
|
* * *
| | | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73434924/438484362/-31037693?refcode=jtk324-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTYzZmZmYzQtMTM4NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MHng6S3vjPLqFE5Koov8s7U_rQo9IRA8yoTJOTCmqXc=)
---

She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. We are rapidly approaching the March 5th primary for the California U.S.
Senate race.

In fact, we are in the last full fundraising quarter before the primary
right now, and tonight’s midnight goal is our mid-quarter deadline of the
FEC quarter.

So it’s no exaggeration to say that hitting our goals now has an impact on
how we do in the primary when early voting begins in less than 100 days.

Whether we can knock on an extra thousand doors or not. Whether we can run
an extra digital ad or not. Whether we can print another dozen yard signs
or not.

With over 30 candidates in this race, and only two moving on to the
general election, the odds are tough.

But this team — including you,
Derek — has pulled off some
remarkable feats.

And I’m hoping tonight, you can help us pull off another one.

In fact, we are in the last full fundraising quarter before the primary right now, and tonight’s midnight goal is our mid-quarter deadline of the FEC quarter. So it’s no exaggeration to say that hitting our goals now has an impact on how we do in the primary when early voting begins in less than 100 days. Whether we can knock on an extra thousand doors or not. Whether we can run an extra digital ad or not. Whether we can print another dozen yard signs or not. Listen, I know how you feel – I also hate when Matt asks me to chip in to up this campaign’s fundraising (though he usually asks me for 3 hours of call time, not to chip in $3).

So I wanted to send you a quick note because:

**A:** We’re falling behind critical benchmarks that we need to hit to stay competitive in this single-digit seat, and...

**B:** _I hate doing call time_. Matt has already said he’ll expect me at the office bright and early tomorrow if we can’t hit tonight’s goal, [**so I’m PLEADING with you – can you chip in $10 to make sure we fully fund our digital ad fund goal? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73435163/438488921/417269932?amount=10&refcode=RRFC_20231115_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzNlODdiMmItMTU4NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=h3E4U0wPYy_2LbdaE0whkvIj-idIxc7Ke-3cHE4IMGc=)
[CHIP IN $10 NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73435176/438488925/417269932?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=RRFC_20231115_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzNlODdiMmItMTU4NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=h3E4U0wPYy_2LbdaE0whkvIj-idIxc7Ke-3cHE4IMGc=)
---
**Believe or not, friend, this campaign is fueled largely in part by small dollar donors like you chipping in power this people-first movement.**

But when we fail to hit critical benchmarks, we’re forced to spend precious time _calling donors_ instead of _talking to voters_ about the dramatic differences between my extremist MAGA opponents and me.

[**I can’t defend this blue seat and help Democrats take back the House if our grassroots donor networks continue to dry up – so I’m really counting on you here – will you help our team hit tonight’s digital ad fund goal by chipping in $10 before midnight? Your support means everything to me in this critical moment – chip in $10 now »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73435196/438488951/417269932?amount=10&refcode=RRFC_20231115_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzNlODdiMmItMTU4NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=h3E4U0wPYy_2LbdaE0whkvIj-idIxc7Ke-3cHE4IMGc=)

clean_body: | = Our campaign manager told me he reached out to you yesterday and asked you to chip in towards our digital ad fund goal. He also tells me we missed yesterday’s $3,000 goal to fully fund it... | = Listen, I know how you feel – I also hate when Matt asks me to chip in to up this campaign’s fundraising (though he usually asks me for 3 hours of call time, not to chip in $3). So I wanted to send you a quick note because: A: We’re falling behind critical benchmarks that we need to hit to stay competitive in this single-digit seat, and... B: I hate doing call time. Matt has already said he’ll expect me at the office bright and early tomorrow if we can’t hit tonight’s goal, = = Believe or not, friend, this campaign is fueled largely in part by small dollar donors like you chipping in power this people-first movement. But when we fail to hit critical benchmarks, we’re forced to spend precious time calling donors instead of talking to voters about the dramatic differences between my extremist MAGA opponents and me. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you so much, Dr. Raul Ruiz | | Paid for by Dr. Raul Ruiz For Congress Committee P.O. name: Senate Updates
subject: Are we doing enough for Israel?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
The House is voting to send $14.3 billion in aid to Israel. Should the Senate get on board? | Fellow American,

**As the only democracy in the Middle East, American support for Israel ought to be ironclad.** For longer than most anyone can remember, it has been. But believe it or not, there are Americans among us who not only don’t support Israel, they’re vocally pro-Palestine.

While it’s hard to believe that anyone would support a de-facto state run by a terrorist organization, the thing that sets America apart from communities run by terrorists/dictators is that we have rights. The right to free speech and the right to public protest.

Our question for you today is: [**do you support sending aid money to Israel to help them eradicate Hamas?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=08575133694a4313af0facaa897eede1&_e=Snagu3vPNlZTsG629D2yceh5CV-v0XXhwhOXWdQVQdSyeTEdYY6APlRr5-bDUaZcTmlCT0o9oWdZ46GXdW-6XsvxzwfXV7QGS8LFJdrvLQMHC4ArMR1zxhXHDvN3DiKx-JPfwNuGYRiGFsbOZKeEZPjrNcIIM6rwNSN9kEZANHjxlzbiONMm6WZFIVZL7ovAUfNgbxbuQ6HmDAZelXs_oLyqnAaCPbovB6lJ1kZ3PuiOBqHgzItq0ZbWNp6QxxkWuUImd8BFVYX83WquP2vZINDzle8uBS5qpfmyS7u425GvTGTe0NdHTIoLc0n-azO7E_0zDrPxZoGQ_AEndexbNlm--DbsjW9047uEW2l4KOo3LJWW5dejM_fVftx2kX9uRbkM_VwTE5hXSbx_YEl9SOUuATnC0ir_ZAZ0Pb-mCiE%3D)

[**NO**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=08575133694a4313af0facaa897eede1&_e=Snagu3vPNlZTsG629D2yceh5CV-v0XXhwhOXWdQVQdSyeTEdYY6APlRr5-bDUaZcTmlCT0o9oWdZ46GXdW-6XsvxzwfXV7QGS8LFJdrvLQMHC4ArMR1zxhXHDvN3DiKx-JPfwNuGYRiGFsbOZKeEZPjrNcIIM6rwNSN9kEZANHjxlzbiONMm6WZFIVZL7ovAUfNgbxbuQ6HmDAZelXs_oLyqnAaCPbovB6lJ1kZ3PuiOBqHgzItq0ZbWNp6QxxkWuUImd8BFVYX83WquP2vZIJugmpNUAtr7gUpc0KFl2dlZfGD9RN7dMIlDD6VSXUXR0fsy7Nw1eRTpWizIHq-1FYRK7-LXv89B4WJlZ08g9XSALyC1ZwgomGL8qKIxoO86Cq9WQw48WCYHEz7zl4nDE40rUUKi0NJwgmggCgFzjIA%3D)

subject: I’d appreciate this favor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Good evening, Peter. This is Scott here reaching out again about the race to flip CA-47.

We may be in a strong position right now, with polls showing some favorable signs for Republicans and our message resonating with folks across the district.

But in politics, things can change in an instant – not to mention, I suspect Democrat donors are getting ready for a massive blitz with Election Day now less than a year out.

So that’s why I’m hoping you’ll help this campaign keep up its momentum. **With tonight being another fundraising checkpoint**, [I’d appreciate your support today of $10, $100, or any amount you can spare.](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=e16a2c7ca0&e=8a657725d1)

Every dollar goes straight to work fueling our fight to take back Orange County and flip CA-47. Make A Contribution: [https://secure.winred.com/scott-baugh-for-congress/secure-link-23](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=e58dfe7445&e=8a657725d1)
Thank you,
-Scott Baugh

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: I’ll be quick
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I needed to reach out personally to ask for your support before our mid-month fundraising deadline passes
#

Hi friends, it’s Gabby Giffords.
I know my team has already reached out to you a few times about tonight’s mid-month fundraising deadline, so I’ll be quick.
I just couldn’t let this deadline pass without personally asking for your support.
[**So please, if you’re able to use this link to make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC before midnight, I’d really appreciate it.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov23.H_pglF&refcode=em231115-2-30&t=1&akid=6893%2E3935704%2EmVPOLc)
As we rapidly close in on the end of the year, it’s crucial that we have a strong fundraising performance so we can hit our 2023 goals. Our opponents in the gun lobby are waiting for us to show any signs of weakness, and we need to prove to them that our movement is stronger than it's ever been.
When you make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC, it’s the best way to send a strong message that you’re committed to our fight to end gun violence.
[**Will you please make a contribution before our mid-month fundraising drive ends tonight?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov23.H_pglF&refcode=em231115-2-30&t=2&akid=6893%2E3935704%2EmVPOLc)
Thank you so much for standing with us during this important moment.
My very best,
Gabby Giffords
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov23.H_pglF&refcode=em231115-2-30&t=3&akid=6893%2E3935704%2EmVPOLc)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=6893%2E3935704%2EmVPOLc) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

Hi Peter –
We’re halfway through the final quarter of 2023 and we want to make it our most successful one yet. We know everyone’s thinking about the holidays coming up and spending time with family – and so are we. But democracy is a verb, and we can’t stop now. Can you chip in $12 to make sure we hit our quarterly fundraising goal so we’re ready for the new year? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_111523_halfway&amount=12]
We know folks will be busy wrapping things up with work, buying gifts for their kids, going to holiday parties, and traveling to visit loved ones. It’s truly a magical time of year for so many, but it can make meeting our fundraising goals especially challenging.
That’s why we are reaching out early for your support. We want to make sure our campaign can enter 2024 with momentum on our side. We’ll need your support to make that happen. Can you chip in $12 to help us out? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_111523_halfway&amount=12]

body:
\- - - > 7pm MST |
---
| | Just a heads up...

Senator Winder revealed on a radio talk show that he's removed me as Vice Chair of my committee.

So I'm jumping on Twitter tonight to discuss it.

We kick off at **7 pm MST.**

Tune in if you're able - here's the link:

**[https://twitter.com/i/spaces/1RDGlljRjNNGL?s=20](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=f7579cbd41&e=dea908e0fe "click here @ 7pm MST")**

Catch you there,

name: Ryan Busse
subject: We have to meet people where they are
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Busse for Montana, PO Box 8537 Kalispell, MT 59904, Democrat
body:
Ryan Busse puts principles over politics. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/KuMB1syMs0W9O3v5MuCvqQ2?unsubscribedata=nDULd9AnoTAgWrnPI80liGEvzrbiXWoYZBfulriwuT9o1EEii%2BGXa%2BpHPHDZwvhoKrGE%2BFYLU0Crvwuh78rKdbDagTYFpzVyTmLYv8euskQik8mNSHN8nlONGF53daEVOrbH%2BNERwufqdBDq25lqWsvMwVC8P3iWemvPGQXLmXvApgnVHM7zCS5a%2BxqMSR%2BGZzzMr%2BJCKD%2Bt6S0SCNccqbw%2FnuMJuIGVToaVVPlDPO4NmNNWR5UvUsLywvbo2HbkW1TMqVeaAeqv%2Bhnwcupk5iPitacalEfXEM5Mfhgs%2BZ3uUyJsFGfZORLJbRriqfofHK4WDCWGcg%2BYs7s1HRFWXrHOVs7whTyf25gU6DDZYW3GtC%2FjVEdN7zG13x%2FJTIlNhlJ%2B4b93D6bNZFXck7qQk5vLWt%2FEJr%2F17UVeC0dcFHjDlNVoEsSUvr%2FnL0LpIMcf)
---
| |
---
Hey there, it’s Ryan. Here’s the thing about running for office these days: **We have to meet people where they are** , not where we want them to be.

A few weeks ago, I got my elk on public land. I was already planning on heading east that day and didn’t have time to process it myself, so I called a few friends in Havre and asked if they knew anyone who could help me out.

They said, “Well, maybe Bob... but not sure you guys will see eye-to-eye on politics.” **But I don’t care about Bob’s politics; I just need someone to process my elk** — so I head over to see him.

Bob meets me by his Trump flag, wearing a MAGA hat. His shop is nice and clean. As we get to talking, he asks me what I do. I say, “I’m running for Governor, Bob.”

Bob gets real quiet for a moment before saying, **“Well, I do love Trump, but I really don’t like that Gianforte guy.”**

This is what I’m talking about, Peter. This is why I’m traveling from corner to corner of our great state, listening to as many Montanans as possible. [But gas ain’t cheap, and I need your help to stay on the campaign trail. Will you chip in now so I can stay out on the road?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73435736/438500876/1684620444?source=SBD_RB_EM_FR_NOV23_1_1_MMFS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDgzNDciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmIzNTczMGUtMTk4NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1HJQ0DS33RXNyNIYEjWqVqjHlQSOWWHoHcbBvE2sCkU=) | | [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73435737/438500877/1684620444?source=SBD_RB_EM_FR_NOV23_1_1_MMFS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDgzNDciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmIzNTczMGUtMTk4NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1HJQ0DS33RXNyNIYEjWqVqjHlQSOWWHoHcbBvE2sCkU=)
---
Over the past few months, I’ve been meeting so many voters with incredible stories who are excited about bringing a new brand of leadership to Montana. **But they’re also really frustrated.**

Everywhere I go, I meet people who are disgusted by rich and powerful people like Gianforte selling our state and changing it into a place that everyday Montanans don’t want it to be.

Gianforte and his wealthy buddies don’t have any respect for our way of life, Peter. But I want the people of Montana to know that we still have a chance at preserving the Last Best Place.

[If you’re as committed to saving our state as I am, please chip in $10 now and help me meet more folks where they’re at.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73435738/438500878/1684620444?amount=10&source=SBD_RB_EM_FR_NOV23_1_1_MMFS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDgzNDciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmIzNTczMGUtMTk4NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1HJQ0DS33RXNyNIYEjWqVqjHlQSOWWHoHcbBvE2sCkU=)

— Ryan

We should be terrified of their anti-freedom agenda. Greg Gianforte is the problem. He’s already raised your taxes, ignored the high cost of housing, lied to Montanans, and even went jet-setting in Italy while Montanans had to deal with record-breaking floods. He’s just getting started. Ryan is ready to deliver “a new brand for Montana,” and protect the Last Best Place from Greg Gianforte’s dangerous, failed leadership.

body:
Only a few signature spots left!
| **Did you see our email the other day??** Your signature is _MISSING from our card thanking Jamie Raskin for standing up to MAGA Republicans:_ [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57052?t=6&akid=11761%2E878179%2EJdsMaR) [**We’re SHOCKED to see Democrats like you abandoning Jamie Raskin while Republicans plot their revenge! We’ll give you ONE last chance to sign: Please, add your name to thank hero Rep. Jamie Raskin! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57052?t=7&akid=11761%2E878179%2EJdsMaR) | [ONE-TIME MIDNIGHT EXTENSION: SIGN THE THANK YOU CARD! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57052?t=8&akid=11761%2E878179%2EJdsMaR)
---
TO: Rep. Jamie Raskin
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: You’re a hero! **_To Rep. Jamie Raskin — thank you for being one of the top defenders of our democracy!_**

First, your heroic work on the January 6th Committee EXPOSED Donald Trump and the MAGA mob’s deadly insurrection!

Then, you stood up to the GOP’s selfish government shutdown plot, averting a TOTAL disaster for the American people!

**And now, you’re REFUSING to put up with MAGA Speaker Mike Johnson and his chaotic caucus, demanding they get back to work!**

[**I know Republicans are plotting their revenge by placing a HUGE target on your seat. So today, I’m fighting back and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to put the MAGA mob in their place and keep electing amazing Democrats like you! » **](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57052?t=9&akid=11761%2E878179%2EJdsMaR) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57052?t=10&akid=11761%2E878179%2EJdsMaR)
---
**_X A proud Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=11761%2E878179%2EJdsMaR). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=11761%2E878179%2EJdsMaR).**

subject: Republicans are already running attack ads in WI
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Will you help Tammy defend Wisconsin and our Senate majority today?
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1542%2E35263%2E_NXMka)
Hi Peter, here’s where things stand with just hours to go before our midnight deadline:
* National Republicans are _already_ spending money in Wisconsin on attack ads against Tammy
* Now that Senator Joe Manchin isn’t running for reelection, Republicans are all but guaranteed to win West Virginia — meaning they only need to flip **one more seat** to flip the Senate
* Our fundraising is still lagging behind, so we’re counting on a surge of grassroots donations to reach our $20,000 goal before midnight

Before Tammy’s Republican megamillionaire opponents enter the race, we can’t afford to miss a single fundraising goal. | Last week proved once again that the majority of Americans stand for reproductive freedom, Peter.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73435809/438501960/1713626325?refcode=BLU-HFFC-20231115-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjJhNmZmNzQtMTk4NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xjLjORsB3U2iz1rKx1MjS8-_DapeBTPZfkP2UW1RK_M=)
In the year and a half since the Supreme Court rolled back our rights, we’ve seen attacks on reproductive freedom in states all over the country, including in neighboring Idaho. Rightwing state legislators are attacking reproductive rights, _**but we’ve seen time and time again that everyday Americans support the right for a woman to make decisions about her own healthcare.**_ But we need action on the federal level.

Congress must restore reproductive freedom and ensure every woman, no matter what state she lives in, has the right to a safe abortion and reproductive healthcare. **Hilary Franz is committed to being a strong advocate and vote for making reproductive freedom the law of the land** , as well as protecting access to reproductive healthcare from the impacts of hospital mergers and buyouts, especially in rural communities. But she needs your help to get to Congress.

Hilary Franz has spent the last seven years fighting for Washington families and communities as our public lands commissioner. [_**Now, she's taking her work to Congress. Can we count on you to chip in $5 right now to empower Hilary to continue her work fighting for every Washingtonian?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73435810/438501961/1713626325?refcode=BLU-HFFC-20231115-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjJhNmZmNzQtMTk4NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xjLjORsB3U2iz1rKx1MjS8-_DapeBTPZfkP2UW1RK_M=)

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73435830/438502905/-1237197063?refcode=email_111523_MM1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzhhOTdhZS0xOTg0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xFAPy0RvzB6WZ1ZurWO549NSkjmMSAbwMeOs-N4QB5U=) Hey Derek, I know your inbox is probably filled with emails asking you for donations, and I’ll be honest: This is another one of those emails. [_**Our mid-November fundraising deadline is at the end of the week, so I wanted to ask you to chip in and help us keep up the fight for freedom and opportunity here in Pennsylvania.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73435831/438502906/1945296156?refcode=email_111523_MM1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzhhOTdhZS0xOTg0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xFAPy0RvzB6WZ1ZurWO549NSkjmMSAbwMeOs-N4QB5U=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73435832/438502907/1945296156?refcode=email_111523_MM1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzhhOTdhZS0xOTg0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xFAPy0RvzB6WZ1ZurWO549NSkjmMSAbwMeOs-N4QB5U=)
---
Every day, I wake up honored and humbled at the opportunity to serve as Pennsylvania’s Governor.
And I’m proud of the work we’ve accomplished so far. From enacting universal free breakfast for students across the Commonwealth to creating good-paying jobs that don’t require a college degree, I’m working hard to deliver real results to every part of our great Commonwealth.
**But I’m also not naive.** I know that this fight won’t always be easy, and I know that far-right extremists are going to try to halt and roll back our accomplishments at the first opportunity they get.
That’s why I’m asking for your support, Derek. At this critical moment for our Commonwealth and our country, we need to keep building this grassroots movement so we can keep Pennsylvania moving forward.

clean_body: = Hey Derek, I know your inbox is probably filled with emails asking you for donations, and I’ll be honest: This is another one of those emails. = | | = Every day, I wake up honored and humbled at the opportunity to serve as Pennsylvania’s Governor. And I’m proud of the work we’ve accomplished so far. From enacting universal free breakfast for students across the Commonwealth to creating good-paying jobs that don’t require a college degree, I’m working hard to deliver real results to every part of our great Commonwealth. But I’m also not naive. I know that this fight won’t always be easy, and I know that far-right extremists are going to try to halt and roll back our accomplishments at the first opportunity they get. That’s why I’m asking for your support, Derek. At this critical moment for our Commonwealth and our country, we need to keep building this grassroots movement so we can keep Pennsylvania moving forward. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = – Josh | By participating, you agree to the for recurring autodialed marketing messages from Josh Shapiro to the phone number you provide. **Look around, Fellow American. Right now, in America...**
_Children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves._

_The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God._

_Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes._

_Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth._

_Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives._

**As Speaker of the House, my mission is clear: we must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. **

As we aim to make history in the 2024 Election, I need to have my hand on the pulse of the most important thing: _**American voters.**_

[**Which is why I am conducting a _critical_ American Voter Survey today.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=73eafa4d1795426fb07cde4a1d5e018c&_e=RWHPkxkvsuJX53tmpaXBkJRtHYxgv72tC4fDTV0jtx9AeUhTMSTb7WiE6YZr7ymTenTwK-XH0_8_LiacwBWT_lHK4bKPj-wcs-yWBUVxIxAqLkdhz7yrW4xsLEPHMrcnQQQuSduzr0S5W-1VvQoZWlblsRJVQFeb8jdIF_NoBpR36BG7HSs7ia6cF0OfpgdGq7keKpVzeheL_klxoep43VBCMFfAzsh2h-Fr7FOMQ8phwGSD5cuXeCOAnECsnaocsihDiK_k85-jF-f6r8-MUgR1yxOq3yMeB6d_QqChyuktL-7F7hSeA331FgFO2mK4edxEhxGRhcPmkUHx-iz_92mV8OsVECaUY-buJGGb79HvGIR3lvFkEgWVdiSxPf0sSGgGEeHJvzlM2H3_gfEurg%3D%3D)

**_-RESPOND TO SPEAKER JOHNSON-_** [** LAUNCH AMERICAN VOTER SURVEY > **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=73eafa4d1795426fb07cde4a1d5e018c&_e=RWHPkxkvsuJX53tmpaXBkJRtHYxgv72tC4fDTV0jtx9AeUhTMSTb7WiE6YZr7ymTenTwK-XH0_8_LiacwBWT_lHK4bKPj-wcs-yWBUVxIxAqLkdhz7yrW4xsLEPHMrcnQQQuSduzr0S5W-1VvQoZWlblsRJVQFeb8jdIF_NoBpR36BG7HSs7ia6cF0OfpgdGq7keKpVzeheL_klxoep43VBCMFfAzsh2h-Fr7FOMQ8phwGSD5cuXeCOAnECsnaocY8s_9hOzwvGfiF14IAwr-fnansUQV8zbKZz3o2LMZb85R05Rtg1emobAiBYA24BsK455z6nkpZsJ6szaFw1YIRPFlGyyVP1Z12qqt5hWg9O7KHfhhTJwUzZdhIDE_-1G6EEy4YxFoiue9QhsFqn0QA%3D%3D)
If you care about the future of this country... _if you care about what happens in next November's election,_ [**please take 5 minutes out of your day to respond.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=73eafa4d1795426fb07cde4a1d5e018c&_e=RWHPkxkvsuJX53tmpaXBkJRtHYxgv72tC4fDTV0jtx9AeUhTMSTb7WiE6YZr7ymTenTwK-XH0_8_LiacwBWT_lHK4bKPj-wcs-yWBUVxIxAqLkdhz7yrW4xsLEPHMrcnQQQuSduzr0S5W-1VvQoZWlblsRJVQFeb8jdIF_NoBpR36BG7HSs7ia6cF0OfpgdGq7keKpVzeheL_klxoep43VBCMFfAzsh2h-Fr7FOMQ8phwGSD5cuXeCOAnECsnaoccs8hodwoRN2g3scYPFPGmJyn4PA9idzwezFdJChCS1LiR4BQOElV3d016Fu0I2MIgKLd7RXgyHDGOaa2Ln_88XnLTHVmF5dsJszEKI7S8Yws8x6PcW0pbTTkIKgMuO5MYilFSXtXxHmkkAiYUFe5uA%3D%3D)

As Speaker of the House, there are many pressing issues that come across my desk each day, [**so I want to ensure I am dedicating my time and energy to the issues you care about most.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=73eafa4d1795426fb07cde4a1d5e018c&_e=RWHPkxkvsuJX53tmpaXBkJRtHYxgv72tC4fDTV0jtx9AeUhTMSTb7WiE6YZr7ymTenTwK-XH0_8_LiacwBWT_lHK4bKPj-wcs-yWBUVxIxAqLkdhz7yrW4xsLEPHMrcnQQQuSduzr0S5W-1VvQoZWlblsRJVQFeb8jdIF_NoBpR36BG7HSs7ia6cF0OfpgdGq7keKpVzeheL_klxoep43VBCMFfAzsh2h-Fr7FOMQ8phwGSD5cuXeCOAnECsnaoczQByrE4vIpk5M6ze6UCIWhpGH0WFO4YNT25TiBpzGF-1P4oKKNWVLjv4ATepxu5vfmjYvEeQ1Dz6ydqNV_5_JxA7enOhRjDYNd5fohjlNmP9GOE40r_irranuc3_lFCl84Lme7rFL1cTVnvg5jEPYw%3D%3D)

My team has identified you as a reliable voice in Republican politics, which is why I am asking for your important input.

If I am going to successfully help elect strong conservative leaders to Congress in 2024, _**I need to hear from you in the next hour.**_

**_-RESPOND TO SPEAKER JOHNSON-_** [** LAUNCH AMERICAN VOTER SURVEY > **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=73eafa4d1795426fb07cde4a1d5e018c&_e=RWHPkxkvsuJX53tmpaXBkJRtHYxgv72tC4fDTV0jtx9AeUhTMSTb7WiE6YZr7ymTenTwK-XH0_8_LiacwBWT_lHK4bKPj-wcs-yWBUVxIxAqLkdhz7yrW4xsLEPHMrcnQQQuSduzr0S5W-1VvQoZWlblsRJVQFeb8jdIF_NoBpR36BG7HSs7ia6cF0OfpgdGq7keKpVzeheL_klxoep43VBCMFfAzsh2h-Fr7FOMQ8phwGSD5cuXeCOAnECsnaociggx5j3y7wstuFZG4Bevgjc6ZCXjjVeQloWp9n04A8cJutHIJ_JQIfYTlm95PGRGGsNl26vt0f9ME0aPrI57Pn2_RVx3JZ7XTtzbCyo2gLwCTbSFpLm3s7I51S61bty2yAvrOcnVIf1n2dlmk_FUbQ%3D%3D)
Thank you for being a reliable member of Team Johnson.

Gratefully,

body:
Katie’s back of the napkin math.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=33192%2E3422442%2EtNGRGp)
Derek,
Earlier this week Katie reached out to share some back-of-the-napkin math _(literally, it was written on the back of an airplane napkin!)_ to figure out how many supporters we needed to close the gap on our $50,000 mid-month goal.
Since Monday, we’ve raised almost 82% of our goal, and that’s thanks to supporters like you chipping in what they can to our movement.
**But that means we still have to raise just over $9,000 in order to reach our goal by**** _midnight tonight_****.**
**If just 321 supporters are able to chip in $28 (the average donation to our campaign) we’ll be able to keep this campaign on track.[Can we count on you to rush a donation of $28 (or whatever makes sense for you) before our midnight deadline?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231115-2?refcode=EMAN23_2_MM3_20231115_V1_F&refcode2=33192_3422442_tNGRGp&akid=33192%2E3422442%2EtNGRGp)**
**As a grassroots-funded movement, Katie refuses to take a single dime of corporate PAC or federal lobbyist money. Katie’s the only candidate in this race to make that commitment, because she’s always believed corporate money has no place in our politics.**
**[Can Katie count on you to chip in today with a donation of $28 to help us reach our goal?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231115-2?refcode=EMAN23_2_MM3_20231115_V1_F&refcode2=33192_3422442_tNGRGp&akid=33192%2E3422442%2EtNGRGp)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231115-2?refcode=EMAN23_2_MM3_20231115_V1_F&refcode2=33192_3422442_tNGRGp&akid=33192%2E3422442%2EtNGRGp)
Onward,
Katie Porter HQ

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAN23_2_MM3_20231115_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=33192_3422442_tNGRGp&akid=33192%2E3422442%2EtNGRGp)**

clean_body: Katie’s back of the napkin math. Derek, Earlier this week Katie reached out to share some back-of-the-napkin math (literally, it was written on the back of an airplane napkin!) to figure out how many supporters we needed to close the gap on our $50,000 mid-month goal. Since Monday, we’ve raised almost 82% of our goal, and that’s thanks to supporters like you chipping in what they can to our movement. But that means we still have to raise just over $9,000 in order to reach our goal by midnight tonight. If just 321 supporters are able to chip in $28 (the average donation to our campaign) we’ll be able to keep this campaign on track. As a grassroots-funded movement, Katie refuses to take a single dime of corporate PAC or federal lobbyist money. Katie’s the only candidate in this race to make that commitment, because she’s always believed corporate money has no place in our politics. Onward, Katie Porter HQ Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma.

name: (2) me, Donald J. Trump
subject: RE: My defiant entrance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
I made it clear: I will NEVER SURRENDER.| | | Patriot,

---
The Democrats want me to give up.
---
They want to break my spirit.
---
They want me to stare at the litany of false charges against me, the threat of 1,000 years in prison, the notorious mugshot, and the “corporate death penalty” – and drop to my knees in surrender.
---
But, as was clear from my defiant entrance at the UFC match in New York City last weekend after having to stand trial just a few days prior, there’s no attack on the face of the planet that can break me. _I will_** _NEVER SURRENDER_** _our mission to Save America!_

---
[](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=1975b55140174a5995deffaad345b4a1&_e=YC2iSRKxCUsh2dCZ3-j8pyHAxe9ik0BienyCxRx5pSpRjKBX1z-iGoinNBEg4Ros6t10QzpTe7y3Sge7fJP0ibQOF8DIItELr_-bzlg0LlYVN_JU6ytWMMRlw4Le2bHxMSB9KeuDEWYcINNm5BLpDvxXDNSHcm7_8_dGiS6upLS44BDlnoiSh7U2jNYxeqlK6zDrrBzSXOOA3jIIRWTC1Py0Es3u1e62grm3IFBs41zpkF86-oupimnwwGn8QDjJmsGvHXmHG-cb43cCmZcuMFPWvV-sQLHaZC_EFw1Zlq_cCvbUlgMDCjht5HTooBN9PBQYyGURu9G_Lo1ZHbNGerME899SmhTzg7nK_vyXP57dr0s_NR5kHw-_pgaG_j7InR6eOiSXLY8ZLZBVNwEDGdP2N_ATsVWQfTbh3Ol7Qk8rex8yEk_8S37VzArXa5c7ByO5RWg7G4phyHTwMVyE1sJ33hjSm7pyCdrTRz6r4f_YBMkmUbaifEd7u3Draotc)
---
Even as it may seem that our country is falling apart, that the world is burning, and that our once great Republic conceived in liberty and justice is transforming into a Third World Dictatorship, we simply cannot give up hope.

---
I have never been more committed to saving our great country. _Are you?_

---
_If you cannot contribute at this time because of the very sinister people in control of D.C. who want to crush our spirits, then please do not even think about donating. But I will still ask for this one favor: do not, ever, under any circumstances, lose faith!_

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: Here’s the deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:
Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=OKXjf9WFXwTwXcRXMEyM1fZDKOVtLfdEXXfNF%2FULCLed%2BaWR0oHoh9DV9sYWFOgGOOjJLp2rpvMW2JVXEh5XVbcx5W34pJn7vSL9JL%2FToOSvOSW1TguPFznjNNPINVaOVYqB6tNqCm7vKPR76JifHW7MDzktiRp0%2BCtfkln88ByoqlKLMXFg4Erm1bZJZSLyR8%2FkaTHdbMqjNe0XRYeUxa1EH3R3d5BVapvi%2FHrisSP21UaapAhyAF%2FgOHH7uJ9aZ0a0suxX2e7Q6l1QPxEY25RPXZ7gCGVPGt7SPfecS4BS3o3HHx%2F9Ch%2Fsp7GIj8pOnstnASBAid88rDjr2tbLonIsfEWExwC2ru0VsIkC9EPTaSn6p9UMcwUCBhLaW2lxBpRq%2BzOqjfTA88ZIDwRgpVRERs%2BGJyHk%2BLEpzqRbPJo%3D)
---
| |
---
Saludos, it’s Gabe.

I’ve been at work getting a lot of good things done for you — I just introduced a package of bills to address immigration, and I’ve relentlessly demanded that Greg Abbott remove his unconstitutional border wall between Texas and New Mexico — **but I wanted to take a minute to level with you about what else is going on right now.**

We just avoided yet _another_ government shutdown — and we’re approaching the holiday season, which is always a tough time for fundraising (for good reason!).

subject: We don’t need another Boebert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:

Chip in any amount that you can before midnight and help me build the strongest campaign possible that will defeat these extremists.**](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=b36782c21d764b15a645530648049287&_e=OmO5apV8aijjHJRb-o5ywrEScoHAnaXf5ryTlrCXsxbk3Fqxz6g0FoDzjc2BuIaXPQq8-M0Dg1gjxgZ2Gn_u6XQ8viX58ZU08UOBffFJ0Sqlhh2uKkghNA7DvOFcrjp9eWWvJ9Ibal4TMzs4wLCm1bYfkSFha0B4wE29Ag9e3go8Kipe6VoOKHmXhGEoG25uP1yyL5-tCj0hv0f0SHI6TxY9MerSHkRQoUOZtKd7xhYVRJuythOXzOS1A6ijGdRUXvDYKcA48ob4d6rMd0VZg3spVJ3FLc_5zAxTIa60_8R9iIKj32yPtNtoWfBfzvDq2E3fGxkYnJZ1fSk-uNv86WlU2wMfTU_Ng6rjtvy3DfK_lMhLbopA31iyasqKddgcnLdgHwuzFneEUuym_V7jn4zlTBI080BLVJyIoxnWWlg%3D) All the best, John Padora **My story is not unique.** I was born and raised in Pennsylvania in rural, blue-collar, and old coal mining communities. I'm running to build a movement and a government that works for working families. | | Fellow Patriot, As I talk to people throughout our Commonwealth, people keep asking me:
"April, why are you and Hung doing this? After twenty-five years in the Navy,
don't you two want to take a break?"
But every time, I have the same answer: **we 've been called to fight.**
When he was just 18, Hung knew that he had a duty to this country. That's
why he had the honor of being appointed to the Naval Academy. Over the years, his calling to service has only grown.
Right now, we know we don't need more politicians. We need leaders like Hung.
He puts duty and honor into everything he does and even though he's hung
up his uniform, he's still feels called to serve for the future of our children.
For my husband, sitting on the sidelines while the country he loves struggles, **isn 't an option.**
We see how the woke agenda affects our communities and country, and we
won't stand by and allow Democrats take away the freedoms Hung fought for.
**That 's why I'm reaching out to you today, Fellow Patriot. ** Hung and I are putting in long hours for this campaign, but we can't do it
alone.
We need your support as we embark on this journey, and we know you share
the same love and passion for America that we do. **[Will you put that passion into action and pitch in today to help send Hung to the U.S. Senate?](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f399391ca53d42a2b24359bd79d17d5e&_e=MAoH0LZCT45zVDLJGnMAL-AD6s2sT_Od2_pA8SXvQ_RAELysGQALt_TRNp9K4JHQKwZSPMhc7BO-F1gQ-8sfUuXK_ySPbCCLl8PlFmnz7Ex1DbV44OzVUQnlEBSFsmvVuAxK1Gfy35EyrcmyeKo1LEauUWYXOat84nJA4C4Qy3Sj4vRsvWIHNaKafWUvnD9mJNCP7kToc5-nBUMTT_LYA5xrQZn1_l7abpMGJIRjrlozuLG_IGTjVMO-tNR2Ar0WaRUvCNfaMqwNUDckrAKBynCojjWPJTmQP-jnJe-k7qtyUGHo4sX9cZ2WoMeelj-OXaLFtOWaIABeeiNtF8Kk2g%3D%3D)**

Peter,

I’m proud to endorse my friend, **Bernie Moreno** , to be the next U.S. Senator from Ohio and to help us take back the Republican majority in the Senate.

As a conservative, a political outsider, and a successful business leader, Bernie knows what it will take to disrupt the establishment in Washington, D.C.

**Bernie is a proven leader** and is the Republican who is best equipped to take on career politician Sherrod Brown, Joe Biden, and the radical Left to restore principled & effective leadership in America.

**As one of the top-target Senate races of 2024 and with the Senate majority riding on this race, Bernie needs our help to flip Ohio.**

[**Will you stand with me and America First champion Bernie Moreno by rushing your immediate support to his campaign?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3df92508a1bc4521ae2d45fd08cd90b6&_e=nK5_AJG16wRxN_BfdV0KiYsI3DNoK12d7_-gq-gf8YYsR9cUUl-DQtvmqwj5ODjOHP7K30-2i8bUMxPG7PLXfuXmm8bk_ZE5AQzbRzgS0jwl9HqjrfOclVNH-zDMxqihfll1oQdJ7dnVWI18Zg9ZyyF8kYyJfB3PMoiY7GlI3J5CYh3NA4dQD7IodljRXItARLs7uh2ZMoRvgHhAk6MW5EJE5qLmP8NbDcox5eBFFF90STz2Qw_OnIJJhrhn6LA-RC9ZkL2yeW5GxDrLfIOQZq_968aFlPdbHsm2TCG0Y_PfQlhJXreWfRIONHqiG5zUAiZKExpoCR0FhbG7UAAqqZB1zXoIWO8WRMk7QHry9WzHpYc9ksdSA9Tcq1mCgEGEn49lgdDBtiFwrdqL8zruow%3D%3D)

[** JOIN NEWT GINGRICH
SUPPORT BERNIE MORENO **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3df92508a1bc4521ae2d45fd08cd90b6&_e=nK5_AJG16wRxN_BfdV0KiYsI3DNoK12d7_-gq-gf8YYsR9cUUl-DQtvmqwj5ODjOHP7K30-2i8bUMxPG7PLXfuXmm8bk_ZE5AQzbRzgS0jwl9HqjrfOclVNH-zDMxqihfll1oQdJ7dnVWI18Zg9ZyyF8kYyJfB3PMoiY7GlI3J5CYh3NA4dQD7IodljRXItARLs7uh2ZMoRvgHhAk6MW5EJE5qLmP8NbDcox5eBFFF90STz2Qw_OnIJJhrhn6LA-apbrQTCD0IE7v-prPKNsPhsFcqEeQ0CYhUIg4kBkbxjzrR-nxTfSLhMpI-jr_Yrx_eoSH4rwWPrOPBV_0GCbPaY1w-Q6-JJbPgP52pl-jNKoqU6m1hnWMPb_VjVyqUANEHCc7mIZHkNu4FXVNCCAuA%3D%3D)
I’m not the only conservative leader to recognize that Bernie Moreno is the key to taking back the Senate and getting our country back on track.

**Pres. Trump** urged Bernie to jump into this race, and Senators **J.D. Vance** & **Marco Rubio** along with other conservative leaders like **Ambassador Ric Grenell** , **Kash Patel** , and **Kari Lake** have all thrown their support behind Bernie.

clean_body: As one of the top-target Senate races of 2024 and with the Senate majority riding on this race, Bernie needs our help to flip Ohio. | | Peter, I’m proud to endorse my friend, Bernie Moreno , to be the next U.S. Senator from Ohio and to help us take back the Republican majority in the Senate. As a conservative, a political outsider, and a successful business leader, Bernie knows what it will take to disrupt the establishment in Washington, D.C. Bernie is a proven leader and is the Republican who is best equipped to take on career politician Sherrod Brown, Joe Biden, and the radical Left to restore principled & effective leadership in America. As one of the top-target Senate races of 2024 and with the Senate majority riding on this race, Bernie needs our help to flip Ohio. I’m not the only conservative leader to recognize that Bernie Moreno is the key to taking back the Senate and getting our country back on track. Pres. Trump urged Bernie to jump into this race, and Senators J.D. Vance & Marco Rubio along with other conservative leaders like Ambassador Ric Grenell , Kash Patel , and Kari Lake have all thrown their support behind Bernie. I’m adding my voice to theirs in telling you that we need to give Bernie Moreno every bit of support we can to ensure victory in Ohio and for America. Lauren Boebert is everything that’s wrong with Congress. She’s an election denier that encouraged the attack on the Capitol. She wants to make all abortions illegal – even in cases of rape, incest, or the life of the mother. She’s part of the angertainment circus in Washington that’s tearing our country and our democracy apart.
It’s time that the people of Western and Southern Colorado had a representative in Washington working to get things done for them – not taking money from corporate PAC donors and pushing wild conspiracy theories.
My campaign is funded entirely by donors, like you, giving an average of just $22 online this month. A people-powered campaign is what will help us correct the Super PAC lies and finally defeat Lauren Boebert – but I’m counting on your support now if we’re going to be successful.
**We only lost by 546 votes in 2022. It was the closest race in the country, even though no one gave us a chance. We are so close to hitting our mid-November $350,000 fundraising goal, but time is running out before the deadline.**
[**I’m asking you personally: Will you make a donation right now to my campaign – whatever amount you can afford before midnight tonight – to help me hit our fundraising goal, defeat Lauren Boebert, and restore some sanity to Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73437437/438521508/1610638071?refcode=em20231115pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=6bd344c0-2184-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmQzNDRjMC0yMTg0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KIo0wUdDu3mLUCh8a32ZYaGJhSrZ1FgcMZ4-In_g-LI=)
This is our most important fundraising goal of the campaign so far. Let’s start this race strong and finally send Lauren Boebert packing.
I couldn’t do this without you. Thank you so much for joining me on this journey again.
With gratitude -
Adam

A people-powered campaign is what will help us correct the Super PAC lies and finally defeat Lauren Boebert – but I’m counting on your support now if we’re going to be successful. We only lost by 546 votes in 2022. It was the closest race in the country, even though no one gave us a chance. We are so close to hitting our mid-November $350,000 fundraising goal, but time is running out before the deadline. = This is our most important fundraising goal of the campaign so far. Let’s start this race strong and finally send Lauren Boebert packing. I couldn’t do this without you. Thank you so much for joining me on this journey again. With gratitude - Adam ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dan=20Cox?=
subject: Urgent: I need to reach them by name now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Cox for Congress, Inc
body:
Lessons from last Tuesday: I need to reach residents by name now. There is no time to waste. | | | |
---
|
---
| | |
# Lessons from last
Tuesday's Election.
Last Tuesday saw mixed results with some local seats flipping Republican for the first time in over 20 years, while high-profile ballot initiatives were passed.
---
| Dear friend,

I write to tell you the main reason Republicans and conservative pro-life Americans had mixed results last week - but it is probably something you already know. _**We are entirely underfunded because the national money flowing into Democrat and far-Left efforts is outpacing us in a massive way.**_

Governor Scott Walker of Wisconsin was one of the conservative national figures pointing this out and it had little to do with messaging or any need to be more "democratic" - like. We were outspent by MILLIONS.

Simply put, conservatives need better funding. Look at the chart below.

That is why I am urgently writing to ask for your best donation now to help our campaign to be your next Congressman. We each acknowledge and speak up about what is going on in our nation. Now, I'm asking for your help to fund and send those we trust to fight in the arena for us, and I pledge to continue that fight as your Congressman.

I'm already extremely busy fighting for us to win this seat. But I need your urgent help or it will be in vain.

I NEED TO RAISE $15,000 IMMEDIATELY TO REACH 20,000 SIXTH DISTRICT RESIDENTS TODAY. WE NEED TO REACH EACH PERSONALLY TODAY. I NEED TO REACH EACH VOTER BY NAME.

We in Maryland have built a foundation of excellence and strength in the Sixth District, and are positioned to win big in this presidential election year. But unless Republicans, Conservatives and Independents who care help us financially, we will face a massive funding gap against the far-left Democrats in a winnable seat.

Do you care about Maryland like I do? Do you also have family here and want to stand in the gap for our liberty? If the radical Left succeeds in total control in Maryland, they will never stop here. This land is our land. Please help me with your contribution today.

Any amount will do. Some of you can help us in a big way. Please do. Thank you.

For our freedom,

---
| [CONTRIBUTE $1776 NOW](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=113ec858c9&e=5bb5efcda7 "CONTRIBUTE $1776 NOW")

---
|
---
| |
---
### Former Congressman Roscoe Bartlett gave a rousing speech last night in Frederick to save our future generations from financial disaster
$33 Trillion in debt means over $100,000 for each of us and our children. This is unsustainable and we must stand up now for fiscal restraint.
---
|
---
|
---
| | China’s Communist President Xi arrived in SF, United States of America to communist party anthems, cheering throngs and silenced and removed peaceful protestors. Xi - a man who persecutes religious Chinese and all dissenters - tracks every person on their soil denying social credit to anyone the Party dislikes. He is at this moment fomenting conflict and possible war against us, Hong Kong, Taiwan and free States throughout Asia and elsewhere. If we don’t take heed, we will be economically and actually subservient to his Communist Party.
“A group of anti-communist party protestors had gathered earlier in the afternoon, but were soon after blockaded by San Francisco police and later dispersed from the area.”

name: Nikki Haley
subject: I want to share this with you
body:
Whether you’ve been with me from the start or this is the first time you’re hearing about me, I couldn’t be more grateful to have you on board. | |
---

Hi Fellow Conservative,

Whether you’ve been with me from the start or this is the first time you’re hearing about me, I couldn’t be more grateful to have you on board.

With election season kicking into high gear, I think it's important to take a few minutes to introduce myself and talk about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=00b9907c23954a6b8e557a2090990221&_e=G3V5vRRvCjIAq3S-vwLS6sfmBbCq6iF3YUqgk0y2Bhg8oENmKrpGW20tpjk4J-_8P0EUPFHF9V8efNlg5XW76Di6SQ2m0AwU9Mld1rfQBAzMkvdaqOx43oILayxRADZyLztj-034kF8LgWBtkycU5aRmdE-0ofyf8GHB_NxRVzmG72eN9qWQbSdM7wNtEghtcvChrLMNxCkAOeYZDl3WSUwf8_YgtCvM2J8toZmJxEmHbEmb20Gdg8XjGj-MWrasrMSdg8Onq3oQbtmkFO2TlTgswuofrejvo8oXCtGZs-jwh2eiQHkq_S3u53PjguXjtQQVnWvf7SW6qrH2hhKIUoQ2T9Hsgp6QzGxLQG2UGOg%3D "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
| | | | | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=00b9907c23954a6b8e557a2090990221&_e=G3V5vRRvCjIAq3S-vwLS6sfmBbCq6iF3YUqgk0y2Bhg8oENmKrpGW20tpjk4J-_8P0EUPFHF9V8efNlg5XW76Di6SQ2m0AwU9Mld1rfQBAzMkvdaqOx43oILayxRADZyLztj-034kF8LgWBtkycU5aRmdE-0ofyf8GHB_NxRVzmG72eN9qWQbSdM7wNtEghtcvChrLMNxCkAOeYZDl3WSWcO9sRKX8-4tG0Jkjoimp8LLase6Il-WCLoc4hOEl_sdxtWYxbX1-Xhrs7Nfsw0sqRLAPi6IODc52Rc1QWzjD9cXYBElng2pPC348WWCKGWGDU1ds2ZmsPfC9uYzQtiQHQIm0eUoDNHjNtv3GbMAGA%3D)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---

After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _

---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won.**
---
| | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=00b9907c23954a6b8e557a2090990221&_e=G3V5vRRvCjIAq3S-vwLS6sfmBbCq6iF3YUqgk0y2Bhg8oENmKrpGW20tpjk4J-_8P0EUPFHF9V8efNlg5XW76Di6SQ2m0AwU9Mld1rfQBAzMkvdaqOx43oILayxRADZyLztj-034kF8LgWBtkycU5aRmdE-0ofyf8GHB_NxRVzmG72eN9qWQbSdM7wNtEghtcvChrLMNxCkAOeYZDl3WSWsHlcWv5w3DjclipmuMA9Kk6SBnHsRGaSiHZH-G1xIOQMZo1k9EgMyNQ9IYsHQIVuyEnh1CvFLUx5qZeoC1aTLBZS-zmCcn5AVlQ2GLFt_vJSL9dmrW3jkoLdJMhLJlAozzQy9IhqmTjz5Uwkg5OPU%3D)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---
| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=00b9907c23954a6b8e557a2090990221&_e=G3V5vRRvCjIAq3S-vwLS6sfmBbCq6iF3YUqgk0y2Bhg8oENmKrpGW20tpjk4J-_8P0EUPFHF9V8efNlg5XW76Di6SQ2m0AwU9Mld1rfQBAzMkvdaqOx43oILayxRADZyLztj-034kF8LgWBtkycU5aRmdE-0ofyf8GHB_NxRVzmG72eN9qWQbSdM7wNtEghtcvChrLMNxCkAOeYZDl3WSeP9ETTD2shz99W8eQ9iWWAaI-lQu9jKHlUJtT87DIxPMjg-C3t5saXDpeVEM1MlKWf0zS8JJ7E5SubQMKX6Fu-HYluNSukO-nyz8KXjrKLx2MNGol5kWm3PslLt35h4pl0k-P4EpGaZ3TnSZIbU-78%3D)

I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, " I need your help â€“ starting right now. " Your support is what keeps our movement thriving, so thank you for standing with me. My very best, | Nikki Haley | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **Look around, Peter. Right now, in America...**
_Children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves._

_The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God._

_Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes._

_Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth._

_Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives._

**As Speaker of the House, my mission is clear: we must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. **

As we aim to make history in the 2024 Election, I need to have my hand on the pulse of the most important thing: _**American voters.**_

[**Which is why I am conducting a _critical_ American Voter Survey today.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9ef00f34525f403593f9ecc2be6793a5&_e=QLRnZW6H0mE2ZdK4GPBpkS_SApHiqmWqvzam2EgArgbP83yNydUYHi0iI7yTQnWy59OXZ6VqXpIVej8-eYDkiyPFb0v1TWP4FhcdPp-3LTo0wmRbju3LQqiSEpAUeMPc87JI0Jn9BKbLKo-JTDeHr-bxdqy2enFxVW-0RfO2tlYLfLBSksU_-DAlU1BpohGRM-NrGfZTe-p0nQwG8GSXCU0LEjU9-9N8B83roHY5ja9UbupuK9xK9HDIj3-x6kdG2EiVfiqzvSrSqJEOI33VsuW7RkT-pxXVlDng84JAK0FMpsSN_OtAVSzHabhqRJEqiRzLLsT_aNbmMeX63OWOakmpxLUJYrJJ9W7HpLLpLaGVH__A9Mot80VXtyVp-TZx3LPg4oC3seazYwNb8MrBYeXWuaiIADEcNxY7qU-Twd4%3D)

**_-RESPOND TO SPEAKER JOHNSON-_** [** LAUNCH AMERICAN VOTER SURVEY > **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9ef00f34525f403593f9ecc2be6793a5&_e=QLRnZW6H0mE2ZdK4GPBpkS_SApHiqmWqvzam2EgArgbP83yNydUYHi0iI7yTQnWy59OXZ6VqXpIVej8-eYDkiyPFb0v1TWP4FhcdPp-3LTo0wmRbju3LQqiSEpAUeMPc87JI0Jn9BKbLKo-JTDeHr-bxdqy2enFxVW-0RfO2tlYLfLBSksU_-DAlU1BpohGRM-NrGfZTe-p0nQwG8GSXCU0LEjU9-9N8B83roHY5ja9UbupuK9xK9HDIj3-x6kdGrZ1d6F8-jc5kjeZMbT0UbTAinN5vkmjvtdkxXceWL9evZSRxoOEWKISHqsRRui_77yDREvQgxZrtlhJv_qn_rvz7-jqiFKL7Tei_qn6JUUkBfB-vHCqpt94oZfRvQFN_oFxj7qVWBGXdvyFfcNr8uxvfLsMu73mSYjY3Rbej3NI%3D)
If you care about the future of this country... _if you care about what happens in next November's election,_ [**please take 5 minutes out of your day to respond.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9ef00f34525f403593f9ecc2be6793a5&_e=QLRnZW6H0mE2ZdK4GPBpkS_SApHiqmWqvzam2EgArgbP83yNydUYHi0iI7yTQnWy59OXZ6VqXpIVej8-eYDkiyPFb0v1TWP4FhcdPp-3LTo0wmRbju3LQqiSEpAUeMPc87JI0Jn9BKbLKo-JTDeHr-bxdqy2enFxVW-0RfO2tlYLfLBSksU_-DAlU1BpohGRM-NrGfZTe-p0nQwG8GSXCU0LEjU9-9N8B83roHY5ja9UbupuK9xK9HDIj3-x6kdGuuhLj8ZISodRWYyG9HXUn07q5LEtGYjxWtNQSjwmTOGh2D-uvnS8lAumWfH_nbjs7d7MZQ-8ZYv8iyI-ZPtIO_PWRAjETb59yXTIgHNchQKoCrk2YRBJwnMpK5xyd9wWIeQbCS72CZGa4L_wFw-ta5ct4FskxYG_mJO1EW-MtW8%3D)

As Speaker of the House, there are many pressing issues that come across my desk each day, [**so I want to ensure I am dedicating my time and energy to the issues you care about most.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9ef00f34525f403593f9ecc2be6793a5&_e=QLRnZW6H0mE2ZdK4GPBpkS_SApHiqmWqvzam2EgArgbP83yNydUYHi0iI7yTQnWy59OXZ6VqXpIVej8-eYDkiyPFb0v1TWP4FhcdPp-3LTo0wmRbju3LQqiSEpAUeMPc87JI0Jn9BKbLKo-JTDeHr-bxdqy2enFxVW-0RfO2tlYLfLBSksU_-DAlU1BpohGRM-NrGfZTe-p0nQwG8GSXCU0LEjU9-9N8B83roHY5ja9UbupuK9xK9HDIj3-x6kdGB8TKBXhZp6sPMbBemMKmDYBC4fmvE24tT8v4IMhA8zNq02Ib5rQJFM8KoT4Qs9RNvMAvaRnuDktlSe5BkWsXq21JiXe8_XTC8QvfhNVccf5WdVeMTsSK_wwlIknNEKNM3Yox5ZODE-UX_cAGP26HSM_grbSL7nkRig-HmDyPtDk%3D)

My team has identified you as a reliable voice in Republican politics, which is why I am asking for your important input.

If I am going to successfully help elect strong conservative leaders to Congress in 2024, _**I need to hear from you in the next hour.**_

**_-RESPOND TO SPEAKER JOHNSON-_** [** LAUNCH AMERICAN VOTER SURVEY > **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9ef00f34525f403593f9ecc2be6793a5&_e=QLRnZW6H0mE2ZdK4GPBpkS_SApHiqmWqvzam2EgArgbP83yNydUYHi0iI7yTQnWy59OXZ6VqXpIVej8-eYDkiyPFb0v1TWP4FhcdPp-3LTo0wmRbju3LQqiSEpAUeMPc87JI0Jn9BKbLKo-JTDeHr-bxdqy2enFxVW-0RfO2tlYLfLBSksU_-DAlU1BpohGRM-NrGfZTe-p0nQwG8GSXCU0LEjU9-9N8B83roHY5ja9UbupuK9xK9HDIj3-x6kdG4OJ3QusOjEWBJkAmDW0ZfyYgZ2rXdWeRzOUvWJ_hca8x25EK3ZURell4JsgdPQvdGx1J9LX2DONrLOtShQRmyJV2QHS5BE_LnVZqt_mysD_1v82axDn7RNKHj-oET-EViPoODwuRnhFXTJvg_cjD_gB3u_tN-MRmf4k_eSPK0C8%3D)
Thank you for being a reliable member of Team Johnson.

Gratefully,

[ ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9ef00f34525f403593f9ecc2be6793a5&_e=QLRnZW6H0mE2ZdK4GPBpkS_SApHiqmWqvzam2EgArgbP83yNydUYHi0iI7yTQnWy59OXZ6VqXpIVej8-eYDkiyPFb0v1TWP4FhcdPp-3LTo0wmRbju3LQqiSEpAUeMPc87JI0Jn9BKbLKo-JTDeHr-bxdqy2enFxVW-0RfO2tlYLfLBSksU_-DAlU1BpohGRM-NrGfZTe-p0nQwG8GSXCU0LEjU9-9N8B83roHY5ja9UbupuK9xK9HDIj3-x6kdGGE9OTilhuNLUM4iGeOBJKE67hTXPXOF8B7eE985rZ3BMJ2lu1dM0Uli4kiAUirQa_d3tyPCRFefUBE2ll4Zw-pe8SoHZV0v0iWSkPXJsfDEBrwOezRaEmRwVzW1erPmuNa4YsVJaW7r1BgHiWMkgMRc6fBmAqZsBLjxcjG-t6u4%3D)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

* * *

[ ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9ef00f34525f403593f9ecc2be6793a5&_e=QLRnZW6H0mE2ZdK4GPBpkVpowX23E7C0LTSJ3zkDrqlXptpDr0ivdkFjwUQGGWdtOpEHS1po8yHSlqSGMUx2OsKfSnceKfCWzVLIEpqXJa84AXPzJ9cx_8oSeDWrdMEoru8YNs0nloAMWCaEZRat88o_TvdZdPbXo8UfLNfrTBnwAZCaR-XELKhwgXWtsvM4q7GiNXR4fZYsW7ur2tn2EcPu67NnBuarGyw8D-NF3Me2hrsKp7SUPXl5AN7w6aXTNcZ3vDyllfiLhHUuqTfE05C1Bln76mwvuwFYi278WETckIkE03aQ2s_ToPP0bb5yNY6yWzleS-hKrdrK9Y1JP0C9V_Qeg59Ur8rac4YxPv_Sib4Vs5hDdMjvMOHVmUMiRbhA479KeWvweFl_onydi4Fd9bnQtvFMo6rQYTcBrf2DPz7VSjm0Lq0x27iy97DynUjsNxdvMlwEW3SRe80IUjvJm3Ssg2ZLFKYbKuA_qQbN0YHtmwIBsQ30UJUNl52TYtU35r-b1LAt153ioN-Tn3P4Vv-Sr_BVB6i3b1JfOGQZJtcDZ_85WvRM7L7u1FaSbkuxVRBj8Z4SvuNysHrRRg%3D%3D)
As Speaker, I want to hear from you on the top issues of the day. It's important for us to deliver results for the American people.

Would you take a moment to complete my [**_Official Speaker Survey_**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9ef00f34525f403593f9ecc2be6793a5&_e=QLRnZW6H0mE2ZdK4GPBpkVpowX23E7C0LTSJ3zkDrqlXptpDr0ivdkFjwUQGGWdtOpEHS1po8yHSlqSGMUx2OsKfSnceKfCWzVLIEpqXJa84AXPzJ9cx_8oSeDWrdMEoru8YNs0nloAMWCaEZRat88o_TvdZdPbXo8UfLNfrTBnwAZCaR-XELKhwgXWtsvM4q7GiNXR4fZYsW7ur2tn2EcPu67NnBuarGyw8D-NF3Me2hrsKp7SUPXl5AN7w6aXTNcZ3vDyllfiLhHUuqTfE05C1Bln76mwvuwFYi278WETckIkE03aQ2s_ToPP0bb5yNY6yWzleS-hKrdrK9Y1JP0C9V_Qeg59Ur8rac4YxPv_Sib4Vs5hDdMjvMOHVmUMiRbhA479KeWvweFl_onydi4Fd9bnQtvFMo6rQYTcBrf2DPz7VSjm0Lq0x27iy97Dy0WtNE4malsI6PBZSd60WyL33FwogXgMD3yFfY2HoJ58i0AXLSl9WV2DpHcw8doFheR_EFI-CSpY2L7YaJeM8He8QMuhimwtOOU4NHYjuOlrP_CQC21QBe4gM4Y_suwdzSCTOR3USyUtTYbDUkksD5Q%3D%3D) today?

Your input is important to making sure we move America forward. I appreciate you taking the time to send me your input.

Peter,

**2018: Republicans Lost

2020: Republicans Lost

2022: Republicans Lost**
Now, in 2023 we’re seeing more of the same with a fundamental lack of party leadership. We _**absolutely cannot**_ repeat the same mistakes next year. I am sick and tired of this Republican Establishment that has made us a party of losers.

A week ago on the GOP Debate stage, I called on Ronna Romney McDaniel to resign. Now, I'm asking grassroots conservatives across the nation to join me so she can feel the power of the people. It’s time to stop the culture of surrender and losing. [**Do you agree, Peter?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=302c8abc5586443592e35416f23a6da5&_e=rbpE2R4p3_-fqlY3U2bQGyKpVpCd9gAUt_bdC_1vJ0njs2Rc2YBJccshCHoE-e5WapUaabbU3BPcC0Rh2UFGKTGFeQPfvHAWckTTcLWtkaYojH_D_Gznple5-OzXlohhz9Cx_rrPmfcmLXrlIBpwYJgKzrSwjwgWy9yUKDx4LWJpYbFvTbhZ9dF0ENR2FlYqPzoFDpjCrb7so3-yi26ZK_IQksug6-P0iGPJg6PF-tIXWZ9j_Q6-Qg_IQ9DQYmprN5VqMc8sS_dzrj4bE9qmh9LThWNqGxQaFb-w2xXr56PIoZ8V7ap5DifjaDisF3wpiuW4QG9RlrPtrawPPrPDsw-m2Lpn1_tZtTKy3OtVsm-9Kyu9XtDgUGMNazfd8x51B_5gJ9hriuo_ZB9-aiXrAs5q5-ZRtMXcBxLzySpo7xhXT9rZ2jRC9B53YMWtFdf1RP4eTAgdP3lzIWAy2DzkAmY1_5SklLYXTeuOHD0fwL7amCJrBdz7jYfWY17j4Pm8Oz9mFQ2xhc44UOHzu4z1cA%3D%3D)

Grassroots conservatives like yourself should be appreciated by the GOP Establishment, not consistently beaten down and then approached hat in hand come election season. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=302c8abc5586443592e35416f23a6da5&_e=rbpE2R4p3_-fqlY3U2bQGyKpVpCd9gAUt_bdC_1vJ0njs2Rc2YBJccshCHoE-e5WapUaabbU3BPcC0Rh2UFGKTGFeQPfvHAWckTTcLWtkaYojH_D_Gznple5-OzXlohhz9Cx_rrPmfcmLXrlIBpwYJgKzrSwjwgWy9yUKDx4LWJpYbFvTbhZ9dF0ENR2FlYqPzoFDpjCrb7so3-yi26ZK_IQksug6-P0iGPJg6PF-tIXWZ9j_Q6-Qg_IQ9DQYmprN5VqMc8sS_dzrj4bE9qmh9LThWNqGxQaFb-w2xXr56PIoZ8V7ap5DifjaDisF3wpiuW4QG9RlrPtrawPPrPDsw-m2Lpn1_tZtTKy3OtVsm-9Kyu9XtDgUGMNazfd8x51A-GVSMdPygkSdqPTU-TwzTQJ2UfGZwXR64hCKpwbegHxg3M2e4sKyVHjMH2Cl1d3PHYX2JPALNT_PKbbbNwAX42SkEj7LtfFgO-_1PFwvK-hG3T0f9bmkQBIVO9FEptmhnlftMiKHcKYa8tyChgvcg%3D%3D)

subject: re: our urgent $15,000 goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
How we build this movement in 2023 will have a major impact on the results we see on November 5, 2024.
#
Peter — is there anything we can say to encourage you to add your first donation of any amount toward our goal of raising $15,000 before midnight?
**[ELECT LUCAS KUNCE: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39285?refcode=em20231115-4195&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4195%2E614464%2E_ax80T)**
What if we told you that Josh Hawley is the GOP’s most vulnerable U.S. Senator running for re-election in 2024 — with approvals even lower than Ted Cruz and Rick Scott — and that national Republicans and corporate mega-donors are already spending MILLIONS to prop up his floundering campaign?
Or what if we said Missouri is our best chance to flip a GOP-held U.S. Senate seat this cycle — and that investing early in our campaign could very well tip the scales in what multiple polls already show is a neck-and-neck race between Josh Hawley and Lucas Kunce?
Or what if we told you chipping in right now meant we’d have one more vote in the Senate to protect abortion access, preserve voting rights, stop Big Oil subsidies, empower workers, and finally rebuild our communities by making real investments into the American people?
**How we build this movement in 2023 will have a major impact on the results we see on November 5, 2024 — so supporting Lucas and our race here in Missouri _right now_ could be your chance to make a real difference.**
**[So Peter, can you add your first donation of absolutely any amount toward our $15,000 goal before midnight tonight? Lucas isn’t taking a cent from corporate PACs in this race, so your support really does power our grassroots campaign.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39285?refcode=em20231115-4195&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4195%2E614464%2E_ax80T)**

Team Lucas Kunce

name: is this right? [FFR]
subject: you need to see this…
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
When we emailed you earlier today, we thought Democrats would rush to help end Citizens United
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=20414%2E4449941%2EiMz43H)
