name: Congressman Paul Broun
subject: Sign the petition to ban transgender child mutilation
body:
Ban Child Mutilation Nationwide

Dear Concerned American,

Should so-called doctors be allowed to
sexually mutilate or chemically sterilize children - even
children as young as 8 years for girls and 10 years for boys?

Should publicly-funded schools be permitted
to promote this radical trans-sexual abuse, often behind the
backs of parents?

I hope you say ABSOLUTELY NOT!

Yet it is happening every day in America. In
fact, an insider report from a horrified worker at a Missouri
Children's Hospital revealed that the number of children sent for
"gender transition" has increased by more than 400% in the last
five years.

That's why I'm emailing you today asking you
to sign your petition to your U.S. Representative and Senators
demanding they take immediate action to ban the transgender child
sexual mutilation and chemical castration procedures.

I am former U.S. Congressman Paul Broun, and
I'm more determined than ever to stop the worldwide tide of
Leftism I see targeting our children and grandchildren.

CitizenGO represents millions of members and
supporters fighting back against the radical anti-family LGBT
ideology that has swept through our schools, media, and
entertainment, mercilessly attacking the relationships between
children and their parents and destroying family morality and
faith.

Will you join with millions of pro-family
Citizens to defend our children from transgender child sexual
mutilation?

Click here to sign the petition to Congress
demanding they ban all gender transition procedures for minors
immediately!

Puberty blockers, hormone supplements, and
drastic sexual organ surgery are all procedures with horrific
side effects that children cannot fully grasp. And in a sea of
lies and misinformation, few adults understand the true horror.

Make no mistake, the transgender lobby wants
them confused and isolated from any dissenting voices.

*** I've seen an entire generation of youth
come out of their schools confused and assaulted by the
transgender ideology attacking gender and their sense of self,
persuading them to seek poisonous and severely harmful procedures
to change their bodies to "fit in" with the transgender world.

*** I've seen families torn to pieces as the
newest generation of children, who are fed radical transgender
values with their cereal, clash with bewildered parents over a
child's so-called" gender identity."

*** In a growing number of States, children
are encouraged to hide their planned mutilations or chemical
castrations from their parents by teachers and counselors.

*** Meanwhile, the transgender lobby rabidly
shuts down or "cancels" any dissenting voices or studies on the
harmful effects of child sexual mutilation.

*** They even more rabidly suppress any study
of the massive number of children who abandon gender transition
after the fact...

... and are left with bitter regrets, twisted
bodies and awful consequences.
The best way to put a stop to it all is by
passing a flat-out Federal ban on administering these procedures
to minors.

Our children, the most vulnerable members of
our society, are being conned into irreversible procedures that
alter their bodies and lives forever.

This is not a matter of choice or identity -
it's a matter of safety and common sense. Minors are not equipped
with the life experience or emotional maturity to make such
grave, scarring, and often irreversible decisions about their
bodies and their futures.

Sign your petition today demanding Congress
step in and protect our children from transgender mutilation.

14 states have already passed bans on
transgender child sexual mutilation, though 2 are being
challenged in court.

But states like California and New York will
not follow suit willingly, and the transgender lobby is howling
for blood at the restrictions being placed on them.

That's why, once you've signed, I ask you to
chip in with a modest contribution to help CitizenGO bring other
Americans into the fight against child sexual mutilation. Even a
gift of $10 or $25 will be a big boost.

The success of this campaign relies on the
power of Citizens standing together to make our voices heard, and
every extra dollar counts when we're fighting to counter the
transgender lobby's pervasive ideology.

So please, sign your petition, share, and
chip in with a quick $10 or $25 contribution to help CitizenGO
recruit more signers and win the fight.

In addition to recruiting more petition
signers to increase the impact of our campaign, your contribution
will help fund:

Hard-hitting advertisements to highlight
and draw attention to the horrible practices of transgender
centers.
Targeted petition deliveries to key
elected officials demanding they take action to defend children.
Phone calls to likely supporters to raise
awareness and recruit new members.
Radio and TV ads exposing everything the
transgender ideology is inflicting on our children, should funds
permit.

So once you have signed, I ask that you
make a contribution of $10 or $25 to CitizenGO, or perhaps an
even more generous gift of $50 or $100, to help expand their
recruitment and to fund all of these plans in CitizenGO's fight
to stop child sexual mutilation.

So please sign your petition, share, and chip
in with a generous contribution of $10 or $25, or perhaps an even
more generous gift of $50 or $100 today.

Thank you for standing with us in this
crucial fight for our children's future.

Sincerely,

Paul C. Broun (MD)
U.S. Congressman Georgia 10 Ret.

P.S. I'm more determined than ever to stop
the worldwide tide of Leftism I see targeting our children and
grandchildren.

CitizenGO represents millions of members and
supporters fighting back against the radical anti-family LGBT
ideology, and I want every pro-sanity American to band together
to put a stop to child sexual mutilation and chemical castration.

The best way to do that is with a Federal ban
on performing Transgender procedures on minors, and CitizenGO is
launching a campaign to do just that. But it will take people
power to succeed.

That's why I'm counting on you to sign your
petition, and then go on to add a modest $10 or $25
contribution, or perhaps an even more generous gift of $50 or
$100, to help CitizenGO fight to ban child sexual mutilation.

In addition to signing your petition and
donating, I need you to share it with your friends and family who
share our values so they can have the opportunity to sign as
well. CitizenGO's petition page makes it super easy to share in a
way you prefer.

CitizenGO is a community of
active citizens that works to ensure that human life, the family
and our freedoms are respected worldwide. CitizenGO members live
in every nation of the world. Our team is spread across 16
countries on 5 continents and operates in 12 languages. Learn
about CitizenGO here or follow us on Facebook or Twitter.

Not produced or emailed at
taxpayer expense.

Sign your petition today demanding Congress step in and protect our children from transgender mutilation. 14 states have already passed bans on transgender child sexual mutilation, though 2 are being challenged in court. But states like California and New York will not follow suit willingly, and the transgender lobby is howling for blood at the restrictions being placed on them. That's why, once you've signed, I ask you to chip in with a modest contribution to help CitizenGO bring other Americans into the fight against child sexual mutilation. Even a gift of $10 or $25 will be a big boost. The success of this campaign relies on the power of Citizens standing together to make our voices heard, and every extra dollar counts when we're fighting to counter the transgender lobby's pervasive ideology. So please, sign your petition, share, and chip in with a quick $10 or $25 contribution to help CitizenGO recruit more signers and win the fight. In addition to recruiting more petition signers to increase the impact of our campaign, your contribution will help fund: Hard-hitting advertisements to highlight and draw attention to the horrible practices of transgender centers. Targeted petition deliveries to key elected officials demanding they take action to defend children. Phone calls to likely supporters to raise awareness and recruit new members. Radio and TV ads exposing everything the transgender ideology is inflicting on our children, should funds permit. So once you have signed, I ask that you make a contribution of $10 or $25 to CitizenGO, or perhaps an even more generous gift of $50 or $100, to help expand their recruitment and to fund all of these plans in CitizenGO's fight to stop child sexual mutilation. So please sign your petition, share, and chip in with a generous contribution of $10 or $25, or perhaps an even more generous gift of $50 or $100 today. Thank you for standing with us in this crucial fight for our children's future. Sincerely, Paul C. Broun (MD) U.S. Congressman Georgia 10 Ret. P.S. I'm more determined than ever to stop the worldwide tide of Leftism I see targeting our children and grandchildren. CitizenGO represents millions of members and supporters fighting back against the radical anti-family LGBT ideology, and I want every pro-sanity American to band together to put a stop to child sexual mutilation and chemical castration. The best way to do that is with a Federal ban on performing Transgender procedures on minors, and CitizenGO is launching a campaign to do just that. But it will take people power to succeed. That's why I'm counting on you to sign your petition, and then go on to add a modest $10 or $25 contribution, or perhaps an even more generous gift of $50 or $100, to help CitizenGO fight to ban child sexual mutilation. In addition to signing your petition and donating, I need you to share it with your friends and family who share our values so they can have the opportunity to sign as well. CitizenGO's petition page makes it super easy to share in a way you prefer. CitizenGO is a community of active citizens that works to ensure that human life, the family and our freedoms are respected worldwide. CitizenGO members live in every nation of the world. Our team is spread across 16 countries on 5 continents and operates in 12 languages. Learn about CitizenGO here or follow us on Facebook or Twitter. Not produced or emailed at taxpayer expense. name: Elise Stefanik
subject: This is how we end the Trump witch hunt in NY
body:
Co-sign my ethics complaint to remove crooked Judge Engoron from Trump's case >>

| Friend, It has been clear from the beginning that the case against President Trump by corrupt AG Letitia James in NY should never have been brought and is nothing more than a chance for opportunistic Leftists like herself to tarnish Joe Biden's top political opponent. The truth is Democrats are TERRIFIED of the consistent polling that shows President Trump is in prime position to win back the presidency next year. This strategy of lawfare against conservatives is just a desperate attempt by the Left to hold onto power. **Any impartial Judge could see right through these schemes for what are, a political witch hunt.** **But Radical Leftist Judge Arthur Engoron is not interested in upholding justice in this case!** _He entered summary judgment against Trump before the trial even began. Judge Engororn was not interested in hearing witness testimony, cross-examinations, or any other evidence. It did not matter what Trump or his lawyers had to say. This judge had already made up his mind because he said in his own words that Trump is a "bad guy" that law enforcement "should go after."_ Well, I have had enough. We live in America, the freest country in the history of the world, not a communist dictatorship. I will not stand by and let partisan judges persecute their political opponents. [**That is why I filed an official ethics complaint to remove Judge Arthur Engoron from New York v. Trump, et al.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9a1c9b4f264549308aabaab18fa2ede2&_e=PEG3v19llbooXXZiP5HvO_ZLZzniEHw4sl3TCY4bBQhxUDMH0LjGduwFalJbMIEkPd6vVS6rsawgdvA2cTvyduJNyZGTdry2r7t6XbHPDKYv8aqcuKRBXLJGsOSmQKsCWc1I5dWi29Zke-J75fZ5Xu17PFluP2fvr_EXagMtfERT-IYz-EueYGZdqDZYim3RkwfAwppBmiP0F7Xnt3TSvxzOrRFlbDbixh87cST0htv3cq30SchtI1PlnPyN2jPNGzlUt87VXbXSXQi4RtKDx5-dRXeOB5XDJASYxYMqVMpzS6_9MMluKdv8IoSipN2Wx3O-2LnQ_HxhZWEu6k2RUA%3D%3D)

Our mission to Save America includes preventing partisan judges from doing the bidding of the Radical Left, and I am calling on America First patriots to stand with me at this critical moment.

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Reject U.S. support for greedy polluters
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2123235?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Stop the U.S. from financing a fossil fuel disaster in Guyana! >>** [**Take action now!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2123236?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) The U.S. Export-Import Bank is considering funds for a natural gas plant and offshore pipeline that **undermines climate goals** and **threatens pollution** for the Guyanese people. Would you want a foreign country financing a toxic plant near your home? Installing solar panels on people’s roofs would meet the energy needs of Guyanese communities. It would cost less to build, reduce bills for ratepayers, generate local jobs, and fight the climate crisis. Seems like a no-brainer, right Friend? Instead, the **U.S. might fund the project that will make greedy companies ExxonMobil even richer!** **[Please, Friend, tell the U.S. Export Import Bank to REJECT the fossil fuel project in Guyana before it’s too late!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2123237?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2123238?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
This gas project will have _**global consequences.**_ Every day we see the impacts of the climate crisis: rising sea levels, crops dying, new diseases spreading, unprecedented storms, floods, and fires. Pumping out even more gas emissions is a _**DEATH SENTENCE**_ for many places around the world -- and in some cases the people who live in the vicinity.
According to UN researchers, we need to **immediately end all liquefied natural gas investments** to avoid catastrophic global warming. The U.S. previously pledged not to support new projects like this -- but **now it’s poised to violate its own commitment.** **That’s why we need YOUR help right now!** **[Will you help STOP this climate bomb project in Guyana and protect people and the planet?](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2123239?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2123238?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

clean_body: | | | | | == ---|---|--- | | URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Stop the U.S. from financing a fossil fuel disaster in Guyana! >> == The U.S. Export-Import Bank is considering funds for a natural gas plant and offshore pipeline that undermines climate goals and threatens pollution for the Guyanese people. Would you want a foreign country financing a toxic plant near your home? Installing solar panels on people’s roofs would meet the energy needs of Guyanese communities. It would cost less to build, reduce bills for ratepayers, generate local jobs, and fight the climate crisis. Seems like a no-brainer, right Friend? Instead, the U.S. might fund the project that will make greedy companies ExxonMobil even richer! == | == This gas project will have global consequences. Every day we see the impacts of the climate crisis: rising sea levels, crops dying, new diseases spreading, unprecedented storms, floods, and fires. Pumping out even more gas emissions is a DEATH SENTENCE for many places around the world -- and in some cases the people who live in the vicinity. According to UN researchers, we need to immediately end all liquefied natural gas investments to avoid catastrophic global warming. The U.S. previously pledged not to support new projects like this -- but now it’s poised to violate its own commitment. That’s why we need YOUR help right now! == == Standing with you, Kate DeAngelis Senior International Finance Program Manager, Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 foe.org/about-us/contact/

## Israel Shows Weapons Captured at Hospital
Israeli troops have taken control of the Al Shifa hospital in Gaza, where they say that Hamas had an underground command center. They've [released pictures](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L3ymzAQBPCnEZ0Y6cSXCxVp6Jw2JXNwh7mMQIwkm_HbZ0j9b3eb3-6f5_RECXK8fuPOvqxxwqXIhydrte00uKmpyK_MwK5ib3tjrHt0fV9tfiEDAJZa4oEZexrc_JhpMHPvcDFzJR4MOGttZ03btFAbYwcHjizbbngYoxrDJCWm-m-Uo2y8hm_8cKqXuFfBb6WcWblfCkYF43VddeJ34ZTv_k5iCqRg3IUosGbMRcEoOSEH0bsEKZi-OuM364vxjEfWa3wfpDHovMmKeov5lIJB31J9j24VjFXydF4SguSuV4157SjhP6r8_NG_AAAA__9hNGiA) showing weapons and other military supplies captured there. There are reportedly still hundreds of patients and staff members in the hospital. Israeli troops have been searching the building and staff to uncover Hamas militants and military gear in what Israel described as a "[precise and targeted](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7Fu7CAQAL8Gd1i7i8FHQfEad_falBZn1mcibE4YmeTvo0udcjTFaD7u893HFI_nf7-zq2ue_VLjxTOiRCNJzUMX3MpMrDp2OAKgsmYcu81pZR_BEqllBEvKah2WGy3sYbAWzNpFR0AKEQ2CHjT1AHhTpAIympsFEANwiDWX_jPHo268pu98cemXvHfJbbW-TqH-CZoETa21fs1fB7fz7QVNKV4s3yxoOvLF-4OLRC3jWTwnufndn7L50hUXXi2mFE8zigGeu4_pt1H_Xv4JAAD__6wOVss)" operation. Israeli officials have acknowledged they have a limited time to accomplish their military goals in the face of public opinion. [A majority of Americans](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAQQL8GNiK4w9geGLp4S9eOlmOO-CpiLCCu8vdVOnd-enrS-7rO14UT7_fP5UG-xTwva-OTZmOUcQpwtjL4SASEkrzptTY4ur6Xm3fW4eDQDf16GzuAMdjlhi52vcNI0Ur2oAGNMc7oznZw0doMCBgMGTeMWgurKXDL5fKdeW8bxfTKJ5XLmh8y-a21owr8EDAJmNpGG6f0ZgKmIydeXwKmQJH2SgImi0Y77NSzqvo8jlyairkormWhpLiqQGvinfe7qs9y0tuWxYfjh1Pi6nph9f2x8F9Ctv9v_AYAAP__E7lfiQ) now back a cease-fire for the first time.
## Thanksgiving Prices Drop From Last Year
Thanksgiving dinner will cost 4.5% less to prepare this year, thanks mainly to [lower turkey costs](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uhDAQhJ_GdEbetfm5wkUaukubEhmz4M0ZczLOoXv7iNRpppiR5pO-r_t4dxw5rZ9uI1uWfXS-8ItGAAmtRD2aarYLEZKuyEKnFOhb23VVsC3ejDFq6jqzgJl67XrtjHfUYDNRYyq2qFADQAuqMQ3WSkGvUc9A0PY3pYRRNHPZc_29cyqBlvjeX5Rrv29VtKGU5yH0h8BB4HCeZ-3T5K9R4HBdCxwArmgEDiW49DhWfnFa5cwpUZblJz_oLfmQPpB7Xk3gQ77J5TqULVbZzs-TY-Sj7YRR6-Y4_tHL_zJ-AwAA__9QE16a), but it's still much more expensive than before the pandemic. The supply of turkeys is up over last year, so the price is down as much as 6%. Cranberries cost 18% less, and whipped cream costs 23% less. The Farm Bureau has a breakdown of [Thanksgiving food prices](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1uwyAUxfGnwRsWF4w_BoYu3tK1o0Xii7kNhghI3Lx95c7dj3R--n9dloulQHH7tDua6tJib5VeuABw6LlUS9esxiFKVA0aGIQANfXD0HgzWtSo3TQKNU3X3kqtLWhlOxxGUMI1ZKSQCgB6ELrTshUCRiXVCgj9OAnBOoEr1ZTb70SxenThnV6Y21vam2B8rY_C1AeTM5PzcRytSz_XZ6GIpZwbJudADkt9B2Ryrt7Ge9noRXHjK8WImZ8C7jFj4T4dfH_ePH-nZwjcpXzn51uTzfo4KAQq_cA6se2Wwh-h_l_kNwAA__-WUmMD) year over year. Still, compared with pre-pandemic times, the cost of a Thanksgiving feast is about 25% higher this year, a sign of the impact of high inflation since 2020.
## NBA Match Erupts in Wild Melee
An NBA game between the Minnesota Timberwolves and the Golden State Warriors was disrupted in the first two minutes after a fight broke out [(see it here)](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOhCAUAL8GOww8XFgLimvo9torDStPfRsEA0Szf3_Zq6-eZDKZn8f08BQprd9-R9uWPPm50YmTlFxqDmoaumAXREDVoZVGCKlGbUy32UUv4eaVEgKCnr0JwYTnOIzCIJhZh44sCFBSSi3FbbhBL4S8K1BBotT3UQg2CAzUculfmVLbcInvfGLp57x30W6tHZWpLwaOgbuuq8d6pA9k4NLTM3C15fJm4CYGjgIDpz5eDXcGrm15P2pOfC2Iie9z8IkwVo4vnBsGfuV4YuWXL4VyqXyhdWtdseG4KEaq2rBBrLun-BfU_v_zGwAA__-aVGZ1) that ended with one player choking another on the court. The incident resulted in three players being ejected and began before a single basket had been scored. The Warriors' Klay Thompson got in a scuffle with Minnesota's Jaden McDaniels. In the ensuing melee, the Warriors' Draymond Green gripped Minnesota's Rudy Gobert in a headlock. Green was ejected and received a 5-game suspension, and three other players received $25,000 fines. On social media, fans went wild with memes, including one that [captured the headlock image](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskjGTpCAQhX8NZkzRjaAGBlc3a7YbXdWFFkI7w67IHDBr7b-_Uu-yjR70a17xQf9-HV-NX_x6ezOB-jLH0djiP2kE4KA5yrGuXD8TIcmKemiEANnppqnufddpM2MnqYZ2ssYo0dmWtDYdkrRGVr5HgRIANAhVK7wIAa1E6YBAt50QrBbkfInp8h79Wu40L1_xk9LFxlAt_b2UR2byB8OB4VA2X8rpMRyu9EiUM7nry683hkMupjwzwwEarLUE0CgQAAQIzeSQaB5zskxey7YrKvVS5o2han6WzZrwOEsbUaEwkfvnFErhcL6LPVtu6WhAqYComWsrZS06B6ja1jintZYtWY0GOj01_4NtXI9jGUaGer_eMy1MXk9mVDu12rkVDtu2XfK0muLjeuIrHNbJHLo_8bEAOEWdZdlphKY-Ni6ZrxBXx2-JaOX2Hj_I8fR0X_wWJ0qFBwqU-Z9nLJT5e_ygzHO03iw8kPOmSr17bH5ZfNYNq8UtGL8cv1S-H5q_AQAA__9K4LSL) and said: "Put it in the Louvre."

The IDF released pictures showing weapons and other military supplies they captured there. | | | | | | THURSDAY, NOVEMBER 16, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! On this date in 1974, the Arecibo radio telescope transmitted the first intentional message into interstellar space, containing coded information about the human race. No aliens have replied yet, but you can . Just in case you haven't signed up for The Flyover yet, you can take care of that . Want to keep up with us on X? Don't miss our new sponsor today, ! | Israel Shows Weapons Captured at Hospital Israeli troops have taken control of the Al Shifa hospital in Gaza, where they say that Hamas had an underground command center. They've showing weapons and other military supplies captured there. There are reportedly still hundreds of patients and staff members in the hospital. Israeli troops have been searching the building and staff to uncover Hamas militants and military gear in what Israel described as a "" operation. Israeli officials have acknowledged they have a limited time to accomplish their military goals in the face of public opinion. now back a cease-fire for the first time. Thanksgiving Prices Drop From Last Year Thanksgiving dinner will cost 4.5% less to prepare this year, thanks mainly to , but it's still much more expensive than before the pandemic. The supply of turkeys is up over last year, so the price is down as much as 6%. Cranberries cost 18% less, and whipped cream costs 23% less. The Farm Bureau has a breakdown of year over year. Still, compared with pre-pandemic times, the cost of a Thanksgiving feast is about 25% higher this year, a sign of the impact of high inflation since 2020. NBA Match Erupts in Wild Melee An NBA game between the Minnesota Timberwolves and the Golden State Warriors was disrupted in the first two minutes after a fight broke out that ended with one player choking another on the court. The incident resulted in three players being ejected and began before a single basket had been scored. The Warriors' Klay Thompson got in a scuffle with Minnesota's Jaden McDaniels. In the ensuing melee, the Warriors' Draymond Green gripped Minnesota's Rudy Gobert in a headlock. Green was ejected and received a 5-game suspension, and three other players received $25,000 fines. On social media, fans went wild with memes, including one that and said: "Put it in the Louvre." name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Just five minutes of your time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
My mission is clear, and my team is set, now I need to hear your opinion.

|
[ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e66433dee827472faaf412c002b28d64&_e=OqUPIoeA_eI0Wrpm1X1IATKir8Aq5EpIoE1cASGrnI59A1sY3uJcKuRu48U7yF7qDmDVkfQP270zco4LJRqjwV3fnZzDA-Bb-ceq139d31HoqViwvtvt3KMpPXKHty4Tg_8cM6zNUQcvIYqGIAsiTNjlAsd-2rpy59itHDbzjyrfyU7HUbPAk3ya4EkHc27O5yoIVH_jXuiVVwZP8T0QgQLp_39coESxEV3rLC-dwCZvsMTHMhIzckFEEOFnsQt1PPdmPu8u1MYt6upYYmtkw35ZN9OtPX3hUhGYYb2lB9ZHCqR4eCA6cl2mWN-7OaIyV98P6y3PF5w-mHQMEo0Bkn8Fc7PzZTgIUUhHEU9YDkAIMlXi6tz_wOHlUL988Y_CYJXB1VuF1e1sM0Umnu2Mig%3D%3D)
---
**Look around, Fellow American. Right now, in America ...**
_Children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves._

_The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God._

_Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes._

_Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth._

_Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives._

**As Speaker of the House, my mission is clear: we must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. **

As we aim to make history in the 2024 Election, I need to have my hand on the pulse of the most important thing: _**American voters.**_

[**Which is why I am conducting a _critical_ American Voter Survey today.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e66433dee827472faaf412c002b28d64&_e=OqUPIoeA_eI0Wrpm1X1IATKir8Aq5EpIoE1cASGrnI59A1sY3uJcKuRu48U7yF7qDmDVkfQP270zco4LJRqjwV3fnZzDA-Bb-ceq139d31HoqViwvtvt3KMpPXKHty4Tg_8cM6zNUQcvIYqGIAsiTNjlAsd-2rpy59itHDbzjyrfyU7HUbPAk3ya4EkHc27O5yoIVH_jXuiVVwZP8T0QgQLp_39coESxEV3rLC-dwCZvsMTHMhIzckFEEOFnsQt1noheSK7QHP9oxx1Zgnw6uHAr-ab31zfMz4zT0XD4hV9MpY9ZV3D3FA8eHWrgGOxXStfNIhH8keYg9ZeCWWpeASs_otDI1nB0nCNupHjAeafrjFPpx0nwjNKV4tYRGxNo7QcoitBmLR9A33Gh2jmsGA%3D%3D)

**_-RESPOND TO SPEAKER JOHNSON-_**[** LAUNCH AMERICAN VOTER SURVEY > **](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e66433dee827472faaf412c002b28d64&_e=OqUPIoeA_eI0Wrpm1X1IATKir8Aq5EpIoE1cASGrnI59A1sY3uJcKuRu48U7yF7qDmDVkfQP270zco4LJRqjwV3fnZzDA-Bb-ceq139d31HoqViwvtvt3KMpPXKHty4Tg_8cM6zNUQcvIYqGIAsiTNjlAsd-2rpy59itHDbzjyrfyU7HUbPAk3ya4EkHc27O5yoIVH_jXuiVVwZP8T0QgQLp_39coESxEV3rLC-dwCZvsMTHMhIzckFEEOFnsQt1Y04Rw4B7bW70-T7eeenQXJ5Cy_HlrJNCBz8A-jZlhiUhyF4OdV3Rt0VBRnEQ10xvmxob5j90GWQciTec_QZc_CG_VggwjaT2k4iD6NQAeuI5odR4l0lNyvplWByEV6onaJHD81Lfca4IhIxhsjpBPg%3D%3D)
If you care about the future of this country... _if you care about what happens in next November's election,_ [**please take 5 minutes out of your day to respond.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e66433dee827472faaf412c002b28d64&_e=OqUPIoeA_eI0Wrpm1X1IATKir8Aq5EpIoE1cASGrnI59A1sY3uJcKuRu48U7yF7qDmDVkfQP270zco4LJRqjwV3fnZzDA-Bb-ceq139d31HoqViwvtvt3KMpPXKHty4Tg_8cM6zNUQcvIYqGIAsiTNjlAsd-2rpy59itHDbzjyrfyU7HUbPAk3ya4EkHc27O5yoIVH_jXuiVVwZP8T0QgQLp_39coESxEV3rLC-dwCZvsMTHMhIzckFEEOFnsQt1xshh3bEJPQNUDimvrZ0VoX8-gMKnu6T95JsEJUtnIFfwYNE-3euNj4pwF0YLmJWGg6azEUuJwvPPUUENWThEFPUBD296wF67hgKKKxUqSTjfGx8RH5bSBFDw_q95P9u1YjfPrIiFlIlbhbhFkY_ALw%3D%3D)

As Speaker of the House, there are many pressing issues that come across my desk each day, [**so I want to ensure I am dedicating my time and energy to the issues you care about most.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e66433dee827472faaf412c002b28d64&_e=OqUPIoeA_eI0Wrpm1X1IATKir8Aq5EpIoE1cASGrnI59A1sY3uJcKuRu48U7yF7qDmDVkfQP270zco4LJRqjwV3fnZzDA-Bb-ceq139d31HoqViwvtvt3KMpPXKHty4Tg_8cM6zNUQcvIYqGIAsiTNjlAsd-2rpy59itHDbzjyrfyU7HUbPAk3ya4EkHc27O5yoIVH_jXuiVVwZP8T0QgQLp_39coESxEV3rLC-dwCZvsMTHMhIzckFEEOFnsQt1Y2WxKGODXQ_rxcin8oZqIxPW1apAIDO9ID1pNLizU-bifFDArs4cj6o_tHFhEeCY2GthKsSHcvXHCDlTDm6uOoIK1dKts1MYPQOv85Ic9hxpF1Z6jiXRPmvtNMDWFBYanNgojqLw_KBGV33X1tCDhw%3D%3D)

My team has identified you as a reliable voice in Republican politics, which is why I am asking for your important input.

If I am going to successfully help elect strong conservative leaders to Congress in 2024, _**I need to hear from you in the next hour.**_

**_-RESPOND TO SPEAKER JOHNSON-_**[** LAUNCH AMERICAN VOTER SURVEY > **](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e66433dee827472faaf412c002b28d64&_e=OqUPIoeA_eI0Wrpm1X1IATKir8Aq5EpIoE1cASGrnI59A1sY3uJcKuRu48U7yF7qDmDVkfQP270zco4LJRqjwV3fnZzDA-Bb-ceq139d31HoqViwvtvt3KMpPXKHty4Tg_8cM6zNUQcvIYqGIAsiTNjlAsd-2rpy59itHDbzjyrfyU7HUbPAk3ya4EkHc27O5yoIVH_jXuiVVwZP8T0QgQLp_39coESxEV3rLC-dwCZvsMTHMhIzckFEEOFnsQt1dgNcX-l9u3W_pAFi0zw4bVyBwuVVuKlrDwQT0oZGKxoHeIIEZkwc04M4yMluqrEzP8fJwjDN__UHf61UrZTdzsy31RKUJrJFOlZavBawkpPrG084RJmH58ig_0tCfoTNJPwxAyDyJQ7SfT6YZFztrA%3D%3D)
Thank you for being a reliable member of Team Johnson.

Gratefully,

[ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e66433dee827472faaf412c002b28d64&_e=OqUPIoeA_eI0Wrpm1X1IATKir8Aq5EpIoE1cASGrnI59A1sY3uJcKuRu48U7yF7qDmDVkfQP270zco4LJRqjwV3fnZzDA-Bb-ceq139d31HoqViwvtvt3KMpPXKHty4Tg_8cM6zNUQcvIYqGIAsiTNjlAsd-2rpy59itHDbzjyrfyU7HUbPAk3ya4EkHc27O5yoIVH_jXuiVVwZP8T0QgQLp_39coESxEV3rLC-dwCZvsMTHMhIzckFEEOFnsQt1aFTwFL0tUDVJEnMmI28rNLOf8y-FRauKgzy2IWxJXbPAu9ZsyVIwEMoGiCVLdwyPVgTogidgEMMYlpc27QVohC1vlV6on8GnM_IX1DvuLLWeqJA7hnqwm2e5Y-i_f9fLdMpIlQ5ybyldFbMMToFDwg%3D%3D)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

| **_SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Speaker Johnson is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

We have watched our ally Israel come under attack, and instead of supporting them... 1) Joe Biden has sent billions to Palestine--going straight into the hands of Hamas 2) He has failed to cut off funding of Middle East adversaries like Iran 3) He is meeting with dictator Xi Jinping in San Fransico instead of shutting down the violent pro-Palestine & Hamas protests that have spread like an epidemic across our country. He is FAILING at his job. Our country is in danger. Have you seen our collection of Biden's greatest failures in the Middle East?
---
| | | **Joe Biden's Middle East Track Record:** On Day One as President, Biden restarted U.S. taxpayer-funded payments to the Palestinians despite knowing the money would fund Hamas terrorists. In September, Biden gave $6 billion to Iran, which supports Hamas and helped plan the terrorist group's attack, as part of a hostage exchange. Biden oversaw and conducted the embarrassing and deadly withdrawal of U.S. troops from Afghanistan. As our fallen troops arrived home from Afghanistan in caskets, Biden repeatedly looked at his watch, and the families of the fallen noticed. Biden accidentally droned 10 Afghan civilians in the wake of the U.S. withdrawal. Biden opposed the strike that took out Iran's top general, Qasem Soleimani. Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f9bdda12f414ec59b199f8bd0b48756&_e=kGbWVuWvFgvqMC1eDmiJYQ7umOBkEAtq7rbNFhqD8vPVkeRrSoA4uNHlbNbUxf0m6xtpt2YsAL856zoCqwnDmvO0JHRHxLAOEUmP0UPwQCtzIYIgjPx3PZ0-2rhuaZqEgItOdkKmRCRb4K-kbw1_Be2XHgmqwdIPR4n5MTzli0iuX3svZcTyeP-Snm58_ASjs4U0sD8A5EQW0fd6nvY-I87dfEwgpbQ-KMHXPj1UJB5hDUyScZdgJJjELKZZ3aNveL63cV7jmIeGxVsA9Y44v1PH4bUXr8-UgwvEqW0z9SEXpRean01VQhxFTqMkCNOTs-FBX8pJyfQmFqGXAz8sd_1zZVwOAN_tjceQUPmM2s73McsrMzZHCXs288UFwemmUn3794J9c2IbfVlVtWy80tLQbUfAYg92jsEOzFPp6mkZORC6CcA4JJEaxJ3I9Ko-)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

| | Good day, fellow American. You are an informed citizen--I believe that wholeheartedly. You love this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S. Constitution says and what it means, and you aren't afraid to stand up for America's founding and the principles of liberty that define our nation. _**[Your leadership and knowledge are needed today ...](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1c409cfabae04e0089269156d29912d0&_e=lYgR4T1H6UNM04dfHkHt3MNhDe_qUM4l_NS3999npDMutY0myibxanxxNrqRIUqPh1oHRy3rFrvZxaj2Cf3fp2kMr_PKdTSuvWpGXYB8K6-F8CN7F0yVIsbq8Mth8XG5SeEQte5vlNP2MYhU2lRqrUMCUY2K0NtdjVVpaUffYZL5snpSVBJLv-zc4tKniSe_Mf1jzaWqdwgdc1sxenUUXrevhUsCU_gBhhwkzr3LfLiTWqubwwOs2tiANbF09a2rDpYqlw0DfTJafVntf2HbYdK_nqxshGhUQEoI0a0iwhJ4rMB18oBYNuocbYXAP4SDCVUxvnFiia0qVPJ9RZNvAh-38wVwEo5HD_1ho9kS7M2q55HXV7zjuBr8kz-9VC2ngiaTMl03PoX2yZxMmnXpAg%3D%3D)**_

## Do you believe it is important for Americans to have basic knowledge of American history and civics, including knowledge about the Constitution?
[Yes](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1c409cfabae04e0089269156d29912d0&_e=lYgR4T1H6UNM04dfHkHt3MNhDe_qUM4l_NS3999npDMutY0myibxanxxNrqRIUqPh1oHRy3rFrvZxaj2Cf3fp2kMr_PKdTSuvWpGXYB8K6-F8CN7F0yVIsbq8Mth8XG5SeEQte5vlNP2MYhU2lRqrUMCUY2K0NtdjVVpaUffYZL5snpSVBJLv-zc4tKniSe_Mf1jzaWqdwgdc1sxenUUXrevhUsCU_gBhhwkzr3LfLiTWqubwwOs2tiANbF09a2rSxiRULaRY1VHmFLgC--BoNZUMCWF1eCwENEmdAjIcBuvUAnC1nWB-gZbWx-XAuZPUQjeiZnmOu0dhgd7iMzrYssRwj39JDacto-xid91Zkv4tm7NJUwoGx9iW0kYQo85cyKtXkvYGfJtaw6K1yp6QQ%3D%3D) [No](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1c409cfabae04e0089269156d29912d0&_e=lYgR4T1H6UNM04dfHkHt3MNhDe_qUM4l_NS3999npDMutY0myibxanxxNrqRIUqPh1oHRy3rFrvZxaj2Cf3fp2kMr_PKdTSuvWpGXYB8K6-F8CN7F0yVIsbq8Mth8XG5SeEQte5vlNP2MYhU2lRqrUMCUY2K0NtdjVVpaUffYZL5snpSVBJLv-zc4tKniSe_Mf1jzaWqdwgdc1sxenUUXrevhUsCU_gBhhwkzr3LfLiTWqubwwOs2tiANbF09a2rduMzikjN-YcD3PJ9ai7lYDWKZAOGQuKyi7zBmQZPY-lCEJjeEbYbK_-7xzYFsnDhd-qHyTRNKmWx7F0YOvYj64sGZGrGwiifF_OhUJnv1jU4LJ8qa9AUn-7jVgEzJ7MUeOelOjFEFyaoyACS6_mf8Q%3D%3D) [Not Sure / Don't Know](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1c409cfabae04e0089269156d29912d0&_e=lYgR4T1H6UNM04dfHkHt3MNhDe_qUM4l_NS3999npDMutY0myibxanxxNrqRIUqPh1oHRy3rFrvZxaj2Cf3fp2kMr_PKdTSuvWpGXYB8K6-F8CN7F0yVIsbq8Mth8XG5SeEQte5vlNP2MYhU2lRqrUMCUY2K0NtdjVVpaUffYZL5snpSVBJLv-zc4tKniSe_Mf1jzaWqdwgdc1sxenUUXrevhUsCU_gBhhwkzr3LfLiTWqubwwOs2tiANbF09a2rp-SUmV4fMxPLwuZPytMMSkFX4HU4pb6iZtZ4vlaKGU-R3rBw9OCoqmZqvM6yKSjwttffmPULBpM9lwlG-plfHY8KjALFEBhZcKQFiE8nTgskf2m_zE6EGPG5byzAfPUpAo3D-gF7ER69PGoS7O5FgQ%3D%3D) We need more citizens like you--_informed citizens_ --because America is at a turning point. Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold thanks to a decades-long campaign by progressives to attack the Constitution and undermine liberty and patriotism. The country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We can't let that happen! That's why I am writing to you today and asking you to be part of Hillsdale College and our nationwide initiative--the **CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS**. We are the foremost educational institution committed to reaching and teaching millions about freedom and limited government. The goal of this campaign is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand
* WHAT the Constitution says;
* HOW it relates to current issues and events; and
* WHY the preservation of constitutional principles is essential to liberty.

If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people, that our education system failed. These are young people that "educators" deliberately deceived or who just haven't learned about a proper understanding of American history in school. **You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable. ** That's because we're seeking _1,000 people_ in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to _10,000,000 Americans_ , and this initiative starts with you--YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights. And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what's best for the country. So please, share your opinions by completing the **National Survey on the State of American Education **today at the link below. Thank you for reading my email! [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/survey-informed-citizen/**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1c409cfabae04e0089269156d29912d0&_e=lYgR4T1H6UNM04dfHkHt3MNhDe_qUM4l_NS3999npDMutY0myibxanxxNrqRIUqPh1oHRy3rFrvZxaj2Cf3fp2kMr_PKdTSuvWpGXYB8K6-F8CN7F0yVIsbq8Mth8XG5SeEQte5vlNP2MYhU2lRqrUMCUY2K0NtdjVVpaUffYZL5snpSVBJLv-zc4tKniSe_Mf1jzaWqdwgdc1sxenUUXrevhUsCU_gBhhwkzr3LfLiTWqubwwOs2tiANbF09a2rmDwBD0X4hyXS5cNOQrYWBSX27lt5i6sU7OtayoT-HNT4quOkSRpVdeSerPso54rMRSMQaxUy_G4I0ESj4U5B1bzGG1D0BagTV9RQ786ErBqqVeDBSqmAUHpdAVCCfTvy7t2bjMipzDes6NtmaPLilQ%3D%3D) For our children, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

A Navy warship defended itself against a drone fired from Yemen early
Wednesday local time, the Pentagon confirmed to the Daily Caller News
Foundation. While transiting the Red Sea, the USS Thomas Hudner, an
Arleigh-Burke Class Destroyer, targeted and destroyed an attacking
drone that originated from Yemen, the Pentagon said.

Pentagon Fails Sixth Straight Audit With Little Improvement From Last
Year

The Department of Defense (DOD) failed its sixth straight audit with
little positive change from the year prior, despite pledges from
Pentagon leaders to make improvements on the massive undertaking each
year. Auditors gave seven of the department’s 29 sub-agencies a clean
audit in 2023, with no change from the 2022 audit, according to a
Wednesday statement.

name: Gold Alliance
subject: JPMorgan Chase Pivots to Gold - Is Your Savings Ready for the Shift?
body:
Have you noticed your hard-earned dollars not stretching as far as they used to

Dear Fellow American,
Have you noticed your hard-earned dollars not stretching as far as they used to, affecting not just your everyday expenses but also your long-term retirement savings?
The financial landscape is evolving in significant ways.
****Inflation is not going away..
The **dollar is losing its strength.**
And our **national debt** isn't just high — it's **sky-high.**
All this paints an uncertain picture for your retirement savings.

name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: WRVA with John Reid on why Sen. Hashmi Must Resign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LAqQ3xxudNBaLBgT_9HQ-Cm1IaHIpY0fQy4D7CZqaVzmsjhKt-dtXDwXr1GudhjOmgd8RwAdAUqXxjF2Zv9JhfYHqVb-hi2PG6X7YC-zh_yuPaxjX7T_sKjj05OPVvSvkWGl4wSIyF9Qhe-bKN9o5ycTNbAmHtDKojoGrNoklJc=&c=VBy5TufG_RbxGh1QKdsZJG3NIqpmQQZ6NEp4hiZjYaaVUFm1bJlCmA==&ch=_C8u24raMJPaDCYFDJc54S2YW68NOPlwgIJKjsskF4ze2Ecyh7KcCA==)
---
| Election Fraud is a Serious Crime
---
| | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LAqQ3xxudNBaLBgT_9HQ-Cm1IaHIpY0fQy4D7CZqaVzmsjhKt-dtXEBf1d5QcxQhWucvExZkKYm-0jX--uUpq1h8mhDDNws-KV8CyJMSFv5vyaCgbcWzZ4bQTqEdX0cqTZmGSJ1hatzbnxgZ2YcTuiGq2-TNmoFBH6ML4SIYYRJxTunPWPCNVfuxbP8aVaPh-6eXMCIyJulxLwzfTC92Bg_s7gdRqXK5i0sFYekZsV1MkM1d73PO0TWstZNhl7nTWY-Uy_EnqmfLBioJZ90uMj4lnAMofZicEXuWNcUW_t-89ZOw-Yq0L0GBC60NEMDP8j-F2lZqsiE=&c=VBy5TufG_RbxGh1QKdsZJG3NIqpmQQZ6NEp4hiZjYaaVUFm1bJlCmA==&ch=_C8u24raMJPaDCYFDJc54S2YW68NOPlwgIJKjsskF4ze2Ecyh7KcCA==)
---|---
Dear Friends,

In case you missed it, here's my interview from this morning with John Reid on WRVA, [linked here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LAqQ3xxudNBaLBgT_9HQ-Cm1IaHIpY0fQy4D7CZqaVzmsjhKt-dtXEBf1d5QcxQhWucvExZkKYm-0jX--uUpq1h8mhDDNws-KV8CyJMSFv5vyaCgbcWzZ4bQTqEdX0cqTZmGSJ1hatzbnxgZ2YcTuiGq2-TNmoFBH6ML4SIYYRJxTunPWPCNVfuxbP8aVaPh-6eXMCIyJulxLwzfTC92Bg_s7gdRqXK5i0sFYekZsV1MkM1d73PO0TWstZNhl7nTWY-Uy_EnqmfLBioJZ90uMj4lnAMofZicEXuWNcUW_t-89ZOw-Yq0L0GBC60NEMDP8j-F2lZqsiE=&c=VBy5TufG_RbxGh1QKdsZJG3NIqpmQQZ6NEp4hiZjYaaVUFm1bJlCmA==&ch=_C8u24raMJPaDCYFDJc54S2YW68NOPlwgIJKjsskF4ze2Ecyh7KcCA==).

I am calling on State Senator Ghazala Hashmi to resign over her fraudulent claim of residing at an apartment in North Chesterfield. She has committed election fraud and lied to voters. She must resign.

I am also calling on Republican and Democrat Senate leadership to step up and join me in calling for Sen. Hashmi to resign.

Sen. Hashmi and her husband own a house that they have lived in for about 25 years. Re-districting moved the lines for a lot of state senate districts. Sen. Hashmi's house was drawn into a new district. Virginia law requires state senators to live in the district they represent.

Below is a photo of one of the documents in question, published by The Daily Wire, and [here is a link to that one and the rest of her campaign paperwork](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LAqQ3xxudNBaLBgT_9HQ-Cm1IaHIpY0fQy4D7CZqaVzmsjhKt-dtXJ7JJVhJwBi6lzQH_gO65MLVJHzyocwV0ypfnDyqeQQBBdT6c6y8_1vbdT9DuV3DX9065iwTm2ry_aYIFw6YvxucOks7ozEgdprQ104x4vcYCv51JIkU_RgvRTR-mx-4q5woXhOVg5bFECY46-BgpwO09YwGPqt8bfgB9FfogPKf&c=VBy5TufG_RbxGh1QKdsZJG3NIqpmQQZ6NEp4hiZjYaaVUFm1bJlCmA==&ch=_C8u24raMJPaDCYFDJc54S2YW68NOPlwgIJKjsskF4ze2Ecyh7KcCA==). Take a good look at lines 4 and 5.
---
She doesn't live in that apartment, line 4. So she's registered in a place where she doesn't live, line 5. Then take a look at her signature on the form. That's a felony.
I don't know anyone who believes Sen. Hashmi lives alone in North Chesterfield. I seriously doubt even Sen. Scott Surovell believes that. But Scott and his colleagues are going along with Sen. Hashmi's lie; they promoted her to be their caucus treasurer. A known liar handling a lot of money- what could go wrong?
I don't agree with those who say there should be a special election called by the Governor to replace Sen. Hashmi. Two candidates filed in Senate District 15 by the deadline and one is disqualified because she lied about her primary residence.
This cannot stand. We must do something. Please call your State Senator and urge them to pressure Sen. Hashmi to resign and call for a full investigation. [Here is the link to the State Senate Directory](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LAqQ3xxudNBaLBgT_9HQ-Cm1IaHIpY0fQy4D7CZqaVzmsjhKt-dtXHPKop4VS8WAGijFSucWFGtcnm8zXD6kRFnMd7oUZre81-08kOj8AynnLwAWBmoHZdkf6moj8Bc6T2YAF31g6ht4bhFCTNvZLqOoDl2HcRFPFdkLc9fvTl6U5ZnFC1wpDg==&c=VBy5TufG_RbxGh1QKdsZJG3NIqpmQQZ6NEp4hiZjYaaVUFm1bJlCmA==&ch=_C8u24raMJPaDCYFDJc54S2YW68NOPlwgIJKjsskF4ze2Ecyh7KcCA==).
The law applies equally to everyone. The Department of Elections and the Attorney General's office need to investigate, and Republican and Democrat Senate leaders need to join me in calling for Sen. Ghazala Hashmi to resign.

For God & Country, Amanda Chase
---

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: The decline of American Citizenship
body:
Do you desire a deeper understanding of what it means to be an American citizen?

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b86c0a90fa9f4e6f9e40dfd30e554693&_e=Ct11O-uE1voDx4bPN1kM-nGPRKp8X-jXLFTN8OWVRA2pmVPwNaUq9i8PA0MbHwZKHmUwUHyYw2azAzSiAfVX-PAWNRpdytPNU9Tjb-NmUaLkaTN09pZTWgJxmc8VARZWnEK6G2rokV5Mkuqkxd8eQgspu6jT4fU3YpKGqbq8faEUcGgQ2fBl9d_tWU5W05Huzll06tcML_AzcMM8SSYzrTldoGU3OD-865fMQiJbqoT4LIasY0k27LbRg2SkD4UNjevtvlt5UteH-Oj5A5QNaAiVQg16LtTeATjQPzNPjsYcK70K9EGGXWfMrikgvUPR8qa_7-dS86__hmvPuEt6pHKFnLAmf7i9gGZAcdxpI3VdXx34QdvLKb9vQqchQ4zZC1x6-F2Iyb_0thcQsaUKGbbVNqofQJ_unVa6iotAq2PlyDb74t-w8g0oo5U-mxGC) Dear Friend,

Do you desire a deeper understanding of what it means to be an American citizen? Are you passionate about preserving and promoting the Founding principles of our great nation?

At **Hillsdale College** , we are committed to providing the education necessary for informed citizenship because we believe that a virtuous citizen is the best defense for liberty.

As part of this effort, we are excited to offer our free online course, **" American Citizenship and Its Decline,"** taught by **Victor Davis Hanson.**

Here's a glimpse of what you'll learn:

* a comprehensive history of citizenship and its development in America.
* the current challenges facing our nation, including the erosion of the middle class, the opening of our borders, and the growth of the deep state.
* an in-depth analysis of assaults on the Constitution and the emergence of a new form of global government.

Enroll in this course today to join those determined to defend the free and independent American citizen against the efforts to strip us of our rights.

You can learn more and begin your free course today by clicking on the link below.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/register/american-citizenship-and-its-decline](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b86c0a90fa9f4e6f9e40dfd30e554693&_e=Ct11O-uE1voDx4bPN1kM-nGPRKp8X-jXLFTN8OWVRA2pmVPwNaUq9i8PA0MbHwZKHmUwUHyYw2azAzSiAfVX-PAWNRpdytPNU9Tjb-NmUaLkaTN09pZTWgJxmc8VARZWnEK6G2rokV5Mkuqkxd8eQgspu6jT4fU3YpKGqbq8faEUcGgQ2fBl9d_tWU5W05Huzll06tcML_AzcMM8SSYzrTldoGU3OD-865fMQiJbqoT4LIasY0k27LbRg2SkD4UNjevtvlt5UteH-Oj5A5QNaAiVQg16LtTeATjQPzNPjsY6abNJ-GwRA7B3RyPT5bvWJCOg-_jB8VPLdQsWnEEf4D7QVibVYMorGYIgudlXRsiDpcQs2M7fdmjF1f3rx8ixJA4JzLZ4A0v08dW1R27OoKpJ1XWz9--0OHgGOSerp09Ef0IvrkzS62xtrm4cpLNa)**

Best,
Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College |

| Defend the Constitution

---
We have watched our ally Israel come under attack, and instead of supporting them... 1) Joe Biden has sent billions to Palestine--going straight into the hands of Hamas 2) He has failed to cut off funding of Middle East adversaries like Iran 3) He is meeting with dictator Xi Jinping in San Fransico instead of shutting down the violent pro-Palestine & Hamas protests that have spread like an epidemic across our country. He is FAILING at his job. Our country is in danger. Have you seen our collection of Biden's greatest failures in the Middle East?
---
| | | **Joe Biden's Middle East Track Record:** On Day One as President, Biden restarted U.S. taxpayer-funded payments to the Palestinians despite knowing the money would fund Hamas terrorists. In September, Biden gave $6 billion to Iran, which supports Hamas and helped plan the terrorist group's attack, as part of a hostage exchange. Biden oversaw and conducted the embarrassing and deadly withdrawal of U.S. troops from Afghanistan. As our fallen troops arrived home from Afghanistan in caskets, Biden repeatedly looked at his watch, and the families of the fallen noticed. Biden accidentally droned 10 Afghan civilians in the wake of the U.S. withdrawal. Biden opposed the strike that took out Iran's top general, Qasem Soleimani. Biden opposed the raid to take out Osama bin Laden.
---
| | | | [FIRE JOE BIDEN](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b9d33f0cef3449a0ba072cc5d5efbac3&_e=-dqzSOLftqBN9GokVugeLiZ-qq1Bf16Vbg74IjOf6_NOHCIgZwXfvaMja9_thTKkomldQpg4cq_Pu6UcIIH9VAxcR20GH8-EQ9GiQybivxvZmIBZWN-jb43OpdxjGlL0Lrxv6jCo1Hb6CDrlupYsQQFt8IKjBOiPSfpuSL34GbY6j9Shlnar6VAzKn8hqY-ZycNjX0Ttl1_LEdNzdgsTWBhbLRvfES1EOYdcqRHoUnzTkDviqv_5ChnM-myOxO3z0QNN4NyhMQ2qtyTGuXod5JzaLB8AR8VEXRgtax875kNeB3KMe4WfrS3r2RdugTiNwamfa8gn0tLwlXj8RDZuRva1URx7xNIBJEOozinUxGp85qiDJQG9atJ04QNckMYhiuE1oizu4YsBgnLeteZA_LAByos-2_pQ4DXe9hexFbufL-bvxAoqTwQ1O0YlqmAQ)

In DIRECT contrast, Ron DeSantis has sent planes to the Middle East to rescue stranded Americans, sent thousands of donated critical supplies to suffering innocent civilians, and increased sanctions on terrorist-backing Iran. ****Inflation is not going away..
The **dollar is losing its strength.**
And our **national debt** isn't just high — it's **sky-high.**
All this paints an uncertain picture for your retirement savings.

Please read the message below from our sponsor.

Kelly Walsh, Editor

* * *

Biden is attempting to make it nearly impossible for the next president to fire the radical left-wing activists who control federal agencies via a proposed rule by the Office of Personnel Management (OPM). And the deadline to weigh in against them is this Friday, November 17. After being repeatedly sabotaged by bureaucrats in federal agencies, President Trump proposed a new job classification that would have stripped civil service protections from policymaking roles, forcing bureaucrats to implement the policies of the president or be fired. He didn't have time to implement it, but the proposal is ready to go on day one in the next administration. Biden's Deep State Protection Scheme would prohibit it, emboldening left-wing bureaucrats to undermine the next Republican president even more aggressively. Biden is on a regulatory rampage. In just his first two years, Biden regulations imposed costs of nearly $10,000 per household, which is $1,300 more than the burden of the Obama Administration rules during the comparable timeframe.1 The next president will have to move quickly to roll back the onslaught of red tape and get the economy moving again. That's why stopping Biden's deep-state protection scheme now is critical. [Please click here now to submit an official comment to the OPM urging them to withdraw their proposed Deep State Protection Scheme.](http://mgmail.americanpatriotdaily.com/c/eJx00L3WoyoUANCn0ZLF4SAcCot71zd5D_whYkAJkqg8_ayZfvpd7amnyWigdu5Bcw6KOFG79JM02hJip0YQs7bSAEjoxKQQUAJvfS-4QABQgndSEgMG_9Mv4EiGK21AdY3kNs7Zj3ZLtmS_l8n6cLNxj23ol1JSg_814tGIR8l2fLF_6T8GH1cJDf6A05sNsVbfDbJ-UgTcuckyHcXNs7vMGy__jLm6rTqHdM2DvW-URsA33UUb7PZd67enxa7pFocyWWlxqeDSafeaYfoC3wxObry2SNWdl76LB_8iQKHSZ8TODEcj1OyXBn9eNdJ2lFWlHFc9LFUf6_e73cdb42CfSxt71QEXhNTmfkqnD8EfSjeSP6P14W9H6S92SHVyzgBNYmd4jcmyM_CcC1u2RHxgFEYQzGk5IYP1g78DAAD__5aVjQ4) Thanks for everything you do,
Phil Kerpen
President

Biden's Deep State Protection Scheme would prohibit it, emboldening left-wing bureaucrats to undermine the next Republican president even more aggressively. Biden is on a regulatory rampage. In just his first two years, Biden regulations imposed costs of nearly $10,000 per household, which is $1,300 more than the burden of the Obama Administration rules during the comparable timeframe.1 The next president will have to move quickly to roll back the onslaught of red tape and get the economy moving again. That's why stopping Biden's deep-state protection scheme now is critical. Thanks for everything you do, Phil Kerpen President American Commitment 1: Mulligan, Casey. "Hearing Wrap Up: The Biden Administration’s Regulatory Blitz Jeopardizes America’s Economy." Testimony before House Committee on Oversight and Accountability, 118th Congress, June 14, 2023. Chinese President Xi Jinping received a standing ovation from American
business leaders during an exclusive dinner in San Francisco on
Wednesday. Xi met with President Joe Biden on the sidelines of the
Asia-Pacific Economic Cooperation (APEC) conference in San Francisco
Wednesday and had talks on a broad range of issues, including military
communications, fentanyl trafficking and Taiwan.

Senate Judiciary Committee Scraps Vote On Subpoenas Of Wealthy
Conservatives

Senate Judiciary Committee chair Dick Durbin again put off, for the
second time, a scheduled vote on issuing subpoenas to two wealthy
conservatives as the next step in Democrats’ Supreme Court ethics
probe.

Allegedly Thrown During Student Government Meeting

The Arizona State University (ASU) Police Department announced
Wednesday that they are investigating a pro-Palestinian protest that
interrupted a student government meeting, according to a post on X,
formerly known as Twitter.

Wednesday local time, the Pentagon confirmed to the Daily Caller News
Foundation. While transiting the Red Sea, the USS Thomas Hudner, an
Arleigh-Burke Class Destroyer, targeted and destroyed an attacking

business leaders during an exclusive dinner in San Francisco on
Wednesday. Xi met with President Joe Biden on the sidelines of the
Asia-Pacific Economic Cooperation (APEC) conference in San Francisco
Wednesday and had talks on a broad range of issues, including military
communications, fentanyl trafficking and Taiwan. http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfreo0om6lqb4aikavsdekjr90f746r72lel8o4o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30chimeor2c5h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38cti69qbacpkmerj79hnmmrqatjlktq34tjgmio7b9jgmurr2tjlk4rrestlk4p7fctl6mhj4ttlmmifaddl6erq49fg

Several universities that held pro-Palestinian rallies around the U.S.
are holding Transgender Day of Remembrance candlelit vigil events this
week to commemorate transgender lives lost. Pennsylvania State
University (Penn State), Boston University (BU) and the University of
North Carolina (UNC) at Pembroke are among the universities holding
candlelit vigils to commemorate violence committed against transgender
people, according to their websites. [...]

| Announcement:
---
| I'm a Father, a Navy SEAL, a Day One Trump Supporter, a Christian Conservative, and a Pro-Life, Pro-Gun Business Owner running to SAVE AMERICA and HELP THE PEOPLE.
---
|
---
| McGuire and Trump all the way!
---
| Friends,
I wanted you to be the first to know that I'm running for Congress.
Together, we can save this great country.
Here's how we do it:

* Get President Donald J. Trump back in the White House
* Unify the Republican Party behind Trump and focus on beating the Democrats and their Marxist, freedom-crushing policies
* Deliver results for the American people

I'm working hard every day on accomplishing those three goals. However, Bob Good has betrayed these goals by betraying Trump.
On the day our president was wrongly indicted, Bob abandoned Trump by endorsing another candidate. Story: [Good back stabs Trump Click here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dPTa_g4AVk6B3QagmIFXct_7fQrE45UHWF1t9s5DX9azJPYX4tSMezfSW_qth2jbWe_F-P4Vd7Wo5Bs-zJa26ZWmD_PbRQQV9NIMMtuzFBpx_bAhBOyR3IiuO_gQDPm6CZQOwr46br8EKdcgEKGYQKfqrXZm08rp_ZcCCWwlarKWEiVcRXSyP0jAvBMPRbaAAw1Ql8VrADiihrhTHO1lmvpKAeUwASrNjUOjbukoa0Q=&c=szCTkPvG-dl-GbzLc7aLUZlaCBR1BJWnhG1qEek_2OP4V4SKuvQORA==&ch=-c-nkg1DCv-4Y7tWKVb-8xdRWn_1l7kC38yNja4t5bYuW3hKNQtgpg==)
We need a new direction in the 5th Congressional District.
Here's how I see it:
Our great country is under assault and is teetering on the brink. We don't have time for politicians who are more focused on personal vanity than on We the People, we don't have time for toxic infighting that cripples our party and country, and we don't have time for do-nothing politicians.
I appreciate anyone who wants to serve in office, but our current Congressman has failed us time and time again. He's more focused on getting on the news and serving himself than on serving the people.
Our current Congressman voted for Kevin McCarthy to be Speaker, then threw a temper tantrum, reversed himself, and allowed the party to fall into chaos, costing us the 2023 elections.
Republicans came together around Mike Johnson, who is now working to clean up the mess our Congressman created by his chaos-causing temper tantrum, costing us the majority here in Virginia.
As you know, Marxist Democrats now control the Virginia General Assembly, which is going to hurt the people of Virginia badly. Instead of our current Congressman helping the GOP team and the people of Virginia, he helped himself -- and the Democrats.
Ever since I won the convention to be your nominee for state senate, people from across the district have been urging me to run against the entrenched, establishment Congressman who has only served himself. I'm answering the call.
There are other consequences of our current Congressman's failed approach. When our strongest ally, Israel, was attacked by terrorists who burned babies, killed 32 American citizens and took at least 10 American citizens hostage, our Congressman didn't help.
In addition, one of the primary concerns I hear from people in the 5th Congressional District is how our current Congressman treats them personally. We The People are not interested in having someone represent us who yells at grandmothers to try and intimidate them. There is no honor in that behavior and those who keep giving him a pass are complicit. How can Republicans build a majority and win when you treat fellow Republicans or anyone that way? I will do what I must.
I have a Biblical worldview and will always stand up for righteousness. That's why I'm answering the call from folks all over the 5th district to run for this seat.
I look forward to continuing my service in the General Assembly during this campaign. In contrast to our current Congressman, I've passed many bills that improve the lives of Virginians. My team and I will keep working hard on constituent services, so if you need anything, contact us. There's nothing more satisfying than helping Virginians navigate the bureaucracy and win.
In this battle for America's future, as a Navy SEAL, I cannot not sit by and watch our country fall apart. We can do better than Good.
I deeply appreciate the support so many have shown for me in the past and I'd be deeply appreciative if I can count on your support in the future.
---

clean_body: | | | | | | == | == | Announcement: | I'm a Father, a Navy SEAL, a Day One Trump Supporter, a Christian Conservative, and a Pro-Life, Pro-Gun Business Owner running to SAVE AMERICA and HELP THE PEOPLE. | | McGuire and Trump all the way! | Friends, I wanted you to be the first to know that I'm running for Congress. Together, we can save this great country. Here's how we do it: Get President Donald J. Trump back in the White House Unify the Republican Party behind Trump and focus on beating the Democrats and their Marxist, freedom-crushing policies * Deliver results for the American people I'm working hard every day on accomplishing those three goals. However, Bob Good has betrayed these goals by betraying Trump. On the day our president was wrongly indicted, Bob abandoned Trump by endorsing another candidate. Story: == We need a new direction in the 5th Congressional District. Here's how I see it: Our great country is under assault and is teetering on the brink. We don't have time for politicians who are more focused on personal vanity than on We the People, we don't have time for toxic infighting that cripples our party and country, and we don't have time for do-nothing politicians. I appreciate anyone who wants to serve in office, but our current Congressman has failed us time and time again. He's more focused on getting on the news and serving himself than on serving the people. Our current Congressman voted for Kevin McCarthy to be Speaker, then threw a temper tantrum, reversed himself, and allowed the party to fall into chaos, costing us the 2023 elections. Republicans came together around Mike Johnson, who is now working to clean up the mess our Congressman created by his chaos-causing temper tantrum, costing us the majority here in Virginia. As you know, Marxist Democrats now control the Virginia General Assembly, which is going to hurt the people of Virginia badly. Instead of our current Congressman helping the GOP team and the people of Virginia, he helped himself -- and the Democrats. Ever since I won the convention to be your nominee for state senate, people from across the district have been urging me to run against the entrenched, establishment Congressman who has only served himself. I'm answering the call. There are other consequences of our current Congressman's failed approach. When our strongest ally, Israel, was attacked by terrorists who burned babies, killed 32 American citizens and took at least 10 American citizens hostage, our Congressman didn't help. In addition, one of the primary concerns I hear from people in the 5th Congressional District is how our current Congressman treats them personally. We The People are not interested in having someone represent us who yells at grandmothers to try and intimidate them. There is no honor in that behavior and those who keep giving him a pass are complicit. How can Republicans build a majority and win when you treat fellow Republicans or anyone that way? I will do what I must. I have a Biblical worldview and will always stand up for righteousness. That's why I'm answering the call from folks all over the 5th district to run for this seat. I look forward to continuing my service in the General Assembly during this campaign. In contrast to our current Congressman, I've passed many bills that improve the lives of Virginians. My team and I will keep working hard on constituent services, so if you need anything, contact us. There's nothing more satisfying than helping Virginians navigate the bureaucracy and win. In this battle for America's future, as a Navy SEAL, I cannot not sit by and watch our country fall apart. We can do better than Good. I deeply appreciate the support so many have shown for me in the past and I'd be deeply appreciative if I can count on your support in the future. | | PS -- Here's how you can help: 1\. Forward this email to any friends that might be interested. 2\. Follow my ==, ==, and == pages. 3\. And ==. | | | | It really is amazing what we can achieve when we work as a team. name: LTC (Ret.) Alex Vindman
subject: Sincerely urging you to contribute to my twin brother Eugene’s campaign for Congress.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
It wasn't just me who blew the whistle on President Trump. It was me and my brother, Eugene
#
It’s Alexander Vindman.
Most of you know that I’m an Army Veteran. And most of you know who I am because of Trump’s first impeachment trial.
But it wasn't just me who blew the whistle on President Trump. It was me and my brother Eugene – a former Colonel in the U.S. Army – who was the senior ethics official at the National Security Council in the White House at the time.
Now Eugene is running for Congress in Virginia where he will continue the fight to defend our democracy and the Constitution both of us swore to protect.
But he can't do it alone.
I am with him – there is nothing more important to me right now. So if you believe Congress needs more members with the integrity and courage to put service to country first, I am asking:
[**Can I count on you to use this link to contribute to my brother Eugene Vindman's campaign for Congress in Virginia? He needs all of us to stand with him, like he stood strong when taking on Trump.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-evfc-email-nov23.RfceN0&refcode=em231116-1-evfc-30&t=1&akid=19451%2E3013755%2EmDgjj7)
When I testified before Congress during the first impeachment of Donald Trump, I did it to stand up for our democracy.
My brother and I were both attacked by Trump. Both of our careers in the Army suffered and ended abruptly.
Since both of us stood up to Trump, Republicans’ abuse of power and attacks on our democracy have only grown.
Most recently, extremists in Congress chose Mike Johnson to be Speaker of the House – the “mastermind” of the attempt to overturn the 2020 election and undermine our democracy.
We need more members in the House who are willing to stand up to extremism and who are prepared to hold corrupt officials accountable.
We need members with the courage to put their constituents first.
My brother Eugene will do that. But he can't do it without your help:
[**Can you please use this link to contribute directly to my brother Eugene Vindman's campaign for Congress in Virginia? Eugene stood with us and for the Constitution, now he needs our help to get to Congress.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-evfc-email-nov23.RfceN0&refcode=em231116-1-evfc-30&t=2&akid=19451%2E3013755%2EmDgjj7)**
Eugene’s congressional campaign is extremely important to me. Thank you in advance for donating. This means a lot to me personally.
Alexander Vindman
| [CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-evfc-email-nov23.RfceN0&refcode=em231116-1-evfc-30&t=3&akid=19451%2E3013755%2EmDgjj7)
---

| | Good day, fellow American. You are an informed citizen--I believe that wholeheartedly. You love this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S. Constitution says and what it means, and you aren't afraid to stand up for America's founding and the principles of liberty that define our nation. _**[Your leadership and knowledge are needed today ...](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=14e2dac959a9428f9fc97fd78cc677b1&_e=BZZhj5fNaqsH__xfyEZXuGwWeXMo2APYrhVaZLM_dRhe7P0rnY2wuSqdq-7Q6TFvb7ZrwTQ6M8aoOYCgdXPDni-jH47FWhLZwv1LjDiCVBo8SiPgIeyQJ_AmiRsqRdjq0haZbqTgzQ__H9xSUKXBz68x1fi6YgiYFMMqi_fkqDVNt5p6E8Zjn9_u1TREuOj1vEh1nSDKn3gZHaxJOtEEyg15m5azMTIjPEDNl5-H01hh4ITnEjAh-a9H0xDPg763YKlnzrn_5qBu3yVj4o2TTkvfOU6ytGQV3JmyhsMBra3f_pggcK2lbS1LsWXUNewbRvM-VFuMFCVqFBL-uxsfa69Kdp9RmJbPUkQweXIPij274-VW8cGWVYbDA6TPqLrgrb4G3gumHMIv5XMnyy0zyw%3D%3D)**_

## Do you believe it is important for Americans to have basic knowledge of American history and civics, including knowledge about the Constitution?
[Yes](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=14e2dac959a9428f9fc97fd78cc677b1&_e=BZZhj5fNaqsH__xfyEZXuGwWeXMo2APYrhVaZLM_dRhe7P0rnY2wuSqdq-7Q6TFvb7ZrwTQ6M8aoOYCgdXPDni-jH47FWhLZwv1LjDiCVBo8SiPgIeyQJ_AmiRsqRdjq0haZbqTgzQ__H9xSUKXBz68x1fi6YgiYFMMqi_fkqDVNt5p6E8Zjn9_u1TREuOj1vEh1nSDKn3gZHaxJOtEEyg15m5azMTIjPEDNl5-H01hh4ITnEjAh-a9H0xDPg763oYh_VEBARyInRbcnjTv3S_ldxSzlMxM-tg-UXdQLBi-VF2zCoycyLSAnxKBiKatB-ay7m1jgLw7GIcC547zFlCnB7x-aN0Tq3p_wJWkDKuF1IWmgMQm3XEWXEMxXj_1N2H7mshyzwEuvjP7cWA3L9g%3D%3D) [No](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=14e2dac959a9428f9fc97fd78cc677b1&_e=BZZhj5fNaqsH__xfyEZXuGwWeXMo2APYrhVaZLM_dRhe7P0rnY2wuSqdq-7Q6TFvb7ZrwTQ6M8aoOYCgdXPDni-jH47FWhLZwv1LjDiCVBo8SiPgIeyQJ_AmiRsqRdjq0haZbqTgzQ__H9xSUKXBz68x1fi6YgiYFMMqi_fkqDVNt5p6E8Zjn9_u1TREuOj1vEh1nSDKn3gZHaxJOtEEyg15m5azMTIjPEDNl5-H01hh4ITnEjAh-a9H0xDPg763OB42vKWVAe5k72Jh4oPKjw2n911aMJYN5Akp1wO55PNBsTJbZSAWlMui7o3kIFLDnxMKx8vIRvT6kiTuaxRhaHiNooprq5xbEPwTmWL8rNJlXvHD5d2ZWQOqQQJEfTSzoefQxF1XYCIVZ4_iNdZ54g%3D%3D) [Not Sure / Don't Know](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=14e2dac959a9428f9fc97fd78cc677b1&_e=BZZhj5fNaqsH__xfyEZXuGwWeXMo2APYrhVaZLM_dRhe7P0rnY2wuSqdq-7Q6TFvb7ZrwTQ6M8aoOYCgdXPDni-jH47FWhLZwv1LjDiCVBo8SiPgIeyQJ_AmiRsqRdjq0haZbqTgzQ__H9xSUKXBz68x1fi6YgiYFMMqi_fkqDVNt5p6E8Zjn9_u1TREuOj1vEh1nSDKn3gZHaxJOtEEyg15m5azMTIjPEDNl5-H01hh4ITnEjAh-a9H0xDPg763VuCtCyFQj7M_w-IBJUCJDAUvF6fvCvoEh34aJQcUK0x7GvKu136NXWJKuk_I8UhX1BgY9lUGtVbsdcxOBytMXcoK8YOGCvy6iprMdFm8281wyhphXsqbmrRxpjI2sORI1s_19uC_tdRvHY55dCZV-g%3D%3D) We need more citizens like you--_informed citizens_ --because America is at a turning point. Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold thanks to a decades-long campaign by progressives to attack the Constitution and undermine liberty and patriotism. The country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We can't let that happen! That's why I am writing to you today and asking you to be part of Hillsdale College and our nationwide initiative--the **CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS**. We are the foremost educational institution committed to reaching and teaching millions about freedom and limited government. The goal of this campaign is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand
* WHAT the Constitution says;
* HOW it relates to current issues and events; and
* WHY the preservation of constitutional principles is essential to liberty.

If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people, that our education system failed. These are young people that "educators" deliberately deceived or who just haven't learned about a proper understanding of American history in school. **You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable. ** That's because we're seeking _1,000 people_ in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to _10,000,000 Americans_ , and this initiative starts with you--YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights. And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what's best for the country. So please, share your opinions by completing the **National Survey on the State of American Education **today at the link below. Thank you for reading my email! [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/survey-informed-citizen/**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=14e2dac959a9428f9fc97fd78cc677b1&_e=BZZhj5fNaqsH__xfyEZXuGwWeXMo2APYrhVaZLM_dRhe7P0rnY2wuSqdq-7Q6TFvb7ZrwTQ6M8aoOYCgdXPDni-jH47FWhLZwv1LjDiCVBo8SiPgIeyQJ_AmiRsqRdjq0haZbqTgzQ__H9xSUKXBz68x1fi6YgiYFMMqi_fkqDVNt5p6E8Zjn9_u1TREuOj1vEh1nSDKn3gZHaxJOtEEyg15m5azMTIjPEDNl5-H01hh4ITnEjAh-a9H0xDPg763XLTqNZz1RVvQDWYxA56VrYobVC3rA7psgsJPwpa3XzzZul8uqu8UzFkK9qNse6OPAMOLPmxCitqSbnBFbZkZzduoYLtG8vadB7MK3g9BivegjI8jwjGRpEEFNb83rt6Vbo1x82Mc18jYoSKqq0cWGA%3D%3D) For our children, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

name: Markwayne Mullin
subject: He threw the first punch.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MULLIN VICTORY FUND
body:
A union thug boss threatened me.

| **He threw the first punch.**
A union thug boss threatened me.
It’s Republican Senator Markwayne Mullin, and I just challenged a Democrat union boss to a charity cage fight.
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zai9t2ajfg1n5tlni5331e8md124e9pg3ir0rgd8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30chim9p75clh2bs)
---
I’m SICK of their intimidation. They think they can bully hardworking people like us. When he challenged me to fight, "anyplace, anytime" it was on.
But here’s the thing, a fight like this is nothing compared to the fight to save our country.
DC Swamp Creatures like this union boss are spending **HUNDREDS OF MILLIONS OF DOLLARS** to hold onto the Senate.
This election is going to be one the closest fights for the Senate in American history.
**[So today, I’m asking if you’ll be in my corner to help me wrestle the Senate out of Democrat control.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjbb1q3gjtqhj59v97dkv15l5d07ito38nmfor1g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30chim9p75clh2bs)**
| [**BE IN MARKWAYNE’S CORNER - TAKE BACK THE SENATE**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6qe7mb94blr02sdhmut8bv4uqhnej4jks763vj8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30chim9p75clh2bs)
---
**Taking back the Senate is going to be one of the biggest fights in American history.**
But I know with you in our corner, it will be impossible for us to lose.
**[Please stand with us today.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdlca0fg0vlk4jajk58c722srscr9p764vksepfo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30chim9p75clh2bs)** This is a fight we **MUST** win.
| [**SAVE OUR COUNTRY**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1m4gqbea22nlv8ahplvdjidlq3vmgftpeuchq6o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30chim9p75clh2bs)
---

Thank you, US Senator Markwayne Mullin

| | _**_Meet Tom Cotton_**_

Tom Cotton was born and raised on his family's cattle farm in Arkansas, served as an Army infantry officer in Iraq and Afghanistan, and is fighting for working Americans in the U.S. Senate.

The tragic attacks of September 11, 2001 occurred during Tom's final year of law school and changed his life's trajectory.

After clerking on the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit and spending a short time in private law practice, he joined the United States Army as an Infantry Officer, spending nearly five years on active duty.

Between his two combat tours he served as a platoon leader with the Old Guard at Arlington National Cemetery, the unit responsible for military honors funerals.

Tom's military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal, Combat Infantry Badge, and Ranger Tab.

In the U.S. Senate, he's fighting the tough battles for Arkansans and Americans, and delivering real results. He knows that only the strong can survive in a dangerous world, and he's building a movement to make America strong again.

---
