name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Well, how was that?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsmXtBriNt

The third Republican debate went just as well as we knew it
would. We faced the nation, rose..

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osmXtBriNt

Friend,

There is no clearer contrast between Joe Biden and the energy we
brought to the stage at the third Republican debate. We just gave
the nation a preview of what the nation will see in the 2024
general election, and the response we're getting now is
unbelievable.

Now
is the time to take action. We put in the work standing up to the
challengers, but we are just getting started. We are facing a
chance to maximize our momentum TODAY if we step up and make this
victory a stepping stone to the next stage of our campaign, but
that means coming together to earn an unprecedented show of
support for our mission.

SUPPORT THE CAMPAIGN NOW: DONATE $25 HERE

Now
that the nation has gotten another chance to see what we're
fighting for, here's what they know:

We WILL put an end to the absurd claims that men can get
pregnant.

We WILL throw every sexually-explicit material they've tried to
shove into our nation's elementary schools in the garbage-where
it belongs.

We WILL go straight to the southern border, ARMED, and leave
Mexican drug cartel members trying to bring thousands of pounds
of fentanyl near young Americans STONE COLD DEAD.

We WILL fire every bureaucrat that siphons off tax-payer dollars
to fund ineffective, corrupt, useless agencies.

We WILL hold federal leaders accountable for the harm they've
done to adult Americans and the futures of American children.

We WILL restore our American dominance and strength from our
military to our manufacturing, to our energy sector.

We WILL END our toxic, abusive relationship with China, and
declare our economic independence from foreign adversaries.

After the last debate, we are one step closer to slashing the
outrageous cost of living that Biden has imposed on average
Americans, stripping the woke absurdity out of the lives of
children, and reinstating our dominance as a nation so our future
is as proud, independent, and free as our past.

We're doing everything we can to defeat this failing radical Left
for good, but they've seen how strong we are and what we will
achieve, and now we have a giant target on our back. It will take
more than one donation to defeat Joe Biden-we MUST NOT let up.

<<
Help me continue to fight back by sending in a monthly donation
to my campaign here >>

PLEDGE ANY AMOUNT

We
have a long road ahead and these stakes are too high to risk
falling behind. I need you to step up on this team, and I believe
that you will. Click here to send in a quick donation to help
fund our fight for a free American future.

Yours in Freedom,

Ron
DeSantis

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

Ron DeSantis comes from
blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to
him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the
Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate
degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was
so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered
to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a
life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and
now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting
to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in
this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every
turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and
consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his
life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and
3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that
this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents
face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political
agenda down the throats of children.

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has
promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected
bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to
children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by
immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our
southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the
mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring
our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on
track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record
speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment,
politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the
legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his
leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has
stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next
President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill
for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for
President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the
decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for
another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act
is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as
charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.
Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without
"green cards"), federal government contractors, and national
banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best
efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address,
occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose
aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The
maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600
($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple
using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary &
$6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute
$10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident
(i.e., green card holder).

This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not
being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose
of making this contribution.

I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card
and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued
to another person.

I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this
contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization,
national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal
contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron
DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his
military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not
imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department
of Defense.

Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

PO Box 3696

Tallahassee, FL 32315

Good morning, neighbors! **If you've ever met Sarah, you probably know that she likes coffee. Like, a lot.** Last week, we asked Sarah to document _allllllll_ the coffee she drank in one day. We got reports of at least 6 cups of coffee! And while we're a bit worried about Sarah's coffee intake, we wanted to share these great selfies Sarah took throughout the day: **First up** , Sarah with a cup of coffee at the Urban League breakfast in Wilmington. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73451677/438547000/1664895137?refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20231116_na_coffee_team_nc_act_xx_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmNhNTJmOC04OTg0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UdP5O1Dt_lq1Ho1-cKK_cPOqXXcIIJzpDIh2IZfpi2A=) Back at home, Sarah had her second cup o' Joe while making calls to supporters. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73451678/438547001/1664895137?refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20231116_na_coffee_team_nc_act_xx_img2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmNhNTJmOC04OTg0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UdP5O1Dt_lq1Ho1-cKK_cPOqXXcIIJzpDIh2IZfpi2A=) She then headed over to the Mitchell Awards to honor Delaware’s leaders in diversity, equity, inclusion, and justice. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73451679/438547003/1664895137?refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20231116_na_coffee_team_nc_act_xx_img3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmNhNTJmOC04OTg0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UdP5O1Dt_lq1Ho1-cKK_cPOqXXcIIJzpDIh2IZfpi2A=) We drove down to **Dover** to have coffee meetings with community leaders and ran into Kristin Stonesifer, the owner of House of Coffi – one of Sarah's favorite local coffee shops in the state. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73451680/438547007/1664895137?refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20231116_na_coffee_team_nc_act_xx_img4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmNhNTJmOC04OTg0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UdP5O1Dt_lq1Ho1-cKK_cPOqXXcIIJzpDIh2IZfpi2A=) We took a pit stop at Starbucks #7807 in **Rehoboth Beach** for a meeting. The baristas were big Sarah supporters and gave her several "Green Apron Cards" — notes they share with colleagues to appreciate them. (Seriously, we did not plan this! 😭🥰) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73451681/438547016/1664895137?refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20231116_na_coffee_team_nc_act_xx_img5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmNhNTJmOC04OTg0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UdP5O1Dt_lq1Ho1-cKK_cPOqXXcIIJzpDIh2IZfpi2A=) Our last stop of the day was at the **Lewes** Public Library for a Women's March panel about economic security where Sarah snagged a cup of Wawa coffee. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73451682/438547017/1664895137?refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20231116_na_coffee_team_nc_act_xx_img6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmNhNTJmOC04OTg0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UdP5O1Dt_lq1Ho1-cKK_cPOqXXcIIJzpDIh2IZfpi2A=) ...and that's a day in the life on the Sarah McBride campaign! Sarah made it to **all three counties** , attended **three events** , and had **dozens of conversations with Delawareans**. There's no one who works harder — and consumes more coffee — in service of our great First State! | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: NH Senate Republicans
subject: ICYMI: GOP State Senators Call Out Hate Speech From UNH Professor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Hampshire Senate Republicans PAC
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMzQ5Mzk5NTkwNzIzMTMxMDg5JmM9bjd1OSZlPTE5MjgmYj0xMjQwNTEyMjc0JmQ9eTFqOWk4aw==.x5hflDvs-Cf6ONJhpuQDhCVFK83PofJwEmn_3hllY7k)
| | | |
---
| |
---
| Friend, ICYMI, this week NH Republican **Senate President Jeb Bradley and Senator Dan Innis strongly condemned the recent anti-semitic remarks** made by a liberal UNH Associate Professor. This type of hateful rhetoric has no place at our state-funded universities, or anywhere else in the Granite State. See the story below:
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| While tens of thousands gathered at the National Mall in Washington, D.C., to show their support for Israel, two local state senators released a statement condemning homegrown “hate speech” on the University of New Hampshire campus.
“When free speech escalates into hate speech, and it causes the members of a community to become fearful for their safety, things have gone too far,” wrote state Senate President Jeb Bradley (R-Wolfeboro) and Sen. Dan Innis (R-Bradford), a professor at the UNH School of Business and Economics. The two singled out UNH Associate Professor Chanda Prescod-Weinstein, a progressive activist who has denounced Israel as an “apartheid state” and compared Hamas terrorists who launched the Oct. 7 attacks to the Jews who resisted the Nazis in the Warsaw ghetto. “Speech should always be protected, but when that speech creates a dangerous environment for others, it must be condemned and stopped. Suggesting that a group of people should be killed is not speech. It is a direct threat to their safety and well-being. Associate Professor Chanda Prescod-Weinstein is guilty of threatening everyone on the UNH campus and beyond, particularly Jewish students, staff, and faculty,” they wrote. “Her words are hateful and disgusting, and we condemn this behavior. It is our hope and expectation that UNH will do the same.” UNH has declined to respond to requests for comment about Professor Prescod-Weinstein, who was granted tenure by the university in June. However, in response to students chanting the eliminationist slogan “From the river to the sea, Palestine shall be free,” the university told concerned students that the solution to objectionable speech isn’t censorship. It is more speech. “In as much as I am committed to the safety of our community, I am similarly committed to our role as a public university in protecting free speech on campus,” UNH President James Dean wrote to UNH College Republicans. “It is only at times like these that this commitment is tested. The remedy for speech that some may find objectionable is not for the university to choose sides. Instead, the university should support more speech and opportunities west understand different perspectives.” New Hampshire has a small Jewish population — about 10,00o of the 1.4 million residents — but the issue of supporting Israel has become a flashpoint in Granite State politics since the Oct. 7 terror attack. U.S. Rep. Chris Pappas (D) voted to censure antisemitic Rep. Rashida Tlaib (D-Mich.) and signed a Democratic letter condemning the “from the river to the sea” language, for example. His fellow Democrat Rep. Annie Kuster declined to do either. Gov. Chris Sununu has condemned the “river to the sea” message at UNH, calling it “nothing short of requesting another Holocaust.” State Senate Democratic Leader Sen. Donna Soucy (D-Manchester) declined to respond to requests for comment. In the House, Republican Rep. Judy Aron (R-Acworth), who is Jewish, also took issue with UNH’s refusal to call out the eliminationist rhetoric on its campus. “The administration at UNH should be loudly condemning UNH Associate Professor Chanda Prescod-Weinstein. They also should be making sure that pro-Israeli support is not threatened or intimidated by these pro-Hamas demonstrations and actions on their campus. “What is happening on these campuses is just atrocious. It’s such a disgrace to our so-called system of ‘higher learning,’ as it is clear these places do not know or teach history and seem to promote and thrive on terrorist propaganda. “It is amazing to me that these college kids and their self-aggrandized college professors don’t even realize that Hamas would behead them in an instant for their liberal views,” Aron added.”
---

| Paid for by New Hampshire Senate Republicans PAC. Jeb Bradley, Chairman

name: Staff Sgt. Aquilino Gonell
subject: They attacked us with the American flag.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
The same flag I swore an oath to when I joined the Army.
#

[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov23.azuTO_&refcode=em231116-1&t=1&akid=1448%2E734936%2EtsaBMV)
---
Peter -
I will never forget January 6th. I was more afraid at the Capitol that day than I was in my entire deployment to Iraq.
On January 6, I was assaulted by more than 40 rioters and mob members who were part of concerted efforts to overtake the Capitol. I was sprayed with bear mace, punched, kicked, beaten with stolen police batons and weapons.
They even attacked us with the American flag. The same flag I swore an oath to when I joined the Army.
I still bear the scars of this day and am saddened every time I think about my career being cut short because of that day.
I honestly thought I was going to die.
But I fought back. I fought for our democracy.
I'm still fighting for it.
And while I was fighting the mob, Ruben Gallego was on the House floor. He helped barricade the doors. He taught his colleagues how to use a gas mask. He was ready to fight for our democracy again, same as when he joined the Marines, same as when he fought in Iraq.
He's still fighting for it, too.
He's fighting to beat the people who led those insurrectionists, who cheer them on, who defend them — peoplein Arizona like Mark Lamb and Kari Lake.
Ruben is the kind of leader we need in the Senate, not them. I’m proud to support him. And that's why I'm writing to you today.
To win, he is going to need your help.
[**Can he count on you? Make today the day that you give your first donation to Ruben’s Arizona Senate campaign.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov23.azuTO_&refcode=em231116-1&t=2&akid=1448%2E734936%2EtsaBMV)

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: Corrupt Judge Arthur Engoron removed from President Trump’s case?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Please read it below then add your name as a cosigner to help me stop this Witch Hunt.

|
---
| | |
Friend,

It's GOP Conference Chair Elise Stefanik.

_**I filed an ethics complaint calling for the removal of Judge Arthur Engoron in President Trump 's New York Case. **_

Please read it below then add your name as a cosigner to help me stop this Witch Hunt.

---

**Ethics Complaint Against Corrupt Judge Arthur Engoron**

I, the undersigned, hereby join the call for the removal of Judge Arthur Engoron from continuing to preside and/or rendering a judicial decision in New York v. Trump, et al.

Judge Arthur Engoron has shown clear judicial bias and judicial intemperance against the defendant in the case, President Donald J. Trump.

Judge Engoron has repeatedly deprived the defendant, President Donald J. Trump, of his constitutional rights, even going as far as issuing an illegal gag order against President Trump's legal team.

Additionally, Judge Engoron has repeatedly violated the New York Code of Judicial Conduct, which only further proves his political bias and judicial intemperance.

Therefore, in light of the egregious and myriad violations and deprivations of the defendant's rights, I hereby request Judge Engoron and his staff to be removed entirely from presiding over and/or rendering a decision in New York v. Trump, et al.

Respectfully,

---

---

Thank you,

Elise Stefanik
House GOP Conference Chair

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: I’d love to meet you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
Be my VIP Guest at my beautiful golf club next month.| | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=b2d68634feed449f83291b71337bf38a&_e=tYUimWbzU8t3Sds1PwP80YT280vN6ifCiARnMpCqHgMYug9KVEUacGhpCOo8jemJc-CD1Z-AYCm8uKl1YoESzj62yW0G7lPABZTo28CrQcaEG8gj5rJybNUgb2rDLzFdMFY-vbZg--k6R0xxkymCUWY0AXI_YHCNVN9shS4JsOJwrAo2Boqk4yKBW_GsaJapZMXNmRtWaRwhm3aZm7wVpfiWY4E2l3cRH6d3MB-PT5pBOJvbMA-ITN1DLrwvOJ_9M9UG3SJ8YTR20cMbXuMZI1wJNd5Ez_zEn0y0551A0N7_rJdzKGFW2E_1z8gxCrrm7YMl0Inj2rvaGg4kkMCSI0k35SqNle1FmIUwMwBs_W4af7AOu9QnkCi3YcKX_bHJlLbDPgF04juRxB2b1ZTNPc1iPriM-kxmp4gAdwt7-djqySShVrKvnKTs8Bixry1vPnjYbPZyAt26TMo_nKiSFtdnPT-Qy-aJzqqutUBNSssCPyyLvdkNhp8BIsj6pbyn)
---
| | Patriot,

---
How would you like to meet your one and only 45th _(and future 47th)_ President?
---
**_Because I’d certainly love to meet YOU!_**

---
In honor of officially crossing the 1-year-out mark from the most important election of our lifetimes, I’m hosting a special reception at my beautiful Trump International Golf Club in West Palm Beach, Florida... _and I’d like YOU to be my_ __VIP GUEST__ _!_

---
With less than a year to go, we’re DOMINATING the primary like no one’s ever seen before (a 60-point frontrunner!), we’re leading Crooked Joe nationally by double digits, and we’re even beating him in all the biggest battleground states that will no doubt decide the 2024 election.
---
But such an important event wouldn’t feel complete without the most critical part of _our_ movement in attendance – grassroots supporters like you, Patriot.

---
Which is why I’m going to fly one lucky winner plus a guest of your choice out to Florida for __FREE__ _!_

---
I’ll cover your hotel, you’ll get to enjoy hors d'oeuvres and refreshments on me, and we’ll even take a photo together so that you can always remember this special moment.

---
_But right now, all you have to do is enter to win!_

---

name: Team DeSantis
subject: Who've you got? Biden or the CCP?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=0084b3289be1cdf946bbc66f247cc6380807a5846f41bf420828c9f8ea52cc2cdf00c028993f3644e72b2d71a52a446b740cd50e612275cf2e6f2bf6241c3ddfefcb4a87b6df2eb51318c3b33e16d7f5

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=f39b421fcee336b71c33c2ce2c468150ee5d1a626289cc831a71834d52de0ce67601c91a67725274943c3978b6d6f34db397094f42cbe58de4c5c1f8c720b502

Friend,

Every time Biden steps on stage we see first hand just how unfit he is to lead. His speeches don't make sense, he seems lost, and he's projecting weakness...and just met with Xi Jinping in San Francisco.

Do you think he's strong enough to take on the Chinese Communist Party? Respond here:
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=f39b421fcee336b71c33c2ce2c468150ee5d1a626289cc831a71834d52de0ce67601c91a67725274943c3978b6d6f34db397094f42cbe58de4c5c1f8c720b502
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=17496fe1f655fb90e98a0f967c5b91a49e7c052905714f4791affc334e525fb7701adbcc260ddadebfd5422cb3ca5075b2a774e86cf55d29d7cc2e59fdb810bb

At least we know Biden and Xi Jinping agree on a few things:

- They've bolstered anti-American ideologies.
- They've made it their mission to indoctrinate children.
- And they'll stop at nothing to take control of your life.

We're almost certain our U.S. security will be at risk as soon as Biden opens his mouth. We cannot risk our country being in his hands for another 4 years. We've seen what's happened to our cities, our border, our families, our government, our financial freedom, and our rights under leftist control. Joe Biden cannot be trusted to take a stand against Xi Jinping and the CCP.

Do you agree? We want to know.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=f39b421fcee336b72bca6185b39e4c89b8c3b5adcebfe79f5dcb4012f2075f652bf74755ae321f41e68fd7bcbb361034abdcb9768ab17d0463630a6158a3167e
YES: I believe Biden can stand up against the CCP

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=f39b421fcee336b75ad064f0cefcc72b885c7cb29da55a0dbbad21ab2783731c3c44e939271dd9731357c100f001ce20f0715c83c6d7c02c3f29781ec7bbc4f4
NO: The CCP is running circles around Biden

It is up to us to fight back against communist control and their domination over our country. And we DO NOT trust Biden to get the job done. Will you let us know where you stand?

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=f39b421fcee336b7d2b8fc89a73f8096e56d4c99d58e788d34c179891d7885ebc677b457acc152d771e5b545a543d089c19ae0b7b51cb9b46ac856f9121bb63f

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=f39b421fcee336b741075cccd2766de9ba055f2089f34d70c033c698fe6cf5f0b05be8e5bdb3401dbea2451f58bd0b566746cdc21273c450ae0e8220f6b19ce0
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=f39b421fcee336b7ad4523efbd332362577ccb58ccd00ef599fb23ba452e8673daed503e55c93e9270ddccdc4351fd593382592000f95cdbe713944e5783468e
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=f39b421fcee336b71c33c2ce2c468150ee5d1a626289cc831a71834d52de0ce67601c91a67725274943c3978b6d6f34db397094f42cbe58de4c5c1f8c720b502

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=f39b421fcee336b71c33c2ce2c468150ee5d1a626289cc831a71834d52de0ce67601c91a67725274943c3978b6d6f34db397094f42cbe58de4c5c1f8c720b502

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). | Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[ ](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJx0kEGPmzAQhX-NuSWyx4DLgUMaSk89Nbs9WmN7AKsmINso4t9XZNO9rY_f--R5ejivwQ97y9R3BjB5lxgAkxcGsGX5jm9vv-J-En9-nH5W7zAeIVwZQN5X-jRfn5xpRh8OqrrCtSWgGGxBrVCci1Jx3hRTC4NV1ACqb8pxpIpXsiEjVIMc3VC5wrfAQQohalFxCc25copLI0pFlluwJSv589B5iER58ve_FB36sJ_tMhehnXJe07NYz6B_PB7niTAeIYPeMegNpawP5u-jRu-SxmHg4vBljzYz2V2uN368mosaLtcbg3rLs07LFi0x2ZndvdBMzm8zkx0Ogw8eM70Ci_OKfrwz2W1J011jOI7qT0-b3R3kFPw4ZbMFc3LLZgLplDGaBaPTX_RYNxN8mihq75jsfv_3GdRpMx-wj0S3j3W6Y50itm59-BB8qhUr-fjc0C7zvwAAAP__-QOkqw)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they think they are still big and ugly. However, Marco and Paul wanted to change this perception with a **revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers formerly from Siemens.**

But now, a **game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry** , and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they’ve seen in over a decade.

It’s called **Horizon by[hear.com](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJx0kEGPmzAQhX-NuSWyx4DLgUMaSk89Nbs9WmN7AKsmINso4t9XZNO9rY_f--R5ejivwQ97y9R3BjB5lxgAkxcGsGX5jm9vv-J-En9-nH5W7zAeIVwZQN5X-jRfn5xpRh8OqrrCtSWgGGxBrVCci1Jx3hRTC4NV1ACqb8pxpIpXsiEjVIMc3VC5wrfAQQohalFxCc25copLI0pFlluwJSv589B5iER58ve_FB36sJ_tMhehnXJe07NYz6B_PB7niTAeIYPeMegNpawP5u-jRu-SxmHg4vBljzYz2V2uN368mosaLtcbg3rLs07LFi0x2ZndvdBMzm8zkx0Ogw8eM70Ci_OKfrwz2W1J011jOI7qT0-b3R3kFPw4ZbMFc3LLZgLplDGaBaPTX_RYNxN8mihq75jsfv_3GdRpMx-wj0S3j3W6Y50itm59-BB8qhUr-fjc0C7zvwAAAP__-QOkqw).**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **Horizon has taken the U.S. by storm since its release in early 2023** , offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJx0kEGPmzAQhX-NuSWyx4DLgUMaSk89Nbs9WmN7AKsmINso4t9XZNO9rY_f--R5ejivwQ97y9R3BjB5lxgAkxcGsGX5jm9vv-J-En9-nH5W7zAeIVwZQN5X-jRfn5xpRh8OqrrCtSWgGGxBrVCci1Jx3hRTC4NV1ACqb8pxpIpXsiEjVIMc3VC5wrfAQQohalFxCc25copLI0pFlluwJSv589B5iER58ve_FB36sJ_tMhehnXJe07NYz6B_PB7niTAeIYPeMegNpawP5u-jRu-SxmHg4vBljzYz2V2uN368mosaLtcbg3rLs07LFi0x2ZndvdBMzm8zkx0Ogw8eM70Ci_OKfrwz2W1J011jOI7qT0-b3R3kFPw4ZbMFc3LLZgLplDGaBaPTX_RYNxN8mihq75jsfv_3GdRpMx-wj0S3j3W6Y50itm59-BB8qhUr-fjc0C7zvwAAAP__-QOkqw)
[ ](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJx0kEGPmzAQhX-NuSWyx4DLgUMaSk89Nbs9WmN7AKsmINso4t9XZNO9rY_f--R5ejivwQ97y9R3BjB5lxgAkxcGsGX5jm9vv-J-En9-nH5W7zAeIVwZQN5X-jRfn5xpRh8OqrrCtSWgGGxBrVCci1Jx3hRTC4NV1ACqb8pxpIpXsiEjVIMc3VC5wrfAQQohalFxCc25copLI0pFlluwJSv589B5iER58ve_FB36sJ_tMhehnXJe07NYz6B_PB7niTAeIYPeMegNpawP5u-jRu-SxmHg4vBljzYz2V2uN368mosaLtcbg3rLs07LFi0x2ZndvdBMzm8zkx0Ogw8eM70Ci_OKfrwz2W1J011jOI7qT0-b3R3kFPw4ZbMFc3LLZgLplDGaBaPTX_RYNxN8mihq75jsfv_3GdRpMx-wj0S3j3W6Y50itm59-BB8qhUr-fjc0C7zvwAAAP__-QOkqw)
What makes Horizon so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

With Horizon, they can. **Imagine effortless hearing in every situation** —restaurants, weddings, block parties, and beyond. Imagine being able to **understand every word clearly** with a device so small and comfortable, you’ll completely forget you’re wearing it.

This means that Horizon offers all of the usual benefits of a modern hearing aid—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: it can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

Dear Fellow Conservative

I’ll bet you’ve heard this one before: voter fraud doesn’t exist—it’s just a ploy.

That’s the baseless narrative constantly pushed by Leftists politicians, liberal fanatics, and their mainstream media mouthpiece.

Apparently, election fraud only exists when the Left loses elections. The preposterous hypocrisy of the radical Left simply knows no bounds.

The reality is that voter fraud does exist and it is on the rise, despite the radical Left’s attempts to minimize this issue.

And to ensure that this urgent matter is addressed through aggressive reform and oversight, today I’m asking you to join other concerned citizens by completing our [National Survey on Election Fraud >>](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzIwLTQ2YjRkNDk2YzVmMzQ2MDNiMmExNTExNGU2MDBlMjk1IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZWQuaGVyaXRhZ2Uub3JnL3ZvdGVyLWZyYXVkLXN1cnZleS8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXZvdGVyZnJhdWQmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFfQUVfU1BPNDQzMjEifQ/UMwaf5aJJoBAfBcVqHNrIg)

Your answers will help us pressure lawmakers to pursue aggressive reforms and hold those who enable fraud legally accountable.

The survey should only take a minute or so to complete, but your input is invaluable to this work. You can get started right now using the secure link below:

[https://secured.heritage.org/voter-fraud-survey/](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzIwLTQ2YjRkNDk2YzVmMzQ2MDNiMmExNTExNGU2MDBlMjk1IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZWQuaGVyaXRhZ2Uub3JnL3ZvdGVyLWZyYXVkLXN1cnZleS8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXZvdGVyZnJhdWQmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFfQUVfU1BPNDQzMjEifQ/eR9vOWVhpSNSsc56DHpGAA)

Thank you so much. I look forward to seeing your response.

Regards,

Alexander Hyatt

name: Sen. Heidi Campbell
subject: Will I see you on December 11th?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for State Senate, Lee Jones, treasurer
body:
https://www.voteheidicampbell.com/ [https://www.voteheidicampbell.com/]
Hi Peter,
I’m reaching out with a reminder to please join me on December 11th for a fundraiser in support of my re-election campaign! RSVP here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbelldec2023]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbelldec2023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbelldec2023]
As I gear up to return to session this January, I am acutely aware of just how important it is that we continue focusing our efforts on breaking the Republican supermajority and putting a stop to GOP extremists in our legislature.
We cannot accomplish this without protecting Democratic-held seats like District 20. I’m ready to continue working for my constituents in D-20, but winning this race will not be an easy win.
I’ve never been one to back down from a fight, and I fully intend to continue serving in the legislature - but I need your help to be successful on Election Day in 2024. Please consider supporting my re-election campaign today by joining the host committee for this event! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbelldec2023]
Thank you for your consideration, I truly couldn’t do this without you. I’m looking forward to a great event on December 11th, and I look forward to seeing you there!
Sen. Heidi Campbell
RSVP [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbelldec2023]

name: (2) me, Donald J. Trump
subject: RE: My defiant entrance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
I made it clear: I will NEVER SURRENDER.
| | Friend,
---
The Democrats want me to give up.
They want to break my spirit.
They want me to stare at the litany of false charges against me, the threat of 1,000 years in prison, the notorious mugshot, and the “corporate death penalty” – and drop to my knees in surrender.
But, as was clear from my defiant entrance at the UFC match in New York City last weekend after having to stand trial just a few days prior, there’s no attack on the face of the planet that can break me._I will**NEVER SURRENDER** our mission to Save America!_

Reaching grassroots supporters directly is CRITICAL if we’re going to Save America from Joe Biden and the Left. But, in order to do that we need to provide supporters with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts.

**TEXT TRUMP to 88022** to start receiving text messages from President Trump.

It’s because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU, that we will SAVE AMERICA! Thank you again for your generous support. They want me to stare at the litany of false charges against me, the threat of 1,000 years in prison, the notorious mugshot, and the “corporate death penalty” – and drop to my knees in surrender. But, as was clear from my defiant entrance at the UFC match in New York City last weekend after having to stand trial just a few days prior, there’s no attack on the face of the planet that can break me.I willNEVER SURRENDER our mission to Save America! | Even as it may seem that our country is falling apart, that the world is burning, and that our once great Republic conceived in liberty and justice is transforming into a Third World Dictatorship, we simply cannot give up hope. I have never been more committed to saving our great country. Are you? If you cannot contribute at this time because of the very sinister people in control of D.C. who want to crush our spirits, then please do not even think about donating. But I will still ask for this one favor: do not, ever, under any circumstances, lose faith! | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: DonaldJTrump.com Date: Mon, November 13, 2023 Subject: Witness Stand ➡️ The Arena To: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Friend, Last week, President Trump took the witness stand in New York City. And to close out the week, President Trump returned to New York City with Tucker Carlson to step into the UFC arena and show the entire nation that he will NEVER SURRENDER our mission to Make America Great Again! | Upon setting foot in the arena, he was met with an outpouring of love. His defiant return to the city he once built is a reminder that he will never forget his first and most loyal supporters. President Trump’s powerful entrance sent a message to the tyrannical Democrats that they can NEVER break his spirit – even as they try to wrongfully imprison him for life and invoke the “corporate death penalty” upon him to financially destroy him. And that goes for all of us! No matter how vicious the Left’s attacks become, we can never lose faith in our mission to save America. Even as it may seem that our country is falling apart, that the world is burning, and that our once great Republic conceived in liberty and justice is transforming into a Third World Dictatorship, we simply cannot give up hope. President Trump has never been more committed to saving our great country. Are you? If you cannot contribute at this time because of the very sinister people in control of D.C. who want to crush our spirits, then please do not even think about donating. name: Bob Casey
subject: Asking you personally:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
Will you help us out?
| | | Friend, I'm here to talk to you about the map. Not just the map of Pennsylvania, but the roadmap we'll need to follow to defend our Senate majority next year.

So how do we get from point A (a razor-thin Senate majority) to point B (keeping Mitch McConnell out of power)? It starts with _you_ and a road that runs straight through Pennsylvania.

**[To chart out a path to victory, we must win in every single swing state. Will you split $5 between my campaign and the DSCC to defend my seat and keep the Senate map blue?>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/12724?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20231116-BobCasey-CaseyTandem3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20231116-BobCasey-CaseyTandem3-Pros-sl1&akid=12635%2E9716520%2ETzmT5l)**

The truth is, we've been down this road before. It's a little like déjà vu, team:

* Last year, Republicans ran a wealthy out-of-state businessman for Senate in PA.
This year, McConnell's hand-picked recruit is _running a similar playbook._
* Last year, the pundits said defending the Senate would be an uphill battle.
This year, they're saying our majority is in _even more_ danger.
* Last year, Democrats like you stepped up in key moments.
This year, _I know I can count on you to step up again._

To win again in PA, defend the Senate, and stop the GOP, we'll need to do what we did last time -- fight hard, hit our fundraising goals, and lay the groundwork for historic victories.

**[Now's the time to make that happen. Will you chip in $5 or more to my campaign and the DSCC to help us win in Pennsylvania and defend our Senate majority?](https://go.dscc.org/go/12724?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20231116-BobCasey-CaseyTandem3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20231116-BobCasey-CaseyTandem3-Pros-sl1&akid=12635%2E9716520%2ETzmT5l)**

If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Bob Casey for Senate and the DSCC.

Bob Casey

_Listen, Donald Trump and his MAGA army are trying to make voters lose faith in every last democratic institution!_

...and media watchdogs like _MSNBC_ are just their latest target!

We need to know that their plan to overtake this country is NOT impacting the minds of our most loyal Democratic supporters!

Peter,
In odd and even years alike, we work year-round to have Keith’s back as he fights to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect as the People’s Lawyer.
Keith was in one of the closest races in the country last year, and powerful special interests are still working 24/7 to restrict our right to vote, end our right to choose, make us less safe, and make corporations more powerful and the middle class weaker.
This grassroots team is our only line of defense, and the work never stops. It’s essential we keep our budget on track month after month to hold the line. That’s why we’re reaching out today to ask for your help.
We just got out of a fundraising meeting, and to get straight to the point: We’re over halfway through the month and less than 40% of the way to our November budget target.
We especially know that fundraising will take a dip around the holidays, so it’s essential that we pick up the pace ASAP if we’re going to catch back up in time to keep the lights on.
According to our records, you haven’t donated to Keith’s campaign yet this year. That means you’re still eligible to take advantage of your PCR. You can donate up to $50 right now (or $100 for couples) and receive a full refund from the state!
[**Peter, Keith is only able to keep up his critical work if he has the support of this entire team. name: Vikram Mansharamani
subject: Jason Osborne and Vikram Mansharamani - NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY
body:
Podcast, radio show, conversations...
| | | | PLEASE SUBSCRIBE TO DR. MANSHARAMANI'S NEWSLETTER at [MANSHARAMANI.SUBSTACK.COM](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y-iphapdUnSvHSbAJVY_b1J1q8ruuV53JT9JC2Du5-tedC1shZv26aU7NqGfIfrCJxvv4t9KPkxtuMhhaI73cJEdoXOMgYx_CJ9zLBOHAauCT0yLU3kK9ynVQ-uaoFvAapn_PJGvKFCMOSCZjezwxXvLjhXXZrDL&c=QjY9lWwjpGYdbB4QIL3dByJFhZtQFiQhDtEZ9vf9gvC1CMzdYkBSMA==&ch=Oq9-jTcuNXLQdfN1igTJhsRqQgIFGLK6VzHTg2MyYZ2e6wE4C2dT9A==)
---
# Jason Osborne,
# NH House Majority Leader
---
---
|
---
In this episode of Navigating Uncertainty, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Jason Osborne, the New Hampshire House of Representatives Majority Leader. Jason shares his story of growing up on the left coast, attending Hillsdale College, and his path from studying economics in graduate school to running a substantial call center business. He also describes how pink signs led to his career in politics before he opines on some of New Hampshire's biggest challenges. Jason concludes with good advice for all of us seeking to successfully navigate uncertainty: create as many options for yourself as possible (and also save money)!
Please tune in via any of the links below, or if you'd prefer to watch the conversation, please visit mansharamani.substack.com for link to the video.
---
PRIOR EPISODES ALL AVAILABLE ON DEMAND!
For those who missed the prior episodes of NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY, have no fear! They're all available on demand via the links below. As you sit in traffic during your weekend trips, tune in and use the opportunity to learn about some fascinating people as well as some of the most important topics of our times!
You'll find my conversations with Bill Greiner, Founder of Primary Bank, Jon Savira-Savett, Rabbi of Temple Beth Abraham in Nashua NH, Charles Miller, Co-Founder and Chief Executive Officer of Lynk Global, Matthew Bartlett, Co-Founder of Darby Field Advisors, Mary Steady, Director of Pupil Services at LinWood Public Schools, Mike Dennehy, Public and Political Affairs Consultant, Lori Van Dusen, Founder of LVW Advisors, Fahim Fazli, Actor and Hollywood Insider, Robert Reynolds, CEO of Putnam Investments, Dr. Benjamin Kilham, founder of the Kilham Bear Center, Ashlee Vance, Author of When the Heavens Went on Sale, Darrell Hartman, Author of The Battle of Ink & Ice, Jim Cantrell, Co-Founder of SpaceX and Founder of Phantom Space, Dean Carucci, CEO of the Portsmouth Regional Hospital, GOP Presidential Candidate Doug Burgum, Jack Heath, Host of Good Morning New Hampshire, John Formella, Attorney General of New Hampshire, Dean Kamen, Founder of DEKA Research, Donald Kreis, Consumer Advocate for the State of NH, Jeremy Hitchcock, Founder of Dyn and Executive Chairman of Minim, Phil Taub, Partner at NixonPeabody and Co-Founder of SWIM WITH A MISSION, Morgan Ortagus, Former Spokesperson for the State Department, David Jordan, Founder of Seven Hills Foundation, John Avlon, Senior Political Analyst at CNN, Derek Leathers, Chairman & CEO of Werner Enterprises, Rudy Glocker, Founder of Burgeon Outdoor, former US Senator Kelly Ayotte, NCUA Vice Chair Kyle Hauptman, Miami Mayor Francis Suarez, NH Governor Chris Sununu, NH Education Czar Frank Edelblut, Commissioner of Business and Economic Affairs Taylor Caswell, GOP Presidential Candidate Vivek Ramaswamy, former Commander of NORAD and Retired Four Star General Lori Robinson, and former Chair of House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence Mike Rogers.

---
| |
---
---
|
---
|
Navigating Uncertainty is a show in which acclaimed global trend-watcher and futurist [Vikram Mansharamani](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y-iphapdUnSvHSbAJVY_b1J1q8ruuV53JT9JC2Du5-tedC1shZv26Te__bFsL1Jk04UhhvTJgM0wDh0PM71nO15DpvbeiykUD7hVzGts59iqDHyvX4h39iCXlh_a71D9BgdterobnhGb_WBS-0UK5A==&c=QjY9lWwjpGYdbB4QIL3dByJFhZtQFiQhDtEZ9vf9gvC1CMzdYkBSMA==&ch=Oq9-jTcuNXLQdfN1igTJhsRqQgIFGLK6VzHTg2MyYZ2e6wE4C2dT9A==) dives into how leaders make decisions. Through long-form conversations that move beyond sound-bites, Dr. Mansharamani explores how some of the most successful people think about tough choices. Serious, irreverent, entertaining, heart-warming, and occasionally tear-jerking, Navigating Uncertainty offers listeners bite-sized authentic biographies of high-impact leaders from all walks of life.Weekly episodes are released every Thursday via Apple Podcast, Spotify and everywhere podcasts are generally available!

To stay in touch with Dr. Mansharaman and to subscribe (for free) to his weekly newsletter, please visit [mansharamani.substack.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y-iphapdUnSvHSbAJVY_b1J1q8ruuV53JT9JC2Du5-tedC1shZv26f8fvwyMjK80yuK3hveeIn9cdZpXt3sZjPQ2138QA0X_DYKNaSfI_y8pgn-yqJOlUZXbFuMe8_3xOZ77a8oW__AMOCmnAP-9K241jg6P2p2C&c=QjY9lWwjpGYdbB4QIL3dByJFhZtQFiQhDtEZ9vf9gvC1CMzdYkBSMA==&ch=Oq9-jTcuNXLQdfN1igTJhsRqQgIFGLK6VzHTg2MyYZ2e6wE4C2dT9A==)

clean_body: Podcast, radio show, conversations... | | | | PLEASE SUBSCRIBE TO DR. MANSHARAMANI'S NEWSLETTER at == Jason Osborne, NH House Majority Leader | In this episode of Navigating Uncertainty, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Jason Osborne, the New Hampshire House of Representatives Majority Leader. Jason shares his story of growing up on the left coast, attending Hillsdale College, and his path from studying economics in graduate school to running a substantial call center business. He also describes how pink signs led to his career in politics before he opines on some of New Hampshire's biggest challenges. Jason concludes with good advice for all of us seeking to successfully navigate uncertainty: create as many options for yourself as possible (and also save money)! Please tune in via any of the links below, or if you'd prefer to watch the conversation, please visit mansharamani.substack.com for link to the video. PRIOR EPISODES ALL AVAILABLE ON DEMAND! For those who missed the prior episodes of NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY, have no fear! They're all available on demand via the links below. As you sit in traffic during your weekend trips, tune in and use the opportunity to learn about some fascinating people as well as some of the most important topics of our times! You'll find my conversations with Bill Greiner, Founder of Primary Bank, Jon Savira-Savett, Rabbi of Temple Beth Abraham in Nashua NH, Charles Miller, Co-Founder and Chief Executive Officer of Lynk Global, Matthew Bartlett, Co-Founder of Darby Field Advisors, Mary Steady, Director of Pupil Services at LinWood Public Schools, Mike Dennehy, Public and Political Affairs Consultant, Lori Van Dusen, Founder of LVW Advisors, Fahim Fazli, Actor and Hollywood Insider, Robert Reynolds, CEO of Putnam Investments, Dr. Benjamin Kilham, founder of the Kilham Bear Center, Ashlee Vance, Author of When the Heavens Went on Sale, Darrell Hartman, Author of The Battle of Ink & Ice, Jim Cantrell, Co-Founder of SpaceX and Founder of Phantom Space, Dean Carucci, CEO of the Portsmouth Regional Hospital, GOP Presidential Candidate Doug Burgum, Jack Heath, Host of Good Morning New Hampshire, John Formella, Attorney General of New Hampshire, Dean Kamen, Founder of DEKA Research, Donald Kreis, Consumer Advocate for the State of NH, Jeremy Hitchcock, Founder of Dyn and Executive Chairman of Minim, Phil Taub, Partner at NixonPeabody and Co-Founder of SWIM WITH A MISSION, Morgan Ortagus, Former Spokesperson for the State Department, David Jordan, Founder of Seven Hills Foundation, John Avlon, Senior Political Analyst at CNN, Derek Leathers, Chairman & CEO of Werner Enterprises, Rudy Glocker, Founder of Burgeon Outdoor, former US Senator Kelly Ayotte, NCUA Vice Chair Kyle Hauptman, Miami Mayor Francis Suarez, NH Governor Chris Sununu, NH Education Czar Frank Edelblut, Commissioner of Business and Economic Affairs Taylor Caswell, GOP Presidential Candidate Vivek Ramaswamy, former Commander of NORAD and Retired Four Star General Lori Robinson, and former Chair of House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence Mike Rogers. | | | | Navigating Uncertainty is a show in which acclaimed global trend-watcher and futurist == dives into how leaders make decisions. Through long-form conversations that move beyond sound-bites, Dr. Mansharamani explores how some of the most successful people think about tough choices. Serious, irreverent, entertaining, heart-warming, and occasionally tear-jerking, Navigating Uncertainty offers listeners bite-sized authentic biographies of high-impact leaders from all walks of life.Weekly episodes are released every Thursday via Apple Podcast, Spotify and everywhere podcasts are generally available! To stay in touch with Dr. Mansharaman and to subscribe (for free) to his weekly newsletter, please visit == LINKS TO THE SHOW | | == | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | | | | | | Vikram Mansharamani | P.O. subject: Why we’re doing this

body:
| | | [](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=229bd2fac1044dd6be58a054fce9ee47&_e=uFYhejl-YagifB5sH09iPQuJlFWIL43OBTkdY8szr-hDug2t137E22uYy1EcVakDQLan_pfEb1MOyTco1N4Tdxf_NI29Be5XHgJhQ3ofmLZFU17Wfx4f1eDxiHOb5tyHlBztzxpmq6cVs0oQpD7IvZjjlkkwkGFxyMANfMdVoexkq_ccFmoyHhqHnNWcfh3KdyWBrObxih_G4ahDnme2bg53J-6ELbKJKAfZERAuBJ5lvrjUq9aeDyO36Q7uRLHGqLuHjXVzrshNnr1YT5aa3UVh-Bdz1QGlEnyKrz-gBp0uo64rMg-PiYM4Y0Fp4d2KlnzQrc_ZnaqwGxz6P8lUxbYmj5rmDfHlJ4Yh_pRZJJSQPlu5oOYXgQOfk7992epW)

| | Peter, As I talk to people throughout our Commonwealth, people keep asking me:
“April, why are you and Hung doing this? After twenty-five years in the Navy,
don’t you two want to take a break?”
But every time, I have the same answer: **we’ve been called to fight.**
When he was just 18, Hung knew that he had a duty to this country. That’s
why he had the honor of being appointed to the Naval Academy. Over the years, his calling to service has only grown.
Right now, we know we don’t need more politicians. We need leaders like Hung.
He puts duty and honor into everything he does and even though he’s hung
up his uniform, he’s still feels called to serve for the future of our children.
For my husband, sitting on the sidelines while the country he loves struggles, **isn’t an option.**
We see how the woke agenda affects our communities and country, and we
won’t stand by and allow Democrats take away the freedoms Hung fought for.
**That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter. ** Hung and I are putting in long hours for this campaign, but we can’t do it
alone.
We need your support as we embark on this journey, and we know you share
the same love and passion for America that we do. **[Will you put that passion into action and pitch in today to help send Hung to the U.S. Senate?](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=229bd2fac1044dd6be58a054fce9ee47&_e=uFYhejl-YagifB5sH09iPQuJlFWIL43OBTkdY8szr-hDug2t137E22uYy1EcVakDQLan_pfEb1MOyTco1N4Tdxf_NI29Be5XHgJhQ3ofmLZFU17Wfx4f1eDxiHOb5tyHlBztzxpmq6cVs0oQpD7IvZjjlkkwkGFxyMANfMdVoexkq_ccFmoyHhqHnNWcfh3KdyWBrObxih_G4ahDnme2biR7wo6MbfZwBXYVR55gAOqXp1D30NOmEjuyBqoaP-vV3oEXJvNBNGltFpEgZZlPZIYYlAE0e2oNZdcsZ_CcnShWsk5FCYSCSfqm4_LAU4o4gfIriUNGkk5SEz63Wxjb0IFbuZAvl72jyLHQGUjskO0A8GKY8CAOuCmH1XOtGMo4)**

subject: The final quarter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
We’re halfway through the final quarter of the year! That means 2024 is about a month and a half away—along with the important end-of-year FEC deadline.
As the campaign’s treasurer, I’m keeping a close eye on our account—as I always do—seeing what we have to spend—and what we have to raise—to get our message out to voters. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231116?refcode=lpfe231116]
Being able to keep up our fundraising pace means that we will have what we need to win from today through Election Day. The resources we raise now shape the campaign we can run.
Having won elections before, we know what we need to do and when we need to do it. Every dollar powers the things that make for a strong, winning campaign—like printing literature and yard signs, recruiting volunteers to help us reach voters in our district, and so much more. And our on-the-ground organization will play a big role in the outcome on Election Day.
Contribute today and help us ensure our campaign strength is sustained and sustainable through the entire election cycle. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231116?refcode=lpfe231116]
Thank you for your support!
Gordon

name: Christian Castelli
subject: One thing!
body:
Peter,

[Congressman Chip Roy](https://roy.house.gov/) said it best.

**_" One thing. I want my Republican colleagues to give me one thing. One. That I can go campaign on and say we did. Anyone sitting in the complex, if you want to come down to the floor, and explain to me one meaningful, significant thing the Republican Party has done." _**[**_U.S. Rep. Chip Roy (TX)._**](https://chiproy.com/)

_Rep. Chip Roy Video:_[_https://www.newsweek.com/chip-roy-texas-republican-house-representatives-speech-1844256_](https://www.newsweek.com/chip-roy-texas-republican-house-representatives-speech-1844256) __

Congressman Roy hit the nail on the head. What has our Republican majority done?

[****](https://secure.winred.com/committee-to-elect-christian-castelli/donate-today)

_I 'm Christian Castelli. My military service includes 22 years as a decorated soldier, Green Beret, and senior advisor at the Pentagon._

When I speak with people across the NC-06 congressional district, there is one thing I hear often. Americans face dangers abroad and at home - what are we doing about it?

I am __the best prepared candidate__ to meet the challenges we face today. I will represent North Carolina. I will serve North Carolina. This is not a job opportunity for me. It is not a childhood hobby. This is deadly serious business.

We have Iranian state-sponsored terrorists that attacked Israel, killed Americans and Israelis, want the annihilation of the United States and Israel. Joe Biden's failed leadership has weakened America and endangered our allies.

Our homeland is unsafe. We have a border that is exposed and allows 10,000 illegal entries every day. Joe Biden and Democrats are allowing anyone and everyone to enter our country with nothing more than a promise to appear months or years in the future.

Middle-class families are being choked by inflation - higher gas, groceries, and rent prices. Our economy is making the American Dream unattainable, but reckless federal spending continues.

My entire career was spent meeting challenges, overcoming difficulties and defeating them. I have been trained and prepared for moments like we face.

I won't sit idly by as Joe Biden and Democrats ruin America, and Republican politicians do nothing about it. I will defund sanctuary cities, cut wasteful spending and protect Americans at home and abroad.

Democrats want to harm America. Republican politicians have failed us and continue to fail us. We need selfless service, not opportunistic politicians who call it service. We need real-world experience, not silver spoon privilege.

Together, we can restore safety and prosperity in America. I need you to help me win this Primary so I can stand for you in Washington - and fight for your values.

[****](https://secure.winred.com/committee-to-elect-christian-castelli/donate-today)

R. Christian Castelli
Lieutenant Colonel (Retired)
U.S. Army Special Forces
Republican Candidate for the U.S. House of Representatives
(336) 810-8100
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** from **colonel@castellifornc.com**.
If you do not wish to receive further messages from us, [ please click here to unsubscribe](https://emailtracking-cm.aristotle.com/frmEmailUnsubscribe.aspx?databaseId=b33a3810-9cbf-4584-a3d2-01672886537a&activityID=1cb72480-0aea-4608-a0c6-4b8d9caf21ea).

subject: we came up short

body:

| | |

Hi there, team — it's Sydney, Debbie's finance director. I hate to reach out like this, but I've got some tough news: **We missed our critical mid-month goal by about $5,000.**
I know it's hard to believe, but 2024 is just around the corner. And once the election year officially begins, Rick Scott won’t pull any punches. So here at Team Debbie HQ, we're all hands on deck. Every single goal is absolutely critical. And every single dollar helps fuel the grassroots operations that we need to win — from reaching out to voters and running vital ads to hiring more campaign staff.
We have to enter 2024 with a strong grassroots war chest — but we're running out of time. **I’m meeting with Debbie in the morning, and I know it would make her day if we close this gap.**
**We're competing against a self-funded mega-millionaire who spent $64 MILLION of his own money to win this seat last time by just 10,033 votes. Peter,
---
We are less than ONE YEAR from Election Day 2024, and we can’t slow down if we want to defend this all-important seat and our narrow majority.
---
**As a toss-up race in a critical battleground state, all eyes are on our campaign as the radical Left’s #1 target.**
---
_Joe Biden and his fellow far-Left Democrats know that my dedication to defending and preserving the American Dream is the biggest threat to their power and control._
---
That’s why they’ve launched relentless multi-million-dollar lying attacks to try to derail my campaign.
---
But their millions are no match for our grassroots army and with your help, I know we will keep the momentum going through Election Day to win this all-important seat and save the American Dream.

clean_body: Let’s keep the momentum going to defend this all-important seat. | Peter, We are less than ONE YEAR from Election Day 2024, and we can’t slow down if we want to defend this all-important seat and our narrow majority. As a toss-up race in a critical battleground state, all eyes are on our campaign as the radical Left’s #1 target. Joe Biden and his fellow far-Left Democrats know that my dedication to defending and preserving the American Dream is the biggest threat to their power and control. That’s why they’ve launched relentless multi-million-dollar lying attacks to try to derail my campaign. But their millions are no match for our grassroots army and with your help, I know we will keep the momentum going through Election Day to win this all-important seat and save the American Dream. Thanks to your continued support we’ve had massive success in fundraising the past few quarters – ensuring we have the funds necessary to FIGHT BACK against the Left’s attacks. We MUST keep the momentum going if we want to defend this seat. The future of our country and the American Dream is on the line in 2024 as Biden’s disastrous agenda threatens to destroy the very foundation this country was built on. Democrats think they can topple my campaign to win this all-important seat and take back the House majority. But they underestimate our strength and determination to ensure future generations get the opportunity to live the American Dream. Thank you, Rep. Juan Ciscomani Arizona’s 6th Congressional District PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 35103 Tucson, AZ 85740

name: Tom Barrett for Congress
subject: Barrett SITREP
body:
Open For Your Full Briefing | | | November 16, 2023
---
| |
---
Peter Willis,As the holiday season approaches, we continue to make great progress on our petition gathering to secure ballot access. As I talk and visit with voters across the Seventh District, they all agree we need stronger leadership in Washington. That’s why I’m in this race. The status quo must change, and we can’t send another career politician - like my opponent - to Washington who will go along to get along. Democrats in Washington are preparing for a HUGE fight in Michigan because they know the path to the House majority runs through this district. And I’m ready for it. I’m a 22-year U.S. Army veteran who won’t back down from the attacks from the left. We need to show America what real leadership looks like, and that begins by electing a member of Congress who is focused on the issues that matter to Michigan families, not to special interests and lobbyists.Thanks for standing with me in this fight,
---
|
---
---

They showcase local artists and their artwork on tiles that are displayed on their ceiling. | | Tom attended a meet & greet with the Ingham County GOP in Lansing and shares an update about his race for Congress. | | | | | | | | | | | mailto:campaign@tombarrettforcongress.com | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- PO Box 15221, Lansing MI 48901, USA

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73466967/438600976/-693783797?refcode=EM_F_231116power_N_SB_90DO_7_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjllMDU0OC05Yjg0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hGFwA7Y_fzIZ-9E5dNXb7axOHytG4y3W02fa0v4_vVg=) Peter,

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Ronchetti?=
subject: Exclusive: Inside Scoop from DC — an evening with Trump's rival
body:
🚨 Behind-the-scenes GOP debate prep | New episode for dpwillis67@gmail.com - No Doubt About It Podcast | | | | | |
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=38e8807558&e=567664f14c)

Friend, we're thrilled to share an exciting update from the [No Doubt About It Podcast](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=356b42939e&e=567664f14c) with Mark and Krysty Ronchetti.

[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=cdb68cb44e&e=567664f14c)
In our latest episode, we bring you [**a special edition direct from Washington, D.C.,**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=6f7d8d0a1a&e=567664f14c) where we delved into the upcoming Republican Presidential Primary.

Our team attended events and even had the opportunity to spend an evening with one of Donald Trump's prominent challengers. **Tune in for firsthand updates, key takeaways, and our impressions from this insightful experience.**
| [STREAM EPISODE 53 NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=a33dd69894&e=567664f14c)
---
But that's not all – we're joined by the esteemed political consultant, Brett O'Donnell. Known as one of the most well-connected individuals in DC, Brett is currently working with Governor Ron DeSantis on debate prep and strategy.

We pick Brett's brain on the state of the race and discuss how Republicans can navigate the abortion issue. **He also shares his thoughts on what needs to happen for the Republican side of the Presidential race to truly heat up.**
| [STREAM EPISODE 53 NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=50cb10a78e&e=567664f14c)
---
In the final segment, we dive into the future of Joe Biden in the race for President. **Considering his policy choices and declining mental acuity, we explore the near certainty that the Democratic Party will seek an alternative candidate.**

It's [**a conversation**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=60ecef6f3c&e=567664f14c) you won't want to miss!
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=2c4c211822&e=567664f14c)

If you enjoy this episode, please consider supporting us by **liking, subscribing, and leaving a review on your favorite podcast platform.** Don't forget to subscribe to our YouTube channel for additional content.

For those looking to show some extra love or sport some podcast gear, visit [nodoubtaboutitpodcast.com](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=489f966f09&e=567664f14c) where you can also make [financial donations](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=027bbf7009&e=567664f14c) to help us continue delivering valuable content.

Thank you for being a valued member of the No Doubt About It Podcast community. We can't wait for you to join us in exploring the dynamic landscape of US politics!

See you soon,
Mark and Krysty Ronchetti
|
---
|
---

name: Team Slotkin
subject: Michigan Republicans on Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=819%2E135344%2EvxZQc_)

Friend --
The Republicans in the Michigan Senate primary are twisting themselves into knots trying to both cater to the extreme, far-right Republican base and paint themselves as moderates who can win a general election.
Nowhere is that more clear than how the candidates talk about former President Donald Trump.
When asked in an interview whether Donald Trump is honest and truthful, Peter Meijer -- who is best known for his vote to impeach Trump in the aftermath of January 6th -- **in the same breath said that "facts absolutely matter" and "Donald Trump's never lied to me."** He’s also said that he will support the former president in the 2024 election. It’s an attempt to try to give Trump a pass on deceiving the American people while saying that Trump doesn't always "get the facts right all the time."
Also recently, former Congressman Mike Rogers -- who is a former FBI officer -- was asked about Donald Trump’s dozens of criminal indictments. His response? He deflected the question by claiming that we should be more concerned about the U.S. Department of Justice. This comes after one of Rogers’ first moves in his campaign was to release a glossy video attacking his former colleagues at the FBI for investigating Trump’s alleged criminal actions.
Both of these candidates want to have it both ways: They want to appeal to Trump and the extreme base of the GOP while also posturing as the sensible, responsible, moderate candidate who can win independent voters. **But both can’t be true.**
While Republicans have to sort through their messy and chaotic primary, our campaign is staying focused on what really matters: talking to voters, listening, and figuring out how to fight on their behalf.
[**With that in mind, can you make a $3 contribution to Elissa Slotkin's campaign for Senate? Help us inform voters that those who hope to win this seat can’t seem to make up their mind who they want to be.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov23.RK33_Y&refcode=em231116-1-30&t=2&akid=819%2E135344%2EvxZQc_)**

Thanks for all you're doing.

name: IlhanOmar.com
subject: obscene
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=737%2E791427%2Eq8tdAp)

It's been a big week for our campaign. If you have a minute, here's a recap:
**FIRST:** Ilhan's primary challenger from last year decided he wants a rematch, and launched his 2024 campaign against us.
**THEN:** News broke that AIPAC — who spent hundreds of thousands of dark-money dollars supporting our opponent in 2022 — are already gearing up to spend _**"at least $100 million"**_ against progressive champions like Ilhan, Cori Bush, and Rashida Tlaib this cycle.
**NOW:****Ilhan is counting on ALL of us to fight back.**
You probably already know that Ilhan doesn't fund her campaigns the way a lot of her colleagues in Congress do.
She doesn't have any shady super PACs backing her. She doesn't trade political favors for blank checks from corporate lobbyists. And there certainly aren't any right-wing mega-donors waiting in the wings to bail her out.
_What she does have is us_ — a grassroots movement that has been, is, and always will be funded by lots and lots of people chipping in what they can.
The unfortunate truth is that it's going to cost an obscene amount of money to take on the likes of AIPAC and their Republican donors in this race. So please:

name: Candace Owens, BLEXIT at TPUSA
subject: Can I Send You This Anti-Woke T-Shirt?
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

Please read the following message
from our sponsor.

Fellow Patriot,

At my first Live Free Tour event with Turning Point USA this
fall, a student attendee asked me to address those on-campus who
"actively feel victimized" ... just by my physical presence.

My answer was simple, and I bet it's one you'd tell your own
kids and grandkids:

"Life is tough. Get a helmet, man."

The room erupted with applause from BLEXIT activists and TPUSA
students ... and then, when the video was posted online, it went
viral - reaching millions of people in just a few hours.

Today I want to send YOU a "Life is tough. Get a helmet, man"
T-shirt of your own. All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of
any amount to help BLEXIT at TPUSA cover costs.

But please don't wait: to receive a FREE T-shirt of your own
with my thanks, you must make a gift before MIDNIGHT on November
30.

Get your free T-shirt now

At BLEXIT -- the non-profit I founded with Brandon Tatum -- we
are committed to DESTROYING the Victimhood Mentality that has
taken over America and building up a Victor's Mentality instead.

The Left's toxic Victimhood Mentality has created a society of
emotional toddlers - people who complain, erupt into tantrums,
protest without knowing why or what they're protesting, and lack
education, reason, purpose, conviction, or courage.

And the result is a generation of young people who expect
everyone to coddle, compliment, or otherwise indulge them in
whatever Victimhood Mentality they've wrongly learned.

It takes courage to speak the truth, and that's just what
BLEXIT does in order to awaken, empower, and inspire young
Americans to adopt a Victor's Mindset and pursue their own
American Dreams.

Can I send you a FREE "Life is tough. Get a helmet, man."
T-shirt to thank you for your support of BLEXIT today?

All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of any amount, even
just a dollar, to help BLEXIT cover the costs ... but I must hear
from you before MIDNIGHT on November 30!

Get your free T-shirt now

I truly believe that, thanks to our continued work through
BLEXIT, Americans are beginning to wake up - and they're tired of
the Victimhood Mentality that has nearly destroyed our
communities and our culture.

Thank you for your continued support. Together, we are making a
difference.

Candace Owens

Chair of BLEXIT

Turning Point USA

Get your free T-shirt now

4940 East Beverly Road

Phoenix, Arizona 85044

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

TheFederalistWire.com

525-K East Market Street # 114

City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176
Contact Email:
today@thefederalistwire.com

© Copyright
TheFederalistWire.com All Rights Reserved.

This stalling comes as no surprise, Peter. Republicans have shoehorned their national abortion ban into _ every funding bill they could_ prior to the deadline, despite knowing they won't reach the necessary vote threshold.

We've said it before and we'll say it again:**A Republican majority led by Speaker Johnson is one that is willing to hold our government captive to prioritize their draconian anti-choice platform.**

**That's why EMILYs List has endorsed Democratic pro-choice women fighting to take back the House majority. Now, we want to hear from _you_.
