name: House Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: It’s all coordinated. And it’s all preplanned.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.
My fellow Americans – this is Mike Johnson.
| |

---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=142e3cf3860343e1a1326d3ed801f638&_t=RIeO_RLiY4a5KLdPglihijJtwlFX_bkubUWYnyqY258Unnjf-cAwztifH7Y1o4oASNUS7Mta6n7SF22QokGtK-V4wqK83Ky5dWaH__fLmSk%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=142e3cf3860343e1a1326d3ed801f638&_t=RIeO_RLiY4a5KLdPglihijJtwlFX_bkubUWYnyqY258Unnjf-cAwztifH7Y1o4oASNUS7Mta6n7SF22QokGtK-V4wqK83Ky5dWaH__fLmSk%3D)

| My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

_**[This is a longer email but I'm humbly asking you to read it start to finish.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=142e3cf3860343e1a1326d3ed801f638&_e=fmWY7GGI3S0y-n2-Sjxmgjukv8R8ie_se7MKInr8jSk1NY2VzLWYI9GWsBFoT7rRraAAJM_gxVJYi6L-xtUxIymVI-E7OUvvmLpoXgwUi4bY5dd2tiziGgaK5spwFPzLmY9ijzoVfeRlxJ06q3S1WGRrTYULAtvXqSxXYYoPOu1vIftFX3UL-OgI5RPZgJ8nKVjczKod0ifFWFcVutaoHYA_6k3R8KTut6E2X0M8yMmH6wMFTX_RzG4CR596fqtO4svOMwQtzCv2hazLOujvrYgZFql7iHWdG373fPWSC-mKvgmUPZszkc2PJfqU-WIzchzL7OLEpF-yJjOYu5BTuc9_GsLJsXhDr0vRVEAzCht6niRwyBITYVo7oX8AuL2a2f5O8ZEDqLu6t3cUYcrnS2Bm1glEAGBI694Z6RND-WU%3D "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.")**_

Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.
* The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.
* Politico fired off this headline: _" Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson."_
* And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. _But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not _really_ the goal..._

The _real_ goal of this political ambush is two-fold: **1)** smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and **2)** scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

**It 's about power and money. Nothing else.**

That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. _**[So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=142e3cf3860343e1a1326d3ed801f638&_e=fmWY7GGI3S0y-n2-Sjxmgjukv8R8ie_se7MKInr8jSk1NY2VzLWYI9GWsBFoT7rRraAAJM_gxVJYi6L-xtUxIymVI-E7OUvvmLpoXgwUi4bY5dd2tiziGgaK5spwFPzLmY9ijzoVfeRlxJ06q3S1WGRrTYULAtvXqSxXYYoPOu1vIftFX3UL-OgI5RPZgJ8nKVjczKod0ifFWFcVutaoHYA_6k3R8KTut6E2X0M8yMmH6wMFTX_RzG4CR596fqtORKVnFuqRhrYeFofZ-FtvhkL4oFI-n5S4KhRGpwhVGHtOgv-BAEJtvgNW0dy2idHH015FbYLBQ9tD5jE6AdPuWgYUAHQV6mXvxW69Mq4X9Sb_qGZQlodk2zzgr6EmyWu-db38IcFy5Z_f2x_-SE6HRKyaOrVfa-ou5_Av14azmNY%3D "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country.

**If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority.**

So here's my final pitch to you:

We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now.

The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this.

Let me make myself perfectly clear:

_I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative._

_**[The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=142e3cf3860343e1a1326d3ed801f638&_e=fmWY7GGI3S0y-n2-Sjxmgjukv8R8ie_se7MKInr8jSk1NY2VzLWYI9GWsBFoT7rRraAAJM_gxVJYi6L-xtUxIymVI-E7OUvvmLpoXgwUi4bY5dd2tiziGgaK5spwFPzLmY9ijzoVfeRlxJ06q3S1WGRrTYULAtvXqSxXYYoPOu1vIftFX3UL-OgI5RPZgJ8nKVjczKod0ifFWFcVutaoHYA_6k3R8KTut6E2X0M8yMmH6wMFTX_RzG4CR596fqtOjcu0MQgS4JHJh4FvtgUL9t2sWYlJNxkNOiCUvIc7kKw0JTkYSs0ToTxqwAGAkFruBDWdohySwglF9wdMhMKJJB1v5VH9xLVtdqAe6iAFNUIIvbjtFHxNgyK3TyRTnJG8PpWCGa9n3VVV4zR06MiQ6zbfn89a01e3-f0MBNFcF_g%3D "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.")**_

That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in?
---

clean_body: This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish. My fellow Americans – this is Mike Johnson. | | | | | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson. "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish." Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me. The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC. Politico fired off this headline: " Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson." And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports. Look: These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not really the goal... The real goal of this political ambush is two-fold: 1) smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and 2) scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats. It 's about power and money. Nothing else. That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month." It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country. If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority. So here's my final pitch to you: We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now. The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this. Let me make myself perfectly clear: I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative. "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING." That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in? Thanks for all you do. In liberty, Speaker Mike Johnson | "Speaker Mike Johnson" | | | "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!" This is Steve Scalise. name: =?utf-8?Q?Kelvin=20King?=
subject: LWFAA Celebrates Successful Inaugural Town Hall in “Candid with the Candidates” Series
body:
Co-chairs of Let’s Win for America Action (LWFAA) Kelvin and Janelle King celebrate success | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lwfaa/lwfaa-celebrates-successful-inaugural-town-hall-in-candid-with-the-candidates-series?e=cb396c52a2)
---
| |
---
| | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
Nov. 16, 2023
Contact: info@lwfaa.com
**Let’s Win for America Action Celebrates Successful Inaugural Town Hall in “Candid with the Candidates” Series** ATLANTA (November 16, 2023) – Co-chairs of Let’s Win for America Action (LWFAA) Kelvin and Janelle King celebrate success, as their organization’s coordinated effort with the Atlanta Young Republicans (AYR) resulted in an exciting and informative evening with Governor Asa Hutchinson. LWFAA and AYR hosted Governor Hutchinson at the Park Bench Battery for a presidential town hall just before the Republican debate last week.
---
| [ ](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=1cb0013d72&e=cb396c52a2)
---
| As topics ranged from artificial intelligence to woke culture and everything in between, the Kings were elated at how thorough the conversation between Governor Hutchinson and audience members became. Kelvin, who moderated the town hall from the stage, praised Governor Hutchinson and attendees, saying, _“We are honored to facilitate authentic conversations between candidates and community members. We created LWFAA to bridge the gap between the Republican party and diverse communities, and as we looked around the room last night, it was clear we were fulfilling that goal.”_

Governor Hutchinson conversed with Kelvin on several different topics and took questions from audience members. The crowd was extremely diverse and consisted of many young voters, including students from Spelman College, Morehouse College, Clark Atlanta University, Morris Brown College, Kennesaw State University, and the University of Georgia.

Kelvin and Janelle would like to thank the Atlanta Young Republicans, Park Bench Battery, Governor Hutchinson, and all event attendees for their engagement in what will be a continuing series throughout the 2024 Republican Presidential Primary season.

The Kings encourage all interested in attending their next town hall to be on the lookout on their social media pages for the announcement of the next “Candid with the Candidates” event. ###
---
|
---
---
|

---

Fellow Conservative, Last Tuesday, _Unwoke: How to Defeat Cultural Marxism in America_ , was officially released far and wide across America. The response has been outstanding – it’s the right book at the right time, when we need to unite conservative patriots to prevail against the woke left.

[**ORDER YOUR COPY**](http://trk.tedcruz.-DMlEce8TOQXnWIZMog)

A few days before its release, Ted appeared on _Life, Liberty & Levin_ on Fox News Channel to discuss a variety of topics, including the border crisis, the Israel-Hamas war, and how woke ideology has taken hold in the current administration.

**They also discussed the book – as host Mark Levin summed it up,_Unwoke_ is “absolutely superb and prescient in many ways.”**

body:
| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f44c34e37a46421a8715435dc8fb2857&_e=gkAKCSS11ZJ7wSBoRRMCusgZ5HNImtBmZU29e00jqzavSjNTYgCmxhPuzLNE1xgJDi6lzKx2o3qWNkNr7y6mHJ1-aeIIv_nNRrmEzllF-9tp84nxW2gUM9AsO6RXdyro-PI1uYqM_qo9L6ZRGMzepY6Hfx5V5yGqf9fqIX9OE-WAIxw2zsVO353FAG9MR2I4rO6375ICIPwJc9sQNyu4X73kj3VQGXeVOpRgzy5jdztW7FYePqEyzinHKII-lmdrUvFcKQ2cPfuIab9XZ4fcf6SZ_S3SUdtm3i7e8sXXJDa3kVEaEbNzGa7XZqrlTkaYVaY8vSZbRxVqKcBFd5q_z65wjPgfwJ57mgSXQOYuLmZ19rxNKdtMe-EWs2q8L0XGt-tEsR0C3OtRvPspcrm--oOQc4LyaMPChh77D0aLD4z0mWUwf5u589zs-Ead2LqZ2XZqZfqzMu3q-B5EudmJxkjcCZ8B9SCju9L8npr2n4XPKKKiDSM5WWz9HGucGHMG4mk0u-z3AybN1gQE_-IOCKTLS7qdOG3O71ycXRfpoZgK-nuM6sJL0_NQa9AUKPeK)
---

Friend,

Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America's future.

| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---
After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _
---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️**

It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

Now, I'm running for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

clean_body: | | | | | | Friend, Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America's future. Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. "Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!" Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: " Don't complain. Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️ | | It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. Now, I'm running for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG! >>" Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days. "Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the of OUR movement?" | | Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, "I need your help – starting right now. " Your contribution is what keeps this movement alive and thriving, so thank you for standing with me. My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. . . Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. Our mailing address is: 186 Seven Farms Drive, Ste F-401 Daniel Island, SC 29492

name: Dan Kildee
subject: A Message to My Supporters

body:
I wanted to tell you directly: I have decided to not seek re-election and will leave Congress at the end of my term on January 3, 2025.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73471472/438610868/2066770328?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmZjNzg3Zi1hMDg0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hFCWBN0OhBfeWth7GumkCFh1-LgMwX7aqPRoW_zaEas=&emci=75d29e0c-9884-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=4bfc787f-a084-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=31479900) Friend —

I wanted to tell you directly: **I have decided to not seek re-election and will leave Congress at the end of my term on January 3, 2025.**

I hope you can take a few minutes to watch my announcement video to my constituents and supporters: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73471474/438610869/1777721005?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmZjNzg3Zi1hMDg0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hFCWBN0OhBfeWth7GumkCFh1-LgMwX7aqPRoW_zaEas=&emci=75d29e0c-9884-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=4bfc787f-a084-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=31479900) I was first elected to public office when I was 18 years old. Nearly five decades later, I continue to love public service and the work I do every day. For most of this year, I saw myself continuing to serve and was actively planning another campaign.

But there are times in all our lives that make you reassess your own future and path. For me, being diagnosed with cancer earlier this year was one of those moments. Thankfully, earlier this year I had successful surgery and I’m cancer-free.

But after spending time with my wife, children and grandchildren and contemplating our future, the time has come for me to step back from public office. Running for office, ultimately, is a personal decision first. And this was not an easy decision to make. But I know it’s the right one for me and for my family.

I am confident that Michigan will re-elect President Biden, entrust Democrats with legislative majorities and elect a Democrat to serve Michigan’s Eighth District after I retire from Congress. And while my name will not be on the ballot next November, I will be doing everything I can to help elect common sense, principled and results-oriented leaders.

It is a true honor to serve and represent my hometown of Flint and surrounding communities in Congress. I am grateful for the trust Michiganders have placed in me over the past six terms. I am proud of what we’ve accomplished for mid-Michigan and the country.

When Flint needed help during the water crisis, I spoke up—working with Republicans and Democrats to secure a federal aid package to replace lead pipes and expand health care for families and children. I’ve introduced and passed new laws to lower prescription drug costs and cap the cost of insulin at $35 a month for seniors, while continuing to push an insulin cap for all Americans. For years, I never gave up advocating for the release of political prisoners in Iran, and we secured the release of four Americans in 2016. Working together, I played an important role in passing transformational legislation to rebuild America’s roads and bridges and invest in good-paying manufacturing jobs that can support a family. We passed the largest ever investment to combat the climate crisis, including my law to expand electric vehicle manufacturing in America and lower costs for consumers. As a member of the Ways and Means Committee, I’ve worked to protect Social Security and Medicare, and make our tax code work better for working people. And I’ve made a continuous effort to bring back federal resources to mid-Michigan to support our local economy, provide affordable housing and expand after school programs. I’ve not been afraid to speak up on important issues, and work with Republicans when we agreed and could compromise to get things done.

I want to thank my incredible, talented, and truly dedicated staff. Many on my team have served alongside me since my first day in Congress. They have worked tirelessly alongside me to serve mid-Michigan. I’ve always told my staff that while I cast the vote on the floor of the U.S. House of Representatives, they too serve in Congress. I truly have the very best team and am grateful for their dedication to the district.

I want to thank my family, especially my amazing wife Jennifer, for allowing me to serve. Serving in Congress is a family effort that requires a lot of sacrifice, and I am so grateful to her for her help and support along the way. Traveling from Michigan to Washington most weeks of the year meant many nights away from home. To our children Ryan, Kenneth, and Katy, thank you for being wonderful and remarkable kids.

For the remainder of my term, I will continue bringing the same passion, work ethic and drive to help our community and my constituents. My congressional offices will remain open and available to assist anyone in the district who needs help.

As I have said many times: While I’ve been elected to numerous public roles, I’ve never felt like I’ve changed careers, because my job responsibilities have stayed the same: serving, working for, and representing the people who elected me. To my constituents, thank you for the honor and privilege of being your voice and advocate.

While I’m stepping back from elected office at the end of my term, I’m most definitely not retiring. I’m looking forward to a new chapter continuing to serve Flint and mid-Michigan, just outside of elected office.

Sincerely,

Dan Kildee

clean_body: I wanted to tell you directly: I have decided to not seek re-election and will leave Congress at the end of my term on January 3, 2025. Friend — I wanted to tell you directly: I have decided to not seek re-election and will leave Congress at the end of my term on January 3, 2025. I hope you can take a few minutes to watch my announcement video to my constituents and supporters: I was first elected to public office when I was 18 years old. Nearly five decades later, I continue to love public service and the work I do every day. For most of this year, I saw myself continuing to serve and was actively planning another campaign. But there are times in all our lives that make you reassess your own future and path. For me, being diagnosed with cancer earlier this year was one of those moments. Thankfully, earlier this year I had successful surgery and I’m cancer-free. But after spending time with my wife, children and grandchildren and contemplating our future, the time has come for me to step back from public office. Running for office, ultimately, is a personal decision first. And this was not an easy decision to make. But I know it’s the right one for me and for my family. I am confident that Michigan will re-elect President Biden, entrust Democrats with legislative majorities and elect a Democrat to serve Michigan’s Eighth District after I retire from Congress. And while my name will not be on the ballot next November, I will be doing everything I can to help elect common sense, principled and results-oriented leaders. It is a true honor to serve and represent my hometown of Flint and surrounding communities in Congress. I am grateful for the trust Michiganders have placed in me over the past six terms. I am proud of what we’ve accomplished for mid-Michigan and the country. When Flint needed help during the water crisis, I spoke up—working with Republicans and Democrats to secure a federal aid package to replace lead pipes and expand health care for families and children. I’ve introduced and passed new laws to lower prescription drug costs and cap the cost of insulin at $35 a month for seniors, while continuing to push an insulin cap for all Americans. For years, I never gave up advocating for the release of political prisoners in Iran, and we secured the release of four Americans in 2016. Working together, I played an important role in passing transformational legislation to rebuild America’s roads and bridges and invest in good-paying manufacturing jobs that can support a family. We passed the largest ever investment to combat the climate crisis, including my law to expand electric vehicle manufacturing in America and lower costs for consumers. As a member of the Ways and Means Committee, I’ve worked to protect Social Security and Medicare, and make our tax code work better for working people. And I’ve made a continuous effort to bring back federal resources to mid-Michigan to support our local economy, provide affordable housing and expand after school programs. I’ve not been afraid to speak up on important issues, and work with Republicans when we agreed and could compromise to get things done. I want to thank my incredible, talented, and truly dedicated staff. Many on my team have served alongside me since my first day in Congress. They have worked tirelessly alongside me to serve mid-Michigan. I’ve always told my staff that while I cast the vote on the floor of the U.S. House of Representatives, they too serve in Congress. I truly have the very best team and am grateful for their dedication to the district. I want to thank my family, especially my amazing wife Jennifer, for allowing me to serve. Serving in Congress is a family effort that requires a lot of sacrifice, and I am so grateful to her for her help and support along the way. Traveling from Michigan to Washington most weeks of the year meant many nights away from home. To our children Ryan, Kenneth, and Katy, thank you for being wonderful and remarkable kids. For the remainder of my term, I will continue bringing the same passion, work ethic and drive to help our community and my constituents. My congressional offices will remain open and available to assist anyone in the district who needs help. As I have said many times: While I’ve been elected to numerous public roles, I’ve never felt like I’ve changed careers, because my job responsibilities have stayed the same: serving, working for, and representing the people who elected me. To my constituents, thank you for the honor and privilege of being your voice and advocate. While I’m stepping back from elected office at the end of my term, I’m most definitely not retiring. I’m looking forward to a new chapter continuing to serve Flint and mid-Michigan, just outside of elected office. Sincerely, Dan Kildee | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to . | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DAN KILDEE Friends of Dan Kildee P.O. Box 248 Flint, MI 48501 United States

name: Tom Fitton
subject: We’re Fighting to Protect Your First Amendment Rights!
body:
Judicial Watch is fighting back hard and effectively against Joe Biden’s attacks on Americans’ free speech rights...including your free speech rights!

| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Judicial Watch is fighting back hard and effectively against Joe Biden's attacks on Americans' free speech rights...**including _your_ free speech rights**!
Last week we released bombshell government emails that _prove_ Facebook censored Americans at the direction of the Biden White House and his Surgeon General's political operation ...one _more_ example of the Biden administration's conspiracy with Big Tech to _censor and suppress_ the opinions of Americans who oppose the Biden agenda.
Our lawsuits are breaking through the curtain of government secrecy about these unprecedented attacks on the First Amendment...and that's why [I ask you to support our work with a special contribution today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65861&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65861&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

The emails released to us are between U.S. Surgeon General Vivek Murthy and top Facebook executives. _They relate to censorship of Covid controversies_. One of the emails says that the Big Tech giant's team are seeking to "**_better understand the scope of what the White House expects from us on misinformation going forward_**."

"**Misinformation** " is liberal double-speak for anything posted on social media that disagrees with the Biden party line...in this case, disagreement with the government's Covid policies.

Our investigations and lawsuits are exposing a massive politically-driven assault on free speech by the lawless Biden administration and Big Tech to muzzle Biden's opponents...

...and that's [why I am asking for your help now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65861&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)...because our lawsuits cost us time and money!

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65861&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

This release of records from the Surgeon General's office marks just the latest of our legal actions exposing government censorship efforts.

* We uncovered records from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) showing that Facebook coordinated closely with the CDC to control the Covid narrative and "misinformation," and that over $3.5 million in free advertising was given to the CDC by social media companies.
* We sued the California Secretary of State for having YouTube censor a Judicial Watch election integrity video.
* We sued the U.S. Department of Homeland Security for records showing cooperation between the Cybersecurity and Information Security Agency and social media platforms to censor and suppress free speech.
* We have filed two lawsuits against the U.S. Department of Justice and other federal agencies for communications with Facebook and Twitter regarding the government's involvement in "**_content moderation_** " and censorship on social media platforms.

No other presidential administration has shown _such lawless and dangerous contempt for the free speech rights of Americans who disagree with them_ as the Biden administration is today...

...yet while others just _complain_ about the Biden-Big Tech conspiracy to undermine the First Amendment, and while the Dominant Media and Congress _ignore_ it, Judicial Watch goes to court and forces the release of government documents that _prove_ it!

Today, the Biden administration and Big Tech are targeting conservatives for opposing their radical agenda...but their attacks on conservative free speech are also **an unconstitutional attack on yours and _all_ Americans' First Amendment rights!**

[I urge you to stand with us today, as we continue to use the legal system and the courts to fight for the U.S. Constitution and expose this unprecedented assault on free speech.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65861&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65861&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

And thank you in advance for your support Judicial Watch and our mission!

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65861&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)

Our investigations and lawsuits are exposing a massive politically-driven assault on free speech by the lawless Biden administration and Big Tech to muzzle Biden's opponents... ...and that's our lawsuits cost us time and money! This release of records from the Surgeon General's office marks just the latest of our legal actions exposing government censorship efforts. We uncovered records from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) showing that Facebook coordinated closely with the CDC to control the Covid narrative and "misinformation," and that over $3.5 million in free advertising was given to the CDC by social media companies. We sued the California Secretary of State for having YouTube censor a Judicial Watch election integrity video. We sued the U.S. Department of Homeland Security for records showing cooperation between the Cybersecurity and Information Security Agency and social media platforms to censor and suppress free speech. We have filed two lawsuits against the U.S. Department of Justice and other federal agencies for communications with Facebook and Twitter regarding the government's involvement in "content moderation " and censorship on social media platforms. No other presidential administration has shown such lawless and dangerous contempt for the free speech rights of Americans who disagree with them as the Biden administration is today... ...yet while others just complain about the Biden-Big Tech conspiracy to undermine the First Amendment, and while the Dominant Media and Congress ignore it, Judicial Watch goes to court and forces the release of government documents that prove it! Today, the Biden administration and Big Tech are targeting conservatives for opposing their radical agenda...but their attacks on conservative free speech are also an unconstitutional attack on yours and all Americans' First Amendment rights! And thank you in advance for your support Judicial Watch and our mission! Sincerely, Thomas Fitton President | | Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 Third Street SW, Suite 800 Washington, DC 20024 (C)2023, All Rights Reserved Judicial Watch is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. Contributions are received from individuals, foundations, and corporations and are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. | |

body:

body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Email%20Logo.png] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Sam%20Headshot.png]
ACROSS THE COMMONWEALTH
VOTE TODAY! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Make%20A%20Plan%20To%20Vote.png]
You can vote for November's elections NOW! Vote at your Registrar's office during business hours. Saturday early voting is available October 28th and November 4th. Learn More [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
Find your local Registrar's office here: https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/VWCC.jpeg] 15 years of the Community College Access Program at VWCC
Learn More [https://www.wdbj7.com/2023/09/26/virginia-western-celebrates-15th-anniversary-ccap-program/] CCAP is a successful public/private partnership that pays the cost of tuition for three years at Virginia Western Community College if a qualified student does not have sufficient financial aid to pay tuition costs.
This program has helped over 4,200 students achieve higher education!
CANDIDATE SPOTLIGHT
https://karenforvirginia.com/ [https://karenforvirginia.com/] Karen Jenkins for HB-89
Donate Here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/karenforvirginia] Karen Jenkins is a life-long resident of the City of Suffolk. Throughout her lifetime she has passionately advocated for others and currently serves on the Suffolk School Board with a proven track record and history of accomplishments. She is running for the House of Delegates for the 89th District to continue delivering results for the people of Virginia.
She is a champion for education, public safety and mental health. As your next Delegate for the 89th District, she will continue to fight and vote for meaningful policies and legislation to support the needs of the district. At the state level, she will be positioned to write and sponsor bills and laws to benefit the schools and communities in the 89th District and throughout the commonwealth.
LOCAL CANDIDATE EVENTS
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/lily%20canvass.png]
Canvass for Lily Franklin!
On Sundays, join Team Lily at the South County Library Parking Lot from 12 - 12:30 pm for a Roanoke canvassing event!
Bring your walking shoes, a charged cell phone, and water. When you arrive to their launch location you will receive a brief training and literature before being sent out to turf. Questions? Email Beth at egunter3@gmail.com [egunter3@gmail.com] or call 540-353-3645.
South County Library Parking Lot, 6303 Merriman Rd, Roanoke, VA 24018
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/sam%20and%20trish.jpg]
Canvass for Sam and Trish!
*this is a place holder until the new facebook event is created*
Join us Sunday to canvass for Sam and Trish! Meet our Field Coordinator, Dom, on September 3rd at the Williamson Road Library, 12:00pm.
Located at 3837 Williamson Rd, Roanoke, VA 24012.
IN THE COMMUNITY
https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story [https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story] https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424 [https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424]
Roanoke River Contamination Settlement Reached Roanoke Young Democrats Canvass Tailgate
Without current regulations, the water contamination caused by these companies could have been so much worse. Come out to support Roanoke Valley Democratic candidates!
Read More [https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story] The Roanoke Young Democrats will be enjoying pizza, coffee, donuts and more before canvassing to knock for Trish White-Boyd, Sam Rasoul, Lily Franklin, Samantha Newell, Jade Harris, & Nancy Horn. Door knocking will begin about 12:30 pm!
Read More [https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424]
Roanoke EnVision Center Kids Movie Night - Sept. 28 Fall Harvest Festival
The movie is free and there will be snacks and much more! Fall into wellness at the Harvest Festival!
Read More Celebrate the end of farm season with fun experiences for the whole family. Try new activities to support your well-being. Connect with others in a beautiful outdoor space. Free meals available with registration. This event is free and open to everyone!
Read More [https://web.cvent.com/event/19422342-be4f-417d-9fc3-6a6bf883e794/summary]
https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992 [https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992] https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/ [https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/]
Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game - Oct. 1 Henrietta Lacks Statue Unveiling - Oct. 4
Join us for the 6th Annual Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game, being held at the Home of the Salem Red Sox - Carilion Clinic Field. A dignified sculpture will commemorate the ongoing and long unrecognized contributions of Roanoke native Henrietta Lacks, who unknowingly provided the world with the HeLa cell, fueling decades of life-saving and life changing research.
Physicians, nurses and administrators will suit up for each hospital during the nine-inning contest. Proceeds will benefit the American Heart Association. Unveiling is October 4th at 11 am at Henrietta Lacks Plaza.
Admission is $5 at the gate, kids under 10 free. Gates open at 1pm and the game starts at 2pm. 410 3rd St SW, Roanoke, VA 24011
Read More [https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992] Read More [https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/RCDC.jpeg] Join the Roanoke City Democrats!
Roanoke City Democratic Committee meetings are now in-person and open to non-members. We meet the 3rd Thursday of each month. This month we are meeting at 6 pm at the Main Library (706 S Jefferson St, Roanoke, VA 24016). Sign up for meeting reminders and other information here [https://www.roanokedemocrats.com/subscribe] .
Join us for a social hour every first Thursday of the month at Leonore Restaurant, 128 Campbell St. SW, 5-7 pm.
Join Roanoke Young Dems! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/RYD.png]
Meetings occur on the first Monday and third Sunday of every month in person and virtually. The goal of RYD is to help improve our community and to promote the names of Democratic candidates and policies.
Contact: YoungDemocratsRoanoke@gmail.com [YoungDemocratsRoanoke@gmail.com] to get involved!
Donate Today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/samrasoul]
Thank you for your support! If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to reach out to me anytime.
My very best,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Screen%20Shot%202022-07-29%20at%203.44.06%20PM%20%281%29.png]
Del. Sam Rasoul
https://www.facebook.com/SamRasoulVA [https://www.facebook.com/SamRasoulVA] https://twitter.com/Sam_Rasoul [https://twitter.com/Sam_Rasoul] https://www.instagram.com/sam_rasoul/?hl=en [https://www.instagram.com/sam_rasoul/?hl=en]

The goal of RYD is to help improve our community and to promote the names of Democratic candidates and policies. Contact: YoungDemocratsRoanoke@gmail.com [YoungDemocratsRoanoke@gmail.com] to get involved! Donate Today! [] Thank you for your support! If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to reach out to me anytime. My very best, [] Del. name: Byron Donalds
subject: Let me tell you a story.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I was born and raised in Brooklyn, New York...

|
---
| | |
It’s Congressman Byron Donalds, friend.

_I was born and raised in Brooklyn, New York, by a single mother who sacrificed everything so that I could have a chance at the American Dream._
**DEFEND THE AMERICAN DREAM**
---
| | | [CHIP IN NOW](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674659%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8xf9ubXlfzKDyuay9d8lOg&sysid=1 "Generic Button")
---

The Radical Left wants to tell you the American Dream is dead and erase the very idea of it from our minds. **Friend, I’m living proof that the American Dream is alive and well. **

Speaker Johnson and House Republicans are fighting for our American Dream, but without you, we’re doomed.
**The Radical Left knows what’s at stake, and they realize how vital our upcoming deadline is for our Speaker and the GOP Majority. **

We need the means to wage this fight against Joe Biden’s Socialist agenda and his Democrat minions in Congress. Without you, there is no way we can compete with their Soros-funded Super PACs and Hollywood mega-donors.
**[That’s why I’m coming to you, Friend. Will you chip in just a few dollars to save our nation?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674650%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gKhBvMYwnLwK%2fHNoc3eFuw&sysid=1 "That’s why I’m coming to
you, Friend. Will you chip in just a few dollars to save our nation? ")**

---

---

The Radical Left **WILL** succeed without your support, Friend.

---
| | | [CHIP IN NOW](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674659%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8xf9ubXlfzKDyuay9d8lOg&sysid=1 "Generic Button")

God Bless,

Byron Donalds

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Why Harris County?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

You may not have heard about it, but voters just won a big victory in
Harris County.

In a critical decision upholding free and fair elections, a state judge
stopped Texas Republicans from overturning the county’s 2022 election
results.

[1]AP: Texas judge rules against GOP lawsuit seeking to toss 2022 election
result in Houston area

This is a big win – for democracy and against Trump’s Big Lie – but the
fight is far from over. Though they lost this round, the Texas GOP is
still trying to give Governor Abbott’s hand-picked Secretary of State the
power to take over Harris County’s elections. We know that would produce
massive voter suppression in the largest, most diverse city in Texas.

Here’s why it’s so important that we make the investments needed to
overcome these attacks:

Half a million Harris County residents have become newly registered to
vote since 2015 and they’re turning out to vote for Democrats at record
rates. These voters are key to Democrats’ hope of winning statewide for
the first time in decades.

That’s why Powered by People is working to register and mobilize voters in
this key Democratic stronghold and overcome the GOP’s voter suppression
efforts. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/57443?c0=pbp-em-20231116.0s_7sA&refcode=ema20231116-234968&t=1001&akid=234968%2E444211%2E1ooaWb ]And it’s why I’m asking you to chip in $3 today to help us
continue this work.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/57443?c0=pbp-em-20231116.0s_7sA&refcode=ema20231116-234968&t=1020&akid=234968%2E444211%2E1ooaWb ]Contribute $3

If we want to take back Texas, we have to make strategic investments — and
Harris County is one of the best we can make.

— Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1021&akid=234968%2E444211%2E1ooaWb

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

Biden is the de facto host leader of APEC 2023 and he’s joined by First Lady Jill Biden, Vice President Kamala Harris, and Second Gentleman Doug Emhoff. It’s a who’s who of globalists from big tech, big pharma, and finance.

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: $100,000,000 against the Squad
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Breaking news, Peter:

AIPAC plans to go “all out” and spend $100 million to unseat the Squad
next year.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231116-1.3b23bw&refcode=em20231116-31884&t=1001&akid=31884%2E1203867%2EiRxcu0 ]Slate headline: The Squad is About to Fight for its Political Life

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231116-1.3b23bw&refcode=em20231116-31884&amount=3&t=1002&akid=31884%2E1203867%2EiRxcu0 ]We need to start preparing for this fight IMMEDIATELY. Can you rush
$3 or more to Justice Democrats right now to help us defend
the Squad from AIPAC?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231116-1.3b23bw&refcode=em20231116-31884&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=31884%2E1203867%2EiRxcu0 ]Contribute $3

In light of Israel’s genocide against Palestinians, and the Squad’s
unified calls for peace and a ceasefire, AIPAC is preparing to spend big
money on primary challengers against each of these progressive incumbents
in an attempt to unseat them and replace them with centrists who will
uphold the status quo.

AIPAC spent $25 million in 2022, but Slate reports they’re preparing to
quadruple that spend in 2024. They’ve already recruited moderate
candidates to challenge Cori Bush, Summer Lee, Ilhan Omar, and Jamaal
Bowman, but are reportedly “still feverishly recruiting” opponents for
Rashida Tlaib, AOC, and Ayanna Pressley.

Slate also points out that “small-dollar fundraising numbers are way down
across the board, making it even more difficult for those progressives to
fund a defense.” That’s where you come in.

If we’re going to mount a defense against this corporate- and
Republican-funded, anti-Palestinian lobby group that’s going after our
entire bloc of progressive, diverse incumbents in Congress, we need more
grassroots donations from people like you.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231116-1.3b23bw&refcode=em20231116-31884&amount=3&t=1022&akid=31884%2E1203867%2EiRxcu0 ]There has never been a bigger threat to the Squad and our movement for
progress. Please chip in whatever you can to directly support our work to
re-elect each and every Squad member in 2024 →

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231116-1.3b23bw&refcode=em20231116-31884&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1041&akid=31884%2E1203867%2EiRxcu0 ]Contribute $3

The Squad needs us now more than ever, and we need them if we’re going to
keep up the fight for a ceasefire, Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, and
so much more.

I know this is a lot of money, and we know we can’t raise $100 million
like they can quickly, but we have overcome being outspent before. And we
can do it again if we come together to protect what we’ve built these last
5 years. It’s in our hands.

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas
Executive Director

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1042&akid=31884%2E1203867%2EiRxcu0 ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1043&akid=31884%2E1203867%2EiRxcu0 ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20231116-31884-footer&t=1044&refcode2=31884_1203867_iRxcu0&akid=31884%2E1203867%2EiRxcu0

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1045&akid=31884%2E1203867%2EiRxcu0

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Markwayne Mullin
subject: He threw the first punch.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
A union thug boss threatened me.| | | He threw the first punch. A union thug boss threatened me. **[It’s Republican Senator Markwayne Mullin, and I just challenged a Democrat union boss to a charity cage fight.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=e2ecfef6c8604044aaa49ca847a2f124&_e=Xg8ahnyO_uSZcwlaKecxf4nY4R1UB7GhHx87WfD0Ou2kN0z0g-otBZMRGKmZwnVJqlp1fjqtWMTrk9Odq300__zwyeQrzbNuYPAIYZoFwOAdx65SCNeV6XPtIYTwJu4e4GCYor-wow_0kOJlJtKy4YweS-JHNcKSIYbyEJFRP1hS_hA0ucrIvHoXhqps0hR5BLPani6KSG4Oc-a2JA7Q9cA9nni2Z8bbi0IUuoIJ18f5sh5BhCm-WCboFXselN_pvY4PAmOFSQKyDNiYF1WGtzXzBp2azD3662MeAghvpmXqV5s0CK2TRQVHZ7t1EqYDiRETFQZ6CtMEXVA15C1alLkRQD4ZbeKFbVXRDJh9oPOcANwRfspKzrAjOpt41N8gdcGR4-prU6FO6Fdtb9Pj2mAssGe6Q9gvoydrktXLckrFjcH3krdyFYcW0JQ6jqaIvHbaUpgftbyyzdZ3JHbKlA%3D%3D)**
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=e2ecfef6c8604044aaa49ca847a2f124&_e=Xg8ahnyO_uSZcwlaKecxf4nY4R1UB7GhHx87WfD0Ou2kN0z0g-otBZMRGKmZwnVJqlp1fjqtWMTrk9Odq300__zwyeQrzbNuYPAIYZoFwOAdx65SCNeV6XPtIYTwJu4e4GCYor-wow_0kOJlJtKy4YweS-JHNcKSIYbyEJFRP1hS_hA0ucrIvHoXhqps0hR5BLPani6KSG4Oc-a2JA7Q9cA9nni2Z8bbi0IUuoIJ18f5sh5BhCm-WCboFXselN_pvY4PAmOFSQKyDNiYF1WGtzXzBp2azD3662MeAghvpmXqV5s0CK2TRQVHZ7t1EqYDduYuRADLXmKBcFDDLrArazvJk4IMzFa4nJOJD3kZDWEhpPKVokw0jlxVa6OGumzEQfofwut-9L1Cn3wMC83QKsSr-D3OMjUeTCMEcsNEvd2hKqEXnL9VLttF0GCK300WcR5G2gPX5vQb6Rzp39UJ5w%3D%3D)
---
I’m SICK of their intimidation. They think they can bully hardworking people like us. When he challenged me to fight, "anyplace, anytime" it was on. But here’s the thing, a fight like this is nothing compared to the fight to save our country. DC Swamp Creatures like this union boss are spending HUNDREDS OF MILLIONS OF DOLLARS to hold onto the Senate. Here’s a look at the numbers:

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73476588/438620279/-1739567893?refcode=EM_F_231116numbers_N_NP_90DO_6_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg1NDljN2E4LWEzODQtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=T42ZnAMk_eKyLfSYG3dhvlMB8a7pUNdI5wPL8vavXbY=)
| Did you see the message from our organizing team, fellow activist?

NPP went all out to ensure that Democratic Judge Dan McCaffery was elected to the Pennsylvania Supreme Court.

**Here’s a look at the numbers:**

✅ 18,160 doors knocked.
✅ 33 million impressions through our partnership with the Commonwealth Communications digital campaign.
✅ 14,000 text messages sent.
✅ 15,000 mailers sent out.
✅ 60,000 phone calls made.

And it worked! Turnout increased from 2.52 million (29.6%) in 2019 to 2.76 million (31.7%) in 2021 and 3.04 million this year (35.1%). Last week’s election in PA **_shattered_** records. According to AP News, the state Supreme Court election in PA saw **_“the highest turnout for an odd-year election in at least a quarter-century.”_** **_[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73476589/438620280/-1739567893?refcode=EM_F_231116numbers_N_NP_90DO_6_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg1NDljN2E4LWEzODQtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=T42ZnAMk_eKyLfSYG3dhvlMB8a7pUNdI5wPL8vavXbY=)_**
**We are proud of what we accomplished, but in 2024, all eyes will be on PA once again. We have NO plans to slow down as we continue to center historically disenfranchised and underrepresented Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work as we prepare for 2024.** [**But we need your help. clean_body: Here’s a look at the numbers: = | Did you see the message from our organizing team, fellow activist? NPP went all out to ensure that Democratic Judge Dan McCaffery was elected to the Pennsylvania Supreme Court. Here’s a look at the numbers: ✅ 18,160 doors knocked. ✅ 33 million impressions through our partnership with the Commonwealth Communications digital campaign. ✅ 14,000 text messages sent. ✅ 15,000 mailers sent out. ✅ 60,000 phone calls made. And it worked! Turnout increased from 2.52 million (29.6%) in 2019 to 2.76 million (31.7%) in 2021 and 3.04 million this year (35.1%). Last week’s election in PA shattered records. According to AP News, the state Supreme Court election in PA saw “the highest turnout for an odd-year election in at least a quarter-century.” = We are proud of what we accomplished, but in 2024, all eyes will be on PA once again. We have NO plans to slow down as we continue to center historically disenfranchised and underrepresented Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work as we prepare for 2024. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = Onward, Team NPP | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. = || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. name: Team Durbin
subject: 2024 is already heating up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
Last week, Senator Durbin told you what to expect.
#
Peter,
Last week, Senator Durbin reached out with a 2024 briefing to share his priorities for next year’s elections.
Republican political games are only going to increase over the next 12 months. The House is already run by MAGA extremists and Mitch McConnell is handpicking candidates to try and make sure the Senate is next.
We’re going to need your help to protect the Senate majority and take back the House. We have 33 Democratic Senate seats and 14 Democratic House seats in Illinois to defend in the year ahead. **[Can we count on you to pitch in to our mid-month goal of $5,000 to kick-start 2024 planning?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73476829/438621214/1431804517?refcode=dd_em_231116_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzhkNDgzOS1hNDg0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DX9GkNmacJNNWegAmbpWqCoIURAUC5wnaAUhAOiIuW0=)**
The House, Senate, and Presidency are all on the line next year. If Republicans win big, they won’t stop till they roll back our rights, our democracy, and our economy.

name: Team Dean
subject: with thanks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mad4PA PAC
body:
**** Thank you — so many of you stepped up to support Mad and this team as we are ready to defend the Philly suburbs next November! It may not feel like it now but _2024 is right around the corner_ , and your support is critical as we prepare for whatever this election has coming our way.

Speaker Mike Johnson and the MAGA majority have shown that, on issue after issue, they’ll put partisan politics before the priorities of the American people. They have proven that they’re not willing to work in good faith with Democrats – playing games with our economy, American families and seniors, and our democratic allies abroad in the process.

**We are _determined_ to take the gavel back from the GOP in 2024 and govern for _all Americans_.**

body:
Let me put the bottom line upfront: I am running for Governor.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73477425/438623459/775106859?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk919-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzI3MWVjMi1hNTg0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g8V5WkMM1RjRPrlWYJleZg6NT5yFFncaWxiozHFwF3c=)
Derek,

Let me put the bottom line upfront: I am running for governor, and I need your support! **[Will you split a](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73477426/438623460/775106859?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk919-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzI3MWVjMi1hNTg0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g8V5WkMM1RjRPrlWYJleZg6NT5yFFncaWxiozHFwF3c=)****[contribution between my campaign and Chrissy Houlahan today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73477427/438623461/775106859?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk919-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzI3MWVjMi1hNTg0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g8V5WkMM1RjRPrlWYJleZg6NT5yFFncaWxiozHFwF3c=)**
Now, let me tell you why: Years ago, I swore my first oath to our Constitution. I enthusiastically embarked upon a journey and a career of public service — first in law enforcement and then at the CIA. I worked at home and abroad to keep our country safe and protect the country I love.

When my husband Adam and I moved our three daughters home to Virginia – just miles from where we had grown up – I thought my days of public service had come to a close. But after the 2016 election, our country was at a crossroads, and I envisioned what it could be if we flipped Virginia’s 7th District and made clear that the people of our district deserved stronger representation. I worked hard, we built an extraordinary team driven by purpose and principle, and in 2018, our district elected a Democrat – me – for the first time since 1968.
I have served proudly through some extraordinarily consequential moments in our history, and I have endeavored to do right by my constituents every day. I am proud of the work I have done, the laws I have passed, and the difference I have made.
And now, our Commonwealth is at another crossroads – do we continue moving backward with attacks on our rights, our kids’ education, and our communities’ sense of security — or do we move forward on a path of progress? Last week, Virginia’s elections showed that Virginians want to move forward, but we need a new Governor to be driving that progress.

I am running for governor, because I know what I will bring to the job – a deep and abiding love for our Commonwealth, a relentless work ethic, and a focus on bringing people together to solve the real challenges facing Virginians.
**[It is a long road to the 2025 governor’s election, but will you join me now as a Founding Donor and support my campaign and Chrissy Houlahan with a contribution? I am working to build a strong foundation of support, and I need your help.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73477428/438623462/775106859?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk919-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzI3MWVjMi1hNTg0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g8V5WkMM1RjRPrlWYJleZg6NT5yFFncaWxiozHFwF3c=)**

name: Hill Harper
subject: I think about this a lot
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
I want to create change in the educational system that will ripple from Michigan across the country.
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/130?refcode=em20231116&t=1&akid=583%2E62735%2EdroE-d)
Peter,
Education is something near and dear to my heart. I was raised in the Midwest by two doctors and they always instilled in me the value of hard work and lifelong learning.
My family were some of my biggest cheerleaders while I was in school, and on graduation day nothing made me prouder than knowing I did right by my parents and made them proud
**Just take a look at these pictures of me graduating University ↓:**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231116?amount=5&refcode=em20231116-583&refcode2=583_62735_droE-d&akid=583%2E62735%2EdroE-d)
Now, as a single parent, I’m always thinking about the educational future of my son Pierce. There’s no one right way for parents to pursue education for their children but here’s what I do know:
* Good early education needs to be accessible and affordable for all
* We need to have good quality public schools in every neighborhood in every state – socioeconomic status shouldn’t determine the quality of education available to you
* Parents shouldn’t have to be stressed about the exorbitant cost of college and how they’re going to pay for it AND we shouldn’t have to worry about our kids taking on thousands of dollars of debt

We need an overhaul of the educational system in America. It’s been obvious time and time again that it’s not working.
Something is wrong when folks who want to receive a high-quality education are priced out of getting one.
**I want to change that****, Peter, but I need your help.**
Career politicians have made it clear that they don’t actually care about educational equality for everyday hardworking people.
Our elected officials have had opportunity after opportunity to abolish student loan debt, and instead, we’ve only gotten temporary fixes.
They’re fine with the status quo because it benefits them. I want to go to D.C. not to kick my feet up and chit-chat at fancy galas. **I want to fight for the Michiganders who need me most, shake things up, and achieve some real transformative change that can improve people’s lives.**
[**Can you help send me to the hill to fight for YOU****, Peter? You chipping in just $5 today will go a long way in this fight.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231116?amount=5&refcode=em20231116-583&refcode2=583_62735_droE-d&akid=583%2E62735%2EdroE-d)****
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231116?amount=5&refcode=em20231116-583&refcode2=583_62735_droE-d&akid=583%2E62735%2EdroE-d)**
Thanks for being with me,
Hill
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-footer?refcode=em20231116&t=2&refcode2=583_62735_droE-d&akid=583%2E62735%2EdroE-d)**

clean_body: I want to create change in the educational system that will ripple from Michigan across the country. Peter, Education is something near and dear to my heart. I was raised in the Midwest by two doctors and they always instilled in me the value of hard work and lifelong learning. My family were some of my biggest cheerleaders while I was in school, and on graduation day nothing made me prouder than knowing I did right by my parents and made them proud Just take a look at these pictures of me graduating University ↓: Now, as a single parent, I’m always thinking about the educational future of my son Pierce. There’s no one right way for parents to pursue education for their children but here’s what I do know: Good early education needs to be accessible and affordable for all We need to have good quality public schools in every neighborhood in every state – socioeconomic status shouldn’t determine the quality of education available to you Parents shouldn’t have to be stressed about the exorbitant cost of college and how they’re going to pay for it AND we shouldn’t have to worry about our kids taking on thousands of dollars of debt We need an overhaul of the educational system in America. It’s been obvious time and time again that it’s not working. Something is wrong when folks who want to receive a high-quality education are priced out of getting one. I want to change that**, Peter, but I need your help. Career politicians have made it clear that they don’t actually care about educational equality for everyday hardworking people. Our elected officials have had opportunity after opportunity to abolish student loan debt, and instead, we’ve only gotten temporary fixes. They’re fine with the status quo because it benefits them. I want to go to D.C. not to kick my feet up and chit-chat at fancy galas. I want to fight for the Michiganders who need me most, shake things up, and achieve some real transformative change that can improve people’s lives. ** Thanks for being with me, Hill

## Can A Christian "HAVE" A Demon?
---
|
---
A prevalent question right now is: **"Can a Christian have a demon?"** There are many opinions circulating about this. I believe **the best commentary on the Bible is the Bible** I took 10 minutes to shoot a video about this topic. Watch it here: [https://youtu.be/z21RgXNHAbY](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3629490.1234.1.0118fddc5358a5b303afbf45670c88d9)

## 7 Signs Of The Times
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3629490.1236.1.8bc0729ee1a3adb605267d3531fd21e6)
---
There is so much talk about **End Times Biblical Prophecy** with all that is happening in our world, _and rightfully so_.
Here you can learn what the 7 Signs are: [https://youtube.com/live/TuNK8YzJBRY?feature=share](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3629490.1237.1.af76c2fcfa1c7948381969fed1b21ab9)

| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3629490.1239.1.0a6f12379c6f9007a5dd8e0202a2b558)
---
Recently at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3629490.1240.1.909cc5e9d560dc93d446ae3b12dd8079) Tulsa & OKC, I committed the entire sermon to explaining **End Times Biblical Prophecy** and where we are on the timeline.
I addressed **Ezekiel 38** from an in-depth perspective along with the **Israel/Hamas War** that we are witnessing.
This message I know will benefit you and help you understand what the Bible says _MUST_ take place in the **Last Days**..
Watch it here: [The End Times EXPLANIED](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3629490.1241.1.6def48d3cfccecd1fc9a456b77bb813d)
| | [ Watch: Ezekiel 38 ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3629490.1242.1.b717bb1bc74a3eae28cada3a0fd01d25)

## New Building Updates
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3629490.1243.1.b18f61349cd199b1f2e64b78a895e8ab)
---
It has been a little over a month since we moved to our new facility and the progress has been GREAT!
**Here are the upcoming projects to look for:**
**Auditorium**
-TV's to be added throughout the auditorium for the purpose of lyrics & Bible verses
-More lighting in auditorium
**Lobby**
-New ceiling & flooring
**Restrooms**
-The men of Sheridan know what needs to be removed and replaced...
**Kids & Youth**
-Both nursery's will be complete and youth room will be updated with new carpet and layout
These are the updates that we plan to complete here in the near future.
We are doing this entire renovation on a cash basis.
Thank you for your generosity that has accomplished so much and please consider continuing to partner with us so we can get the job done!
You can give at [www.sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3629490.1244.1.9010290671ddd3297d356437850ee2a0)
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
