We promise we’re not lying when we say that just $1 can make a difference for our campaign. It may seem small, but it goes a long way when lots and lots of people like you are chipping in.
Because here’s the thing: $1 adds up quickly, especially when thousands of supporters like you are pitching in.

Thank you for being on our team. Your support means the world. Team Biden-Harris

name: Jerrad Christian
subject: He will make McCarthy look like Bernie Sanders
body:
| |
---
My opponent helped elect one of the most extreme House Speakers in the history of the US House. | [View in browser](https://dagoyy.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjY4ODM3OSxcImxcIjoxMDUwMjI4OTE1NDU4NTU5OTksXCJyXCI6MTA1MDIzMjM0MjQxNDYzOTY1fSIsInMiOiIwNzg0MTJjYjY1ZDhhYWUzIn0)
| | | [ ](https://dagoyy.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjY4ODM3OSxcImxcIjoxMDUwMjI4OTE1NTk0ODY0NjQsXCJyXCI6MTA1MDIzMjM0MjQxNDYzOTY1fSIsInMiOiI3ZDAxYzU4MDlhNWU2MmZmIn0)
---
|
---
Friend,
Last month, Congressman Troy Balderson (R-OH), eagerly voted to elect one of the most extreme Speakers of the House in the history of the US House of Representatives: **Congressman Mike Johnson (R-LA).**

|
---
| [ ](https://dagoyy.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjY4ODM3OSxcImxcIjoxMDUwMjI4OTE1NzYyNjM2ODMsXCJyXCI6MTA1MDIzMjM0MjQxNDYzOTY1fSIsInMiOiJjNDdkZmUxYTM3NTU5ODcxIn0)
---
|
---
Much like Balderson, you _never_ hear much about Speaker Johnson in the news. It’s because these birds of a feather use the same strategy - keep your head down, fly under the radar, _and use your low profile to advance an extreme-right wing agenda._
This is why Jim Jordan flamed out as speaker - he says the quiet part out loud. True operators like Balderson and Johnson don’t say outrageous things in the media and instead dedicate their time to making allies and _actually_ legislating - a proposition far more sinister than anything the GOPs bomb throwers are capable of.
These partners in crime have supported Trump at every turn, helping him cover up his role in the January 6th insurrection, have worked together to strip the LGBTQ community of important rights and protections, and rob women of their right to reproductive freedom.
Because he kept his head down - Congressman Johnson an avowed anti-abortion fundamentalist is now our House Speaker. This is what happens when we ignore the quiet but meticulous wolves in sheeps clothes.
**If you thought former Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy (R-CA) was bad, Speaker Johnson will make McCarthy look like Bernie Sanders.**
My name is Jerrad Christian and I am the rural Democrat running to unseat Speaker Johnson’s ally and enabler Congressman Troy Balderson. The fact that you don’t hear Balderson’s name on MSNBC everyday is testament to his strategy working. We have a unique opportunity to unseat Balderson this cycle before his long game can come to fruition like it did for his friend Mike Johnson but I need your help.
[Can you chip in $10 today to help me nip Troy Balderson’s under the radar mission of right-wing domination in the bud before it’s too late and we start to see him on the news like the formerly unheard of Mike Johnson?](https://dagoyy.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjY4ODM3OSxcImxcIjoxMDUwMjI4OTE1ODg4NDY1OTcsXCJyXCI6MTA1MDIzMjM0MjQxNDYzOTY1fSIsInMiOiI2ODkzMDQ4YmQ4ZjVhMGQ0In0)

clean_body: | | My opponent helped elect one of the most extreme House Speakers in the history of the US House. | | | | | Friend, Last month, Congressman Troy Balderson (R-OH), eagerly voted to elect one of the most extreme Speakers of the House in the history of the US House of Representatives: Congressman Mike Johnson (R-LA). | | | Much like Balderson, you never hear much about Speaker Johnson in the news. It’s because these birds of a feather use the same strategy - keep your head down, fly under the radar, and use your low profile to advance an extreme-right wing agenda. This is why Jim Jordan flamed out as speaker - he says the quiet part out loud. True operators like Balderson and Johnson don’t say outrageous things in the media and instead dedicate their time to making allies and actually legislating - a proposition far more sinister than anything the GOPs bomb throwers are capable of. These partners in crime have supported Trump at every turn, helping him cover up his role in the January 6th insurrection, have worked together to strip the LGBTQ community of important rights and protections, and rob women of their right to reproductive freedom. Because he kept his head down - Congressman Johnson an avowed anti-abortion fundamentalist is now our House Speaker. This is what happens when we ignore the quiet but meticulous wolves in sheeps clothes. If you thought former Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy (R-CA) was bad, Speaker Johnson will make McCarthy look like Bernie Sanders. My name is Jerrad Christian and I am the rural Democrat running to unseat Speaker Johnson’s ally and enabler Congressman Troy Balderson. The fact that you don’t hear Balderson’s name on MSNBC everyday is testament to his strategy working. We have a unique opportunity to unseat Balderson this cycle before his long game can come to fruition like it did for his friend Mike Johnson but I need your help. | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Donate or | Thank you for your support. Together we can make sure Balderson remains an unheard of name and never rises to a position of power by unseating him next fall. | More about Russell Prescott: A New Hampshire native of the Seacoast, Russell Prescott grew up in Exeter and currently lives in Kingston. For several decades, he was the co-owner and vice-president of R.E. Prescott Company, a wholesale distributor and manufacturer of water treatment systems. He purchased the business in 2020 and is now the president and sole owner.
Russell practiced Professional Engineering for 30 years and designs many of the products his company manufactures. As a result, he holds several patents for removing arsenic and radon from water. The company, founded in 1954 by his father, employs approximately 50 people and has operated in the same Exeter building since 1963.
Wanting to give back to his community, Prescott served five terms as a New Hampshire State Senator, being first elected in 2000 for two terms. He was re-elected in 2010, 2012, and again in 2014. As Senator, he represented Senate Districts 19 and 23, including towns from Newmarket to Plaistow and Derry to Seabrook.
Prescott was then twice elected to the Executive Council, once in 2016 and again in 2018. He decided to retire from the Executive Council in 2021 after purchasing his company.
Russell enjoys home restoration and recently finished a restoration of a 1737 colonial barn and grist mill in his town. His community service included Exeter Rotary Club, Kingston Lions Club, and the board of directors for the Exeter Area Chamber of Commerce.
He and his wife, Susan, have been married for 41 years, and they have five grown children and seven grandchildren. Following in their grandfather's and father's footsteps, his oldest three children are heavily involved with the daily operation and vision of the family business.

name: Team DeSantis
subject: Do you remember 2022?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=80b978a5aaafe81805027ba2e2fd132294e018ba0393dfdb6f1e6bb88c1c8680edbc09b094de69a27c3905b45d51ccd191450d637c0e58839ce95b6c0724525296f028198c607ed0b366199dbf976580

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bf25df7c0468116429e968cfd37e5289697921ae6007247bcfc43a692ef794e6aea07b0a5bdd28b0534a3e674b1782ee0e0fbe93c3eb68bb3866dd2e32d537f9

Friend,

Do you remember when Republicans used to win elections? We used to see it up and down the ballot, but we didn't in 2023. And we haven't in years. Our party is desperate for a change. We need leadership.

If we can't win at the ballot how do we expect to win for our children, our rights, or our freedom?

But the good news is this: we HAVE a Republican who WINS historic victories.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bf25df7c0468116429e968cfd37e5289697921ae6007247bcfc43a692ef794e6aea07b0a5bdd28b0534a3e674b1782ee0e0fbe93c3eb68bb3866dd2e32d537f9

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bf25df7c0468116429e968cfd37e5289697921ae6007247bcfc43a692ef794e6aea07b0a5bdd28b0534a3e674b1782ee0e0fbe93c3eb68bb3866dd2e32d537f9
HELP REPUBLICANS WIN IN 2024

In the last few years, Ron DeSantis turned the state of Florida from a deep purple to a bright red. In 2024, with your support, this country will be waking up, coming to their senses about the failure we're facing under Joe Biden and VOTING RED.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bf25df7c0468116429e968cfd37e5289697921ae6007247bcfc43a692ef794e6aea07b0a5bdd28b0534a3e674b1782ee0e0fbe93c3eb68bb3866dd2e32d537f9
SUPPORT THE PARTY: CHIP IN $20.24

Ron DeSantis has the playbook to defeat Joe Biden and the woke mob. He has a proven game plan to convert voters. He has the winning record this party is in desperate need of.

We're ready for Republicans to be a winning party in this country again. We will get this done nationwide, but we need you to support us today.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bf25df7c0468116429e968cfd37e5289697921ae6007247bcfc43a692ef794e6aea07b0a5bdd28b0534a3e674b1782ee0e0fbe93c3eb68bb3866dd2e32d537f9
SEND IN $47

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bf25df7c04681164962e264f6f276461acfd3a419f15d13f5f8aacd34aae627bd4b6b719fe6e93799e705a5b1d4c4b21409518b5e27fd93d0fd5723f8dd8569d

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bf25df7c0468116419f03b2770646bbd3b939e668d23b45f659d428c603931fc8a5bae40a33905b7d44a1e464b2ba26a03f852345768ed674fefe7dbffc482df
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bf25df7c04681164babce06fc9f2607600bd5650d89cb388b8856e4afe2a58f738b2353de3ab19f14f06a5731a66029c66e5d1803b476b5d34bbacb10917a527
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bf25df7c0468116429e968cfd37e5289697921ae6007247bcfc43a692ef794e6aea07b0a5bdd28b0534a3e674b1782ee0e0fbe93c3eb68bb3866dd2e32d537f9

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bf25df7c0468116429e968cfd37e5289697921ae6007247bcfc43a692ef794e6aea07b0a5bdd28b0534a3e674b1782ee0e0fbe93c3eb68bb3866dd2e32d537f9

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

clean_body: To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window. Friend, Do you remember when Republicans used to win elections? We used to see it up and down the ballot, but we didn't in 2023. And we haven't in years. Our party is desperate for a change. We need leadership. If we can't win at the ballot how do we expect to win for our children, our rights, or our freedom? But the good news is this: we HAVE a Republican who WINS historic victories. HELP REPUBLICANS WIN IN 2024 In the last few years, Ron DeSantis turned the state of Florida from a deep purple to a bright red. In 2024, with your support, this country will be waking up, coming to their senses about the failure we're facing under Joe Biden and VOTING RED. SUPPORT THE PARTY: CHIP IN $20.24 Ron DeSantis has the playbook to defeat Joe Biden and the woke mob. He has a proven game plan to convert voters. He has the winning record this party is in desperate need of. We're ready for Republicans to be a winning party in this country again. We will get this done nationwide, but we need you to support us today. SEND IN $47 In Freedom, Team DeSantis 🚨 ATTENTION 🚨 Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click here. Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Get to Know Ron DeSantis Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. * We stand behind our belief that a Democratic Majority in the House will allow us to build a better Georgia - a Georgia where **women have the freedom to make their own medical decisions.** A Georgia where **children have access to quality healthcare** no matter their circumstances. A Georgia **where families can feel safe sending their kids to school**.

body:
| | | Hi there, it’s Diana, the Research Director here at the DSCC.

I'm reaching out because polls show President Biden statistically tied with Donald Trump -- but we’re _still_ missing your response to our presidential approval poll!

The president’s standing among voters like you is a key driver of voter turnout patterns, so it’s _**critical**_ that we have accurate data to help us make necessary strategic decisions.

Unfortunately, we’re still 15 answers short in Pennsylvania, and without your response, we will NOT be able to reach statistical significance for our poll to take on the GOP!

**Our Live Poll is closing at 11:59 P.M.,_so please answer immediately:_**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/13653?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231116-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalPostAnnouncementRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231116-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalPostAnnouncementRF-Pros-sl1&akid=12623%2E9716520%2EgkK7jz)

name: Trone HQ
subject: add your name to fight against gun violence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Maryland
body:
|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73481127/438637031/1520256425?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjQwNDZiOC1hZDg0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GYUoxsovWbGtSml5BSYCC7QoKGeyggKsTnOVAMA8hls=&emci=058c575a-a384-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=a64046b8-ad84-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=25681160) There have been more mass shootings than days in 2023, Peter. Let that sink in. Each of these shootings leaves communities devastated, families heartbroken, and lives lost in an instant. Americans across the country are left to wonder if their community will be next. And still, GOP lawmakers offer thoughts and prayers with no course of action while continuing to take money from the gun lobby. It must stop now. President Biden, Congressman David Trone, and other Democrats are leading the charge to expand background checks – but they need grassroots support from folks like you, Peter. [_**That's why I'm calling for 1,000 Democrats to stand with me before midnight tonight, and I'm personally asking you to represent your area, Peter. name: Col. Mike Waltz (ret.)
subject: Defending our national security
body:
| | | **Did you know that right now there’s a record low number of veterans in Congress?**

It makes sense why our national security is in jeopardy. Between out-of-touch career politicians in Congress and complete absentmindedness in the White House, our safety is in jeopardy.

As a Green Beret, my service took me to some of the most dangerous war zones in the world. I know who our enemies are - and I know how badly they want to bring down America.**

I’ve spent my time in Congress working to make sure those same enemies can’t rise to power and reach us at home, but I need your help.

In the face of national security threats at home and abroad, we need leaders who understand what it’s like to keep our country safe. [Will you sign our pledge to elect conservative veterans today and help us get more heroes to the Capitol?](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=b5e16996f8e44e3bbad1ae49b2600c26&_e=YLrInAYeWNTKuCaRxi2PVij2SznFUusSpBCfTGAWdktWa2bkD3ZcGe5YubM-7MWPJc2zA0P_q5kcl9LscTlFjb4VlgDoXgLGSljk1FS1c0Lc5VKkNCAAePtq9G7sVaZlo1PIHlp8cwBCdAOL0kPDTBSUZ7izU-oWp_6Zbx7AXTPlieWFLMGgkshdck531gs1_LGCzu6iGUk8vpdZ5deJZ1na3DMYe1jTBEVUSB1pGYjYhPC3qqFjtiY_HCoKD7MaRwDiF2ultO_GgIGq-QQEOjqIVNQ8uTymn_qQ-iaKoA6mnWn3ViIpOi336qd-5ocFPFKo-slmWkSwcgGlTPIH8z0rPsITLg6OEGXh3RJZtGNouKDFnESp2uhqOtGCoC--4PvKuUGXsR1NuuVWh3BEMw%3D%3D)

Former Attorney General Josh Shapiro defended Pennsylvania voters in court against far-right lawsuits in 2020 — and we need a leader who will continue that work. 2. In Pennsylvania, abortion is legal — but if we elect an extremist as PA’s next Attorney General, there could be no one to stop the far-right from relentlessly attacking the right to choose. 3. Election Day is less than a year away — and in a swing state like Pennsylvania, there’s no margin for error in this must-win election. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = – Eugene | | | = Make sure this email goes to your inbox. | | | Meta, the parent company of Facebook and Instagram, has quietly decided to change their political ad policy and will allow ads on their platforms that claim the 2020 election was stolen. This is incredibly dangerous! The last time Trump and his MAGA followers' election lies were left unchecked on social media, extremists launched the deadly January 6th attack on our Capitol and tried to overturn our election results. Now Meta will be directly profiting from these dangerous lies and conspiracy theories! We need to raise our voices and demand Meta do the right thing – we can't allow these lies to continue to be widespread on social media. body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=dba8e86849da40fdb5dc4448035cdd6b&_e=q4UnLxyY9ggWbkMEuqzijerrjja3guW6o3fFe-lDGuRVT3gr68nGRJveRWdRxzn1lUxBEz4vWrX0YWm-JJa8NK5-jbibpaA8Oo2t9qRkcgArvCsil17QJfkRLxwRop-ThlH39mRcmLdp06VdT7pOOBeIrz_IG-xEztMftsUb5S0Pqem0vZg2cmObMjMh6hXl2-lQcCYssiZ_h1aSOtuGPgwUqT4s2ovcwrEZNROZ0LU-v0fDTOsonDLUyvDXQilbvA03oDeHuiJQ__fHsFHfLmtGOPWY2w1ZfRbi7TMVpXBj4jFPbQ0fFFKd3taUTH6S)
---
Dear Friend,
---
Check out the new "God of Israel" music video! It's wonderfully produced and highlights the beauty, history, and importance of Israel. The combination of praise sung in English, Arabic, and Hebrew is POWERFUL!! Watch the video below and pray for the nation of Israel!! **_WATCH ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎_**
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=dba8e86849da40fdb5dc4448035cdd6b&_e=q4UnLxyY9ggWbkMEuqzijerrjja3guW6o3fFe-lDGuRVT3gr68nGRJveRWdRxzn1lUxBEz4vWrX0YWm-JJa8NK5-jbibpaA8Oo2t9qRkcgArvCsil17QJfkRLxwRop-ThlH39mRcmLdp06VdT7pOOBeIrz_IG-xEztMftsUb5S3O7mJxCEnsvIACaKQWJDmq6K1i24fy7TSy5Qw9bj7rodmbZgprJDv3QEDVCTYE_7153llCBFBXE3jszXmSDnyK4GHQcIAuJnFRmdeTFflIFmzqv55pMnhtXk5PQlXvxZjvo263lsEOd5b0NYpTp49d)
---
Like our song "Imago Dei" became an anthem of God's love for the unborn, my prayer is that "God of Israel" can be an anthem of hope for the nation of Israel in this dark time!
---
Till all hear,
---
---

Peter, We’re officially off to the races in the 2024 election cycle, and this one is going to be a doozy. We’re crafting our strategy to elect more women and take back the House next year, and we need your help to do it. **We want to know what issues you discuss at your kitchen table and what keeps you up at night. ** Your input is critical to every decision we make. We’re only able to do the work we do because folks like you support us — that’s why it’s so important that we understand what issues you care about as we craft our strategy for the months ahead. And the most effective way to hear from all of you is with a brief survey. It won’t take more than a few moments, and the results will be invaluable. name: Mike Thompson
subject: Staying on track for 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [unsubscribe](https://support
body:
|
---
| | We’re now less than a year away from Election Day, and things are ramping up.

I’m working nonstop to continue delivering on issues like gun violence prevention, affordable health care, the economy, and so much more — but I also have to take time to make sure my fundraising is on track.

Especially because it’s never been more crucial that Democrats take back the House.

[Races here in California are going to determine control of the House, and I’m committed to raising the funds needed to support vulnerable Democrats. My team and I need to raise $7,000 before our critical mid-month deadline on Friday. name: Elise Stefanik
subject: Corrupt Judge Arthur Engoron removed from President Trump’s case?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Please read it below then add your name as a cosigner to help me stop this Witch Hunt.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
|
---
| | |
Friend,

It's GOP Conference Chair Elise Stefanik.

_**I filed an ethics complaint calling for the removal of Judge Arthur Engoron in President Trump 's New York Case. **_

Please read it below then add your name as a cosigner to help me stop this Witch Hunt.

---

**Ethics Complaint Against Corrupt Judge Arthur Engoron**

I, the undersigned, hereby join the call for the removal of Judge Arthur Engoron from continuing to preside and/or rendering a judicial decision in New York v. Trump, et al.

Judge Arthur Engoron has shown clear judicial bias and judicial intemperance against the defendant in the case, President Donald J. Trump.

Judge Engoron has repeatedly deprived the defendant, President Donald J. Trump, of his constitutional rights, even going as far as issuing an illegal gag order against President Trump's legal team.

Additionally, Judge Engoron has repeatedly violated the New York Code of Judicial Conduct, which only further proves his political bias and judicial intemperance.

Therefore, in light of the egregious and myriad violations and deprivations of the defendant's rights, I hereby request Judge Engoron and his staff to be removed entirely from presiding over and/or rendering a decision in New York v. Trump, et al.

Respectfully,

name: Bob Casey
subject: My team wasn’t sure I could do this, so I accepted the challenge
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1150%2E552475%2E5K4S15)
Peter,
My team wasn't sure I could name all 67 of Pennsylvania's counties...
I accepted that challenge.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231116-1?refcode=em20231116-1&recurring=true&refcode2=1150_552475_5K4S15&akid=1150%2E552475%2E5K4S15)
**[Donate to Our Campaign »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231116-1?refcode=em20231116-1&refcode2=1150_552475_5K4S15&akid=1150%2E552475%2E5K4S15)**
>From Erie and Warren Counties in the Northwest, over to Susquehanna in the Northeast, down to Philadelphia and back over to Allegheny -- and every county in between -- I love this state, cherish its history, and will always fight to make things easier for the families who call the Commonwealth home.
As for my opponent, well... All I can say is I couldn't find Connecticut anywhere on the map of Pennsylvania.
What my opponent _does_ have is support from Mitch McConnell and national Republicans, who are ready to spend any amount to flip this seat and take back the Senate. In fact, our race could be the most expensive in the country. I need your support now more than ever.
**[Chip in any amount to this email to support our campaign, and my team will send you an "I ❤️ Maps" sticker to show our appreciation.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231116-1?refcode=em20231116-1&recurring=true&refcode2=1150_552475_5K4S15&akid=1150%2E552475%2E5K4S15)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ [Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231116-1?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=em20231116-1-el&recurring=true&refcode2=1150_552475_5K4S15&akid=1150%2E552475%2E5K4S15) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231116-1?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em20231116-1-el&recurring=true&refcode2=1150_552475_5K4S15&akid=1150%2E552475%2E5K4S15) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231116-1?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em20231116-1-el&recurring=true&refcode2=1150_552475_5K4S15&akid=1150%2E552475%2E5K4S15) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231116-1?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em20231116-1-el&recurring=true&refcode2=1150_552475_5K4S15&akid=1150%2E552475%2E5K4S15) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231116-1?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em20231116-1-el&recurring=true&refcode2=1150_552475_5K4S15&akid=1150%2E552475%2E5K4S15) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231116-1?refcode=em20231116-1&recurring=true&refcode2=1150_552475_5K4S15&akid=1150%2E552475%2E5K4S15)

Bob Casey

As for my opponent, well... All I can say is I couldn't find Connecticut anywhere on the map of Pennsylvania. What my opponent does have is support from Mitch McConnell and national Republicans, who are ready to spend any amount to flip this seat and take back the Senate. In fact, our race could be the most expensive in the country. I need your support now more than ever. Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue. Thank you, Bob Casey To receive texts from Team Casey text TEAM to 51041. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options: To give by check: Bob Casey for Senate PO Box 58746 Philadelphia, PA 19102 Email us: mailto:info@bobcasey.com PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

subject: This is going to be a massive undertaking

It’s been a crazy couple of weeks, so I understand if you’re not on Team Johnson yet. We’re emailing today to make sure we have the information we need to contact you. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=6a1a5450b7c0487db516397930c1a172&_t=ElZphooWH13mNcI8TIDQc6vPmfwH2CeNtXYp2YJeel1owC7sCugGYCdcR8YWOYZQJ4aKM7wzOwur41Vk1-TKHRZ6kVs6IQK_1vEbFqnVJwc%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=6a1a5450b7c0487db516397930c1a172&_t=ElZphooWH13mNcI8TIDQc6vPmfwH2CeNtXYp2YJeel1owC7sCugGYCdcR8YWOYZQJ4aKM7wzOwur41Vk1-TKHRZ6kVs6IQK_1vEbFqnVJwc%3D)
[ ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6a1a5450b7c0487db516397930c1a172&_e=8NDcmcO-PVXKQFN2nBDveBCugyvCmoNEg3-EjIwf53S-q-BjMmppfWE6RkbZfXxTHFq8BBCbbEJ0MUryrLMfCLlHu7w2Zekr8YPBTFeQOpGkMtNzvWxfGaQBbIg2pe9VMyN3aKLbfgM4hvvskS6pDMkUZAZW-Yak79NsVcE8hI_hG0rmZwDKTfCi64P4h4_UKW1I_leQAwTBUh7G-YzS42TpoJKulXY_LBhQO-IHwpaKQgD7p_XpRS1rUwC1Z7wrap3OL3vBebv04k0iNihn5zT4ahpeCmHnTPKDHeQd8TLMezlQhjfsuXqhv-CsBZ8zvzKotphfVUrpC9Gl6-mlqlvW7gZ1dGBaJVFKtJOS-6mj4hEnAULkgPLzfnBI32YNssAjmCKVbeD2Ha4Z1giZqZlg_uPQpdb6_QmhQjbVGmw%3D)

Fellow American -

I’m still settling into my new office – both the physical space and the position I now hold in the federal government. I’m going to be honest with you, the last few weeks have been a blur – but productive and exciting as well.

Believe it or not, there wasn’t a manual left behind that I can reference in this new role. So, as you can imagine, we’ve been wasting no time settling in and figuring out how to best prioritize your interests and needs. The American people deserve nothing less than my best and that’s what I intend to give.

[**I’m reaching out today because I want to make sure that my team has the appropriate email, phone number, and mailing address on file for you.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6a1a5450b7c0487db516397930c1a172&_e=8NDcmcO-PVXKQFN2nBDveBCugyvCmoNEg3-EjIwf53S-q-BjMmppfWE6RkbZfXxTHFq8BBCbbEJ0MUryrLMfCLlHu7w2Zekr8YPBTFeQOpGkMtNzvWxfGaQBbIg2pe9VMyN3aKLbfgM4hvvskS6pDMkUZAZW-Yak79NsVcE8hI_hG0rmZwDKTfCi64P4h4_UKW1I_leQAwTBUh7G-YzS42TpoJKulXY_LBhQO-IHwpaKQgD7p_XpRS1rUwC1Z7wrap3OL3vBebv04k0iNihn51q4auiKTpYggDTbTjOEIVBvp7b1DXEn5cCaMPH_s5LWsnbpwpSTPxDUnFw_19YW64OlsJ8Hu6Njl98uDZRSaFWwvGOL3HBeAr7kzwpPrdwwQ4UTXnRHZz0TEKoJnjIvVqL6G8u2V4_0k8HkbQGyXFo%3D)
[** UPDATE OUR RECORDS **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6a1a5450b7c0487db516397930c1a172&_e=8NDcmcO-PVXKQFN2nBDveBCugyvCmoNEg3-EjIwf53S-q-BjMmppfWE6RkbZfXxTHFq8BBCbbEJ0MUryrLMfCLlHu7w2Zekr8YPBTFeQOpGkMtNzvWxfGaQBbIg2pe9VMyN3aKLbfgM4hvvskS6pDMkUZAZW-Yak79NsVcE8hI_hG0rmZwDKTfCi64P4h4_UKW1I_leQAwTBUh7G-YzS42TpoJKulXY_LBhQO-IHwpaKQgD7p_XpRS1rUwC1Z7wrap3OL3vBebv04k0iNihn5_2Nv4aJz84EbTMs5nKemulQDD3IMVmoA3CEE7puMmQJ6-905QtO_k7l06rjfceSNKpryqFyypTwyQjmf_upIqGzt9sWWrvvoyd8ED9Jf0IKMRVY_hAYnOMJjD1guQ88tQEVQ7Ccqos5oTZDHLsdYVE%3D)
Before my colleagues elected me the 56th Speaker of the House, our mailing list was mainly comprised of folks from the great state of Louisiana. _But now as Speaker, every Republican in the country is a constituent of mine and I need to be able to know I can reach out as needed._

Holding on to the House majority in next November’s election is going to be a tall order – [**but with you on our team, I know our chances will increase exponentially.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6a1a5450b7c0487db516397930c1a172&_e=8NDcmcO-PVXKQFN2nBDveBCugyvCmoNEg3-EjIwf53S-q-BjMmppfWE6RkbZfXxTHFq8BBCbbEJ0MUryrLMfCLlHu7w2Zekr8YPBTFeQOpGkMtNzvWxfGaQBbIg2pe9VMyN3aKLbfgM4hvvskS6pDMkUZAZW-Yak79NsVcE8hI_hG0rmZwDKTfCi64P4h4_UKW1I_leQAwTBUh7G-YzS42TpoJKulXY_LBhQO-IHwpaKQgD7p_XpRS1rUwC1Z7wrap3OL3vBebv04k0iNihn58dS5JD6U4S_ylJ0biiyAMCqpqtTmb2fhlQbhrddz8v13xTly43My0Ol6Qzwp1xfb8a2v9g76qu66LFT-6n_JL4l1D2symgsc_fhlSJljc21skJjKerG4WIFEDCtAmGsY6rwzlQen7t2kM4xmcN9138%3D)

I’ll be honest with you, before I was elected to lead the House a few weeks ago, I was relatively unknown nationally, meaning I probably didn’t have you on my mailing list. As we build out our campaign operation from the ground up, _**I am going to need every patriot to step forward.**_ So please, [**let me hear from you today.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6a1a5450b7c0487db516397930c1a172&_e=8NDcmcO-PVXKQFN2nBDveBCugyvCmoNEg3-EjIwf53S-q-BjMmppfWE6RkbZfXxTHFq8BBCbbEJ0MUryrLMfCLlHu7w2Zekr8YPBTFeQOpGkMtNzvWxfGaQBbIg2pe9VMyN3aKLbfgM4hvvskS6pDMkUZAZW-Yak79NsVcE8hI_hG0rmZwDKTfCi64P4h4_UKW1I_leQAwTBUh7G-YzS42TpoJKulXY_LBhQO-IHwpaKQgD7p_XpRS1rUwC1Z7wrap3OL3vBebv04k0iNihn5ycaDjLTBPcowljo6cjLg8xIchxEgSvb-5ihaY-VqnzpYhbffaXdRPNeG_ClMZ17bY2hH6DPTlVBaTIK8bnoowWA9dkBbEoMQsVJZsYyD1IPqMLinEEE17KNs3RGGaU9fm4NBFJHGwvCW7ORXzBWCow%3D)

[**There are many more conservatives I haven’t reached yet.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6a1a5450b7c0487db516397930c1a172&_e=8NDcmcO-PVXKQFN2nBDveBCugyvCmoNEg3-EjIwf53S-q-BjMmppfWE6RkbZfXxTHFq8BBCbbEJ0MUryrLMfCLlHu7w2Zekr8YPBTFeQOpGkMtNzvWxfGaQBbIg2pe9VMyN3aKLbfgM4hvvskS6pDMkUZAZW-Yak79NsVcE8hI_hG0rmZwDKTfCi64P4h4_UKW1I_leQAwTBUh7G-YzS42TpoJKulXY_LBhQO-IHwpaKQgD7p_XpRS1rUwC1Z7wrap3OL3vBebv04k0iNihn53CMOipCPtDjnVbGmqM0ePEmFS7QMsxrEiDNCgPtnOa3kogVVPv2vtyw42vNCs12I3pv_CKAgSGHlOK9gTPz8qRLjMMLg6jxUQP0x-k5OnVvdH-pOPJJuJG2pmIqAHP4WP4JQwXSdC9prXwyoeo9iRc%3D)

[** _RESPOND TO THE SPEAKER HERE_ **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6a1a5450b7c0487db516397930c1a172&_e=8NDcmcO-PVXKQFN2nBDveBCugyvCmoNEg3-EjIwf53S-q-BjMmppfWE6RkbZfXxTHFq8BBCbbEJ0MUryrLMfCLlHu7w2Zekr8YPBTFeQOpGkMtNzvWxfGaQBbIg2pe9VMyN3aKLbfgM4hvvskS6pDMkUZAZW-Yak79NsVcE8hI_hG0rmZwDKTfCi64P4h4_UKW1I_leQAwTBUh7G-YzS42TpoJKulXY_LBhQO-IHwpaKQgD7p_XpRS1rUwC1Z7wrap3OL3vBebv04k0iNihn580BYS0IS1JRtstycl6q3uVBc2yInT7ZrXKritpV5rccFWif0IEvjTBwCpeMq9-gRXv6XA1lKDCT6uLHLBZoTg9e0KLgpNZAVbxxoF2pibOUO9eyKeZXG7yAf58rbdCMAeZbvL4-8v7GLA0jv1hRKUA%3D)
With respect,

As Speaker, I want to hear from you on the top issues of the day. It's important for us to deliver results for the American people.

Would you take a moment to complete my [**_Official Speaker Survey_**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6a1a5450b7c0487db516397930c1a172&_e=8NDcmcO-PVXKQFN2nBDveGb2ugvZoO9t4JGqdfYXbNn_XrpghfLYy4xtuKGHJ5rSVEvW-wlQE0OwZGwvnkbaQdPORLC9nFW626Ze8fh7xNCIKWmmmrErBfFelYGe8JF-cPnges17_LCVYhxpbqzeKL7oFtFjaIUsIsQpYhvDPS8edBrN3K0YPxzI3I2q5zssG_K0hRFtg0YOSbJDP6aDUvDbNYcWYlksC1h_0kEFBu_XAkHnk1H9L5stk_8WZNjW7DYBJ9Nbrdmuv6BUYttIFWp9FJNIjSTQwY24CHnxZt74QwRkJ4YhApThGeN2GOFpxjXm-HGIdH2oPlkanNN9YtAB78qNjdSe1AFawLwhCH1CR9WpZkVu5Bpfj25ssXY1v5YJ5ucYAJj0vKE_8qeit0O4HQcnPPOk0jV2I5frI1dFNgSDqR1Fv3yWjHv_dElkF8MXy8-AksvSxeAD4ysifvSv5Y7zyW3UFj__4nRqNfU9M26beua63gW6o7QZnQhIvSEq2JZgFqrWJHJVuzwu0dz05YhFN9LodtKFc5LYjUXILn19mMSHTYYjaTVMJgHWizyEj9WOFR7yO3c6xHjz5A%3D%3D) today?

Your input is important to making sure we move America forward. I appreciate you taking the time to send me your input.

| **_SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Speaker Johnson is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

Hundreds Of Migrants Plunge Into Rio Grande The Same Day That Mayorkas
Defended Border Policies To Congress

Hundreds of illegal immigrants crossed the Rio Grande on Wednesday on
the same day that Secretary of Homeland Security Alejandro Mayorkas
defended the Biden administration’s border policies in testimony
before a House committee. The crossing took place near Eagle Pass,
Texas, a location recently visited by Tesla CEO Elon Musk and
Republican presidential candidate Vivek Ramaswamy, NewsNation and Fox
News reported.

| | Hello Peter,

Trump may be banned from Twitter, but he still has access to the biggest soap box in the world. Just last week, Elon Musk amplified Donald Trump’s big lie that Democrats in Georgia cheated and stole the 2020 election – the same big lie that led to the January 6 insurrection AND trials across the country and right here in Georgia for those who attempted to subvert the peaceful transfer of power in the wake of the 2020 election.

**Trump’s hold over Elon Musk, one of the most powerful people in the world, gives his lies unmatched power. Musk controls one of the largest social media networks ever created, with a following of over 160 MILLION people._And he’s sharing Trump’s dangerous disinformation that could sway Georgia voters!_**

We need to fight back against this dangerous disinformation. **[_Will you pitch in $5, $10, or whatever you can afford to help us speak directly with voters across Georgia? The best way to fight back against the biggest soap box in the world is to talk directly with Georgia voters to make sure they know the truth._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73483763/438646956/710125701?refcode=20231116.1_GADems_11W&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjM5MWRhYy1iMzg0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ovA6jgTL6v8ZLBAI7X3d8lSKnfAeIl_egsygKyDRLM4=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

However, If you wish to unsubscribe you can do so [here](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/502xl98alkm3J5MS-c04xA2?unsubscribedata=3twEeIRVSOayg8eRgEf2qOUvQHuS2dVeZC%2Fs2c4Eq%2FIuV3J5dEXny%2Bga0yCeg7JoUnrO5JQPcsNHx8dvEfgNLc8tb3EeFxESWlx9ovBApOSbDdux46CM5OJ%2FPJshoYgqugUW3Lmd8bVx1BgnoByUJ0%2F3%2BFyVbpf9EkKuPe%2FrXzu6HehvDH4PJRBgvB5irZrWKsql2JpBbSLs4Z9eSJ0oaGFJaF1K57rEbWpXXu2PPD7RGZGgxJQUkEXSSvFM7jJYoeClbVW1XDINr%2FMRsdqUuNw2skkLvO8CqJ%2FRZvIEmqNywRJ%2FVo%2FW5i319FJm%2BgRL%2BoWzg2s7%2FETioQfvSN77Ew8hHHfLP5WNVmG1bm1qLsfgE5Ol5G%2Fht%2FaxWD%2BzgzYJO4IDNFSm9kTURvoM5D3MuBEEGbYaHLyOaCoIPzqtn7urmIUiK7WBuBw6WRebjiHQ).

clean_body: We need to educate voters | | | Hello Peter, Trump may be banned from Twitter, but he still has access to the biggest soap box in the world. Just last week, Elon Musk amplified Donald Trump’s big lie that Democrats in Georgia cheated and stole the 2020 election – the same big lie that led to the January 6 insurrection AND trials across the country and right here in Georgia for those who attempted to subvert the peaceful transfer of power in the wake of the 2020 election. Trump’s hold over Elon Musk, one of the most powerful people in the world, gives his lies unmatched power. Musk controls one of the largest social media networks ever created, with a following of over 160 MILLION people.And he’s sharing Trump’s dangerous disinformation that could sway Georgia voters! We need to fight back against this dangerous disinformation. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = We can’t allow Musk to get away with this. Every cent that we raise today goes directly to combatting Trump’s lies on social media and making sure Georgia voters know that the 2020 election was secure and their votes matter. =_ Thank you, GA Dems | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.georgiademocrat.org | Democratic Party of Georgia P.O. BOX 89202 Atlanta, GA 30312 United States

name: Mark Mullet
subject: reproductive rights win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Mark Mullet
body:
| | Last week, we got all the confirmation we could ask for that **reproductive rights will always win at the ballot box.**

Here in Washington, as well as in states like Ohio and Virginia, voters overwhelmingly supported pro-choice candidates and ballot initiatives that protect reproductive freedom.

Ohio voters went so far as to codify the right to an abortion in their constitution – **and if elected as Governor, my top priority will be requesting legislation to do the same here in Washington.**

[If you agree that Washington needs to codify reproductive freedom in our state’s constitution, please add your name today →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73483947/438647716/165425155?source=MM_EM_PT_30DO_231116_1_1&refcode2=232b086f-b484-ee11-8925-00224832e811&contactdata=+UE7RdcM5+NPEhdizDIpha0hlZgOSo60avYHNibli7+68xkbYhfkWfctL+5+kzxY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzJiMDg2Zi1iNDg0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OEh9pt7l1p5DsNCLaqqGR3At3ipphMKgXMtjUTjDLNQ=&emci=b9741a83-9d84-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=232b086f-b484-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=45626167) | | **[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73483948/438647717/165425155?source=MM_EM_PT_30DO_231116_1_1&refcode2=232b086f-b484-ee11-8925-00224832e811&contactdata=+UE7RdcM5+NPEhdizDIpha0hlZgOSo60avYHNibli7+68xkbYhfkWfctL+5+kzxY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzJiMDg2Zi1iNDg0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OEh9pt7l1p5DsNCLaqqGR3At3ipphMKgXMtjUTjDLNQ=&emci=b9741a83-9d84-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=232b086f-b484-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=45626167)**
---
Since first joining the State Senate in 2013, I’ve voted to protect women’s health and rights 100% of the time. I’ve worked to protect reproductive healthcare workers from out-of-state prosecution, eliminate out-of-pocket costs for patients seeking an abortion, protect access to medication abortion, and more.

**I’m committed to keeping our state on the frontline of the fight for reproductive justice – and enshrining the right to choose is just the first step.**

[Add your name to my petition in support of an amendment to our state’s constitution.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73483949/438647718/165425155?source=MM_EM_PT_30DO_231116_1_1&refcode2=232b086f-b484-ee11-8925-00224832e811&contactdata=+UE7RdcM5+NPEhdizDIpha0hlZgOSo60avYHNibli7+68xkbYhfkWfctL+5+kzxY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzJiMDg2Zi1iNDg0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OEh9pt7l1p5DsNCLaqqGR3At3ipphMKgXMtjUTjDLNQ=&emci=b9741a83-9d84-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=232b086f-b484-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=45626167)

Thank you,

Mark

|

name: Lexi Reese
subject: Keeping the lights on
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lexi Reese for Senate
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lr4sem [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lr4sem]
Friend,
I’m emailing today to ask for your help. We got problems and I don't think we can solve 'em without raising more money. To be brutally honest, in order to keep the lights on for this campaign we need more resources and fast.
With less than four months to go before the Primary, we have to reach our fundraising goals. No exceptions. Taking on the status quo in Washington only happens if we win, and for that to happen we need to raise more money.
We need to get our mid-November numbers back on track by midnight tonight. Which means raising another $8,940 - can you help? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lr4sem]
Right now Washington isn’t working. Everybody knows it. Every news cycle highlights a new level of dysfunction and chaos, and the American people are sick and tired of it. I have the experience, drive, and most importantly a fresh perspective. I want to work WITH voters.
If you’re ready for a change, please consider supporting my campaign today. California deserves better, and I’m ready to do my part. Will you join me? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lr4sem]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lr4sem]
With gratitude,
Lexi Reese

name: VoteVets
subject: A humble request:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
VoteVets is proud to support Eugene Vindman and his campaign.
#
Eugene Vindman is running for Congress in Virginia.
Born in Ukraine during the Cold War, Eugene’s father brought him and his twin brother, Alex Vindman, to the United States looking for a better life.
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-evfc-email-nov23.RfceN0&refcode=em231116-2-evfc-30&t=1&akid=19450%2E3013755%2EKyydl-)
They found it. Eugene and Alex grew up in Brooklyn and became United States Army officers. Eugene is a combat veteran of the Iraq War.
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-evfc-email-nov23.RfceN0&refcode=em231116-2-evfc-30&t=2&akid=19450%2E3013755%2EKyydl-)
But you probably wouldn’t know about Eugene or his brother Alex if it wasn’t for a call Trump made to Ukrainian President Zelenskyy. Alex reported Trump’s call to the lead ethics officer in the National Security Council. That officer just happened to be Eugene.
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-evfc-email-nov23.RfceN0&refcode=em231116-2-evfc-30&t=3&akid=19450%2E3013755%2EKyydl-)
Trump dragged the Vindman brothers through the mud, as did most of the Republican Party. It destroyed their military careers. It changed their lives forever. But if you ask them, they’d do it all over again because doing the right thing matters.
That takes courage. And America needs courageous leaders right now.
VoteVets is proud to support Eugene Vindman and his campaign. And we have a humble request:
**[Please, make a contribution to Eugene right now and help him get his campaign off to a strong start. It can be for $5, or whatever you can afford. Anything helps. The donation itself is more important than the amount.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-evfc-email-nov23.RfceN0&refcode=em231116-2-evfc-30&t=4&akid=19450%2E3013755%2EKyydl-)**

clean_body: VoteVets is proud to support Eugene Vindman and his campaign. Eugene Vindman is running for Congress in Virginia. Born in Ukraine during the Cold War, Eugene’s father brought him and his twin brother, Alex Vindman, to the United States looking for a better life. - They found it. Eugene and Alex grew up in Brooklyn and became United States Army officers. Eugene is a combat veteran of the Iraq War. - But you probably wouldn’t know about Eugene or his brother Alex if it wasn’t for a call Trump made to Ukrainian President Zelenskyy. Alex reported Trump’s call to the lead ethics officer in the National Security Council. That officer just happened to be Eugene. - Trump dragged the Vindman brothers through the mud, as did most of the Republican Party. It destroyed their military careers. It changed their lives forever. But if you ask them, they’d do it all over again because doing the right thing matters. That takes courage. And America needs courageous leaders right now. VoteVets is proud to support Eugene Vindman and his campaign. name: Team Tester
subject: This is a turning point in our race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Hey folks,
I hate to reach out again, but this couldn’t wait.
Republicans are already attacking me on TV—a full six months earlier than the last election. That means we need even more resources at this moment to respond.
We’re proudly funded by tens of thousands of grassroots supporters chipping in a few bucks when they can. We immediately put these dollars to work mobilizing supporters, registering Montanans to vote, and fighting back against Mitch McConnell’s misleading attacks. If we want to keep pace in this ultra-competitive race, we have to catch up now.
Asking for money is my least favorite part of the job, just ask my team. But I know it’s essential to winning this race and continuing to work on the issues that really matter. So I hope you’ll bear with me when I ask:
Can you chip in any amount that feels right to you today to help us hit our goal? Your donation will be split between my campaign and Seth Moulton. It truly does make a difference in a people-powered campaign like ours. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Thanks so much. I’ll let you get back to enjoying your day.
Jon

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Dick Cheney 2.0
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
As a father, my moral obligation is to my sons. As President, my sole obligation is to the citizens of our nation.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=3a954164c1124ea2ba5642ac4af98880&_t=4Cza1cnn3VNpNvb0FxgJLPY5X8TvRzi2PEWtO-_TiWr0p_gIhMBA_5PLHjeF_F8wwIdh7bCmfNCrmCf3Z2tZjaratyeSyZnRCWG69Lc4TSg%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=3a954164c1124ea2ba5642ac4af98880&_t=4Cza1cnn3VNpNvb0FxgJLPY5X8TvRzi2PEWtO-_TiWr0p_gIhMBA_5PLHjeF_F8wwIdh7bCmfNCrmCf3Z2tZjaratyeSyZnRCWG69Lc4TSg%3D)

| [](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=3a954164c1124ea2ba5642ac4af98880&_e=EUMP0Sc4r4bwBDP7GauG4VEMqDZKQBXHyBHj7_An2JVnzQ5x5sydxE37dFiZKnLZtvDF-H-BzlYuYe-bbsLq4q1HLtg9dRD3RR7vjCF20cFmUWH7mKdqblp6L_pNxzrxwBf8MWI9091pd7adym0IDwc_s5EbyiZWIXFpx-ntqrckfPvJdp0oBPZF0E1aMa0EtQdUcyzPUYTTAfxb6YHJlN7Ezr5rq2JFdEsKhYVDJI49c-Mv06u8mqoZ6pxJgxpj-ZxMnZSNe1C2SQJICuMffUZJGkPiHOjFgn-1QxTYWSNbZtRtOYKYKIkmObkusa4j-VH16inlsy4L5fVKEDnYin4ZwzDywB_8fvZMd1eJrGXYm4YBO-wzQfEfxKyZKnYNO0qVirEii0OcYEpNOm17cg%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

Nikki Haley is wrong for America. She is Dick Cheney 2.0 and dangerous for America. I can’t believe some of the things she is saying:

* Nikki wants to ban ALL anonymous social media accounts _(I can think of a few formerly anonymous writers who would become the founders of our great country who disagree)._

* Haley is pro-war, pushing for more and more involvement in Ukraine and foreign conflict abroad. No surprise since she cashed in millions of dollars after serving on the board of Boeing.

* And now, Nikki Haley is jumping on the identity politics bandwagon, claiming that she is above criticism because she is a woman running in the Republican primary.

| [** NO TO NEOCONS **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=3a954164c1124ea2ba5642ac4af98880&_e=EUMP0Sc4r4bwBDP7GauG4VEMqDZKQBXHyBHj7_An2JVnzQ5x5sydxE37dFiZKnLZtvDF-H-BzlYuYe-bbsLq4q1HLtg9dRD3RR7vjCF20cFmUWH7mKdqblp6L_pNxzrxwBf8MWI9091pd7adym0IDwc_s5EbyiZWIXFpx-ntqrckfPvJdp0oBPZF0E1aMa0EtQdUcyzPUYTTAfxb6YHJlN7Ezr5rq2JFdEsKhYVDJI49c-Mv06u8mqoZ6pxJgxpjJaZppfoXcU5NYnRFjNP_GpV-HUbc6UDJukzn5DNSTHoioTBFYKpuFr5HJ3ZF-zYpz9QbB9HqejNaI5byBNSjKCweGFP-Z_fZbDhbCY8-vegpAo2F_HRxSgXvKtyEOK_xhsb-RtvJommuFtWYnSA-Rw%3D%3D)
---

America funding the war on Ukraine is a huge mistake that will add to our already massive national debt. And identity politics will take us nowhere in life, definitely not to the White House.

As a father, my moral obligation is to my sons. As President, my _sole_ obligation is to the citizens of our nation. Here’s my foreign policy in a nutshell:

**1\. Avoid World War III
2\. Declare independence from Communist China
3\. Defend the American homeland
**

[**Fellow American, if you believe protecting American interests starts with securing our own country first, I need you on my team.**](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=3a954164c1124ea2ba5642ac4af98880&_e=EUMP0Sc4r4bwBDP7GauG4VEMqDZKQBXHyBHj7_An2JVnzQ5x5sydxE37dFiZKnLZtvDF-H-BzlYuYe-bbsLq4q1HLtg9dRD3RR7vjCF20cFmUWH7mKdqblp6L_pNxzrxwBf8MWI9091pd7adym0IDwc_s5EbyiZWIXFpx-ntqrckfPvJdp0oBPZF0E1aMa0EtQdUcyzPUYTTAfxb6YHJlN7Ezr5rq2JFdEsKhYVDJI49c-Mv06u8mqoZ6pxJgxpj67ek48xiFJMnZ1-JcN_ENqRGgGpPwgMvtftEe3jOJrWAD6fdOfRCgXRT1CrUN2deMiDuqK9L4nrCrJucIe2HyVq9S9GW4R6XB_UEwZgIIh3IaKWBrc_y_09FN_rGyx-u6cCRYwfQmQbIK4t0geVSYA%3D%3D)

_**This campaign is about the future.**_ This campaign is not about looking back on the past and the policies of 20 years ago. We need a modern approach, a Republican who leads our current party and motivates the most voters possible.

That candidate will not come from the neocon wing of the past or those who want to play brinksmanship with American lives. I stand with the American people looking toward a brighter future for our country.

_Fellow American, can I count on you in this fight?_ Neocon ideology cost the US trillions and killed millions in pointless wars that didn’t advance our interests. [**Peace can be obtained, it’s not naive to want to make a better world through America First 2.0 policies. Stand with me today.**](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=3a954164c1124ea2ba5642ac4af98880&_e=EUMP0Sc4r4bwBDP7GauG4VEMqDZKQBXHyBHj7_An2JVnzQ5x5sydxE37dFiZKnLZtvDF-H-BzlYuYe-bbsLq4q1HLtg9dRD3RR7vjCF20cFmUWH7mKdqblp6L_pNxzrxwBf8MWI9091pd7adym0IDwc_s5EbyiZWIXFpx-ntqrckfPvJdp0oBPZF0E1aMa0EtQdUcyzPUYTTAfxb6YHJlN7Ezr5rq2JFdEsKhYVDJI49c-Mv06u8mqoZ6pxJgxpjZnHqHCtqvn8nGEvx5xtZwbuBg8-3ICNZsipxmcXUdHEe_bYyz2cSjSl9l8g1kwYVFG7nIbSi84S_gDk_sewf8OerNVU6oFNhnMv3-5LXeJpwOactLUEIE8hftIu_FSXb_V49IH_nZQdggtDPosxPuA%3D%3D)

In **TRUTH** ,

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=3a954164c1124ea2ba5642ac4af98880&_e=EUMP0Sc4r4bwBDP7GauG4VEMqDZKQBXHyBHj7_An2JVnzQ5x5sydxE37dFiZKnLZtvDF-H-BzlYuYe-bbsLq4q1HLtg9dRD3RR7vjCF20cFmUWH7mKdqblp6L_pNxzrxwBf8MWI9091pd7adym0IDwc_s5EbyiZWIXFpx-ntqrckfPvJdp0oBPZF0E1aMa0EtQdUcyzPUYTTAfxb6YHJlN7Ezr5rq2JFdEsKhYVDJI49c-Mv06u8mqoZ6pxJgxpj1dXtuanydxc7iNu4v6g8jev70-53JWKHlk8oOSWofFXlt1iNsZhPYE3jR-IEevvbJC-OevbibnTOb451qzKLvO2bNKFDiLdbYwE6geEyOaJiVV8hzyz-hBOZ6rzTEDZ90J0LKaBji3XXxMByxzlGkQ%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** NO TO NEOCONS **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=3a954164c1124ea2ba5642ac4af98880&_e=EUMP0Sc4r4bwBDP7GauG4VEMqDZKQBXHyBHj7_An2JVnzQ5x5sydxE37dFiZKnLZtvDF-H-BzlYuYe-bbsLq4q1HLtg9dRD3RR7vjCF20cFmUWH7mKdqblp6L_pNxzrxwBf8MWI9091pd7adym0IDwc_s5EbyiZWIXFpx-ntqrckfPvJdp0oBPZF0E1aMa0EtQdUcyzPUYTTAfxb6YHJlN7Ezr5rq2JFdEsKhYVDJI49c-Mv06u8mqoZ6pxJgxpjS6ABcXUqbPAs4puByD0O0XiHriW-Kealbkb5WB0tE7vvYMwg7PTVoq_zsHfwpT0G-tcLIwoZMUOJq_jYxlCnKzAv86db2Dsze8WqPdRwX5lmVMM2F9dnfULP32u4QZQY5UKnet0Vt_LnYWU4_aIKkQ%3D%3D)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=3a954164c1124ea2ba5642ac4af98880&_e=EUMP0Sc4r4bwBDP7GauG4VEMqDZKQBXHyBHj7_An2JVnzQ5x5sydxE37dFiZKnLZtvDF-H-BzlYuYe-bbsLq4q1HLtg9dRD3RR7vjCF20cFmUWH7mKdqblp6L_pNxzrxwBf8MWI9091pd7adym0IDwc_s5EbyiZWIXFpx-ntqrckfPvJdp0oBPZF0E1aMa0EtQdUcyzPUYTTAfxb6YHJlN7Ezr5rq2JFdEsKhYVDJI49c-Mv06u8mqoZ6pxJgxpj07jNKzvOm7_crPl4YdV7pzcKO2nEHWkhi3x5mNbdKjAe9AQndUy7ZIM5x3wx4ElWikUHLHH21i8Vi96QYIHgUtEFrHYVmsBwAO6RUY0wn6Adzs9T9pIgiiEO4-gBvK0WS_tEzXkeFIfZup7MfL-XHg%3D%3D)

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

Peter,

Adam Schiff’s rabbit hole of corruption has no end.

CNN just uncovered Schiff’s dirty secret – and when the left-wing media is going after Adam Schiff, you know it’s bad.

**For over two decades, Adam Schiff has been lying about living in the California Congressional District that keeps electing him while committing tax fraud on his multiple homes.**

CNN reported about tax records, housing documents, and much more that prove Adam Schiff ACTUALLY resides all the way across the country in Maryland!

His family lives in Maryland, his children attend school there, and he’s claimed his Maryland mansion as his primary residence on numerous legal documents.

But all the while he’s been claiming primary residence tax write-offs for his condo in California and lying in campaign publications that he primarily resides in his district.

_Even as CNN has reported the facts, Schiff’s staffers are sticking with the lie and still claiming he lives in California._

**It is time for the United States Attorney in Maryland to indict Schiff for mortgage fraud and perjury.**

As your Republican candidate for the U.S. Senate, I believe in transparency, accountability, and unwavering dedication to the people I aim to serve. We deserve representatives who genuinely live among us, understand our concerns, and are accessible to address our needs.

# ABOUT ERIC EARLY

clean_body: For over two decades, Adam Schiff has been lying about living in the California Congressional District that keeps electing him while committing tax fraud on his multiple homes. | | DEFEAT ADAM SCHIFF! Peter, Adam Schiff’s rabbit hole of corruption has no end. CNN just uncovered Schiff’s dirty secret – and when the left-wing media is going after Adam Schiff, you know it’s bad. For over two decades, Adam Schiff has been lying about living in the California Congressional District that keeps electing him while committing tax fraud on his multiple homes. CNN reported about tax records, housing documents, and much more that prove Adam Schiff ACTUALLY resides all the way across the country in Maryland! His family lives in Maryland, his children attend school there, and he’s claimed his Maryland mansion as his primary residence on numerous legal documents. But all the while he’s been claiming primary residence tax write-offs for his condo in California and lying in campaign publications that he primarily resides in his district. Even as CNN has reported the facts, Schiff’s staffers are sticking with the lie and still claiming he lives in California. It is time for the United States Attorney in Maryland to indict Schiff for mortgage fraud and perjury. As your Republican candidate for the U.S. Senate, I believe in transparency, accountability, and unwavering dedication to the people I aim to serve. We deserve representatives who genuinely live among us, understand our concerns, and are accessible to address our needs. Adam Schiff does not, and he’s lying about it while fraudulently claiming tax write-offs. There is no limit to the lies Adam Schiff will tell, and we need to do everything possible to stop him from being elected to the United States Senate. I'm committed to working tirelessly to represent The People and uphold conservative values. But I can't do it alone. name: Katie Porter
subject: On this day 5 years ago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
If the past five years have taught me anything, it’s that even amidst the chaos, noise, and tough campaigns, who we elect matters.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=33235%2E3422442%2EA0SObY)
Derek,
Yesterday marked exactly five years since I found out I won my first election to Congress. Notably, yesterday was not five years since the 2018 midterms! It was a very close race, and it took over a week for all of the votes to be counted.
I couldn’t have imagined then all that was in store for the next five years. A pandemic, two impeachments, the longest government shutdown on record, an insurrection, global conflict, and a House without a Speaker. Not to mention two more competitive re-election campaigns!
But amidst the chaos, I’ve been proud to also make good on the promises I campaigned on in 2018. My legislation to finally raise rates on polluters who drill on public lands for the first time in a century was signed into law. My bill to crack down on pharmaceutical companies when they price gouge is now in effect. And importantly, my questioning of a Trump Administration official in the early days of the pandemic secured free COVID testing for every American.
Then there’s the long (very long) list of legislation I’ve worked on, and will continue pushing until it gets signed into law; banning Members of Congress from trading stocks, capping childcare costs at 7% of a family’s income, and preventing oil companies from price gouging at the gas pump, to name a few.
If the past five years have taught me anything, it’s that even amidst the chaos, noise, and tough campaigns, who we elect matters. The priorities and life experiences of our politicians matter. And that’s exactly why I’m running for the U.S. Senate.
Thanks to all of you who have been a part of our movement. Whether you’ve been a supporter since 2018 or joined us more recently, THANK YOU for your support. As my former law professor Elizabeth Warren taught me, nobody gets elected alone.
Onward to another five years of progress!
Katie
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231116-1?refcode=EMAN23_1_5YA_20231116_V1_F&refcode2=33235_3422442_A0SObY&akid=33235%2E3422442%2EA0SObY)

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAN23_1_5YA_20231116_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=33235_3422442_A0SObY&akid=33235%2E3422442%2EA0SObY)**

Friend, The State Department is looking more and more like a **Department of War **than a Department of Diplomacy. __**[I AGREE>>](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=baeb917abf9b4222bdcb04be381a91c3&_e=wCFPsegiLpAGtA_7I0LUlWqLoxVsWpR8KPVVngzX0y7b-NyeXFeCwdNRaLDVQprR5qoCVGpiBJkT2QZpPXWm4InbnlzwR_P6x4Y7RbMfk24l-NDa8m4ZBX5WtOtTzp0k_BoP8IVYLthn18-Dugqi0X7A95K_iSSxv6LIyfSVJRDlOfdxn2eUXmZaI5FfbiCYbdxVfh4OlRxWjZT3leDpaqJPkjrBnCui-WC-jJbwLuwWMT6vkvSzqJ6j0lwfk3h73qO7lO3yS-d5yGF4JC3iFmnqpNRVQXx_-ES8Pt0mOhmLrABxyJsJ5fggouy-PmLGl_g5DJigFoPfjRzMEwsb4F9LoEhdRtUTePax0vhm9CVYPE16uU6vU5dgU0Zla5_7CMdW1MCbKmcfoM9xMML6SR1mvpe_TNmO438AqcFgenLWWNzXvx0WwNuRboJ0h3vABUW3PQFPiLMB40Meic2pcg%3D%3D)**__ They're quick to say we must get involved in every conflict around the world. clean_body: We need to get back to a place of diplomacy, not automatically launching our country into never-ending wars. | | | Friend, The State Department is looking more and more like a Department of War than a Department of Diplomacy. They're quick to say we must get involved in every conflict around the world. And they launch us into never-ending wars without thinking about the repercussions, particularly when it comes boots on the ground. Friend, the Biden administration should be negotiating to end the slaughter in Ukraine, but recent testimony from James O 'Brien, the Assistant Secretary of State for European and Eurasian Affairs, shows that's NOT the case. It 's time to send a message to the warmongers on both sides: | | We must get our financial house in order here at home and focus on protecting Americans ' interests first, friend. subject: FW: State of the race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
Just 2 days out!| | | Patriot,

---
The FIRST contest of the primary is in less than 2 months, and I return to the great state of Iowa in just 2 days!
---
_While the disloyal “Republicans” (RINOs, as I like to call them) continue to_ __attack__ _yours truly and make in-kind-contributions to Crooked Joe, this is our chance to OFFICIALLY WRAP UP the primary and CUT OFF their “Republican” life support to Biden’s failing campaign._
---
Which is why I had set an ambitious NEW goal of an additional 60,000 grassroots donors for our Primary Victory Fund.
---
_And wouldn’t it be something if by the time I landed in Iowa on Saturday, we had _already_ CRUSHED that lofty benchmark!_
---
**With YOUR support, Patriot, we will lock up the nomination right out of the gate so that we can divert all our attention to the** _**_REAL_**_**MISSION: firing Crooked Joe and saving America!**
---
**[So please, make a contribution of any amount – _truly, even just $1_ – to our Primary Victory Fund to CRUSH our new goal before I land in Iowa.](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=65722a34c23a497a8ed9841f42e1ba54&_e=FLDHZSkCioaCaHhQVTQiipJpMqtL3UKIEJW3WNzSmZqTxQlU78f_sqD8H69pW-TT11tcO0FhCzm9lnO7xZSSb4SP08A-KHkra4OCj496g92QYEx_on29JF2qpgWIWYIeYxk3zptkqcTd9hcGspUQkNQG7wr2C-feSwHRCdvMjUgrjPd3Jdc1vGELh6C8s2LIKGc7RAScYs5k4Xr6Ty5iaeuxFr_K-1YHi1EQVoT9Uz06b9t0UI5z-58OS4m_EoeCD8BXE9fs0l6IbkdCI47JFkOVPIdydIMKuErM96obJVtVUPbVAlVc9WqDKJe2ETV9mmwclaibHSqpcqDwCGdhRxFcSB2BiJtfuUbvKnk1P-Gvgp_hTz73Pk1ARz-vqHdRJvLRz_-txdaP6fDLUCTZBJcpjXRlzQKw7Qr9nmMN1FxkH8N_2qsErzZAE-B-sesDj8MPRIUR6wsnn3wPJNKugl41fTFqeDWDDBOFiXSyPdl7nu7Hb0WAzvOMg5QOUzYk)**

Which is why if our already MASSIVE LEAD won’t get them to do the right thing and train their attacks on the tyrannical Crook currently occupying the White House, then we’ll have to up the ante and PROVE that this primary is already effectively over with a surge of grassroots donations. So, with roughly 60 days to go until the FIRSTcontest of the primary, I’ve set an ambitious goal of an additional 60,000 donors for our Primary Victory Fund to officially wrap up the primary as fast as humanly possible. And remember, Patriot, the strength of our movement is never judged by the amount our supporters give, but rather, by the sheer number of patriots in our ranks. | | Thank you, Donald J. ---
With less than a year to go until the most important election in our nation’s history, we are leading the entire Republican field by as many as 60 points, crushing Crooked Joe Biden by double digits nationally, and even dominating him in all the key battleground states.
---
_At this point, I had truly hoped even the disloyal RINOs would see the light..._
---
But no, rather than coalesce behind the _ONLY_ candidate who can and _will_ beat Crooked Joe, the special interest so-called “Republicans” have decided to continue __attacking__ yours truly.
---
After years of being stabbed in the back by these RINOs, I’ve learned you can never count on them to do what’s right, especially when it means putting YOU – _the PEOPLE_ – ahead of their own political ambitions.

---

---

---
__And remember, Patriot, the strength of our movement is never judged by the amount our supporters give, but rather, by the sheer number of patriots in our ranks._

clean_body: Just 2 days out!| | | Patriot, The FIRST contest of the primary is in less than 2 months, and I return to the great state of Iowa in just 2 days! While the disloyal “Republicans” (RINOs, as I like to call them) continue to attack yours truly and make in-kind-contributions to Crooked Joe, this is our chance to OFFICIALLY WRAP UP the primary and CUT OFF their “Republican” life support to Biden’s failing campaign. Which is why I had set an ambitious NEW goal of an additional 60,000 grassroots donors for our Primary Victory Fund. And wouldn’t it be something if by the time I landed in Iowa on Saturday, we had already CRUSHED that lofty benchmark! With YOUR support, Patriot, we will lock up the nomination right out of the gate so that we can divert all our attention to the REALMISSION: firing Crooked Joe and saving America! | | Thank you, Donald J. Trump45th President of the United States \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: Mon, November 13, 2023Subject: re: State of the raceTo: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> | | Patriot, With less than a year to go until the most important election in our nation’s history, we are leading the entire Republican field by as many as 60 points, crushing Crooked Joe Biden by double digits nationally, and even dominating him in all the key battleground states. At this point, I had truly hoped even the disloyal RINOs would see the light... But no, rather than coalesce behind the ONLY candidate who can and will beat Crooked Joe, the special interest so-called “Republicans” have decided to continue attacking yours truly. After years of being stabbed in the back by these RINOs, I’ve learned you can never count on them to do what’s right, especially when it means putting YOU – the PEOPLE – ahead of their own political ambitions. Which is why if our already MASSIVE LEAD won’t get them to do the right thing and train their attacks on the tyrannical Crook currently occupying the White House, then we’ll have to up the ante and PROVE that this primary is already effectively over with a surge of grassroots donations. So, with roughly 60 days to go until the FIRSTcontest of the primary, I’ve set an ambitious goal of an additional 60,000 donors for our Primary Victory Fund to officially wrap up the primary as fast as humanly possible. And remember, Patriot, the strength of our movement is never judged by the amount our supporters give, but rather, by the sheer number of patriots in our ranks. | | Thank you, Donald J. Peter, Do you remember when Republicans used to win elections? We used to see it up and down the ballot, but we didn't in 2023. And we haven't in years. Our party is desperate for a change. We need leadership.

If we can't win at the ballot how do we expect to win for our children, our rights, or our freedom? But the good news is this: we HAVE a Republican who _WINS_ historic victories.
