| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1c7d6b4108c4438da48faaafcda641dc&_e=RcMze2oSuXiXdGmu7TdH3IitJ6qi5wUzApArJEAF0W3SREjI1X5FniJnxCxb2r5ETbtkpKIGDZfvBuXTydRz6mQHDYlo-32r5Hr2kUDipKOV3hcjkcm1Wd4od2VKjJ-vQCzNRB8izFFZlKxDRVgi2AOodTsFCJh020NmlUROPnzSm0R_oPts6kOb-xDKwmhtnTtay9behGDY764cnMs2lOEGY44vVIcLcfMZRoeDCn4j9KxnCfZ4hNN7J0V4NuXzwAcLXMhDFsU5vtE0fUmgOmuDA4EviiZ04VO4IQ4NO8om2vOhMEE2PwRvlFSpaB5ZZreR6v43HhT422Ur2TE5ohGAGqX7tqYWBVTubkC5IQcLdQyBD4GwQDc5GrsIXHvFJjThgTxsiFauDvXbIMCGIsHMeyp6uY4eZ-ac5lRn4ac%3D)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1c7d6b4108c4438da48faaafcda641dc&_e=RcMze2oSuXiXdGmu7TdH3IitJ6qi5wUzApArJEAF0W3SREjI1X5FniJnxCxb2r5ETbtkpKIGDZfvBuXTydRz6mQHDYlo-32r5Hr2kUDipKOV3hcjkcm1Wd4od2VKjJ-vQCzNRB8izFFZlKxDRVgi2AOodTsFCJh020NmlUROPnzSm0R_oPts6kOb-xDKwmhtnTtay9behGDY764cnMs2lOEGY44vVIcLcfMZRoeDCn4j9KxnCfZ4hNN7J0V4NuXzwAcLXMhDFsU5vtE0fUmgOuHjJljOnipQeuot1_iNdkwBAbz76UXh2g0n8Y3HlVSEFLWiL5CUVia1c3SoF1jg8Cl0NW_XaNv94N7OWRN6kVEjgiX4-PueJXTzQgTJWa5nhAQ7Smkl5jgoHvG9quH3fR6LEraoVpeD2YhpNpFY7S0%3D)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|

body:
I am in between meetings right now, so I don’t have much time.

We’re just a few short hours from our mid-quarter fundraising deadline, and I still need 437 grassroots donors to step up with their support. Look, this race is far too competitive to start falling short of our goals. The election forecasters are calling this race one of the most competitive of the 2024 cycle, and my opponent is rated one of the most vulnerable Republicans of the election.

Bottom line: The 2024 election is a big deal for Democrats, and the House majority might hinge on this toss-up battleground race here in New York. So please, team, I am counting on you.

Chip in whatever you can to help us crush our fundraising goal. Here’s your personal link: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_bax_kt_q4]

Kevin Thomas

As Washington's commissioner of public lands, I helped turn Washington into a national leader in wildfire fighting, climate mitigation and clean energy. _Using public lands strategically, I generated new funding for public schools in rural communities, facilitated the construction of new housing, and expanded our green energy solutions._

I knew we needed to use our public lands for the public good, advancing solutions to our most pressing challenges. Along the way, we created countless good-paying jobs in rural communities across Washington, boosting local economies. Brrrrrrr it's cold in here, Peter. ☃️❄️ The days are getting shorter, winter is around the corner, and snow is starting to fall in Upper and Northern Michigan! **We know one thing for certain: Rep. Jack Bergman won’t be around to make snow angels.** While he’s far away from Michigan’s First District, we'll hold down the fort, talk to constituents in this district, and work to protect our democracy, support our middle class, and provide a future for our kids. He calls himself a “snowbird” when we all know that he’s really just a Southerner. At any rate, we wanted to send Rep. Instead of focusing on the challenges that Texans are facing all across our state, Ted Cruz is focused on just one thing: His political career.
Ted Cruz just revealed that he intends to run for president AGAIN, Peter.
Enough is enough.
We can’t let this far-right, self-obsessed excuse for a senator get another six years in power — just to use his position as a launchpad to the White House. I need your help to defeat Ted Cruz once and for all, so I’m asking you personally: Can I count on you to rush in $15 or more before midnight to help get the job done? name: Wisconsin Senate Update
subject: How Joe Manchin’s decision impacts Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Republicans are all but guaranteed to pick up one blue seat.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1543%2E35263%2EBAs1YM)
Peter — Last week, Senator Joe Manchin just announced he’s NOT seeking reelection in West Virginia. **_What does that mean for Wisconsin?_** First, it means that Republicans are all but guaranteed to pick up one Democratic-held seat in West Virginia. Republicans will only need to **flip one seat** after that to secure a Senate majority. Because of that, Tammy will be one of national Republicans’ top targets. And they’ll have even more money freed up to spend against Tammy that they’ll no longer need to spend to beat Manchin and flip West Virginia red. Don’t just take our word for it — **Mitch McConnell’s super PAC has already turned their sights toward Wisconsin and are gearing up to take on Tammy.** All eyes are now on Wisconsin, so we need to stand together to fight back against incoming Republican attacks, reelect Tammy, and defend our slim Democratic Senate majority. **[Will you rush in a donation to help Tammy fight back and defend this seat? name: Will Rollins
subject: Peter, I need your help to fight back.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Despite the strides we've taken toward equality, the recent election of Speaker Mike Johnson proves the GOP is hell-bent on turning back the clock on LGBTQ+ rights.

| Peter,

Like many, my partner Paolo and I came of age at a time when being gay was still considered a crime in many states.

I often reflect back to when I was 17 years old in the wake of 9/11. I had a deep sense of duty to serve the country, but policies like “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell” discouraged me from joining the military.

Thanks to the brave LGBTQ+ Americans who came before me and had the courage to come out, I eventually got the chance to work openly in law enforcement and counterterrorism.
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73487258/438659171/395234972?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2023-11-16_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjExYzBhZGJhLWJkODQtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AGBwVmTrvjnGHdT703phrrNcvLv8v23hH7YI-nSsTd0=)
_Paolo and I recently at Palm Springs Pride._ Despite the strides we've taken toward equality, the recent election of Speaker Mike Johnson proves the GOP is hell-bent on turning back the clock on LGBTQ+ rights.

Johnson’s record reads like something out of an anti-LGBTQ+ hate group’s wish list. Aside from voting against marriage equality just last year, he:
* Is on record supporting the _criminalization_ of sexual acts between consenting LGBTQ+ adults,
* Previously worked with an organization that pushed so-called conversion therapy,
* Claimed that a ‘homosexual agenda’ will destroy society and likened being LGBTQ+ to pedophilia and bestiality. _Really._

The fact that the Speaker of the House doesn’t respect Paolo's and my right to love is shocking -- especially in 2023. And the fact that Ken Calvert and the _entire_ Republican Party handed him the Speaker’s gavel is even more horrifying.

We can send a clear message that rejects Johnson’s hateful agenda by turning the House blue next year. That starts by flipping CA-41.

[_**Can you please split $5, or whatever you can afford, between Fight for Progress and our campaign to help us flip CA-41, defeat Ken Calvert, and restore decency to Congress?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73487259/438659172/395234972?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2023-11-16_1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjExYzBhZGJhLWJkODQtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AGBwVmTrvjnGHdT703phrrNcvLv8v23hH7YI-nSsTd0=)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
We cannot let AIPAC undermine the will of the people: | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvtsmBOsEAFvNGScJEMPxXNqZ4jRlU6qlEQ0f3ObtcHrBwnDs0ED3lxtEC4szBXZWoXtaEJh327MiyXK8x8X3vGXyFV6nFyFpWUdf4El8MZZ-k9igOLtMoOuYZ4CwaxivHZ9rGgFs_oTQ3N4ad7ZLj6WQiiIHKAvhdg9pabKYRhuSBKmrB7CdYmKkyNgXZwTHM89GgC7unKF9r-VRfnpqVfVn1Lz0Wg6zTIShOGbF97SLwYOlnMmwU_I_x_6ySPBRb6iv-FmN6pNCZLOybbQjhiomeCIrA_lzIjzhZ5Ryhk_k/41c/eOWaywEySMywWd7x8Koggw/h0/ze8eG6CocxsL9GIPxwPF-UsHupse8GYs49syr_K7t6w)
---
Friend, **Anti-Palestinian lobbying group AIPAC is planning to spend more than $100 MILLION in an attempt to unseat me and other Squad members in 2024.** Their front group already spent $100,000 on Islamophobic attack ads against me, targeting me for speaking up for a ceasefire. As the only Palestinian American serving in Congress, my voice and perspective is needed here now more than ever. [**Please chip in today so I can withstand AIPAC’s attacks. name: Byron Donalds
subject: I gotta be honest with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Conservatives are in a serious jam

| |

---
| | | I gotta be honest with you: **Conservatives are in a serious jam.**

_Democrats just won a special election in Rhode Island.

Democrats are beating us in early voting.

Democrats are crushing us in ballot harvesting. _

Meanwhile, we have ONE LAST SPECIAL ELECTION in Utah next week and we're falling behind our fundraising goals.

_**[We have our work cut out for us. I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise because if we fail to raise another $220,000 before the polls close, I'm worried for our prospects of saving our Majority.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a5a9b377f0a241fda8a641fed4d02a55&_e=q1UL_fITs_9ZQipONcqYEP7ivvq9ziOoNl838gjCmcqZTcTop1afltjw9hH-hAMfdl7CIcZj7izMz0hDsripaERAe9x7rxr0-pXJGFAF_6Xpq4AuHv8ooJBwzazDfVE2QBqGLd3sIL9G84SiagUoUceTupyUEYQxqxt8a4_GqNi0axdv7js1Kbxoij7zop_HmoQNqmfckVGPYP0wM8rNyOxI44cL0puj1Plc1aHPtj8ZII62CiJRslWNv8G5wLF4v84ue3tXtvbgrQb2oz8QrtwAqnu3IOfn157HP31HmHkj4V8Varn4flvJ_OU0y2wrBj4KFm-zzBjFT6n_aWvkc4zKT0vlbMPMPNIRG_mwgVPzQzpFhBH9TZviFAkJO3qdnKB21KWmHrlsOyntgK_Z84-rNnpLlN_3kAZxpOc5MomhzVprxsQPgPTU7w1PpEIt0D3C0aVvEg1F0Vbv49_sFw%3D%3D "We have our work cut out for us. I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise because if we fail to raise another $220,000 before the polls close, I’m worried for our prospects of saving our Majority. ")**_

By now, you know how powerful the Democrat Machine is when it comes to key elections.

You've seen the vicious attack ads. You've seen the hit pieces in local newspapers. You've seen the news converge from the Liberal Media. You've read the ballot harvesting stories in blue cities. You've seen the jaw-dropping fundraising numbers. And you've seen the dishonest ads targeting Conservatives.

It kills me to say this but I'm deeply worried for the next election. That leaves us with two options:

_We could either throw in the towel, sit out the special election, and let the Democrat Machine steamroll our Conservative candidates ..._

_**[...OR WE COULD FIGHT BACK AND WIN!!!](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a5a9b377f0a241fda8a641fed4d02a55&_e=q1UL_fITs_9ZQipONcqYEP7ivvq9ziOoNl838gjCmcqZTcTop1afltjw9hH-hAMfdl7CIcZj7izMz0hDsripaERAe9x7rxr0-pXJGFAF_6Xpq4AuHv8ooJBwzazDfVE2QBqGLd3sIL9G84SiagUoUceTupyUEYQxqxt8a4_GqNi0axdv7js1Kbxoij7zop_HmoQNqmfckVGPYP0wM8rNyOxI44cL0puj1Plc1aHPtj8ZII62CiJRslWNv8G5wLF4v84ue3tXtvbgrQb2oz8QrtwAqnu3IOfn157HP31HmHkj4V8Varn4flvJ_OU0y2wrIVFlIYbFmHSY_gtRyxzJ28CIqjg2WIslnCSi7r99Y0KcBoPHG6tEsh-3GprskMfmcD_ChU1rxjOw4-r032ErwQ-4L7FwiIAr8ysy-qycksjNCrPnZzF67pYgXcn3tUVCGLUdd4QzTMiColisBN40PA%3D%3D "...OR WE COULD FIGHT BACK AND WIN!!!")**_

Look, I set this ambitious goal for a reason. I looked at the latest fundraising reports and the Democrats have about 20% more cash-on-hand.

**If I can convince every Conservative reading this email to pitch in about twenty-five bucks, we 'll hit this goal, slash our budget deficit, and completely blindside the Democrats when our numbers go public. It would be a huge victory for Conservatives!**

But I need your help to get there. I'm asking EVERYONE to step up and pitch in - that's the only way we'll come out on top.

The special election is right around the corner. _**[Can I count on you right now?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a5a9b377f0a241fda8a641fed4d02a55&_e=q1UL_fITs_9ZQipONcqYEP7ivvq9ziOoNl838gjCmcqZTcTop1afltjw9hH-hAMfdl7CIcZj7izMz0hDsripaERAe9x7rxr0-pXJGFAF_6Xpq4AuHv8ooJBwzazDfVE2QBqGLd3sIL9G84SiagUoUceTupyUEYQxqxt8a4_GqNi0axdv7js1Kbxoij7zop_HmoQNqmfckVGPYP0wM8rNyOxI44cL0puj1Plc1aHPtj8ZII62CiJRslWNv8G5wLF4v84ue3tXtvbgrQb2oz8QrtwAqnu3IOfn157HP31HmHkj4V8Varn4flvJ_OU0y2wr2neoxc0aN0P_Szo31Dz2GI_8zS-stcI0odpcJB7F2Kk9PIVevrCSqHqBvHUGyUtOGOY1675I36vOUUnV0uVF1cFAos9B3Bdazc-tNe6mjYUtmxnq5_JBN9QSX5VoJIvMjG298tGh-mTzlRi8pbsUVg%3D%3D "Can I count on you right now?")**_

Thanks for everything,
Byron Donalds

body:
Also on his podcast. But definitely not on serving Texas. | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/44e8e72f4fda/a-new-way-forward-for-texas-12662699?e=b8ba94fd9b)
---
Ted Cruz is a prolific writer and podcaster.
He’s put out over 100 episodes of his podcast just in 2023!
Those are Joe Rogan numbers right there.
A few days ago, he just put out a new book. It’s called _Unwoke: How to Defeat Cultural Marxism in America._

[](https://tchenkofortexas.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f02de4b9a588e8269491419&id=93ef777d8d&e=b8ba94fd9b)
Sounds like a real page-turner! 🙄
_Know what he hasn’t been doing much of in 2023?**Hosting town halls!**_
Ted Cruz should spend more time working for everyday people and less time writing nonsense and podcasting.
[**Kick in $10 or more today if you agree, and together, let’s ensure that this term in the Senate is Ted Cruz’s last term.**](https://tchenkofortexas.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f02de4b9a588e8269491419&id=af522a4855&e=b8ba94fd9b)
Thank you,Ted Cruz Watch

I've had enough, and I'm not going to apologize for telling the American people the truth: Jared Moskowitz is a liar. **Right now there are folks in my hometown trying to dig up dirt on my family, all because I have the courage to run a real investigation into the Biden Crime Family.** I can save them some time and money as they desperately try to destroy my family's good name: my family was successful because of hard work and integrity. _**Biden and the Democrats don 't know a darn thing about driving a tractor or raising cattle, but they sure know a lot about trust funds and money laundering!**_ [**If you 're able, I'd really appreciate your help to fight back against these attempts to destroy my family's good name.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4e284d10e38c4d329586d0e77f72052d&_e=hNf7HSp-Tu-FLOv-sqBg1gE8i16mP3cm3oQT0kMA03EL2WY2jemjWJ9N5x8B0nRTDKtq7v-kyUjpJwKpZDhuaw60_laBAww65Z5hNEpS8VDIbqKIFz4NF326-aZWonmP4Wf6_jazBuUXPAWfWZRrVvkaA7NH49TKrogLao8ITQwvxbYf3XtxcJzWEJ2L6fOYncVaQlGqHJiEL4_aUt4ZIAwrnAYidZGUTJRurVIP8abnFfFbIaUWdvxJxMV49NM_O5saDJxfzjP5G5rWUSMFQqKj25V-QXeO174hFUnJdsHnO8px5k7b0ZEC5nSESh_Ib0DLwnWwgPjDV11ijcs4AU1i00MUZrD02ldEgTp4DPkYYBsWuqw8x2H7Gl9ifVxKN7Wye8ffGh_i3UNWiLc0YA%3D%3D) _With Courage,_ James Comer Chairman, House Oversight Committee

I can save them some time and money as they desperately try to destroy my family's good name: my family was successful because of hard work and integrity. Conservatives are in a serious jam

| |

| | | I gotta be honest with you: **Conservatives are in a serious jam.**

_Democrats just won a special election in Rhode Island.

Democrats are beating us in early voting.

Democrats are crushing us in ballot harvesting. _

Meanwhile, we have ONE LAST SPECIAL ELECTION in Utah next week and we're falling behind our fundraising goals.

_**[We have our work cut out for us. I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise because if we fail to raise another $220,000 before the polls close, I'm worried for our prospects of saving our Majority.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b56c4df2a6df4d319063595a4001efd8&_e=06Qe_XSLcxx1159OWsvRZMIR3LSlUVRf5TuvPJNtMqYMnR4feHsi3k1QFP1iFEEGky5Bq51v6b81ge0ObPDFHxzH4rhOs6hWW_114peuQTy5m7M5gFB_3uYrT0yeu394mzkfCXLrZ8Yom2q2j1SgxNo0ESIl1NekGqWWeu9c8PA88BpFGfgLZ0ddkYljXxqx6ft_McSlCYO502NaX3nyHP7UhXYyUqF2JMcjHJoIyu3_1OvE_7GuQV41tly2bnAFqrxp9O4olcIaPuWZFHNKKOwmz4NF1Y3yMCMaGRQTM03ye0cnbER-dYLBahrcEL23PQSdJJjxtolwTpuzP-OEWC7PI3TgT-0uyaIh-r_nKfft4yHuAVpeVYi_XrxCq-kKkaB0jr6XcEVV5gCCGQpXjuMPZsIf-gA97MOTqJp1Zs1rvvDgHlaOiNCuwc195_iaHcK7QCOeyX7PszBGINxKcw%3D%3D "We have our work cut out for us. I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise because if we fail to raise another $220,000 before the polls close, I’m worried for our prospects of saving our Majority. ")**_

By now, you know how powerful the Democrat Machine is when it comes to key elections.

You've seen the vicious attack ads. You've seen the hit pieces in local newspapers. You've seen the news converge from the Liberal Media. You've read the ballot harvesting stories in blue cities. You've seen the jaw-dropping fundraising numbers. And you've seen the dishonest ads targeting Conservatives.

It kills me to say this but I'm deeply worried for the next election. That leaves us with two options:

_We could either throw in the towel, sit out the special election, and let the Democrat Machine steamroll our Conservative candidates ..._

_**[...OR WE COULD FIGHT BACK AND WIN!!!](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b56c4df2a6df4d319063595a4001efd8&_e=06Qe_XSLcxx1159OWsvRZMIR3LSlUVRf5TuvPJNtMqYMnR4feHsi3k1QFP1iFEEGky5Bq51v6b81ge0ObPDFHxzH4rhOs6hWW_114peuQTy5m7M5gFB_3uYrT0yeu394mzkfCXLrZ8Yom2q2j1SgxNo0ESIl1NekGqWWeu9c8PA88BpFGfgLZ0ddkYljXxqx6ft_McSlCYO502NaX3nyHP7UhXYyUqF2JMcjHJoIyu3_1OvE_7GuQV41tly2bnAFqrxp9O4olcIaPuWZFHNKKOwmz4NF1Y3yMCMaGRQTM03ye0cnbER-dYLBahrcEL23z2tc4JIKXW49eKs-36b0jTrTQvxJ2uIap1ikgKd9ntSyywLpTFnBDWpHbhTswG7UoYai0KWK9COIkRfwdLvT9DY94aaw64VGo8oNkGrtNeY_0p9mGwqE200UFiwpmUZDL61Eb6fGsIYjSlHLlEoHIQ%3D%3D "...OR WE COULD FIGHT BACK AND WIN!!!")**_

Look, I set this ambitious goal for a reason. I looked at the latest fundraising reports and the Democrats have about 20% more cash-on-hand.

**If I can convince every Conservative reading this email to pitch in about twenty-five bucks, we 'll hit this goal, slash our budget deficit, and completely blindside the Democrats when our numbers go public. It would be a huge victory for Conservatives!**

But I need your help to get there. I'm asking EVERYONE to step up and pitch in - that's the only way we'll come out on top.

The special election is right around the corner. _**[Can I count on you right now?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b56c4df2a6df4d319063595a4001efd8&_e=06Qe_XSLcxx1159OWsvRZMIR3LSlUVRf5TuvPJNtMqYMnR4feHsi3k1QFP1iFEEGky5Bq51v6b81ge0ObPDFHxzH4rhOs6hWW_114peuQTy5m7M5gFB_3uYrT0yeu394mzkfCXLrZ8Yom2q2j1SgxNo0ESIl1NekGqWWeu9c8PA88BpFGfgLZ0ddkYljXxqx6ft_McSlCYO502NaX3nyHP7UhXYyUqF2JMcjHJoIyu3_1OvE_7GuQV41tly2bnAFqrxp9O4olcIaPuWZFHNKKOwmz4NF1Y3yMCMaGRQTM03ye0cnbER-dYLBahrcEL23eZGlexF44YqKXHLK5XgnlvJrlokazd2aVXTp0LVo9vQ2-5QG47bDWbi6lmn6Yd7CC4LcBfX14qSyIn-BHKW6wQ4sBrMszAU6nEtj1uAjZb5K8rMnp0_HgwbRRlnSc0Pd1xYHEUgOh3HPyFKnFJJKqw%3D%3D "Can I count on you right now?")**_

Thanks for everything,
Byron Donalds

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Getting Lauren Boebert out of office
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-bennet?refcode=X_111623_CDPBennet_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-bennet?refcode=X_111623_CDPBennet_actrs]
Friend,
I believe deeply in our democratic institutions, that Americans are entitled to free and fair elections, and that every vote matters.
When we show up, we have the power to incite change.
In 2010, when I was first elected, Colorado was a true battleground state. Today, we have two Democratic senators, five Democratic Congresspeople, a Democratic governor, and a majority in the Colorado General Assembly.
That didn’t happen because of luck or coincidence. It happened because of the sustained, hard work of community organizers, and because of Coloradans who spoke up for their own best interest at the ballot box.
Every vote made a difference.
Next year, we have a chance to flip Colorado’s Third Congressional District blue and take back the House majority.
Rep. Lauren Boebert only won her race by a margin of 546 votes in 2022. In office, she has repeatedly failed her constituents. She voted against clean energy projects, reproductive rights, and good-paying jobs for her district.
Friend, the Colorado Democratic Party has created The 546 Project to flip CO-03 blue. With your grassroots support, they can invest in field organizers, reach voters, and mobilize the vote on Election Day.
Every dollar makes a difference. Will you split a donation now between my campaign and the Colorado Democratic Party so we can elect pro-democracy, pro-choice leaders in our state? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-bennet?refcode=X_111623_CDPBennet_actrs]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Colorado Democratic Party and Michael Bennet will go through immediately:

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell via Blue Amp Action
subject: my story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/oinH9UvVGUmpBQnwg3vyqg2?unsubscribedata=tx9Y0RUjy0w9lMrPQsCVWkrwDw584kGKf8RG4jdvukVg87VCn%2FcVfVwy2og0cgBREinQXYXkkQjqY2dU28pH%2FZ7d1aZFfmj%2FDEQ9AtXnDZXqEZgiNNU%2FzLHADi5dkIVJqlrdZy%2B3senrarZdjljicaXlTAAP8hcdG7xj9m7CLJKCdf0dB6SriFi30bhjwhPkAWDzR5E2TgCnAgvMA3hllYO3U6%2B20i3TzlL%2FWQwbFbtYwmGLRZGr%2BMUhbTqj3Z2SH6702z557EAvLNsAsCXq%2FCNLN8uJbGOsGLQI86CrDHusN4Ef%2FIGuB0adZP50J2uOPMr1yVWGLp0QfR7IYX8eLZD6uZy6Zn7zzVpVwJMpIb8I2mUBWC1m0WuSONvcAOj6zucZ%2F2DeIlbHpyz3EBJVPLYO1TwL1cYrdQ%2Fkh0ZfLPjVMV7nfmqAQVGb%2B1iW%2Bi4m .
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/106667/images/unnamed%20%285%29.png]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baa-dmp2023?amount=15&refcode2=41546920-bf84-ee11-8925-00224832e811 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baa-dmp2023?amount=15&refcode2=41546920-bf84-ee11-8925-00224832e811]

My husband and three children.
Peter, I’m running to be Florida’s next U.S. Senator — and I hope you’ll give me a moment to share why.
I was born in Ecuador, and when I was 14, my mother brought my sisters and me to America in search of a better life.
We made a new home in a small, one room apartment in America. My mother worked double shifts as a home health care provider and at night, she took classes to learn English. When I was 15, I started picking up shifts at the local doughnut shop to help us make ends meet.
My mother’s hard work, incredible sacrifices, and relentlessly fierce hope made it possible for me to graduate college and become the first South American immigrant to serve in Congress. She taught me that a better education, a better home, and a better future is always possible if we never give up. This is the promise of America.
And that’s why I’m running for Senate. Because Florida deserves better, and we’ve got to fight for it.
Right now, our state is being pushed backward by far-right extremists like my opponent, Sen. Rick Scott. He’s targeting the most vulnerable amongst us, dividing our communities, and threatening the American dream. It’s no wonder why a mere 40% of Floridians view him favorably.
With experts saying Rick Scott is one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection in 2024, I know that we can defeat him and restore the promise of America — but not without all hands on deck.
So please, will you join the fight for a better future by splitting a donation of $10 between Blue Amp Action and my campaign? If we win in Florida, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to defend our Senate majority. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baa-dmp2023?amount=15]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baa-dmp2023?amount=15&refcode2=41546920-bf84-ee11-8925-00224832e811]
[https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-and-tell-democrats-abortion-is-a-winning-issue-keep-fighting-for-it?source=2023Winning_BAA&referrer=group-blue-amp-action&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fyyz_ja%3Frefcode%3Dbaa_ja_abortionrightsja_2308%26amount%3D25]
Thank you for joining me in this fight. I’m so grateful to have you by my side.
Debbie
CHIP IN >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baa-dmp2023?amount=15&refcode2=41546920-bf84-ee11-8925-00224832e811]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/106667/images/unnamed%20%284%29.png] Cliff Schecter
President, Blue Amp Action
Amplify Good
Follow Us
https://twitter.com/cliffschecter [https://twitter.com/cliffschecter] https://www.linkedin.com/in/cliff-schecter-0873a448/ [https://www.linkedin.com/in/cliff-schecter-0873a448/]
Blue Amp Action PAC
PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
About BlueAmp Action:
We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world.
We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits.
And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t.
When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.
Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.
So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia.

clean_body: You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can unsubscribe: . [] [] My husband and three children. Peter, I’m running to be Florida’s next U.S. Senator — and I hope you’ll give me a moment to share why. I was born in Ecuador, and when I was 14, my mother brought my sisters and me to America in search of a better life. We made a new home in a small, one room apartment in America. My mother worked double shifts as a home health care provider and at night, she took classes to learn English. When I was 15, I started picking up shifts at the local doughnut shop to help us make ends meet. My mother’s hard work, incredible sacrifices, and relentlessly fierce hope made it possible for me to graduate college and become the first South American immigrant to serve in Congress. She taught me that a better education, a better home, and a better future is always possible if we never give up. This is the promise of America. And that’s why I’m running for Senate. Because Florida deserves better, and we’ve got to fight for it. Right now, our state is being pushed backward by far-right extremists like my opponent, Sen. Rick Scott. He’s targeting the most vulnerable amongst us, dividing our communities, and threatening the American dream. It’s no wonder why a mere 40% of Floridians view him favorably. With experts saying Rick Scott is one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection in 2024, I know that we can defeat him and restore the promise of America — but not without all hands on deck. So please, will you join the fight for a better future by splitting a donation of $10 between Blue Amp Action and my campaign? If we win in Florida, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to defend our Senate majority. [] DONATE NOW [] [] Thank you for joining me in this fight. I’m so grateful to have you by my side. Debbie CHIP IN >> [] [] Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good Follow Us [] [] Blue Amp Action PAC PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: I'm not buying Rick Scott's act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
Listen, I know you're busy, so I'll get right to it
| | |
---
Listen, I know you're busy, so I'll get right to it. MAGA Republican Rick Scott has already spent _OVER $3 MILLION_ this cycle on attack ads against Democrats like me. **It's the largest ad buy of any GOP Senate candidate so far.**

He wants you to think his campaign is strong — that he's ready to fend off any challenge. But I'm not buying his act.
**The truth is that Rick Scott is terrified. Honestly, I don't blame him — polling shows that I am in the lead, and experts at _CNN_ just ranked Florida as one of the most likely Senate seats to flip blue.**

Rick Scott had to spend $64 million of his personal fortune to win by just 0.12% of the vote in 2018. We have a huge opportunity to flip Florida blue this time around, but _**_only_**_ if we have the resources to fight back against our opponent's massive wealth and record-breaking ad buys. **[So, friend, if you have anything extra to spare today, will you chip in to help us win in Florida and defend Democrats' Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73488559/438663571/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk320-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTc3MjcwYjAtYzE4NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eZwvbuQtM0fvdDpxo6bWj81aL251941zKcUibheUZ4Y=)**

Listen, friend, we cannot let these attacks go unanswered. In a statement accompanying this new ad, Rick Scott claims Democrats “have rigged the game against hard-working Americans.” Come on. _Seriously?_
I'm here to tell you myself — that is a bold-faced lie. Rick Scott made his fortune as the CEO of a hospital chain charged with the biggest Medicare fraud scheme in history at that time. He made off with millions, pled the Fifth, and faced no consequences. Now, he's pushing a far-right agenda that would ban abortions nationally, raise taxes on working families, and end Social Security and Medicare. _Talk about rigging the game against hard-working Americans._
My story is different. As a teen immigrant from Ecuador, I fought hard to create my own American dream. In high school, I worked early morning shifts before homeroom to help my family afford rent for our one room apartment.
I studied hard to earn a scholarship that made college possible for me and dedicated my career to public service. Eventually, I ran for Congress, flipped a battleground district blue, and became the first South American immigrant elected to the House. In Congress, I fought tirelessly to expand Medicare access, lower the cost of living, end gun violence, and protect families like yours.
**I've spent my life giving back to the communities that gave me so much and fighting to protect the opportunities that made my story possible. Rick Scott has spent his career getting rich and leaving working families behind.** Floridians deserve better. That's why I'm running to defeat Rick Scott and actually fight for the families that he claims to care so much about.
**[But to defeat his massive fortune, I'm counting on your help. So I'm personally asking — if you've made it this far, will you please chip in $5 to help us retire Rick Scott and flip Florida blue? With your help, this race is truly ours to win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73488565/438663577/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk320-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTc3MjcwYjAtYzE4NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eZwvbuQtM0fvdDpxo6bWj81aL251941zKcUibheUZ4Y=)**

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Manatee Petition: Cruise pollution is wiping out seagrass beds and harming critical marine habitats
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2125217?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Big Cruise is polluting our oceans and pushing Florida’s remaining manatees closer to EXTINCTION.[_Take immediate action now! >>_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2125218?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** Manatees are one of the most iconic and beloved sea creatures. These peaceful marine species are _**STARVING TO DEATH**_ due to excessive loss of a critical food source: _seagrass._ And it’s largely because Big Cruise corporations care more about their bottom line than the survival of manatees, so they are carelessly (and sometimes illegally) dumping TOXIC WASTE into the ocean that can DESTROY the sensitive habitat and vital food supply of manatees. [_**We MUST take urgent action now to save manatees and their marine habitats from the cruise industry’s harmful ocean pollution before these vulnerable sea animals go extinct. Add your name NOW to help protect our manatees and our oceans from Big Cruise’s corporate greed! >>**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2125219?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2125220?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**_Manatees simply CAN NOT SURVIVE without seagrass._ **Not only is it their primary source of nutrition, but they also depend on it for oxygen. Seagrass also plays a critical role in our coastal communities by storing almost a fifth of the world’s ocean carbon and keeping us safe from worsening climate crisis impacts.
But when cruise ships dump **toxic wastewater** and **churn up sand and contaminants** that compromise water quality, they contribute to the unrecoverable destruction of seagrass beds.
Without this important sea vegetation, manatees and our oceanic ecosystem are in _**GRAVE DANGER,**_ so we must STOP corporate cruise pollution from destroying the seagrass that remains. [**_Please, Friend, will you take action now to protect manatees and our ecosystem from corporate cruise destruction?_**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2125221?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2125220?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Your voice is critical to protecting manatees and our oceans,
Friends of the Earth**
|

Now, we must look ahead to next year’s elections, and we know democracy will remain on the ballot. State-level offices and ballot initiatives will shape the trajectory of American democracy. We must continue to pay attention and participate. With each vote, we have the power to tip the scales toward a pro-democracy future.
This is why your support for All On The Line is so crucial in this fight. Support from grassroots activists like you enables us to stand unwavering against assaults on democracy and amplify our determination for fairness across the nation.

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Dear Peter, **It wasn’t long ago that The New York Sun, one of my favorite papers, became the exclusive publisher of my columns. ****In the short time that’s passed, the Sun’s mission has become more urgent than ever.****

**It’s been obvious to many of us for some time that journalism in our country has become corrupted.

More dangerous than the ideological implication is the fact that we’re left with precious few to hold our country’s most powerful institutions to account. Our justice system, law enforcement, universities, major corporations and government agencies have become politicized beyond recognition and act with impunity.

**The Sun is brave and relentless**. Every day it tackles head-on the most important issues facing our country. It truly holds the powerful to account.

It acts as a true newspaper should, in the service of traditional American values and the American people.

The Sun has a long history leading the charge. Its commitment to the finest journalistic standards goes all the way back to its founding in 1833.

The Sun is now growing at a rapid pace, but we’re up against some of the world’s largest media conglomerates. **To win, we need you to join us**. Every single person counts.
---
| | [Join the Sun Now →](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=74809b9e1fd649999d5f3ab92b7c658d&_e=5GyAIuLAE958y96xpAgP9y56i4dBkyNGu7l_ONAUMoQCMnPSrWwYVuF0SrZur6I3ID8Mx4O_Ty-vR3wPPYbbVwCRaGbpPVrw8tqYibhNrdf8W1AU6aLfrrbof83iv7lZ9KdjuCC2eT1yxj-gdGeVNb6tgBEWrmQJ_3mZ47-ydRpjfXf2c8p0TPYyxPs8CjcMb8Uuwy2t9hyJVESviKI3t0y6tzBtrdavlv1Ob1-BAlFy2YZIsOz_dX61Gchnq9DC8V-_S-Uvs61FNQO4mUkyJ8fQ7-xhVkvmGPC_ckiW8hAJdkW_E_GaAokCvxI5nN-qTYa2F9-0oWjLr9X7mXHaoXHidIBpFSsbsvXelqUCkho50b5mq_rB9NN6XBnduPiC)

Join me and the Sun today in the fight to save American journalism. It’s more urgent than ever.

name: Gloria (personal)
subject: y’all… we’re so close to this goal I can taste it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee
body:
| Hey — I had to reach out quickly because my finance team just let me know that we’re only about 65 donations shy of hitting our target for tonight’s mid-quarter deadline. We’re so close! Meeting our 500-donation goal is _critical_ to ensuring we can keep up the pace of this campaign through the rest of 2023 and into our election year. There’s a lot of hard work ahead of us, including traveling around the state to meet voters in their communities. Those costs are sure to add up. If you’re able, use this personal link to make your first donation before midnight: **_[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gj_em_bax?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73489893/438668095/209297649?refcode=ea.1d31e7c8-c384-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ms=ea.1d31e7c8-c384-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDMxZTdjOC1jMzg0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hjKkVTpTVzw8IVDqOT6tpwnt41N34oy_RP_a7ODVhgY=)_** Unlike my opponent, I don’t take big checks from corporate PACs. Instead, grassroots donations from Tennesseans like you make up the bulk of our support. It’s the right way to run our campaign, but it does mean I have to reach out a little more often to ask for your help. And look, I know that this campaign isn’t about me. We’re building a grassroots movement here that starts and ends with the people. I’m in this fight to be YOUR voice and fight for YOUR rights. I really appreciate your willingness to continue hearing me out, even when you get a lot of these emails. The stakes are just too high to let up for a second. Here’s that link one more time; make sure to click before tonight’s deadline: **_[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gj_em_bax?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73489895/438668097/209297649?refcode=ea.1d31e7c8-c384-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ms=ea.1d31e7c8-c384-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDMxZTdjOC1jMzg0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hjKkVTpTVzw8IVDqOT6tpwnt41N34oy_RP_a7ODVhgY=)_** We can only defeat Marsha Blackburn and turn Tennessee around _together._ Thanks so much for being with me. Gloria _Sent from my iPhone. Please excuse typos._ |

name: LTC (Ret.) Alexander Vindman
subject: My brother
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| It wasn't just me who blew the whistle on President Trump. It was me and my brother, Eugene
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4480%2E5257348%2E_33SA5)
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em_vindman.t5vKbb&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC30_20231116_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4480%2E5257348%2E_33SA5)
It’s Alexander Vindman.
Most of you know that I’m an Army Veteran. And most of you know who I am because of Trump’s first impeachment trial.
But it wasn't just me who blew the whistle on President Trump. It was me and my brother Eugene — a former Colonel in the U.S. Army — who was the senior ethics official at the National Security Council in the White House at the time.
Today, Eugene is running for Congress in Virginia where he will continue the fight to defend our democracy and the Constitution both of us swore to protect.
But he can't do it alone.
I am with him – there is nothing more important to me right now. So if you believe Congress needs more members with the integrity and courage to put service to country first, I am asking:
**[Can I count on you to use this link to contribute to split a donation between my brother Eugene Vindman's campaign for Congress in Virginia and Adam Schiff’s campaign for Senate in California? They need all of us to stand with them, like they have stood strong when taking on Trump.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em_vindman.t5vKbb&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC30_20231116_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=4480%2E5257348%2E_33SA5)**
When I testified before Congress during the first impeachment of Donald Trump, I did it to stand up for our democracy.
My brother and I were both attacked by Trump. Both of our careers in the Army suffered and ended before their time.
Since both of us stood up to Trump, Republicans’ abuse of power and attacks on our democracy have only grown.
Most recently, extremists in Congress chose Mike Johnson to be Speaker of the House – the “mastermind” of the attempt to overturn the 2020 election and undermine our democracy.
We need more members in the House who are willing to stand up to extremism and who are prepared to hold corrupt officials accountable.
We need members with the courage to put their constituents first.
My brother Eugene has defended this nation throughout his career, he stood up to Trump, and he will do that in Congress. Adam Schiff does that. But they can't do it without your help:
**[Can you please use this link to contribute directly to my brother Eugene Vindman's campaign for Congress in Virginia and Adam Schiff’s campaign for Senate in California? Eugene and Adam have stood with us and for the Constitution, now they need our help.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em_vindman.t5vKbb&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC30_20231116_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=4480%2E5257348%2E_33SA5)**
Eugene’s congressional campaign is extremely important to me. Thank you in advance for donating to Eugene and Adam’s campaign today. This means a lot to me personally.
Alexander Vindman
[DONATE NOW](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em_vindman.t5vKbb&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC30_20231116_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=4480%2E5257348%2E_33SA5)

clean_body: | It wasn't just me who blew the whistle on President Trump. It was me and my brother, Eugene It’s Alexander Vindman. Most of you know that I’m an Army Veteran. And most of you know who I am because of Trump’s first impeachment trial. But it wasn't just me who blew the whistle on President Trump. It was me and my brother Eugene — a former Colonel in the U.S. Army — who was the senior ethics official at the National Security Council in the White House at the time. Today, Eugene is running for Congress in Virginia where he will continue the fight to defend our democracy and the Constitution both of us swore to protect. But he can't do it alone. I am with him – there is nothing more important to me right now. So if you believe Congress needs more members with the integrity and courage to put service to country first, I am asking: When I testified before Congress during the first impeachment of Donald Trump, I did it to stand up for our democracy. My brother and I were both attacked by Trump. Both of our careers in the Army suffered and ended before their time. Since both of us stood up to Trump, Republicans’ abuse of power and attacks on our democracy have only grown. Most recently, extremists in Congress chose Mike Johnson to be Speaker of the House – the “mastermind” of the attempt to overturn the 2020 election and undermine our democracy. We need more members in the House who are willing to stand up to extremism and who are prepared to hold corrupt officials accountable. We need members with the courage to put their constituents first. My brother Eugene has defended this nation throughout his career, he stood up to Trump, and he will do that in Congress. Adam Schiff does that. But they can't do it without your help: Eugene’s congressional campaign is extremely important to me. Thank you in advance for donating to Eugene and Adam’s campaign today. This means a lot to me personally. Alexander Vindman Use of military rank, job titles or photographs in uniform does not imply the endorsement of the Department of Defense, Departments of the Army, Navy, Air Force, or the Marines or Space Force. 135 E. | | Patriot,

---
What a year it’s been!
---
If you told me a decade ago that in 2023, I would be ARRESTED FOUR TIMES as an innocent man, I wouldn’t have believed it.

---
But here we are! _2023 has been an interesting year – to say the least._

---
As I so often say, despite all of these many attacks, I will NEVER let the cruel and vicious Democrats break my spirit!
---
**_So, to close out the 2023 year, I’m hosting a special reception at my beautiful Trump International Golf Club in West Palm Beach, Florida where we will_** _**_not_**_** _dwell on this very dark year, but rather, will celebrate the coming 2024 year – in which the patriots of our country will win back the White House and Make America Great Again!_**

---
_...And YOU could be my_ __VIP GUEST__ _for this joyous occasion!_

---
I’ll cover your hotel, you’ll get to enjoy hors d'oeuvres and refreshments on me, you can bring a guest of your choice, and we’ll even take a photo together so that you can always remember this special moment.

---
_Right now, all you have to do is enter to win!_

If you told me a decade ago that in 2023, I would be ARRESTED FOUR TIMES as an innocent man, I wouldn’t have believed it. But here we are! 2023 has been an interesting year – to say the least. As I so often say, despite all of these many attacks, I will NEVER let the cruel and vicious Democrats break my spirit! So, to close out the 2023 year, I’m hosting a special reception at my beautiful Trump International Golf Club in West Palm Beach, Florida where we will not dwell on this very dark year, but rather, will celebrate the coming 2024 year – in which the patriots of our country will win back the White House and Make America Great Again! ...And YOU could be my VIP GUEST for this joyous occasion! | | Fellow Conservative, Remember the Covid-era surge in education funding? American taxpayers dished out **$190 BILLION extra** for schools during the pandemic. But those funds did NOT go to prevent learning loss as promised. A new report shows that some of the money was used to hire **_" chief diversity officers"_** in our public schools. And here's where it gets truly enraging: the schools that hired "chief diversity officers" actually made learning loss **WORSE** among black and Hispanic students compared to other schools.
---
[](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=2f2d8557399a4b04ad1ebda39333e46f&_e=AsgcgNygqeCVtaE8Bk9t25B258qRCnmk2hcKlEJ7i2LMUcyIZK0JkUUkqYVZZoGUnQT02Phmy9QrMi2Kktu2s9S9JJ_NTUyOi2EiYrqFdEdBuvWtwUUv2z7niUiOx2_HqA6WtKpczsPs5pj9gpz865wqRZVXlBiBCogTrFsJR36Y_37B_wkpVBYFcbPydP8YDFhQR0knuDI1jsdAc9Xa4XzzIp5mLY-4Z9SRKYlqNJf15wL7lTPxG6GgfZacL5ervLFmOD4Jl5fqDKuBXXoh3A3QmndKg35J4rw2VONUnCEmOUqjhUCdidx79h-qu2S8zXwGAkSI1qa7qJhDsS2iusO6WPz0mH-HxYx3TpBa63ehctbNwOsbIJOvQxYdAMNsti1EybGX1AZr_7PsVzAo0IbG20cQPDCyaViRvQqpt841-ecOzh1fVn08LxOJdFVSp0bNavLZOXsGk5ol3DYF5Q%3D%3D)

name: Mike Feuer
subject: I just signed a pledge (PHOTO)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MIKE FEUER FOR CONGRESS
body:
I invite every candidate in CA-30 to join me:

Mike Feuer for Congress | | Friend, _[**I’m writing to ask you to make a donation of $10 or any amount to help send me to Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73490579/438670550/580515288?amount=10&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2023.11.16_B1_FossilFuels_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDIyMThiYmEtYzY4NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xfpb-puEvGCHdBBr6t7FtZb2CRXl5dbSvXHN692TAoo=)_ But first, an important update: I have said that I will make acting on the climate crisis a priority in Congress. **But actions speak louder than words — which is why I just signed a pledge to forego campaign contributions from the fossil fuel industry. I urge every candidate in the race for California’s 30th District to do the same:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73490580/438670551/580515288?amount=10&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2023.11.16_B1_FossilFuels_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDIyMThiYmEtYzY4NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xfpb-puEvGCHdBBr6t7FtZb2CRXl5dbSvXHN692TAoo=) Oil, gas, and coal companies don’t just drive climate change emissions and poison our planet — they corrupt our democracy, too. Every year, the fossil fuel industry donates millions of dollars to members of Congress, buying their silence or their outright opposition to climate action. As Californians, we know better than most: Climate change is real, it’s dangerous, and it’s already here. We can’t afford to have a representative who is not 100% dedicated to protecting our homes, our democracy, and our planet. As I’ve said, the field to fill Adam Schiff’s shoes in Congress is vast, with over a dozen candidates. Unlike other candidates in this race, I can’t write my campaign a massive check, and I have no interest in begging for corporate PAC money. **Together, we’re building a campaign of, by, and for the people of California. Can you chip in $10 to ensure we have a representative who will put our health, safety, and democracy over fossil fuel profits?** **You can use this link: _[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rs_mikefeuer_fr_q42023](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73490581/438670552/1693661536?amount=10&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2023.11.16_B1_FossilFuels_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDIyMThiYmEtYzY4NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xfpb-puEvGCHdBBr6t7FtZb2CRXl5dbSvXHN692TAoo=)_** Thank you so much, Mike P.S. clean_body: I invite every candidate in CA-30 to join me: Mike Feuer for Congress | | Friend, = But first, an important update: I have said that I will make acting on the climate crisis a priority in Congress. But actions speak louder than words — which is why I just signed a pledge to forego campaign contributions from the fossil fuel industry. I urge every candidate in the race for California’s 30th District to do the same: = Oil, gas, and coal companies don’t just drive climate change emissions and poison our planet — they corrupt our democracy, too. Every year, the fossil fuel industry donates millions of dollars to members of Congress, buying their silence or their outright opposition to climate action. As Californians, we know better than most: Climate change is real, it’s dangerous, and it’s already here. We can’t afford to have a representative who is not 100% dedicated to protecting our homes, our democracy, and our planet. As I’ve said, the field to fill Adam Schiff’s shoes in Congress is vast, with over a dozen candidates. Unlike other candidates in this race, I can’t write my campaign a massive check, and I have no interest in begging for corporate PAC money. Together, we’re building a campaign of, by, and for the people of California. Can you chip in $10 to ensure we have a representative who will put our health, safety, and democracy over fossil fuel profits? You can use this link: = Thank you so much, Mike P.S. If you are interested, here is the full pledge I just signed — more info at . = | | PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MIKE FEUER FOR CONGRESS Mike Feuer for Congress 16633 Ventura Blvd Suite 1008 Encino, CA 91436 United States | | If you would like to receive only our most important messages, . name: Courier Newsroom
subject: Joe Rogan at a crossroads
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73491104/438672516/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjk1NWVjNjAtYzk4NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JkDsZx4ynldjINEoE99KI-Ibwzb5MrIFlGWkCUnxM08=&emci=1bf51ddb-bd84-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=b955ec60-c984-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=14016711)
**Remember Joe Rogan, Peter?** He gave us a shout-out earlier this year because of our mission to hold right-wing disinformation engines like him accountable:
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73491105/438672517/1796093816?refcode=em20231116&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjk1NWVjNjAtYzk4NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JkDsZx4ynldjINEoE99KI-Ibwzb5MrIFlGWkCUnxM08=)**
Well, Rogan’s been busy. Rogan’s podcast recently lost its long-held number one spot among Spotify’s playlist to _The Daily Show’s_ former host Trevor Noah. This comes as Rogan’s contract with Spotify is about to be up for renewal and amid new pressure on Spotify to cut ties with the right-wing flamethrower.
****Before we go further, you should know that Courier and our affiliated newsrooms in nine battleground states are working around the clock to hold bad actors like Rogan accountable, debunk their false claims, and deliver fact-based reporting to the communities that need it most.[Can you pitch in $5 now to support our work?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73491106/438672518/1796093816?refcode=em20231116&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjk1NWVjNjAtYzk4NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JkDsZx4ynldjINEoE99KI-Ibwzb5MrIFlGWkCUnxM08=)****
****So what has Rogan been up to in these last few months? The answer probably won’t surprise you:****
\- Claimed he gave himself **"arsenic poisoning"** by eating too many sardines.
\- When Elon Musk — an **engine of misinformation **himself appeared on Rogan's show recently — he claimed he bought Twitter to save it from so-called "left-wing thinking."
\- Hosted the likes of RFK Jr., who has continued to push **dangerous and debunked lies **about vaccines and other issues.
**The scariest part is just how influential Rogan has become in recent years.**
While his show may no longer occupy Spotify's top podcast spot, Rogan has amassed an **audience in the millions.**
Unfortunately, rather than taking a firm stand against Rogan's BS, it's likely that Spotify will continue to provide a lucrative platform for this type of profit-driven misinformation that will benefit both the company and Rogan himself.
**That's why Courier Newsroom exists, Peter**. Our newsrooms across nine battleground states operate in "news deserts" that lack other reliable sources of local reporting, so our journalists are dedicated to calling misinformation out for what it is and holding those who spread it accountable.
[**But it takes a lot of resources to support our newsrooms, and we're counting on supporters like you to help us keep it up. So if you can, please pitch in $5 or any amount today to help us continue fighting back against misinformation.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73491107/438672520/1796093816?refcode=em20231116&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjk1NWVjNjAtYzk4NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JkDsZx4ynldjINEoE99KI-Ibwzb5MrIFlGWkCUnxM08=)
[Pitch In ➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73491108/438672521/1796093816?refcode=em20231116&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjk1NWVjNjAtYzk4NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JkDsZx4ynldjINEoE99KI-Ibwzb5MrIFlGWkCUnxM08=)
Thanks!
The Courier Newsroom Team
* * *
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

[**Receive Fewer Emails**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73491109/438672522/1416945388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjk1NWVjNjAtYzk4NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JkDsZx4ynldjINEoE99KI-Ibwzb5MrIFlGWkCUnxM08=&emci=1bf51ddb-bd84-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=b955ec60-c984-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=14016711)
[**Update Your Information**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73491110/438672523/1324474970?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjk1NWVjNjAtYzk4NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JkDsZx4ynldjINEoE99KI-Ibwzb5MrIFlGWkCUnxM08=&emci=1bf51ddb-bd84-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=b955ec60-c984-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=14016711)
**[unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/XCUEQN0BTUWWQ1xBmQeS9g2?unsubscribedata=02Mplblg0NCDCjmhwTKclhJjEqVAd4lJGYxi0WgpSrzgUZLxN3PnYvGZL4GwVQmvE1KwHq6kxq72rVrDmVrmZMrC0uIXHhrAg8X1BmWIaqmnkqnOhBLEEfINhz%2Bm985HibLHDsXdz4zbV1Bk1QRixNiWuLzoN0dLKQjbDjnQigvyA8aNdE8IqNAczbnDaMkdsS%2ByU83jTAIGmdjQDJecqevGRv30X%2FTQEyS3wtEOgdqMJlNjO%2FHZ%2F%2BOylLxT9mYPwHOXBonMeRKBPtvnZZXYjqYWMBASpIG124tk%2BtJ8uy2g4lpll42tbQV9l1QhNtuaVj%2FWf%2FtvFcy0j1lhPXTCF4u2sKwhBKedtFoaHyiBd%2FuM0Ryr4AOfklurHmFgDxaUwo82Y5EmmGRQI2xP3IVub6TCs6mav0DIblkJEMVe7zsqpvE7txNNOP9CuZWp3HKb)**

subject: Less than one year from the 2024 election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2024, FEC ID# C00592154
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73491245/438672812/-2113420158?refcode=EM_NBI_JP_20231116_FR_MMFR_0_3MO_JimmyPanetta_NA_NA_MMFR1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTA1NzI4YS1jYTg0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R9VOTQW1sJtc93NwOU1aG8u92b5sFAlBzhYSDK8yoIc=&emci=cc7da8b6-a984-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=fa05728a-ca84-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=6108787) | Peter,

Today, we are less than a year away from the 2024 election. The road ahead will be challenging.

I am working hard in the U.S. House of Representatives to fight for the people and values of California’s 19th Congressional District, including lowering costs, expanding affordable housing, fighting climate change, preventing wildfires, and updating our infrastructure.

As we’ve seen this Congress, the current majority continues to flounder due to their deep division and constant infighting, and their extremism has taken over their legislative agenda. It is important that my campaign has the resources it needs so that we can protect our congressional district and do our part to win back the majority.

[Peter, I have a critical $10,000 mid-month fundraising goal, which I need to meet before Friday at midnight. That’s why I’m asking for your help. clean_body: | Peter, Today, we are less than a year away from the 2024 election. The road ahead will be challenging. I am working hard in the U.S. House of Representatives to fight for the people and values of California’s 19th Congressional District, including lowering costs, expanding affordable housing, fighting climate change, preventing wildfires, and updating our infrastructure. As we’ve seen this Congress, the current majority continues to flounder due to their deep division and constant infighting, and their extremism has taken over their legislative agenda. It is important that my campaign has the resources it needs so that we can protect our congressional district and do our part to win back the majority. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: = = = = = = We need all the support that we can get to make sure that we have resources to protect California’s 19th Congressional District and win back the U.S. House of Representatives. = Thank you for your support, Jimmy Panetta If you'd like to receive only the most important updates from us, Authorized and Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2024, FEC ID# C00592154 Jimmy Panetta for Congress PO Box 103 Carmel Valley, CA 93924 United States ** **

clean_body: To check off all our boxes, we’re going to need grassroots supporters like you to be the driving force that pushes Democrats to victory. | | | | | ---|--- 🚨 19 Days Until Our Next Special Election 🚨 19 days, that’s all we have left to make an impact before our next special elections in Florida and Minnesota. And President Joe Biden is calling on each member of this grassroots team to support our movement to elect state Democrats: Republicans have funneled millions into state-level races, making every special election an even tougher battle to win. We’re heeding President Biden’s call, and we need you to stand with him, too – there’s a hell of a lot more to do. Here’s our to-do list to secure Democratic victory in special elections:: Strategize with our candidates Mobilize resources to push our state Democrats across the finish line Invest in key races to ensure every vote counts Engage voters through door-knocking and phone banking To check off all our boxes, we’re going to need grassroots supporters like you, to be the driving force that pushes Democrats to victory. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thank you for being a crucial part of this team, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Paid for by DLCC PAC. name: Our Revolution
subject: Peter Willis, we can’t lose 2024 swing states. Here's our plan.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

The stakes in 2024 are total because, if Republicans win, they will do everything in their power to stop our country from ever holding another fair election again.

That's why we were so concerned last week to see President Biden's poll numbers plummet in 5 of the 6 most crucial swing states. However, on Tuesday, we also proved how sustained progressive organizing could overcome a tough political environment and deliver important wins up and down the ballot.

We launched our 2024 Swing State Fund to ensure we can deploy the precise tactics we used to mobilize progressive voters and win tight elections on Tuesday next November. Can we count on you to pitch in as a founding donor to our 2024 Swing State Fund? We need to raise $28,421 by the end of the week to meet our launch goal, so any amount is a huge help! (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12470?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231116_fr_2024swingRS_0_2MO_ourrevolution_na_na_2024swing&t=1011&akid=4902%2E5885482%2E8TE4Ky)

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.
CHIP IN $10 NOW » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12471?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231116_fr_2024swingRS_0_2MO_ourrevolution_na_na_2024swing&t=1012&akid=4902%2E5885482%2E8TE4Ky)
CHIP IN $27 NOW » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12472?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231116_fr_2024swingRS_0_2MO_ourrevolution_na_na_2024swing&t=1013&akid=4902%2E5885482%2E8TE4Ky)
CHIP IN $50 NOW » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12473?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231116_fr_2024swingRS_0_2MO_ourrevolution_na_na_2024swing&t=1014&akid=4902%2E5885482%2E8TE4Ky)
CHIP IN $100 NOW » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12474?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231116_fr_2024swingRS_0_2MO_ourrevolution_na_na_2024swing&t=1015&akid=4902%2E5885482%2E8TE4Ky)
CHIP IN $250 NOW » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12475?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231116_fr_2024swingRS_0_2MO_ourrevolution_na_na_2024swing&t=1016&akid=4902%2E5885482%2E8TE4Ky)
CHIP IN OTHER » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12470?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231116_fr_2024swingRS_0_2MO_ourrevolution_na_na_2024swing&t=1017&akid=4902%2E5885482%2E8TE4Ky)
In Virginia, we proved that when we organize and focus on the issues that matter most to working people, we can overcome big money and win tight elections. Your support was critical in helping ALL SEVEN of our endorsed candidates in Virginia win their races and ensure that Virginians hold onto their abortion rights!

In Ohio, our voter contact work meant the overwhelming passage of Issue 1 to guarantee abortion rights in the state Constitution — and our candidates even swept city council races to build local progressive power in red states like Ohio.

We helped progressives win important local races in diverse states, including Pennsylvania, Indiana, Texas, and Washington State. For example, Our Revolution member Jared Evans won re-election to the Indianapolis City Council with 53% of the vote in a district that Trump won and the media predicted would go Republican!

These victories prove the power of progressive organizing, and we couldn't have funded our work without the unwavering dedication of our supporters like you.

Please consider making a donation now to Our Revolution's 2024 Swing State Fund. Together, we can defend democracy against authoritarianism and build a future that reflects our shared aspirations. (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12470?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231116_fr_2024swingRS_0_2MO_ourrevolution_na_na_2024swing&t=1018&akid=4902%2E5885482%2E8TE4Ky)

When we organize, we win!

Our Revolution

name: EMILYs List
subject: This swing district Republican voted with MAGA Mike 89% of the time 👀
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
We're taking on Mike Johnson and the Republicans who vote with him |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Molinaro?=
subject: November Update from Rep. Marc Molinaro
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marc for US Inc
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5b51e91cb369/molinaro-meets-with-schoharie-locals-on-inflation-law-enforcement-9414975?e=a39a20e5dd)
---
| |
---
|
---
| The holidays may be approaching ([did you see the Rockefeller Tree is coming from Vestal!](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=06f02eafea&e=a39a20e5dd)), but my work for our communities isn't slowing down.

Check out some of the recent highlights below. And I wish you and your family a happy Thanksgiving!
---
|
---
|
---
We all know the horrific effects of the opioid epidemic. It is the greatest public health emergency of our lifetime. We must take decisive action to save lives.

I'm proud to have introduced the Supporting Access to Vital and Affordable Care for Everyone (SAVE) Act that expands access to over-the-counter naloxone and was proud to have groups such as Mothers Against Prescription Drug Abuse, stand with me in support of this.

[\- "Rep. Molinaro Introduces Bipartisan Bill to Make It Easier to Access Narcan Amid Spike in Local Overdose Deaths"](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=361608b1df&e=a39a20e5dd)
\- ["Molinaro introduces bipartisan bill to expand community access to Narcan"](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=474289e4b9&e=a39a20e5dd)

Additionally, I have pushed the Federal Communications Commission to implement a system that reroutes calls made to the National 988 Crisis Lifeline to local call centers. Having this lifesaving technology is indispensable for addressing New York state's mental health crisis; it's a necessity we cannot afford to be without.

- ["Molinaro supports suicide prevention with crisis hotline rerouting technology"](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=2622a08aca&e=a39a20e5dd)
|
---
|
---
I've said it before, and I'll say it again. I will continue to stand with Israel as they defend their right to exist. **We must hold Hamas terrorists accountable for their crimes. Biden needs to stay firm in support of Israel.**

\- [Molinaro continues to show support for Israel](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=fb3ce6134b&e=a39a20e5dd)
|
---
|
---
I'm excited to announce that over $1.5 million in federal funding will be delivered to multiple police departments in order to address the law enforcement labor shortage in upstate New York.

This funding will help improve our community safety as departments are better able to attract and retain police officers.

\- ["Ulster County Sheriff’s Office among beneficiaries of federal funding to aid law enforcement personnel shortages, U.S. Rep. Marc Molinaro’s office says"](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=17b98aa944&e=a39a20e5dd)

|
---
|
---
The Administration's attempt to claw back social security payments is unfair and unacceptable. I'll continue to push back and make sure that doesn't happen for our seniors.

[\- "The Social Security Administration Overpays People—and Then Demands the Money Back!](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=6d4f57cfab&e=a39a20e5dd)["](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=f360f19a80&e=a39a20e5dd)

We all know that far too often our seniors find themselves isolated, especially those with disabilities or living in rural areas. By bringing the successful 'Friendly Calls for Seniors' program to the national level, we can combat loneliness and help seniors live fuller and more dignified lives. It was an honor for me to introduce this bill to bring this program to the national level.

\- ["U.S. Rep. Marc Molinaro introduces bill to bring Friendly Calls for Seniors program to national level"](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=4e5b1319a5&e=a39a20e5dd)
|
---
| [DONATE TODAY](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=f35a3acb31&e=a39a20e5dd "DONATE TODAY")

Hi there Friend,

It's Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson.

_**I wanted to reach out and introduce myself because, Friend, I hear you are one of our most dedicated grassroots supporters. **_

I was raised in Shreveport, LA. My father was a firefighter who taught me early the importance of service and sacrifice.

I attended Louisiana State University, where I received a degree in business and later my law degree.

As a constitutional lawyer, I worked tirelessly to protect religious freedom, the sanctity of human life, and biblical values.

name: Team Scholten
subject: Let’s retake the House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress

But it’s not just West Michiganders relying on Hillary’s leadership in Congress. The path to the House majority runs straight through this district, so all Americans are counting on us to keep this seat out of the hands of extremists.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73492193/438675825/1436736915?refcode=em-11.16.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTM0NDNkMmMtY2M4NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZcK_Qhad58OVYPZAaT-x0tJsSRMKaRWUf0Od58q6fXg=) In a district widely considered a bellwether for our chances of retaking the House, Democrats in Orange County -- and across the country -- know how important it is to nominate the _strongest Democrat possible_ in CA-47.

**The good news is we have just that in Joanna** , but don't just take our word for it. Here's a quote from OC representative Linda Sanchez: | _“Weiss’ experience mobilizing women voters will be essential in 2024, as Democrats hope to harness the lingering anger about the overturning of Roe v. Wade. As recent elections in Ohio and Virginia showed, the right to an abortion remains a deeply potent issue.

**When you talk about things like a woman’s right to choose, that’s very personal. Being a woman in that race, she’s going to be able to deliver that message.”**_

Rep. Linda Sánchez (D-Calif.)

Joanna also consistently reports the largest number of low-dollar, grassroots donors from Democrats across Orange County. **That's important because David Wasserman of the _Cook Political Report_ says that if "Democrats can coalesce around Weiss" we can put up a strong fight to keep the seat!**
