clean_body: | = Peter, did you catch today’s POLITICO article about CA-47? = In a district widely considered a bellwether for our chances of retaking the House, Democrats in Orange County -- and across the country -- know how important it is to nominate the strongest Democrat possible in CA-47. The good news is we have just that in Joanna , but don't just take our word for it. Here's a quote from OC representative Linda Sanchez: | “Weiss’ experience mobilizing women voters will be essential in 2024, as Democrats hope to harness the lingering anger about the overturning of Roe v. Wade. As recent elections in Ohio and Virginia showed, the right to an abortion remains a deeply potent issue. When you talk about things like a woman’s right to choose, that’s very personal. Being a woman in that race, she’s going to be able to deliver that message.” Rep. Linda Sánchez (D-Calif.) Joanna also consistently reports the largest number of low-dollar, grassroots donors from Democrats across Orange County. That's important because David Wasserman of the Cook Political Report says that if "Democrats can coalesce around Weiss" we can put up a strong fight to keep the seat! With Joanna at the helm, we're in our strongest position to win this race, but we need to keep pushing: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: **= | = ---|--- = | = = | = CA-47 is becoming ground zero in the fight for House control, and the implications here touch everything -- from reproductive rights to protecting Social Security and Medicare, and the very stability of our democracy. Republicans and our opponent Scott Baugh are looking for any reason to jump in with millions of dollars to crush our chances. Our best firewall against that is a unified and strong grassroots movement. That’s where you come in: = Thank you, Joanna Weiss HQ =** | Joanna's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! To chip in to Joanna's campaign = To learn more about Joanna, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . | | Hey Peter, it seems like the chaos in the House has only just begun. **While this week's narrow miss of a government shutdown**** _should_****be a breath of fresh air — it's created all sorts of**** _bizarre_****behavior among the Republican caucus.** Rep. Chip Roy said of his party: "One thing. I want my Republican colleagues to give me one thing. One. That I can go campaign on and say we did. Anybody sitting in the complex, if you want to come down to the floor and come explain to me, one meaningful, significant thing the Republican majority has done." Kevin McCarthy has taken to playground tomfoolery, reportedly elbowing his colleague Rep. Tim Burchett in an otherwise walkable hallway. It's not just the House, Peter. Over in the Senate building, Republicans spent hours clashing over Sen. Tommy Tuberville's blockade of essential military promotions. **But here's the thing — they all seem surprised.** _Surprised_ , despite knowing that shutting down the government was detrimental to their constituents as well as their own records. _Surprised_ , as if unseating their party's Speaker of the House wouldn't slow progress and cause hateful sentiment. _Surprised_ that the stonewalling and grandstanding would eventually catch up with them. But why? **It**** _might_****be because they aren't paying very good attention, Peter.** Take my opponent, Lori Chavez-DeRemer and her decision to support Rep. Mike Johnson as Speaker of the House. Following her party-line vote, she issued a [press release stating](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73492347/438676294/498819188?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDEwN2M2Ni1jYzg0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Svr5fWXKX5t47sJG4HojI1MJ9wGVXnvArTyFNq2zsw=&emci=08c92a50-c684-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=bd107c66-cc84-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=29359352): _"I'm hopeful that Speaker Johnson will work effectively with all sides of the Conference to advance commonsense, pragmatic legislation that is good for our state and our nation._**_Although I haven't had the chance to get to know him well, I've made Oregon's priorities very clear to him."_** Then she went on [television](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73492348/438676295/-1980098798?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDEwN2M2Ni1jYzg0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Svr5fWXKX5t47sJG4HojI1MJ9wGVXnvArTyFNq2zsw=&emci=08c92a50-c684-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=bd107c66-cc84-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=29359352) and her opening line about Johnson was, "I don't know much about Speaker Johnson." [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73492349/438676296/974409837?refcode=2023-11-16-lcd&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=bd107c66-cc84-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDEwN2M2Ni1jYzg0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Svr5fWXKX5t47sJG4HojI1MJ9wGVXnvArTyFNq2zsw=) **Seemingly, without doing any research whatsoever, Lori Chavez-DeRemer missed even the most obvious topline values of Johnson: he's anti-gay, anti-reproductive rights, anti-freedom of religion, and doesn't believe in climate change.** If she was _actually_ 'making Oregon's priorities clear,' wouldn't she know that his leadership is plainly incompatible with Oregonians? By aligning with Johnson, Lori has at _best_ demonstrated a failure to do her research, and revealed her disconnect from the values that truly represent our community. **We deserve leaders who reflect our values and priorities.**[**That's why I'm reaching out to you today to support my campaign for Congress against Lori Chavez-DeRemer.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73492350/438676297/974409837?refcode=2023-11-16-lcd&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=bd107c66-cc84-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDEwN2M2Ni1jYzg0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Svr5fWXKX5t47sJG4HojI1MJ9wGVXnvArTyFNq2zsw=) Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: She couldn’t be bothered to do a cursory Google search?! | | | | Hey Peter, it seems like the chaos in the House has only just begun. While this week's narrow miss of a government shutdown shouldbe a breath of fresh air — it's created all sorts of bizarrebehavior among the Republican caucus. Rep. Chip Roy said of his party: "One thing. I want my Republican colleagues to give me one thing. One. That I can go campaign on and say we did. Anybody sitting in the complex, if you want to come down to the floor and come explain to me, one meaningful, significant thing the Republican majority has done." Kevin McCarthy has taken to playground tomfoolery, reportedly elbowing his colleague Rep. Tim Burchett in an otherwise walkable hallway. It's not just the House, Peter. Over in the Senate building, Republicans spent hours clashing over Sen. Tommy Tuberville's blockade of essential military promotions. But here's the thing — they all seem surprised. Surprised , despite knowing that shutting down the government was detrimental to their constituents as well as their own records. Surprised , as if unseating their party's Speaker of the House wouldn't slow progress and cause hateful sentiment. Surprised that the stonewalling and grandstanding would eventually catch up with them. But why? It mightbe because they aren't paying very good attention, Peter. Take my opponent, Lori Chavez-DeRemer and her decision to support Rep. Mike Johnson as Speaker of the House. Following her party-line vote, she issued a : "I'm hopeful that Speaker Johnson will work effectively with all sides of the Conference to advance commonsense, pragmatic legislation that is good for our state and our nation.Although I haven't had the chance to get to know him well, I've made Oregon's priorities very clear to him." Then she went on and her opening line about Johnson was, "I don't know much about Speaker Johnson." = Seemingly, without doing any research whatsoever, Lori Chavez-DeRemer missed even the most obvious topline values of Johnson: he's anti-gay, anti-reproductive rights, anti-freedom of religion, and doesn't believe in climate change. If she was actually 'making Oregon's priorities clear,' wouldn't she know that his leadership is plainly incompatible with Oregonians? By aligning with Johnson, Lori has at best demonstrated a failure to do her research, and revealed her disconnect from the values that truly represent our community. We deserve leaders who reflect our values and priorities.= Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = ---|--- = | = = I will fight for all Oregonians, by advocating for LGBTQ+ rights, defending reproductive freedom, and ensuring that our state moves forward in a way that respects and represents every individual — and do my damn research before voting. More soon, Lynn_ = | | | Paid for by Lynn Peterson for Congress |

My fellow Americans – this is Mike Johnson.

| My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

_**[This is a longer email but I'm humbly asking you to read it start to finish.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a37b20934b4f4d5e8b985b20742245c8&_e=aCyJDzbmZeb4E7L3oHPBxPO0ZhlxfcrxKvAF96GU7ROQyI8vn8AQV83zosO9nl7vYJ8IdrXgGxHUL4svMgURKZDVZtxluq7bQtJv3CfjolIxgJv_CQW_olJMRz-bqapJyX0khW3DdgQ0svMDR9jz3r0qOokaN9dSwJ4Y8xHWCEtbTwEgs1lJ_DIkzjpKIU0Cj1b5pc8S5l6GRvgxLGN2hwzIbOh2V78Lxe_Z9zjVYUeEe6vdrbNURE8L2wu1DWhngWgAHoTVIrkcX93ExV2ELreZl_1h6lmQOMsQhBHOgEgIMh9yz83m45RfnnZEJ4G3EDw6SoCAJfQZVCf0PgoTTfHtCEjsWWl1uWOCDtXmHqy3X_xoXbZLS_3G5zQvRcRSwyq2Z3ZlNwTksWDjU2YLMK6u8yEBDUMmpb5_lh5ldTY%3D "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.")**_

Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.
* The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.
* Politico fired off this headline: _" Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson."_
* And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. _But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not _really_ the goal..._

The _real_ goal of this political ambush is two-fold: **1)** smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and **2)** scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

**It 's about power and money. Nothing else.**

That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. _**[So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a37b20934b4f4d5e8b985b20742245c8&_e=aCyJDzbmZeb4E7L3oHPBxPO0ZhlxfcrxKvAF96GU7ROQyI8vn8AQV83zosO9nl7vYJ8IdrXgGxHUL4svMgURKZDVZtxluq7bQtJv3CfjolIxgJv_CQW_olJMRz-bqapJyX0khW3DdgQ0svMDR9jz3r0qOokaN9dSwJ4Y8xHWCEtbTwEgs1lJ_DIkzjpKIU0Cj1b5pc8S5l6GRvgxLGN2hwzIbOh2V78Lxe_Z9zjVYUeEe6vdrbNURE8L2wu1DWhntPWp_dc9nYr4X2u14thc5g2OTMHMsEshZnhIv1Qd0SQr5vxkTgiKEl9no8TjWkt9zJeW8hzTBDGSh1CiP-iE2SVt06GSLUa6dntt6vFU9fKjhSaOHHd8gJZ6v6rwbjAc44ANBN8MTy5qQf1ha3YMFEMXWH8bQixV83iznbUF3_w%3D "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country.

**If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority.**

So here's my final pitch to you:

We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now.

The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this.

Let me make myself perfectly clear:

_I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative._

_**[The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a37b20934b4f4d5e8b985b20742245c8&_e=aCyJDzbmZeb4E7L3oHPBxPO0ZhlxfcrxKvAF96GU7ROQyI8vn8AQV83zosO9nl7vYJ8IdrXgGxHUL4svMgURKZDVZtxluq7bQtJv3CfjolIxgJv_CQW_olJMRz-bqapJyX0khW3DdgQ0svMDR9jz3r0qOokaN9dSwJ4Y8xHWCEtbTwEgs1lJ_DIkzjpKIU0Cj1b5pc8S5l6GRvgxLGN2hwzIbOh2V78Lxe_Z9zjVYUeEe6vdrbNURE8L2wu1DWhnBHeZt0dWL00wc1msjo5qyaNvgr1GmMRmfDX6CDjk_6iihzNVHCE8ZIuLzq5KBb9pPfvNNNrtjN9bi0wlGnMrxWIG0r1auzAgVRKQ86JRRibF9d0fneaBaZIg6UFtqVb9zwUp59k1SKr1TDB6AZPw_w5Q9BrU9wwjrDqhDljttOs%3D "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.")**_

That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in?

clean_body: This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish. My fellow Americans – this is Mike Johnson. | | | | | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson. "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish." Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me. The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC. Politico fired off this headline: " Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson." And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports. Look: These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not really the goal... The real goal of this political ambush is two-fold: 1) smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and 2) scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats. It 's about power and money. Nothing else. That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month." It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country. If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority. So here's my final pitch to you: We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now. The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this. Let me make myself perfectly clear: I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative. "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING." That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in? Thanks for all you do. In liberty, Speaker Mike Johnson | "Speaker Mike Johnson" | | | "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!" This is Steve Scalise. As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY" at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else. What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats? | | "START MY MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY >>" | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to defending our Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. clean_body: We won’t stand down. | = Let’s be perfectly clear, Peter. The GOP will stop at nothing to cut our Social Security and Medicare benefits. But don’t just take our word for it: FIRST: Senate Republicans released an egregious plan that would gut Social Security. THEN: Former Vice President Mike Pence doubled down and proposed to leave cuts to Security and Medicare benefits “on the table.” AND THEN: MAGA Republicans shamelessly boasted on the House Floor about their readiness to slash Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid. NOW:= It's evident that we can't rely on the GOP to safeguard our hard-earned benefits and social safety net. But we can hold them accountable and support President Biden's dedication to these crucial programs. = Joe is working tirelessly to ensure our seniors can retire with dignity and security, but he needs to know we're behind him. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks for your support, Unite the Country | Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. Of the 33 Senate seats on the ballot in the 2024 Election, 23 are held by Democrats or Independents who caucus with the Democratic Party — while just 10 are held by Republicans.

The Senate map we are looking at is the most favorable map for Republicans in nearly ten years! We are not just talking swing states either, but **THREE RED STATE DEMOCRATS** are up for reelection next year. [**The time to go on the offensive is now – our best opportunity for the next decade!**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=1651a82e74e44177b435111f40b46c09&_e=4c6RlPHu78TYZxccUTnWvi3G8w1n9nbvjq16-BX5ondMnfBIq2M9voCpVGgsVhR0Z1an4Fn_5oiynmCT0p9-lcuBiwjC3WSKLjYYAFYAxwTupsG3JIXsYCrzoXDkhgNAMAR9-k9ita5DzBp2wPa5kajVTDbmDHjVwkuIG16zq5u5QpcUgLjniPwjSX8SQUWJXaH8Hi2LaMJTFgTz2r0EAbLruKSN1xQ30BHbzqVXJq7BZIzBCvyjplTX4sNHRM5WPG_JeSN0GMGkLLFBpvbFB-eNO3qQWz-ldD8s1lZVi034YE-G5FWVPT2HxB92A3uf08gZiHn-Pz9yN5TpEg0Q1paM4wXlGlk0BeA3RRp4wpUJDsHVajr4D6NVKu2zul4khDcvxGUGlbEh8NlErlU3QqzHN_IBf2wwQ6ws-NXiudOwyIa0u1fGPcrgDdwKmDRqIacgU7wxS--sJp1aXKyUTA%3D%3D)

[**SOLIDIFY THE REPUBLICAN ADVANTAGE**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=1651a82e74e44177b435111f40b46c09&_e=4c6RlPHu78TYZxccUTnWvi3G8w1n9nbvjq16-BX5ondMnfBIq2M9voCpVGgsVhR0Z1an4Fn_5oiynmCT0p9-lcuBiwjC3WSKLjYYAFYAxwTupsG3JIXsYCrzoXDkhgNAMAR9-k9ita5DzBp2wPa5kajVTDbmDHjVwkuIG16zq5u5QpcUgLjniPwjSX8SQUWJXaH8Hi2LaMJTFgTz2r0EAbLruKSN1xQ30BHbzqVXJq7BZIzBCvyjplTX4sNHRM5WPG_JeSN0GMGkLLFBpvbFB-eNO3qQWz-ldD8s1lZVi034YE-G5FWVPT2HxB92A3ufivON0lo6Bq43LuYK1fkwpuIRuqqw3N-kt1gx45Y71XdDHgGHNLiKKahFECp8fomh379ELSvGqYsL8GLDOVwkaZgNISjRI9EUS5w45CfyytjabkmyY5GW7ue2kCVn7sQHA76W5bhDgGw1C_8Ukez8kA%3D%3D)
**Montana. Ohio. West Virginia.** These three states will be critical in deciding the future of the Senate majority. While we've had favorable maps in the past, we haven't had the cash on hand to compete against the Democrat money machine. A good map is nothing without the proper funding to run the campaigns we need to win.

**These favorable conditions might not even matter though if you’re not with us!**

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Urgently asking for your contribution to defend this seat
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter -

On Monday morning, my primary challenger from last year announced his 2024
campaign. He wants a rematch against me, and we're going to give it to
him.

I'll explain more in just a moment, but if that's all you need to hear to
add your support, [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231116-2-io.cMS8ge&refcode=em20231116-31892&amount=3&t=1001&akid=31892%2E1203867%2ENKc6Vl ]I'm personally asking you to split a $3
contribution between our campaign and Justice Democrats today.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231116-2-io.cMS8ge&refcode=em20231116-31892&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=31892%2E1203867%2ENKc6Vl ]Contribute $3

Now here's the truth, Peter:

We already knew that this race — no matter who my opponent was — would
attract an obscene amount of outside spending from right-wing dark money
groups and Republican billionaires nationwide.

But after pouring over half a million dollars into supporting my opponent
last time around, you can be sure that the likes of AIPAC's United
Democracy Project and Clarence Thomas-bankroller Harlan Crow are going to
pull out all the stops in 2024.

That means even more bigoted attack ads blanketing the airwaves in my
district.

It means more lies and disinformation spread on social media.

And yes — it means more resources required to fight back.

We can't afford to take anything for granted in this primary, and the only
way we can continue our movement's fight for justice is if we're all in it
together. That's why I'm asking:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231116-2-io.cMS8ge&refcode=em20231116-31892&amount=3&t=1021&akid=31892%2E1203867%2ENKc6Vl ]Can you split a $3 contribution between my campaign and
Justice Democrats today? Lots and lots of grassroots donations is how we
fund this movement, so please add yours if you can.

When we faced a surge of last-minute super PAC spending in 2022, this
grassroots team stepped up with a surge of our own — $5, $10, and $25 at a
time.

We fought back, and we won. Now it's going to take all of us standing
together once more to do it again.

Thank you so much for anything you can chip in today.

In solidarity,

Ilhan Omar

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231116-2-io.cMS8ge&refcode=em20231116-31892&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=31892%2E1203867%2ENKc6Vl ]Contribute

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20231116-31892-footer&t=1023&refcode2=31892_1203867_NKc6Vl&akid=31892%2E1203867%2ENKc6Vl

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=31892%2E1203867%2ENKc6Vl

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Fellow Conservative,

More and more is being written about the Montana Senate race every week - and with every new article, it becomes clearer how Democrats in red states like Montana hope to win their races.

* Use Biden's massive campaign operation to their advantage. While they plan to distance themselves from the president publicly, they're going to be using his resources behind the scenes:

_**“With a Biden versus Trump rematch on the horizon, Roberts said Democrats will be able to collaborate with the Biden campaign in key battleground states and build the infrastructure necessary to wage successful campaigns.”**_

* Ignoring Biden and the most extreme elements of their party:

“ _**For Democrats to hold the Senate, they'll need to rely on voters splitting their tickets at the presidential and Senate levels.”**_
If the sources in the article I read are to be believed, **the way Democrats intend to hold onto this critical Senate seat - and their majority - is by having their candidates pretend to be something they're not.**

From Ohio to Montana, Democrats are trying to outrun the progressive records they've built throughout years of advancing Chuck Schumer's liberal agenda in the Senate.

Fellow American -

I’m still settling into my new office – both the physical space and the position I now hold in the federal government. I’m going to be honest with you, the last few weeks have been a blur – but productive and exciting as well.

Believe it or not, there wasn’t a manual left behind that I can reference in this new role. So, as you can imagine, we’ve been wasting no time settling in and figuring out how to best prioritize your interests and needs. The American people deserve nothing less than my best and that’s what I intend to give.

[**I’m reaching out today because I want to make sure that my team has the appropriate email, phone number, and mailing address on file for you.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1efd158cc1dd4a1689d04fe83de14fc4&_e=pNdi5ZiUs-nXQRk5kSFRRmg5okiilB1HzQwsIf_BYip6zDvegvH6zpmGlUMYx3Z_pigpJc4luNlHiM0Ql3V3Tq_1Kt8HR6wzz6B00IOmbwSAMQan8bABnVUhyoumA19yuBNc9x0-44j_2qNjz9XM775ivdVH7oS0lzEtHwFqtLMjfZBjqOUbwm8XaJi7kaWhniZ6wooWBIlOhO-NXj38gIaqDJTPVUiMU6YrHqNf7IO71GZY7_qVTbDJQFa3Pi8mZj5qb2GVxKhaPeBWF_j6d5DFYLZb3IemOqKI4sd8F1acZEiLv-qhOdTERL07o_tSdXt5mI5TPN28m8S2243AEszZAhDaDiwcM532SshZ4XwLGik8Md9kEt0d5k6w4ZLUXPzZHFTRx_WTXpR7qBFnToPgfZu2rdrHx0B5mnjIZDE%3D)
[** UPDATE OUR RECORDS **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1efd158cc1dd4a1689d04fe83de14fc4&_e=pNdi5ZiUs-nXQRk5kSFRRmg5okiilB1HzQwsIf_BYip6zDvegvH6zpmGlUMYx3Z_pigpJc4luNlHiM0Ql3V3Tq_1Kt8HR6wzz6B00IOmbwSAMQan8bABnVUhyoumA19yuBNc9x0-44j_2qNjz9XM775ivdVH7oS0lzEtHwFqtLMjfZBjqOUbwm8XaJi7kaWhniZ6wooWBIlOhO-NXj38gIaqDJTPVUiMU6YrHqNf7IO71GZY7_qVTbDJQFa3Pi8mpcWkqwdR5VPloYBfWLXAczDCKNwX-TBckOYG5-SsQJKvVsVzMARlPee2JpCXVIcZOUunIq4ZUWU_H4eMfE_iwMJe7Jgxc994OR5Efla_1EhEtgc9tM97gPfy3W9soVZHoF7jQQ5JoAwyHOjvBG40GdwEuXpiMTDdWHMniJkp3lk%3D)
Before my colleagues elected me the 56th Speaker of the House, our mailing list was mainly comprised of folks from the great state of Louisiana. _But now as Speaker, every Republican in the country is a constituent of mine and I need to be able to know I can reach out as needed._

Holding on to the House majority in next November’s election is going to be a tall order – [**but with you on our team, I know our chances will increase exponentially.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1efd158cc1dd4a1689d04fe83de14fc4&_e=pNdi5ZiUs-nXQRk5kSFRRmg5okiilB1HzQwsIf_BYip6zDvegvH6zpmGlUMYx3Z_pigpJc4luNlHiM0Ql3V3Tq_1Kt8HR6wzz6B00IOmbwSAMQan8bABnVUhyoumA19yuBNc9x0-44j_2qNjz9XM775ivdVH7oS0lzEtHwFqtLMjfZBjqOUbwm8XaJi7kaWhniZ6wooWBIlOhO-NXj38gIaqDJTPVUiMU6YrHqNf7IO71GZY7_qVTbDJQFa3Pi8mPFROXXisDfer3T0z6CNjg7JgyDIZI7VZCbkzjL_tdoS1aoUdEknoDDII1ufnNbUmwNSftJ3OsSMGZ7kiRQNYRvoh5d83RlFvRcVVDVxkVY8AXak-hbtXx8mxYyMBj3EtjSceggucvkwIWVA0kRiwHyuu8geoi4wWkzAYp43mdR8%3D)

I’ll be honest with you, before I was elected to lead the House a few weeks ago, I was relatively unknown nationally, meaning I probably didn’t have you on my mailing list. As we build out our campaign operation from the ground up, _**I am going to need every patriot to step forward.**_ So please, [**let me hear from you today.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1efd158cc1dd4a1689d04fe83de14fc4&_e=pNdi5ZiUs-nXQRk5kSFRRmg5okiilB1HzQwsIf_BYip6zDvegvH6zpmGlUMYx3Z_pigpJc4luNlHiM0Ql3V3Tq_1Kt8HR6wzz6B00IOmbwSAMQan8bABnVUhyoumA19yuBNc9x0-44j_2qNjz9XM775ivdVH7oS0lzEtHwFqtLMjfZBjqOUbwm8XaJi7kaWhniZ6wooWBIlOhO-NXj38gIaqDJTPVUiMU6YrHqNf7IO71GZY7_qVTbDJQFa3Pi8mhUhkVofM9PvFiVDzOM41KoNpWbxtFKdmYEVaIljPRTv0JrpHkh4wWJXnt_BdfJ6Mb3h5G3iAjbBIxFUG3udOzVeoiYxuc8wQysEOWIVQOIRoYnxwwvIF0qfX6Js9rIK1VZ_2DHwUjWsx4bmfv4wjOZJgLMbqqXplux3cEqGHTzE%3D)

[**There are many more conservatives I haven’t reached yet.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1efd158cc1dd4a1689d04fe83de14fc4&_e=pNdi5ZiUs-nXQRk5kSFRRmg5okiilB1HzQwsIf_BYip6zDvegvH6zpmGlUMYx3Z_pigpJc4luNlHiM0Ql3V3Tq_1Kt8HR6wzz6B00IOmbwSAMQan8bABnVUhyoumA19yuBNc9x0-44j_2qNjz9XM775ivdVH7oS0lzEtHwFqtLMjfZBjqOUbwm8XaJi7kaWhniZ6wooWBIlOhO-NXj38gIaqDJTPVUiMU6YrHqNf7IO71GZY7_qVTbDJQFa3Pi8m-IrTrOg5scV1rbjMfSApBtk2T5gP2PPdn56z8Z5OtR7njVMYmY6RT9Bm87wG6wQji1QOcY1FXu6iX2nypoxy-WfsqCdnlFjWujZpTMonFagiwIWQRsbdO6wGnQpADygHdozwn7u9Bmopuhboi_0NdGVmRnBZrLMhZPokbA9vOxc%3D)

[** _RESPOND TO THE SPEAKER HERE_ **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1efd158cc1dd4a1689d04fe83de14fc4&_e=pNdi5ZiUs-nXQRk5kSFRRmg5okiilB1HzQwsIf_BYip6zDvegvH6zpmGlUMYx3Z_pigpJc4luNlHiM0Ql3V3Tq_1Kt8HR6wzz6B00IOmbwSAMQan8bABnVUhyoumA19yuBNc9x0-44j_2qNjz9XM775ivdVH7oS0lzEtHwFqtLMjfZBjqOUbwm8XaJi7kaWhniZ6wooWBIlOhO-NXj38gIaqDJTPVUiMU6YrHqNf7IO71GZY7_qVTbDJQFa3Pi8mU267KSYBJDWand8-cpyYBmqJ40Kyb_ovl55HKVN9dtTBwWxK1ZMwguTLQ11ElJ3gOW9x3yc-E5kcjRqe8ID7eKfwl_GlI23B6z0KmYpazBnEWVztHzMeLvYx5a2trTSsb_ef2_OTfXj1QVYguqlyCK65qJD52NHfy8cqyGaHG1Y%3D)
With respect,

[ ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1efd158cc1dd4a1689d04fe83de14fc4&_e=pNdi5ZiUs-nXQRk5kSFRRhktLmaoIW-0CS7oeZGYBbq07og5LPssltS9_9qO8L4UUxRiyU6ZKC4kGFiNmKtCPir5aUhOdJfnz1NSlrOlz-36JrwitM4QLj3qnnUK9cYKNiRASPxZYHUFmLr9qTco5opacZXDpiN6nuKmK2kNUkhxCmrAO0QfiZp4ncG3QK8BGBe8ou6BqudhCmqXpYQFwND_K5JiUtTSLAlwHNGhbr94B34da65yHr8h5PPFFlaUlYV282Nuk2Yfo0iOAcuEY_8j8vXGAwuafmXOeua-nzHPu57f1X2_HHiPF_X67uDN-FKW-nVjrOIziCiKLwOv8OosV2KqXL2R9hTZXTavFojMcP4s2PM-bzP1KSgCAFxRCCvgS3qunMZmTxDz7HEs7v3Ep2NMFqf2QDyQPCXP_KdfUHBphJidPe5kmCo7_9SMLkng1Z01OuRUxGw7asdYHndd69m5O0DIDZjU-lsAk9WCPsp_DMP-Twa9Hx_fkm96_wOMiw468UNNVgo3SBcTusPtH5Iyvi5oTDvmH7IDKLXjBpARY3ZsLFT5N3jt2AxCfkJBKVa9IW3S49RAW2dBGw%3D%3D)
As Speaker, I want to hear from you on the top issues of the day. It's important for us to deliver results for the American people.

Would you take a moment to complete my [**_Official Speaker Survey_**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1efd158cc1dd4a1689d04fe83de14fc4&_e=pNdi5ZiUs-nXQRk5kSFRRhktLmaoIW-0CS7oeZGYBbq07og5LPssltS9_9qO8L4UUxRiyU6ZKC4kGFiNmKtCPir5aUhOdJfnz1NSlrOlz-36JrwitM4QLj3qnnUK9cYKNiRASPxZYHUFmLr9qTco5opacZXDpiN6nuKmK2kNUkhxCmrAO0QfiZp4ncG3QK8BGBe8ou6BqudhCmqXpYQFwND_K5JiUtTSLAlwHNGhbr94B34da65yHr8h5PPFFlaUlYV282Nuk2Yfo0iOAcuEY_8j8vXGAwuafmXOeua-nzHPu57f1X2_HHiPF_X67uDN-FKW-nVjrOIziCiKLwOv8OosV2KqXL2R9hTZXTavFojMcP4s2PM-bzP1KSgCAFxRCCvgS3qunMZmTxDz7HEs7v3Ep2NMFqf2QDyQPCXP_KdfUHBphJidPe5kmCo7_9SMrgq3qnuhyuizZNftaab0U79eMscXTTJ_9dJp35wzTnSygF0LyA8QATfpVxXJcm6vqJ5pS6xNYH5NjRxtEw4EhBqbetfiXR-inN0LzH119fITqCHTLO2ATbT_RuXi6iRuh7KS5kjDNfggWDQRP9u5Ag%3D%3D) today?

Your input is important to making sure we move America forward. I appreciate you taking the time to send me your input.

| **_SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Speaker Johnson is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

clean_body: | | | Team, the men of the Republican party are not doing well. Earlier this week, former Speaker Kevin McCarthy shoved a Republican who voted to oust him. Then McCarthy allegedly punched him in the kidney as he walked away. And over in the Senate, Oklahoma Republican Markwayne Mullin was asking questions in a committee hearing. Apparently he had a previous testy Twitter exchange with the witness, so he used his position as a Senator to ask the witness if he wanted to fight him then and there. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = It should go without saying that elected officials should behave with decorum and dignity. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: AIPAC’s game of shame and blame
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Their MO is to try to shame and blame — and elect a Republican majority.
#
Peter, have you heard the latest on what Republicans have planned?
If not, let me catch you up:
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47497?refcode=em20231116-3171&t=1&akid=3171%2E420207%2EP4eh8n)
**Let's say it out loud: AIPAC backs extreme election deniers for election,_and then goes after people of color_ — most of whom are women — who dare to do our jobs and fight for our constituents. **
Their MO is to shame and blame in order to **elect a Republican majority.**
AIPAC's huge investment means we need to raise our own funds in order to counter their massive spending.
But we know that, with the support of our grassroots movement, **our progressive champions WILL win because they work for the people and stand up for our democracy.**
[**Are you ready to mobilize our grassroots power to support our progressive movement against these fights? If so, please consider chipping in $3 or whatever you're able to give to strengthen our forces.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47497?refcode=em20231116-3171&t=2&akid=3171%2E420207%2EP4eh8n)
**[Donate ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47497?refcode=em20231116-3171&t=21&akid=3171%2E420207%2EP4eh8n)**
Together,
Pramila

clean_body: Their MO is to try to shame and blame — and elect a Republican majority. Peter, have you heard the latest on what Republicans have planned? If not, let me catch you up: Let's say it out loud: AIPAC backs extreme election deniers for election,and then goes after people of color — most of whom are women — who dare to do our jobs and fight for our constituents. Their MO is to shame and blame in order to elect a Republican majority. AIPAC's huge investment means we need to raise our own funds in order to counter their massive spending. But we know that, with the support of our grassroots movement, our progressive champions WILL win because they work for the people and stand up for our democracy. Together, Pramila | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: John Fetterman
subject: The Republicans are fighting…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I came to the Senate to fight for working people... metaphorically speaking.
#
Hey Derek, it's John.
It's an honor to have been elected to stand up for PA families + do what I can in Washington to make people's lives better. 🙏
I came to the Senate to fight for working people -- but it seems like some of my colleagues on the right came here just to fight. _Literally._ While they might be having yelling matches in committee hearings, challenging witnesses to brawls, or starting arguments in the hallways...
**We are focused on getting things done.**
It might not always make the news, but we're doing important work. Like supporting union workers in PA and across the country, both now and as we make the transition to a greener economy. Working to eliminate interest on federal student loan debt, so working people can afford an education. And defending the Broadband Affordable Connectivity Program from expiration, which is a lifeline for many Pennsylvania families that need broadband access.
**[These are the priorities that I'm fighting for (metaphorically 😅) and I know that's why I earned your support last year. If you can, consider chipping in to power that work in the future.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231116-1?refcode=em20231116-1-8669&refcode2=8669_434096_Lij281&akid=8669%2E434096%2ELij281)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231116-1?amount=5&refcode=em20231116-8669&refcode2=8669_434096_Lij281&akid=8669%2E434096%2ELij281)**
I'm really thankful you're part of this team!!
-- John 💛
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator, Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20231116-8669-footer&t=1&refcode2=8669_434096_Lij281&akid=8669%2E434096%2ELij281)**

body:
I am fighting for New York

| [ ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=3d7d0d73d2ad45aab23140c9408be553&_e=sZJQf68PuOjT0ONPeNpGif3g2x8qXmoOEc_se4CxDw4cFv-D6-j4L8lvt07JUJjIYwM9CljSSXV86YD93F73oowQYzqkjpvabNRXPUgyrM-MKU_KvYM-CSKmP2MiUj5XJeDu14Fwsk_Bm6J0vk4yAp2xxK-KlDuLJNGgUeXlx5OpW5yJDot0s65UBbICkYsApCd8yBywefe08BGuTBR5cMD7Ug5W25mOudNcgLK1XNZq96GNk2HXYzqn302VByijd3N4mgAo9fprXgitziXoYnkTqm0dvINGeXGsTAZl6i2oWkUkQ18sMOKcnvsvXH0AXXrMh7_ldgDgd3QBmj7-o2UiyS2YGlfHFP4FvKpa45iIZwtYY5AFXCmKIVXpAId1trGhb-gSD4gJlhVq3GghHQ%3D%3D)

Friend, Friend, Friend,

My liberal opponent, Pat Ryan, has been shaking in his boots ever since I launched my campaign to run against him in New York's 18th Congressional District.

Did you see his recent Twitter ad calling me a MAGA extremist and asking for $5? **_Sounds like he is worried because he knows we have what it takes to beat him and flip his seat RED._** | [ **BRING THE RED WAVE** ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=3d7d0d73d2ad45aab23140c9408be553&_e=sZJQf68PuOjT0ONPeNpGif3g2x8qXmoOEc_se4CxDw4cFv-D6-j4L8lvt07JUJjIYwM9CljSSXV86YD93F73oowQYzqkjpvabNRXPUgyrM-MKU_KvYM-CSKmP2MiUj5XJeDu14Fwsk_Bm6J0vk4yAp2xxK-KlDuLJNGgUeXlx5OpW5yJDot0s65UBbICkYsApCd8yBywefe08BGuTBR5cGgX4XD_SIcOaH4GsAk225PA2MlMHHSwU9IoH0tlRR9-UdepxJ3lN9j4KnnI_LDPVng1CBFPEtxwls83AsZd-xHhXdikQvsAIDGVFHVHQI7pRQjQAxH6ZDXIPM0EeHa1ES6amYDou6nn3YANWvXy86osrYfGrVtX1VItjrN4JlNoi765mzfDQsqD1mZfd3yVeA%3D%3D)
---

I know it'll be an uphill battle, but bringing common sense to D.C. is worth fighting for. As you may have gathered, I'm not one to back down or scare easily. I've seen the worst of the worst as a cop for the NYPD, so this definitely won't stop me.

With that being said, I do need your support if we want to beat my opponent. Will you help send the message to Pat Ryan that he doesn't stand a chance because we have the momentum to win in 2024? clean_body: I am fighting for New York | Friend, Friend, Friend, My liberal opponent, Pat Ryan, has been shaking in his boots ever since I launched my campaign to run against him in New York's 18th Congressional District. Did you see his recent Twitter ad calling me a MAGA extremist and asking for $5? Sounds like he is worried because he knows we have what it takes to beat him and flip his seat RED. | I know it'll be an uphill battle, but bringing common sense to D.C. is worth fighting for. As you may have gathered, I'm not one to back down or scare easily. I've seen the worst of the worst as a cop for the NYPD, so this definitely won't stop me. With that being said, I do need your support if we want to beat my opponent. Will you help send the message to Pat Ryan that he doesn't stand a chance because we have the momentum to win in 2024? \- Alison Esposito Paid for by Esposito for Congress Copyright (C) 2023 Esposito for Congress, All rights reserved.

We can't have a president who is too weak to stand up to them, or worse, praises our enemies. **[We need Chris. Can he count on you to help him win for us?](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe31785746a74a91a29688c558f8e5b5&_m=5833c295141649c3b58c38337ca66aaf&_e=9FZ3iTfn1jz4j5JMsYeTU5ZN_BSXgm1TmsaHwwgCzTRpSCfwPuN0J5VtixdVuvV0S9wkJkzhhGQvvGbcwUdgyn_NAOwadQ7d6aZNVmieCauhyVeNyo28v7cFXfJ8T7DC7K5IbNvohgw_oVVIrSy3VUo42KQwCeIV29put_fM1ov2h3hxr13Gt8xvT9NhovBpNAc6zq4sLdyBPfIdMa9govZsTq6faeOCie-2gBmLLl9VVrq4ju8-QbdOac1888WdHXHQsBIn6kD-QRsaBIv0Zw%3D%3D)** Thank you, **Doug** Team Christie

clean_body: Chris knows we need to support our allies abroad.| | | | | If you missed our last email below, don't miss Chris Christie's powerful speech at the Hudson Institute. Unlike the few other candidates still in the race, Chris has been consistent about his support for our allies, Israel and Ukraine. The world is safer when our strength deters bad foreign actors from recklessly lashing out. The writing is on the wall: China, Russia, Iran, and North Korea are uniting against us. We can't have a president who is too weak to stand up to them, or worse, praises our enemies. Thank you, Doug Team Christie | From: Jordan, Team Christie <info@mail.chrischristie.com>Date: Wednesday, Nov 15, 2023 Subject: Chris just got back from Israel.To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> | | Chris just got back from Israel, where he saw firsthand the atrocities committed by Hamas against innocent men, women, and children. He knows that we can't ask Israel to stand down if there is still a legitimate terrorist threat against them, and there's no question that there is. If you join Chris Christie in supporting Israel, sign your name below! Thank you, Jordan Team Christie | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---

name: Sandra Bishop, Emerge
subject: every election matters and every seat matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America This email was sent by Emerge America
body:
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73494475/438683002/-1986725773?amounts=10,20.24,50,100,250,500&refcode=jtk1361-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBjNmZmZmQ4LWQzODQtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=J5XgoUiz_z9qgEzRAqO5ph2AOvWG8cSlkgmT_nJqEDM=)
---
Peter,
At Emerge, we know that every election matters and every seat matters. That’s why we don’t take “off years” in our work to transform politics. That’s why we consistently empower bold Democratic women up and down the ballot, and that’s why we’re getting to work right now to help more Democratic women run and win in 2024.
**If you’re with us _– and I hope that you are –_** **[please, chip in $20.24 or as much as you can to Emerge today, ahead of our midnight fundraising deadline.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73494476/438683003/-1986725773?amounts=10,20.24,50,100,250,500&amount=20.24&refcode=jtk1361-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBjNmZmZmQ4LWQzODQtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=J5XgoUiz_z9qgEzRAqO5ph2AOvWG8cSlkgmT_nJqEDM=) Every donation helps power our unique recruitment and training programs to equip Democratic women with the tools they need to succeed on the campaign trail and in office. **
Every year, Emerge women do what polls and pundits call impossible – building a democracy that truly reflects our multiracial, multicultural communities. But Emerge understands that real representation is a winning strategy, Peter, and we’ve got the numbers to prove it.
Emerge candidates achieved a** 74% WIN rate in this year's elections so far.** Women of the New American Majority (NAM) – Black, Brown, and Indigenous women, women of color, LGBTQ+ women, young and unmarried women – achieved a win rate of 72%, and our first-time candidates have a win rate of 56% so far (which is more than four times the rate for non-Emerge candidates).
Our impressive win rate, year after year, shows that communities are ready for Democratic women to lead and for excluded voices to be heard at every level of office. We urgently need candidates who know and live in their communities, and who are committed to policies that will serve their communities.
Right now, we need to be energized by our victories and build our momentum for the fight ahead. The stakes are high, but we’re up to the challenge as long as we have your support. So I’m personally asking, Peter: **[Will you donate $20.24 or more before tonight's midnight deadline to power Emerge’s recruitment and training programs and help Democratic women run and win in 2024 and beyond?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73494477/438683004/-1986725773?amounts=10,20.24,50,100,250,500&amount=20.24&refcode=jtk1361-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBjNmZmZmQ4LWQzODQtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=J5XgoUiz_z9qgEzRAqO5ph2AOvWG8cSlkgmT_nJqEDM=)**
| | [SUPPORT EMERGE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73494478/438683005/-1986725773?amounts=10,20.24,50,100,250,500&refcode=jtk1361-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBjNmZmZmQ4LWQzODQtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=J5XgoUiz_z9qgEzRAqO5ph2AOvWG8cSlkgmT_nJqEDM=)
---
Thank you for being a part of this movement,

Sandra Bishop
Chief Development Officer, Emerge
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
Email is an important way for Emerge America to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. body:
Be my VIP Guest at my beautiful golf club next month.

Be my VIP Guest at my beautiful golf club next month. | | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a8fd9887168d438293d349c94ed31b68&_e=9El2jzMsS0LPhquo6UimekhlmlATyy7ZOXEWaTdrGZHxIXDBUvJFK96YjumQQZ85GxGOfkGp8m72BOFLPlfH765IWNltUUmFG7u3by1EZJapPCZitKpeETZOFRuIybHkvXQc-XVtnLYyegf394JqkImbrddAv7N0gjKUcBZE5Ide4bRh3CZ9t3SDBRqmalpFgxI-E5X-O5xYcyGcbhwXzAVPl3OFSBCe6msuAgN3nH6SEZqF3Sg3I-TsFCp-D8cRjFHeFtWozP6ADkVvjQ2LgQjylEjqRRIbWnja4qz4AZ11uCO_lUm33iWl3FgOMA7DDbVeTamCO7_UvjFx80P4nCME0BWZrGICb9KarW5bjKTuP27ZLPRnrhuuKQmN2OpjSMrVktEwEJSQEA4ozcnM4JofNJlJefeGMPriRKWhozWAh66jl58fXbsgBUM_rcxL)
---
| | Friend,

---
How would you like to meet your one and only 45th _(and future 47th)_ President?
---
**_Because I 'd certainly love to meet YOU!_**

---
In honor of officially crossing the 1-year-out mark from the most important election of our lifetimes, I'm hosting a special reception at my beautiful Trump International Golf Club in West Palm Beach, Florida... _and I 'd like YOU to be my ___VIP GUEST__ _!_

---
With less than a year to go, we're DOMINATING the primary like no one's ever seen before (a 60-point frontrunner!), we're leading Crooked Joe nationally by double digits, and we're even beating him in all the biggest battleground states that will no doubt decide the 2024 election.
---
But such an important event wouldn't feel complete without the most critical part of _our_ movement in attendance - grassroots supporters like you, Friend.

---
Which is why I'm going to fly one lucky winner plus a guest of your choice out to Florida for __FREE__ _!_

---
I'll cover your hotel, you'll get to enjoy hors d'oeuvres and refreshments on me, and we'll even take a photo together so that you can always remember this special moment.

---
_But right now, all you have to do is enter to win!_

---
**[Please make a contribution of any amount to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN and you'll be automatically entered to WIN - and hopefully, I'll be seeing YOU very soon!](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a8fd9887168d438293d349c94ed31b68&_e=9El2jzMsS0LPhquo6UimekhlmlATyy7ZOXEWaTdrGZHxIXDBUvJFK96YjumQQZ85GxGOfkGp8m72BOFLPlfH765IWNltUUmFG7u3by1EZJapPCZitKpeETZOFRuIybHkvXQc-XVtnLYyegf394JqkImbrddAv7N0gjKUcBZE5Ide4bRh3CZ9t3SDBRqmalpFgxI-E5X-O5xYcyGcbhwXzAVPl3OFSBCe6msuAgN3nH6SEZqF3Sg3I-TsFCp-D8cRjFHeFtWozP6ADkVvjQ2LgQjylEjqRRIbWnja4qz4AZ18Ca-kexz2F0nxMwhrW70ZEbNNwJ81r9gwI63_PkL_oIJvs1rGLlZvOuhjK5g-aVVzYQuBj2QBqp_COECYA2kVDeIukgjngih_9uteYuO_DAygngB7JtibuOUnY1bFQ1PqrnjhWoZnm2BlMeGBqBat)**

Be my VIP Guest at my beautiful golf club next month. | | | | | Friend, How would you like to meet your one and only 45th (and future 47th) President? Because I 'd certainly love to meet YOU! In honor of officially crossing the 1-year-out mark from the most important election of our lifetimes, I'm hosting a special reception at my beautiful Trump International Golf Club in West Palm Beach, Florida... and I 'd like YOU to be my VIP GUEST ! With less than a year to go, we're DOMINATING the primary like no one's ever seen before (a 60-point frontrunner!), we're leading Crooked Joe nationally by double digits, and we're even beating him in all the biggest battleground states that will no doubt decide the 2024 election. But such an important event wouldn't feel complete without the most critical part of our movement in attendance - grassroots supporters like you, Friend. Which is why I'm going to fly one lucky winner plus a guest of your choice out to Florida for FREE ! I'll cover your hotel, you'll get to enjoy hors d'oeuvres and refreshments on me, and we'll even take a photo together so that you can always remember this special moment. **BREAKING VIA AP NEWS:
_Democrats see abortion wins as a springboard for 2024 as GOP struggles to find a winning message_**
Friend, did you see the election results last week? Democrats celebrated HUGE victories and abortion rights wins across the country, from Virginia to Ohio!
Political pundits keep trying to claim that Democrats are doomed and a red wave is coming. But every single election year, _we prove them wrong_. **It's plain as day: Democrats aren't going to sit back idly in a post-Roe world.**
But the GOP is still scheming to take away our rights, attack patients, criminalize doctors and ban abortions nationwide.
**Make no mistake: Abortion will be back on the ballot in 2024. As we head into the election year, we need to build upon this momentum from last week's election. [_That's why we're launching a brand-new petition to gather 50,000 signatures in support of reproductive rights. clean_body: Abortion is a winning issue | | | BREAKING VIA AP NEWS: Democrats see abortion wins as a springboard for 2024 as GOP struggles to find a winning message Friend, did you see the election results last week? Democrats celebrated HUGE victories and abortion rights wins across the country, from Virginia to Ohio! Political pundits keep trying to claim that Democrats are doomed and a red wave is coming. But every single election year, we prove them wrong. It's plain as day: Democrats aren't going to sit back idly in a post-Roe world. But the GOP is still scheming to take away our rights, attack patients, criminalize doctors and ban abortions nationwide. Make no mistake: Abortion will be back on the ballot in 2024. As we head into the election year, we need to build upon this momentum from last week's election. | | | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: The DeVos family is all in on Mike Rogers:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=822%2E135344%2ED9xhAG)

Friends --
As Michiganders know, for decades the DeVos family’s #1 issue has been weakening Michigan's, and the country's, public education system. Betsy DeVos used Michigan as her petri dish before becoming Trump’s Secretary of Education, and his longest serving cabinet secretary.
The DeVos family has supported opponents of mine in the past, and it looks like they’re ready to double down on this Senate race.
**Republican Mike Rogers' latest FEC report was filled with donations from a bunch of members of the DeVos family -- contributions totaling $46,200 all made on one single day, just before the September 30th deadline.**
Mike Rogers has already started to see a flood of support from deep-pocketed Republican donors like Betsy DeVos, corporate PACs, and Super PACs who will all spend millions of dollars on his behalf in order to flip Michigan red. In 2020, the DeVos family contributed over $1.6 million to candidates and PACs which have spent over $10 million to super PACs to influence races like ours.
So these contributions are just the beginning of the support Mike Rogers will receive from this powerful family.
But this campaign has something Mike Rogers' campaign lacks: lots and lots of regular people giving what they can, when they can.
Just one peek behind-the-curtain of Mike Rogers' FEC report shows he raised less than 5% of his money from individuals making small-dollar donations.
By contrast, the majority of the donations we receive come from people contributing significantly smaller donations than the DeVos family made to Mike Rogers: Our average email donation was $26 last quarter.
And what you may not know is that the single greatest source of individual donations to our campaign is the response to emails like this.
That’s why I would love to earn your support today. [**Your help using this link to make a $3 contribution to my campaign for United States Senate would be a great rebuke to the DeVos support.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov23.RK33_Y&refcode=em231116-2-30&t=2&akid=822%2E135344%2ED9xhAG)**

But it's not just Hollywood — the whole country is seeing the power of unions to make life better for workers. Earlier this year, The Teamsters union used the threat of a record-setting strike by 340,000 members at UPS to achieve better wages, air conditioning for their vans in the summer heat, and more. Here in California, we stood with hotel workers striking for fair compensation and benefits as housing prices continue to soar — and we WON a fair agreement for workers at the Biltmore in downtown Los Angeles. name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Updating my records
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
It’s been a crazy couple of weeks, so I understand if you’re not on Team Johnson yet. We’re emailing today to make sure we have the information we need to contact you. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=1fc3e121219547dc966c5b7fad482a42&_t=UGON90lLQtTP20vmng_1ZzOiXPbVBx0U9sQ13Jgkykkx7gN2hLJBoykqUMkiAitKcoC7HgJ-c9g4Ov4znV4MT04KOB2PA2jZoSCd09WhXgc%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=1fc3e121219547dc966c5b7fad482a42&_t=UGON90lLQtTP20vmng_1ZzOiXPbVBx0U9sQ13Jgkykkx7gN2hLJBoykqUMkiAitKcoC7HgJ-c9g4Ov4znV4MT04KOB2PA2jZoSCd09WhXgc%3D)
[ ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1fc3e121219547dc966c5b7fad482a42&_e=JZAhuZLM9Azc6FuSw45jqDEOJ-WeHPMZO0WTvmjXc29pTRbUUEd5OVRhlVYxWrvwa6w7851YZCXxdaP5_FS94rF9d0kPh0yG7vOELU_zXjwjVd2ILsU3ZZ_dVFZUq-JoTX2YVZztW8BA7pRhkAy_zFjm0L8drgbPzGy5kQOI4kxCsYNQE54whOLJuok2jopiOkfuFqgOG2anP0Z2_MbpVrnuNx3zkv6zRxjEvRt-z3ZnorORRjVHrpWQUC_jurnt2giN--OXLGdbOIgC_ETmZaJbzsf4SUc72yzDArg-E_wx_aa5MwItZN5m7msjYeexQ7ctIj-EtzjpZ_DNcHJ0TR56ZmiE6MWCEt06o1mCoBTpFHTw6SJaxIc8VYy5CKDBRbf56ZN1K5cKqq_upgwHsegU5rAqpZZ1KXjBkPS3cp4%3D)

Fellow American -

I’m still settling into my new office – both the physical space and the position I now hold in the federal government. I’m going to be honest with you, the last few weeks have been a blur – but productive and exciting as well.

Believe it or not, there wasn’t a manual left behind that I can reference in this new role. So, as you can imagine, we’ve been wasting no time settling in and figuring out how to best prioritize your interests and needs. The American people deserve nothing less than my best and that’s what I intend to give.

[**I’m reaching out today because I want to make sure that my team has the appropriate email, phone number, and mailing address on file for you.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1fc3e121219547dc966c5b7fad482a42&_e=JZAhuZLM9Azc6FuSw45jqDEOJ-WeHPMZO0WTvmjXc29pTRbUUEd5OVRhlVYxWrvwa6w7851YZCXxdaP5_FS94rF9d0kPh0yG7vOELU_zXjwjVd2ILsU3ZZ_dVFZUq-JoTX2YVZztW8BA7pRhkAy_zFjm0L8drgbPzGy5kQOI4kxCsYNQE54whOLJuok2jopiOkfuFqgOG2anP0Z2_MbpVrnuNx3zkv6zRxjEvRt-z3ZnorORRjVHrpWQUC_jurnt1DOc1bibLD-R6xpzZHLc9MLo-PUuYnIRSZ4c0D3Du1efEE0KH3QMFuOPELaAjnb5HJ1tspXQdkcjcVJ5k-u1DUuOx9tN85-yp_4YbvqxdhWFJQTWpHsW-sufEwmalBrDR5bCvRAoqzAYQEv618Z6-5C-BBy80qMTCwfJZrWrIPQ%3D)
[** UPDATE OUR RECORDS **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1fc3e121219547dc966c5b7fad482a42&_e=JZAhuZLM9Azc6FuSw45jqDEOJ-WeHPMZO0WTvmjXc29pTRbUUEd5OVRhlVYxWrvwa6w7851YZCXxdaP5_FS94rF9d0kPh0yG7vOELU_zXjwjVd2ILsU3ZZ_dVFZUq-JoTX2YVZztW8BA7pRhkAy_zFjm0L8drgbPzGy5kQOI4kxCsYNQE54whOLJuok2jopiOkfuFqgOG2anP0Z2_MbpVrnuNx3zkv6zRxjEvRt-z3ZnorORRjVHrpWQUC_jurntcjTjPFZsdGDqLRSugqPfjhG2i2YJy5yzZgouis9Rft0l7J0AeJ0uDJtioCLlBAYXBusP5kcvJUXvbgwwhASoGiPnHPV7L3fEBL_-go5HADAKrXgKpAzFUNYneTyEEFfRsnUU2p5nwo7DvCS-mL9xOEUUJPW2J4y_IXIhiXNvdd4%3D)
Before my colleagues elected me the 56th Speaker of the House, our mailing list was mainly comprised of folks from the great state of Louisiana. _But now as Speaker, every Republican in the country is a constituent of mine and I need to be able to know I can reach out as needed._

Holding on to the House majority in next November’s election is going to be a tall order – [**but with you on our team, I know our chances will increase exponentially.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1fc3e121219547dc966c5b7fad482a42&_e=JZAhuZLM9Azc6FuSw45jqDEOJ-WeHPMZO0WTvmjXc29pTRbUUEd5OVRhlVYxWrvwa6w7851YZCXxdaP5_FS94rF9d0kPh0yG7vOELU_zXjwjVd2ILsU3ZZ_dVFZUq-JoTX2YVZztW8BA7pRhkAy_zFjm0L8drgbPzGy5kQOI4kxCsYNQE54whOLJuok2jopiOkfuFqgOG2anP0Z2_MbpVrnuNx3zkv6zRxjEvRt-z3ZnorORRjVHrpWQUC_jurntMin_45lTheMZw9i57oshswzecBMtZMeY0ucCmn0_R5M2e6ioKO9l90Q6BrIPlaMNgvoGNYk-AT-DSyFqtW8yjTnM_SlYBGR8pSeDTOxPUYrEmWetkCVh7Gzxp5VedeaAOfU7qfIs8gNwUxyEH5608yjbiZFluoYx4KyWVfq-LJ4%3D)

I’ll be honest with you, before I was elected to lead the House a few weeks ago, I was relatively unknown nationally, meaning I probably didn’t have you on my mailing list. As we build out our campaign operation from the ground up, _**I am going to need every patriot to step forward.**_ So please, [**let me hear from you today.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1fc3e121219547dc966c5b7fad482a42&_e=JZAhuZLM9Azc6FuSw45jqDEOJ-WeHPMZO0WTvmjXc29pTRbUUEd5OVRhlVYxWrvwa6w7851YZCXxdaP5_FS94rF9d0kPh0yG7vOELU_zXjwjVd2ILsU3ZZ_dVFZUq-JoTX2YVZztW8BA7pRhkAy_zFjm0L8drgbPzGy5kQOI4kxCsYNQE54whOLJuok2jopiOkfuFqgOG2anP0Z2_MbpVrnuNx3zkv6zRxjEvRt-z3ZnorORRjVHrpWQUC_jurntg48iNMs-K1jzlwRKC1loSbBAto5P_VdDKWoK-R86phhuFna_Xs3CE7m3O9JNSH0aChDrMJHTHgvHGk9uBpWElhWoYpBw_sMkV2Lh4W0EZwKACjIDkNT3ReyU-_XRpg1M3YbhhzGLG2pkLHQpgRIAA2DXT10BWk4d8E04IARG878%3D)

[**There are many more conservatives I haven’t reached yet.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1fc3e121219547dc966c5b7fad482a42&_e=JZAhuZLM9Azc6FuSw45jqDEOJ-WeHPMZO0WTvmjXc29pTRbUUEd5OVRhlVYxWrvwa6w7851YZCXxdaP5_FS94rF9d0kPh0yG7vOELU_zXjwjVd2ILsU3ZZ_dVFZUq-JoTX2YVZztW8BA7pRhkAy_zFjm0L8drgbPzGy5kQOI4kxCsYNQE54whOLJuok2jopiOkfuFqgOG2anP0Z2_MbpVrnuNx3zkv6zRxjEvRt-z3ZnorORRjVHrpWQUC_jurntmLRdXqS6LgRKzgOXtbYOOrZ9eEqNg-2Yv_gxdQ7-33MWHNm3Fcr6R3HHevkAA90tB8bQdVYxOtD9gKeAjzdhfiTxiNatCeIIl4NBK62DVyF39Q8vo1xTOxRt5eLH4gEjMzLoiSofT_RSbnC9RzL0EuU8SZtekeOvcyydKFqA074%3D)

[** _RESPOND TO THE SPEAKER HERE_ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1fc3e121219547dc966c5b7fad482a42&_e=JZAhuZLM9Azc6FuSw45jqDEOJ-WeHPMZO0WTvmjXc29pTRbUUEd5OVRhlVYxWrvwa6w7851YZCXxdaP5_FS94rF9d0kPh0yG7vOELU_zXjwjVd2ILsU3ZZ_dVFZUq-JoTX2YVZztW8BA7pRhkAy_zFjm0L8drgbPzGy5kQOI4kxCsYNQE54whOLJuok2jopiOkfuFqgOG2anP0Z2_MbpVrnuNx3zkv6zRxjEvRt-z3ZnorORRjVHrpWQUC_jurntSCX067p8mzY4iRA0Rlct02eFZj-Hn99Hn4rPmJBd4EIpWc_3sOjfFHo_urmqsHjBmMm4KoHv-ruJhAVTvbnZBnMH1DVSqp24fsYO4BmhXjBkvXoGP7ACyT-CwEvZNYwc14bDw0Imjj-lOW8HeMAf2OO3xImOXKiq-YRDAbUsq7o%3D)
With respect,

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

[ ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1fc3e121219547dc966c5b7fad482a42&_e=JZAhuZLM9Azc6FuSw45jqIGVIetrRInmcC-55beah4X3qsFJkwwf9E35m-IeLNvC-XoMG_rlRuEe0zk1_52QgFgJLzcYm1wwXsyRGaIHvpskwVvyRlCTh8-oV9PO8y2uLByrgz2mca1ObJy0-9HO41_4IizyxDhDfo-VyQYd-qgLq7RC0zBL21y4AjLA5Idc2LewVwIv4ga0geomIYjPl84Ly1ZeFxlTy39h8W9q66FmbYclZuZQGERY91dERfoBLwnSOXvpdo3VmbAoWvUrdlkWiCt7rQBSmDIApsaqUijgFJujTFq2KIhf6QL1nCeU0YJ5zptHU0eIy-U8KCsnZXxDwtuM-85WfMJmqIULr8227-Z6QGfdQJa-2P5S4GdEk1aDwXZTve4MXpT29TI0dxmeL3LNNWvaYdXpyls74qVAuqB5l_y60WFjRSGqca_76lRwQT-p6Ja6VS9zxNiHJYUlkGcCYDl4iLFQA6inP0gd6le4beCc9D5OoL5UungCszG2ZW3bwWax7DGM1tdUtd7CVnAL-Z3IMSaUmJMJ1Gz8MmHAgIF7-v2WpHxHZG80ObjJ9yfNxQJSmUxv4X8Vpw%3D%3D)
As Speaker, I want to hear from you on the top issues of the day. It's important for us to deliver results for the American people.

Would you take a moment to complete my [**_Official Speaker Survey_**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1fc3e121219547dc966c5b7fad482a42&_e=JZAhuZLM9Azc6FuSw45jqIGVIetrRInmcC-55beah4X3qsFJkwwf9E35m-IeLNvC-XoMG_rlRuEe0zk1_52QgFgJLzcYm1wwXsyRGaIHvpskwVvyRlCTh8-oV9PO8y2uLByrgz2mca1ObJy0-9HO41_4IizyxDhDfo-VyQYd-qgLq7RC0zBL21y4AjLA5Idc2LewVwIv4ga0geomIYjPl84Ly1ZeFxlTy39h8W9q66FmbYclZuZQGERY91dERfoBLwnSOXvpdo3VmbAoWvUrdlkWiCt7rQBSmDIApsaqUijgFJujTFq2KIhf6QL1nCeU0YJ5zptHU0eIy-U8KCsnZXxDwtuM-85WfMJmqIULr8227-Z6QGfdQJa-2P5S4GdEk1aDwXZTve4MXpT29TI0dxmeL3LNNWvaYdXpyls74qVAuqB5l_y60WFjRSGqca_7KbhMm8YTzR84EPEHV-mpH8AU-7jscy4_eRFw3a3y6RbowUZwewk6hNOyyzIVFtI00IvlQF_cflzoGtSaQ2rWgxLDTe7Of0xIwRifaVidc-FhX417EiuQlvStfKGfZnaQqdBTH2dlR-4eeYJ7BkAYLQ%3D%3D) today?

Your input is important to making sure we move America forward. I appreciate you taking the time to send me your input.

| **_SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Speaker Johnson is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1fc3e121219547dc966c5b7fad482a42&_e=JZAhuZLM9Azc6FuSw45jqDEOJ-WeHPMZO0WTvmjXc29pTRbUUEd5OVRhlVYxWrvwa6w7851YZCXxdaP5_FS94rF9d0kPh0yG7vOELU_zXjwjVd2ILsU3ZZ_dVFZUq-JoTX2YVZztW8BA7pRhkAy_zFjm0L8drgbPzGy5kQOI4kxCsYNQE54whOLJuok2jopiOkfuFqgOG2anP0Z2_MbpVrnuNx3zkv6zRxjEvRt-z3ZnorORRjVHrpWQUC_jurnt3kshomNDWDajCl2VrmJV9n9a6WBCBUetOWs6mbPjMlSx0P6SSszryhtEk3PosMQToOrf-JiuZ-Qv9w8LWRF9uXoMxIgiKIpm40f3CDpM8AYV1eHY1zTHI_srevUSRoOfOaU5t0n6plhZtOqAw5VSH5DLtOrDO0sjeOYsUKGRESs%3D)

name: Working Families Party
subject: Preview of the 2024 Democratic primaries
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | This is bad, Peter. **Yesterday, reports emerged that the American Israel Public Affairs Committee (AIPAC) is prepared to spend over $100 MILLION to oust Working Families Party champions from Congress in 2024.** Reps. Ilhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib, Ayanna Pressley, Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman, and Summer Lee — all Black and brown members of Congress who courageously called for a ceasefire and condemned Israel’s indiscriminate attacks on Gaza — are among the incumbent members of Congress in their sights. [**Will you rush a contribution of $10 or any amount to help us build the grassroots effort necessary to defend our champions in Congress and defeat the right-wing forces trying to protect their interests and buy our elections?**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUYovugXr9yYe4UV6Eq19lePkpE9dmS4BXiOZHSOcJQ94ePcDsEkYhoLX_8XbiKAOcolhDeGWRjgt9L9meKzbxeiq_sW2Zv9C_MdEhIfKW-PHaBnCVEqkBByJ16ogkChc9hKHK2o-LyO4sNOfdbDlwOcLUO_lFEUocVv7XqzLWbdvRqwZ-93k4junhyDKaFbzIbRHQprVZXIDjgO5EyDd712stBvQxecHCf4FTAyK9bNdPMgFAOxuwPnhYHCfsCrjj-HFD3ShK_MXjjeX0rE2Q6VZKOH5lyJ0qp2fWAZRb-uf038n13rqko19Y0hMH1dz1uz99I9ND9fqJhJL4F77-6L0THBAaYasnvuUtOVx0gUuuKl6j0ho6WLvV6CwP_n1PXsteVyw74kxgLs-xJe-Dig/41c/U063nlUUS7esoVBW_-md2Q/h0/s9fQuRvZKs2Ibrc4PtdVl-9ujseUwa2CEXgtieuc1qo) **[Contribute $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUYovugXr9yYe4UV6Eq19lePkpE9dmS4BXiOZHSOcJQ94ePcDsEkYhoLX_8XbiKAOc4JzHGOvfwQjLmn72RYQjWlJqffkuRftsfwxZzfxIT5dUTS_cROFKUCFpjuPsA9rCZtqA4vfGyQSsD3XYBpJVdZa8T6nEMHiTiMH1YVa_e1rDKmgIwtpswg7utgS28RRwp7Stx_sTXBPwXbQ2AH_cZ5QahczWp_uin0Q2Q4ozWcql7cauA_kHF5mdg_1rKNMmHKfbpFrNUOARr0AZ--g32oapdZis6ts9TOn_kHB-1nnoGDp42el3sGf4UNcblXKk4J42JJLzwmZyoQ_inhNGDLFTnVoLsD9uhY4p1GQt8OCUQGxbXJiF51DCFboMGk-C-CHi9u4af1qHgIThV6_9OQ/41c/U063nlUUS7esoVBW_-md2Q/h1/49FzkA2oEaaf9tpE9PQlUkC5pkyYIzIC4oyTE2kO9ho)** Let’s be real, Peter — if these reports are accurate, we’re in downright unprecedented territory.
In the 2022 election cycle, AIPAC spent nearly $30 million trying to defeat progressives, and pundits everywhere thought _that_ was an avalanche of money. This year, they may spend up to **$100 million** _just_ to defeat progressives in Congress — which is roughly _four_ times what they spent in the midterms. **It’s not only the issue of foreign policy that will get yanked to the right if AIPAC wins — it’s everything.** From advancing workers’ rights to implementing ambitious climate action to making real investments in social infrastructure, our _entire_ working families agenda is at risk. **And every dollar that the GOP megadonors who fund AIPAC spend to try and defeat progressives in primaries also helps MAGA Republicans in their quest to capture the White House and full control of Congress for extremists.** But here’s the silver lining: if what AIPAC is lobbying for is truly popular in districts like these, then they wouldn’t need to spend one hundred million dollars to win. WFP champions in Congress have won election after election because they fight for the people they represent — and represent the views of their constituents, majorities of whom are also calling for a clean_body: | | | This is bad, Peter. Yesterday, reports emerged that the American Israel Public Affairs Committee (AIPAC) is prepared to spend over $100 MILLION to oust Working Families Party champions from Congress in 2024. Reps. Ilhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib, Ayanna Pressley, Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman, and Summer Lee — all Black and brown members of Congress who courageously called for a ceasefire and condemned Israel’s indiscriminate attacks on Gaza — are among the incumbent members of Congress in their sights. Let’s be real, Peter — if these reports are accurate, we’re in downright unprecedented territory. In the 2022 election cycle, AIPAC spent nearly $30 million trying to defeat progressives, and pundits everywhere thought that was an avalanche of money. This year, they may spend up to $100 million just to defeat progressives in Congress — which is roughly four times what they spent in the midterms. It’s not only the issue of foreign policy that will get yanked to the right if AIPAC wins — it’s everything. From advancing workers’ rights to implementing ambitious climate action to making real investments in social infrastructure, our entire working families agenda is at risk. And every dollar that the GOP megadonors who fund AIPAC spend to try and defeat progressives in primaries also helps MAGA Republicans in their quest to capture the White House and full control of Congress for extremists. But here’s the silver lining: if what AIPAC is lobbying for is truly popular in districts like these, then they wouldn’t need to spend one hundred million dollars to win. WFP champions in Congress have won election after election because they fight for the people they represent — and represent the views of their constituents, majorities of whom are also calling for a ceasefire. Together, we defeated these forces in 2020 and 2022, and with your support, we can do it again in 2024. Thanks for giving what you can today, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Peter -

I’m still settling into my new office – both the physical space and the position I now hold in the federal government. I’m going to be honest with you, the last few weeks have been a blur – but productive and exciting as well.

Believe it or not, there wasn’t a manual left behind that I can reference in this new role. So, as you can imagine, we’ve been wasting no time settling in and figuring out how to best prioritize your interests and needs. The American people deserve nothing less than my best and that’s what I intend to give.

[**I’m reaching out today because I want to make sure that my team has the appropriate email, phone number, and mailing address on file for you.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1bcd1a43bb8f449e9979e6e27bfc6c6c&_e=a4XN_qIKirpvzfNQGg-u9w9L-UV0WFTMvl7MKQqg7CpsrqcoAtPpdp7Ec5wWxh5eCHpVu0kpo17RfzU9WcNb0P-6inmgHFVt6bD9DIggKfyPG3g9ZTEsroQxkXUQ9hyK5yesmcOyUEg6hLlyNseM5lEFnDGL_QZGmOdsZJy7AxIwdTED_ZPvIF00oK847kOX7Kh8VkSrTCDGZXXDI1upbLBTd_vGhEElj8FfpW0mqyGUBduZfanio3ejR9W4MmDVCJzD584v85UV4rewXra4bxEtxfbuaE7iXy3kJbLs19nZo_T0OmoiJYtnjcoAj6GmRMHM9HPMC0-uz_uUyLWL8Jg5h3drP7Ln9eR6xlw97SqH1d0v99BRGFkiqFcruhKUFSNCVb1gaGSxhYk4hazy5NaH9ukNdz4iDJbTYC1wO_w%3D)
[** UPDATE OUR RECORDS **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1bcd1a43bb8f449e9979e6e27bfc6c6c&_e=a4XN_qIKirpvzfNQGg-u9w9L-UV0WFTMvl7MKQqg7CpsrqcoAtPpdp7Ec5wWxh5eCHpVu0kpo17RfzU9WcNb0P-6inmgHFVt6bD9DIggKfyPG3g9ZTEsroQxkXUQ9hyK5yesmcOyUEg6hLlyNseM5lEFnDGL_QZGmOdsZJy7AxIwdTED_ZPvIF00oK847kOX7Kh8VkSrTCDGZXXDI1upbLBTd_vGhEElj8FfpW0mqyGUBduZfanio3ejR9W4MmDVcBGgN9SAIzLCuUlhR4-uu8nyWIiT6K3ssF3igG3xIQE18J0153y5BDTF8M8d-mEsiChPHT9pjo1RWl2_4-D2deZ3OTkHNm0iaX8CcyAAu25UmWJWRl8kCHbZwee76zMqrYZc0cuQLwKg01bo0cooQgFSoiOmySw1JxGXC7P6-3g%3D)
Before my colleagues elected me the 56th Speaker of the House, our mailing list was mainly comprised of folks from the great state of Louisiana. _But now as Speaker, every Republican in the country is a constituent of mine and I need to be able to know I can reach out as needed._

Holding on to the House majority in next November’s election is going to be a tall order – [**but with you on our team, I know our chances will increase exponentially.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1bcd1a43bb8f449e9979e6e27bfc6c6c&_e=a4XN_qIKirpvzfNQGg-u9w9L-UV0WFTMvl7MKQqg7CpsrqcoAtPpdp7Ec5wWxh5eCHpVu0kpo17RfzU9WcNb0P-6inmgHFVt6bD9DIggKfyPG3g9ZTEsroQxkXUQ9hyK5yesmcOyUEg6hLlyNseM5lEFnDGL_QZGmOdsZJy7AxIwdTED_ZPvIF00oK847kOX7Kh8VkSrTCDGZXXDI1upbLBTd_vGhEElj8FfpW0mqyGUBduZfanio3ejR9W4MmDVPz1hvN8leM_gRnHBUs6p6ddl8jY23FTO6hDcMf3RW_57Vjbk0UTffzM8os-PFiJy7VWYoo0xaQWn0EYDsKVkSxkCaKLHCtsq1N_P6IF4TZlodfhZn2e--05SWM6cSgxLSBGzmhV8U04-_ZGbA9kuzxxes2oxC7__O5caN_k7pmE%3D)

I’ll be honest with you, before I was elected to lead the House a few weeks ago, I was relatively unknown nationally, meaning I probably didn’t have you on my mailing list. clean_body: It’s been a crazy couple of weeks, so I understand if you’re not on Team Johnson yet. We’re emailing today to make sure we have the information we need to contact you. | | Peter - I’m still settling into my new office – both the physical space and the position I now hold in the federal government. I’m going to be honest with you, the last few weeks have been a blur – but productive and exciting as well. Believe it or not, there wasn’t a manual left behind that I can reference in this new role. So, as you can imagine, we’ve been wasting no time settling in and figuring out how to best prioritize your interests and needs. The American people deserve nothing less than my best and that’s what I intend to give. Before my colleagues elected me the 56th Speaker of the House, our mailing list was mainly comprised of folks from the great state of Louisiana. But now as Speaker, every Republican in the country is a constituent of mine and I need to be able to know I can reach out as needed. Holding on to the House majority in next November’s election is going to be a tall order – I’ll be honest with you, before I was elected to lead the House a few weeks ago, I was relatively unknown nationally, meaning I probably didn’t have you on my mailing list. As we build out our campaign operation from the ground up, I am going to need every patriot to step forward. So please, With respect, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House As Speaker, I want to hear from you on the top issues of the day. It's important for us to deliver results for the American people. Would you take a moment to complete my today? Your input is important to making sure we move America forward. I appreciate you taking the time to send me your input. | SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON Speaker Johnson is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Don't want to receive any more of our emails? name: Team AOC
subject: AIPAC wants Alexandria out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
AIPAC just announced that they are going to spend $100 million to get rid of Alexandria and the Squad
#
It’s official: the American Israel Public Affairs Committee — one of the wealthiest and most powerful PACs in the country — is recruiting Democratic primary challengers to defeat Alexandria and six other members of the Squad next year.
**AIPAC is gearing up to spend at least $100 million to unseat the Squad.** They don’t like that we support a bilateral ceasefire in Gaza, even though that’s an opinion shared by a large majority of Americans.
They’ve already found challengers for Representatives Bush, Bowman, Lee, and Omar. Now they’re looking for one for us.
[We need to be ready to fight back. Will you please help us make sure Alexandria has the resources she needs with a $5 contribution?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231116.0bcpHj&refcode=em20231116-5327-P_FND_EGR_HDL&t=1&akid=5327%2E2526796%2E6ra5qI)
**[Contribute](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231116.0bcpHj&refcode=em20231116-5327-P_FND_EGR_HDL&t=2&akid=5327%2E2526796%2E6ra5qI)**
To AIPAC, it apparently doesn’t matter that criticism of the Israeli government’s indiscriminate bombardment of Palestinians is virtually non-existent among U.S. politicians. As far as they’re concerned, the only acceptable level of dissent is zero.
AIPAC spent $30 million in last year’s Democratic primaries, much of it targeted on defeating progressive candidates, and especially candidates of color. While their attack ads rarely mention the conflict in the Middle East, AIPAC disproportionately messages against champions of progressive policies — **all while providing unconditional support to the 109 Republicans who refused to certify the 2020 presidential election.**
[Will you contribute $5 right now to help us defeat AIPAC? AIPAC is going after Alexandria in 2024 and we need to be prepared.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231116.0bcpHj&refcode=em20231116-5327-P_FND_EGR_HDL&t=3&akid=5327%2E2526796%2E6ra5qI)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231116.0bcpHj&refcode=em20231116-5327-P_FND_EGR_HDL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=5327%2E2526796%2E6ra5qI)**
Thank you so much for your support and for everything you do to work for social, racial, economic, and environmental justice.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20231116?refcode=em20231116-5327-P_FND_EGR_HDL&t=23&refcode2=5327_2526796_6ra5qI&akid=5327%2E2526796%2E6ra5qI)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20231116-5327-P_FND_EGR_HDL&t=24&akid=5327%2E2526796%2E6ra5qI)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=5327%2E2526796%2E6ra5qI) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=5327%2E2526796%2E6ra5qI) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=5327%2E2526796%2E6ra5qI)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=5327%2E2526796%2E6ra5qI)
