name: Michael B. Moore
subject: John Tecklenburg is the right choice for Charleston
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael B
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73495343/438685949/-251759529?refcode=header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTNhZjg4YTUtZDY4NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MBGHFmGJkqgNhpS9ZdHOJOYGQ34Z8bkQl8kEYlUMgRQ=) | _Michael Moore is only requesting funds from individuals and Federal PACs up to $3,300 per election and is not requesting funds from corporations or labor unions._
* * *
Peter, I'm reaching out with a personal message today. I'm proud to endorse my friend, John Tecklenburg, for Mayor of Charleston. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73495344/438685950/-583726164?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTNhZjg4YTUtZDY4NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MBGHFmGJkqgNhpS9ZdHOJOYGQ34Z8bkQl8kEYlUMgRQ=&emci=e6b37bf1-c184-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=53af88a5-d684-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=14781535) Look, I've always said that it was my mission to ensure that Charleston didn't forget its historic past – and I'm confident that John is the best fit to continue to protect its future. As founding president of the International African American Museum here in Charleston, I got a chance to work with John Tecklenburg closely. He was there for us when we needed him and was a steadfast supporter of our mission. Charleston has made leaps and bounds under Mayor Tecklenburg's leadership, and I have no doubt that he'll continue to serve the Holy City well. Ahead of next week's runoff election, I hope you'll join me in supporting Mayor John Tecklenburg for reelection here in Charleston. [**And if you can't vote in the election on Tuesday, I'd appreciate it if you made a contribution to John Tecklenburg's get out the vote efforts.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73495345/438685951/-583726164?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTNhZjg4YTUtZDY4NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MBGHFmGJkqgNhpS9ZdHOJOYGQ34Z8bkQl8kEYlUMgRQ=&emci=e6b37bf1-c184-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=53af88a5-d684-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=14781535) Thank you for taking the time to read my letter. Split a quick donation between Bob’s campaign and the GA Dems._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73495414/438686138/1703534649?refcode=20231116.2_BC_11W&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGY3ZWNjZC1kNjg0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2BAjUwEZg51nyZvKTDFh_kXdTvmEmDCQQIie5y9c7Oc=)

Appreciate you all!!

❤️ John

John Fetterman

name: Team ECU/LAV Action
subject: We are so excited to announce the launch of our new voter registration and turnout project in New York!
body:
We are so excited about this project and we know that the youth vote in New York will grow in the next election. | | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73495429/438686226/444630146?refcode=11_15_23&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE3OTEwMzE1LWQ3ODQtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vJD2nz9aKPN9mRWfs-S_xABBuYAgkdT6IvwwVZbbjJk=)
---
| | Friend,**We are so excited to announce the launch of our new voter registration and turnout project in New York!** Over the past several cycles, New York’s youth turnout rate has lagged behind that of other states. In 2022, less than 21% of eligible youth voters turned out to the polls. At a time where we saw youth voter turnout rates grow between 2016 and 2022, this is concerning. Our Organize New York plan has **three major solutions** to this problem: • Registering 20,000 students
• Deploying pro-democracy messaging (issues we know young people care about)
• Mobilizing 90,000 campus commitments to vote. **Pro-democracy messaging is**** _proven effective_****at getting young people to the polls!** We are so excited about this project and we _know_ that the youth vote in New York will grow in the next election. [**But we can’t launch this project without your help, and we’re counting on each of you to chip in $25 to help register students and mobilize them in New York and support all of our pro-democracy efforts.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73495430/438686229/444630146?refcode=11_15_23&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE3OTEwMzE1LWQ3ODQtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vJD2nz9aKPN9mRWfs-S_xABBuYAgkdT6IvwwVZbbjJk=) College-aged students are the group with the most at stake in the future of our country. **Your contribution will go to helping us message directly to our youth.** In New York, over 45% of 18-year-olds are not registered to vote. That’s thousands of young people who have no voice in our democracy or what kind of world they’ll inherit. [**If you want to see our young people turn out and vote, then please contribute $25 or even $50 to our Organize New York plan and support all our efforts to protect democracy.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73495431/438686230/444630146?refcode=11_15_23&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE3OTEwMzE1LWQ3ODQtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vJD2nz9aKPN9mRWfs-S_xABBuYAgkdT6IvwwVZbbjJk=)** ** The past few years have shown us that young voters have a tremendous power when they make their voices heard, and our Organize New York plan seeks to harness this power to create a positive impact on our democracy. [**Every contribution of $25 will go a long way to getting our youth registered and mobilized in New York. We are passionate about protecting our democracy and engaging the youngest voters among us, which is why this project is so important to us. We know you also care about the future of our democracy, which is why we’re asking for you to be with us on this. Can you chip in $25 to support us in New York and all over the country?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73495432/438686232/444630146?refcode=11_15_23&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE3OTEwMzE1LWQ3ODQtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vJD2nz9aKPN9mRWfs-S_xABBuYAgkdT6IvwwVZbbjJk=) Thank you.— Team ECU/LAV Action

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Binkley?=
subject: Ryan appears on DC's ballot
body:
| |
---
| | |
# Campaign News and Views
---
| [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=b7b6881a82&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### Another primary!
Ryan's name will be on the GOP primary ballot in DC. This is his eighth ballot, after gaining spots in New Hampshire, Alabama, Arkansas, Georgia, Nevada, Utah, and South Carolina. The campaign also has over 74,000 unique donors verified by the Republican National Committee. Our goal is to reach 80k donors and achieve 6% polling to qualify for the next debate in December.
| | [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=9b18f689c9&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### KCRG Caucus Conversation
Ryan was the first presidential candidate to visit all of Iowa's 99 counties, and KCRG took notice. Reporter Conner Hendricks talked with Ryan about his policy positions and his plans for caucus night. Scroll to the bottom of _[this page](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=84e7a868f2&e=c1403f41d3) _to watch the whole conversation.
---
| | [ ](http://)
---
### Signing the DC Ballot
This morning, Ryan secured his place on the GOP primary ballot in DC. He met with DC GOP Chairman Patrick Mara and provided his signature. It's a great step towards election day!
---
|
####
**Coming Up**

---
| | [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=886c3f1799&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### Iowa State
Townhall Forum
Ryan will converse with students at an Iowa State forum on December 6th at 6:00 pm. The event will be held at 2623 Memorial Union.
[_Details here_](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=e5233d92c2&e=c1403f41d3)
---
| | [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=39490a4edd&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### 1st in the South Republican Action Conference
Ryan will be speaking at the Republican Action Conference, one of the biggest GOP meetings in South Carolina. He'll be speaking alongside other guests such as Governor Doug Burgum and Congressman Russell Fry. The conference begins on December 7th in Myrtle Beach, SC. _[RSVP here](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=b57e941587&e=c1403f41d3)_
---
|
####
**How Can I Help?**
---
| | [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=062daa4643&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### 90-Day Push to the Primaries
Will you help bolster our outreach to voters over the next 90 days? We're asking for dedicated volunteers to make calls to Iowa and New Hampshire voters. [_Sign up here_](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=9391b07e61&e=c1403f41d3)

---
| [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=d5bf8489c8&e=c1403f41d3)
---
| [Contribute Today!](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=5c43e6dc74&e=c1403f41d3 "Contribute Today!")
---
| • _**LIKE AND COMMENT**_ on all social media posts • A simple "I support Ryan Binkley for President" goes a long way!
• Ignore any argumentative comments that may follow
• Lastly, _**DONATE & SHARE**_ the link with everyone you know!
---
|
---
|
---
| _Coming up: Click[here](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=52ab358956&e=c1403f41d3) to stay up to date with events._

name: BobCasey.com
subject: The stakes of our race just changed
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
All eyes are on our race.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1153%2E552475%2EdJsDB5)
Peter,
**FIRST:** Mitch McConnell pointed to Pennsylvania’s Senate seat as one of his “top targets” to flip in 2024.
**THEN:** Joe Manchin announced that he isn’t running for re-election, giving Mitch McConnell a likely win in West Virginia and clearing a pathway for him to retake the Senate.
**NOW:** Re-electing Bob Casey is one of the only chances we have to stop him.
_All eyes are on our race._ If Pennsylvania goes red next year, we might as well say goodbye to our Senate majority — AND the White House.
**[National Republicans will spend ANY AMOUNT to flip this seat, so we need your help to fight back. Will you rush a donation to re-elect Bob Casey and defend our Senate majority?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231116-2?refcode=em20231116-2&refcode2=1153_552475_dJsDB5&akid=1153%2E552475%2EdJsDB5)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231116-2?refcode=em20231116-2&refcode2=1153_552475_dJsDB5&akid=1153%2E552475%2EdJsDB5)**
The stakes couldn’t be any higher right now. Thanks for doing your part!
–Team Casey

* * *
To receive texts from Team Casey text TEAM to 51041. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=1153%2E552475%2EdJsDB5)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1153%2E552475%2EdJsDB5)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73496298/438688934/476240636?refcode=em_fr_2023.11.16_b1_tb_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGM5NDY4MDYtZDk4NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D0sI7zNM9jU4RBz32BrNrWbEnLGxVb45Y0rRo2jRHss=)** We’ve talked about everything from funding our education system, to expanding rural healthcare, to growing our economy, and more.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73496299/438688935/476240636?refcode=em_fr_2023.11.16_b1_tb_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGM5NDY4MDYtZDk4NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D0sI7zNM9jU4RBz32BrNrWbEnLGxVb45Y0rRo2jRHss=)

We need to ensure every single voter across OR-05 can hear Janelle’s message of change, but in a district this large, we’ll need your help to do just that.

[**If you’re able, please pitch in $10 to fuel our voter outreach efforts in every corner of the district. We can’t win this without your support.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73496300/438688936/476240636?refcode=em_fr_2023.11.16_b1_tb_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGM5NDY4MDYtZDk4NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D0sI7zNM9jU4RBz32BrNrWbEnLGxVb45Y0rRo2jRHss=)
| [**Help Janelle reach voters »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73496301/438688937/-440309746?refcode=em_fr_2023.11.16_b1_tb_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGM5NDY4MDYtZDk4NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D0sI7zNM9jU4RBz32BrNrWbEnLGxVb45Y0rRo2jRHss=)

body:
| 24 hours to go: **_[Click here to take Sharice’s survey on what your biggest driver is for 2024’s elections→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73496288/438688868/203568898?source=EM_NBI_SD_20231116_PL_1.2_0_1MO_website_NA_NA_abortion equality&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmZhNDJmOC1kODg0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wu0kiy3d3CfpsojtXHvDvNre1F_B3IJP8qEgz2SGmn0=&emci=3bfa42f8-d884-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=4bfa42f8-d884-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=22117458)_**
* * *
**\---Message from Sharice---**

Hi,

We all remember our victory last year, when Kansans voted to protect our reproductive freedoms. Last week, I was proud to watch our friends in Ohio do the same.

They closed the door on anti-choice extremism with that vote and now, as we look to election 2024, I’m ready to bolt it shut.

In Kansas’ Third, we’re facing three opponents who have already shown us that they will not stand up for reproductive freedom. Defeating them is one step to ensuring a federal abortion ban doesn’t become law.

**_[After 2023’s elections, I want to hear from you: How important is choice to your vote in 2024? Answer in the next 48 hours→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73496289/438688869/203568898?source=EM_NBI_SD_20231116_PL_1.2_0_1MO_website_NA_NA_abortion equality&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmZhNDJmOC1kODg0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wu0kiy3d3CfpsojtXHvDvNre1F_B3IJP8qEgz2SGmn0=&emci=3bfa42f8-d884-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=4bfa42f8-d884-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=22117458)_** | **[Answer Now→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73496290/438688870/203568898?source=EM_NBI_SD_20231116_PL_1.2_0_1MO_website_NA_NA_abortion equality&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmZhNDJmOC1kODg0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wu0kiy3d3CfpsojtXHvDvNre1F_B3IJP8qEgz2SGmn0=&emci=3bfa42f8-d884-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=4bfa42f8-d884-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=22117458)**
---

Here’s what these results show me: Candidates who are focused on stripping people of their constitutional rights have no place in Congress—and the people know it.

**I have always been focused on protecting our rights, from protecting our reproductive freedoms to protecting marriage equality.**

There’s only one candidate in this race who will stand up for Kansas values and it isn’t one of our opponents. Now, I need to know how important it is that your representative fights for your rights.

**_[https://act.shariceforcongress.com/a/reproductive-freedoms](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73496291/438688871/203568898?source=EM_NBI_SD_20231116_PL_1.2_0_1MO_website_NA_NA_abortion equality&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmZhNDJmOC1kODg0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wu0kiy3d3CfpsojtXHvDvNre1F_B3IJP8qEgz2SGmn0=&emci=3bfa42f8-d884-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=4bfa42f8-d884-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=22117458)_**

— Sharice

name: Mike Rogers
subject: Fidelity. Bravery. Integrity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate
body:
Help me build an FBI worthy of its motto| | |
---
[](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=63405deaabf041eeb2d788b70f0d1630&_e=siJcKnAnDdopjbDKhmywjjUQ-5ZO7D4xSBwpv7r3pGlAvAUUJWaNI5kV5ByihSAsjgGRng_J9elqKpBgbkPxZ_-VP_aRKOw9ZdnU_PAmHgi5JwrKKoEll2AwU4VxDiYAhwP77yaXr1sf4_iTSYjkZ7Cun2r1bGU1UE26c3A39oV1X5r3qWpv9zE3yXp2nn89lWx48X8thDsimmrvDTv3JMbZRcheEsljOF6xMdc0iH7QfZVfJlhaCs4kG-IoZ7TmBMlwgthP_jCEncTnkqS7JikFLc0RP8OSHK2Kna65OvpqZm9QtjqRK9G7o82pJZuuv3S6fq-eXwhSmxvO5JluBa1BI7--oN-6IEIL1GBg2Qpwy3As5I0sRq_bJY33EsCTtFpBveP3eCmKns-VYbjp--brnn2WyRq9Lv-JYuQW-EU%3D)
---
**“I don’t like the FBI, but I respect the FBI.”** Friend, Those were the words said to me by a dangerous South Side Chicago mob boss who I spent some time with during my career as an FBI Special Agent. His offenses included racketeering, conspiracy, and tax fraud, but even he admitted that the FBI gave him a fair shake with "no planted evidence, no cheap shots” as he was sentenced to two centuries in prison. **Friend, how things have changed.** Nowadays, public trust in the FBI has diminished. And with an Inspector General’s report that found **OVER 200,000 ETHICS VIOLATIONS** committed by FBI officials, I can’t say that mistrust isn’t warranted. Friend, I’m running for the U.S. Senate because I remember the days when the FBI commanded respect — **[and I know we can bring those days back.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=63405deaabf041eeb2d788b70f0d1630&_e=siJcKnAnDdopjbDKhmywjjUQ-5ZO7D4xSBwpv7r3pGlAvAUUJWaNI5kV5ByihSAsjgGRng_J9elqKpBgbkPxZ_-VP_aRKOw9ZdnU_PAmHgi5JwrKKoEll2AwU4VxDiYAhwP77yaXr1sf4_iTSYjkZ7Cun2r1bGU1UE26c3A39oV1X5r3qWpv9zE3yXp2nn89lWx48X8thDsimmrvDTv3JMbZRcheEsljOF6xMdc0iH7QfZVfJlhaCs4kG-IoZ7Tm12Pukf8hOarK-boQI7bPFUchCV2UNTnsdx1YSPGl9HPGAd-MX6_8EvLs66hH1u65WLOF27Be99LZAVeSnirwy92oHbPW_43lqcNiIUVmtanryKnvcvYaO63FK7GxCGgdROprHgVr2Gc13mz08fG8lkC_oVjUgtRiJSQqO22Zxjs%3D)** Every American deserves to be able to trust that law enforcement will keep them safe and treat them fairly. As a Senator, I’ll work my hardest to get rid of unethical behavior and make sure the FBI lives up to its motto: **[Fidelity. Bravery. Integrity.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=63405deaabf041eeb2d788b70f0d1630&_e=siJcKnAnDdopjbDKhmywjjUQ-5ZO7D4xSBwpv7r3pGlAvAUUJWaNI5kV5ByihSAsjgGRng_J9elqKpBgbkPxZ_-VP_aRKOw9ZdnU_PAmHgi5JwrKKoEll2AwU4VxDiYAhwP77yaXr1sf4_iTSYjkZ7Cun2r1bGU1UE26c3A39oV1X5r3qWpv9zE3yXp2nn89lWx48X8thDsimmrvDTv3JMbZRcheEsljOF6xMdc0iH7QfZVfJlhaCs4kG-IoZ7TmNVpzEE-jGuvg44KgSRY9TTjVJlK6rGiMq0o13EwtWvLBm9s_4TPB1X78hLPaeuhK0OrH27uGThtThUBxx6kmyv79u7FS_PWIg4Ql1uoF5WrSG9De5QgYOWSE7_qE1vP0u_EWY_9EvtO08wsVVgkdIIgEuQUoZFkHzMK80-wCZDs%3D)** **[Can you chip in today and help me in my next mission?](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=63405deaabf041eeb2d788b70f0d1630&_e=siJcKnAnDdopjbDKhmywjjUQ-5ZO7D4xSBwpv7r3pGlAvAUUJWaNI5kV5ByihSAsjgGRng_J9elqKpBgbkPxZ_-VP_aRKOw9ZdnU_PAmHgi5JwrKKoEll2AwU4VxDiYAhwP77yaXr1sf4_iTSYjkZ7Cun2r1bGU1UE26c3A39oV1X5r3qWpv9zE3yXp2nn89lWx48X8thDsimmrvDTv3JMbZRcheEsljOF6xMdc0iH7QfZVfJlhaCs4kG-IoZ7TmnblKCTfvDYwFQ79Rtfwh1oEZW12mi4_CEFeNH2pF1nWim6jRboUeef1wB_EBRVbQ64fsAjUd9W7DoGFAm8TjtF3WheHVX7SvlCKMPWtQAFzYa93SajlCKSbBv_H0Jr0Z1MDiKLIf3oDLVFatmvSHzKyLDa50rvW4KABt8_y8gcg%3D)** Thanks for your support. Sincerely, Mike Rogers

body:

---
**Happy Transgender Awareness Week, Peter!**

As you know, the transgender community is under attack in statehouses across the country. Hate crimes against trans people are on the rise, and disinformation about what it means to be transgender and the community is rampant.

One of the reasons I decided to run for Congress is because I saw an utter lack of LGBTQ+ representation in our Capitol. Only 14 out of 535 are openly LGBTQ+. **If we’re going to pass legislation to protect and uplift trans people, we have to elect more queer people to office.**

That’s why I’m especially grateful to my friend and transgender activist Rikki Nathanson for her endorsement of me.
**Here’s a quick note from Rikki:**

_“What sets Jirair apart is his genuine empathy and willingness to listen. He has taken the time to engage with people from all walks of life, actively seeking input on issues that directly impact everyone._

_Jirair’s platform encompasses a wide range of progressive policies that address not only LGBTQ+ rights but also healthcare access, affordable housing, climate change mitigation, racial justice, and economic equality. His comprehensive approach demonstrates a true dedication to creating positive change in our society as a whole.”_

clean_body: Jirair is running for Congress because there is so much at stake to ensure everyone in our community has equal opportunities and a fair shot to chase their own dream. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | | = Happy Transgender Awareness Week, Peter! As you know, the transgender community is under attack in statehouses across the country. Hate crimes against trans people are on the rise, and disinformation about what it means to be transgender and the community is rampant. One of the reasons I decided to run for Congress is because I saw an utter lack of LGBTQ+ representation in our Capitol. Only 14 out of 535 are openly LGBTQ+. If we’re going to pass legislation to protect and uplift trans people, we have to elect more queer people to office. That’s why I’m especially grateful to my friend and transgender activist Rikki Nathanson for her endorsement of me. Here’s a quick note from Rikki: “What sets Jirair apart is his genuine empathy and willingness to listen. He has taken the time to engage with people from all walks of life, actively seeking input on issues that directly impact everyone. Jirair’s platform encompasses a wide range of progressive policies that address not only LGBTQ+ rights but also healthcare access, affordable housing, climate change mitigation, racial justice, and economic equality. His comprehensive approach demonstrates a true dedication to creating positive change in our society as a whole.” Rikki has a prestigious list of accomplishments and dedication to the transgender community and I couldn’t be more honored by her support. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = With your help, I promise to fight for legislation that protects all Americans, including transgender people, while building bridges across party lines for meaningful progress. name: Eugene Vindman
subject: I am running for Congress, but I can’t do it alone.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
On July 25, 2019, my brother Alexander Vindman was on a phone call that changed everything.
#
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-evfc-email-nov23.RfceN0&refcode=em231116-3-v-30&t=1&akid=19449%2E3013755%2Eo6sEDz)
---
Derek -
I wanted you to hear it directly from me: I am running for Congress to serve the people of Virginia's 7th Congressional District.
I am going to tell you more about why I made this decision, but if you're ready to become a donor to our campaign today, please use this link:
**[https://act.votevets.org/go/Launch](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-evfc-email-nov23.RfceN0&refcode=em231116-3-v-30&t=2&akid=19449%2E3013755%2Eo6sEDz)**
On July 25, 2019, my brother Alexander Vindman was on a phone call that changed everything.
He listened as President Trump attempted to extort our ally Ukraine, a country at war, by withholding military aid unless President Zelenskyy investigated his political rival.
At the time, I was serving as the senior ethics official at the National Security Council in the White House. After Alex reported the call to me, we both blew the whistle on Trump. The end result was Trump's corruption was exposed and he was impeached.
**The decision to blow the whistle on Donald Trump cost my brother and me our military careers after the former president retaliated against us, but I am not done serving.**
I am running for Congress to ensure the people of Virginia, and this country, have a government that works for them and not just wealthy campaign contributors.
I am running for Congress because the rights of women in this country are under attack from authoritarian leaders who cry "freedom" but fight to take away fundamental rights.
I am running for Congress to make sure our seniors in Virginia and everywhere have the opportunity to retire with dignity and respect.
**And yes, I am running for Congress to defend our Constitution and preserve our democracy. But I cannot do it alone. So I am asking:**
[**Can I count on you to use this link and contribute to my campaign for Congress? It will all add up when we're all chipping in, and that's how we'll win this race. Together.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-evfc-email-nov23.RfceN0&refcode=em231116-3-v-30&t=3&akid=19449%2E3013755%2Eo6sEDz)**
| [CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-evfc-email-nov23.RfceN0&refcode=em231116-3-v-30&t=4&akid=19449%2E3013755%2Eo6sEDz)
---
We need leaders who serve the people, not themselves. That's why I am running. Thank you in advance for your support.
All my best,
Eugene Vindman

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE
Use of military rank, job titles or photographs in uniform does not imply the endorsement of the Department of Defense, Departments of the Army, Navy, Air Force, or the Marines or Space Force.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.votevets.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=19449%2E3013755%2Eo6sEDz).

name: LCV Dirty Energy Team
subject: [ACTION ALERT]: Carbon emissions from the CP2 project would be 20x more than than Willow
body:
Help us reach 5,000 comments to overcome corporate polluters.? Tell the EPA:
PROTECT COMMUNITIES FROM CHEMICAL DISASTERS
The EPA is now seeking public input on a new rule to require industrial facilities to disclose the hazardous chemical risks posed by their operations, take stronger actions to prevent accidents, and move quickly should an accident occur.

Corporate polluters have already killed this rule once, when Trump decided to allow these dangerous facilities to operate in secrecy. We cannot allow them to succeed again.

GOAL: 5,000 actions
TAKE ACTION https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/NvbyBY-PNbf3/eW93citpUjJ2OG5FZlgyWkJMNDNUUU9Zd2JDUkp3Z2RLRzZETVE3dHN4Q2YyN3hiUysvbGNGNmZsME9jRUNXa091SjJqemw2VDJmOHJoR0gwOGtsU2hoWFhnVHhCSm05MG5ZbXZ5VnRKSU09S0/d20rSjk3OUpqSDFRMmNyODhsRmYrZjVuVFFpQWp4aUdQZCtQSkFnRVJON01VLy96TEVhL0lFUXM5NURSaTBYZlhWNWM2THVSb2t4cXQ2QmhEV2lrMHc9PQS2 ? ?
? Peter ? a critical new rule from Biden's EPA would finally require dangerous industrial facilities to disclose any hazardous chemicals they contain ? and take steps to prevent and mitigate harmful accidents.

This rule will especially protect people living closest to these facilities, which are overwhelmingly low-wealth communities and communities of color, as well as workers. Decades of environmental racism ensured these hazardous facilities were located in the neighborhoods with the least resources to fight back, meaning these frontline communities are disproportionately exposed to chemical accidents and harmful pollutants that have jeopardized their health.

Here's the problem: powerful interests, like the oil and gas industry and the chemical industry, are demanding the EPA once again abandon these important protections. Unless our movement speaks up right now, we may miss out on this opportunity to advance environmental justice and worker safety, and create healthier communities and workplaces.

Please TAKE ACTION right now to protect communities from chemical hazards. To beat the chemical industry, we need to urgently deliver 5,000 comments supporting the EPA's proposed rule. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/7RYwsNLAyPs8/eW93citpUjJ2OG5FZlgyWkJMNDNUUU9Zd2JDUkp3Z2RLRzZETVE3dHN4Q2YyN3hiUysvbGNGNmZsME9jRUNXa091SjJqemw2VDJmOHJoR0gwOGtsU2hoWFhnVHhCSm05MG5ZbXZ5VnRKSU09S0/d20rSjk3OUpqSDFRMmNyODhsRmYrZjVuVFFpQWp4aUdQZCtQSkFnRVJON01VLy96TEVhL0lFUXM5NURSaTBYZlhWNWM2THVSb2t4cXQ2QmhEV2lrMHc9PQS2

We've already seen the dangers these facilities can pose. In 2013, an explosion of ammonium nitrate fertilizer killed 15 people and destroyed a school, nursing home, and many homes in the city of West, Texas. The Obama administration began a painstaking process to prevent similar disasters, culminating in enhanced protections for minimizing and managing chemical risks.

But after an aggressive campaign from the chemical industry and other corporate polluters, the Trump administration abandoned the rule, choosing to prioritize corporate profits over the health of vulnerable communities and workers.

Under President Biden, the EPA can now reverse this dangerous decision and finally help protect people, especially environmental justice communities, from hazardous pollution and chemical disasters.

Don't let corporate polluters undermine critical environment protections. TAKE ACTION now to help us deliver 5,000 comments supporting environmental justice and corporate accountability. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/DzpWMX3Py7T2/eW93citpUjJ2OG5FZlgyWkJMNDNUUU9Zd2JDUkp3Z2RLRzZETVE3dHN4Q2YyN3hiUysvbGNGNmZsME9jRUNXa091SjJqemw2VDJmOHJoR0gwOGtsU2hoWFhnVHhCSm05MG5ZbXZ5VnRKSU09S0/d20rSjk3OUpqSDFRMmNyODhsRmYrZjVuVFFpQWp4aUdQZCtQSkFnRVJON01VLy96TEVhL0lFUXM5NURSaTBYZlhWNWM2THVSb2t4cXQ2QmhEV2lrMHc9PQS2

Thank you for taking action to protect people and workers from environmental disasters.

Sincerely,

Madeleine Foote
Deputy Legislative Director
League of Conservation Voters ? ? ? ? ? This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=10241606&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg2MDM0OTMzMQS2&spReportId=MTg2MDM0OTMzMQS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=10241606&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg2MDM0OTMzMQS2&spReportId=MTg2MDM0OTMzMQS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/rNykfkVY6Gs0/eW93citpUjJ2OG5FZlgyWkJMNDNUUU9Zd2JDUkp3Z2RLRzZETVE3dHN4Q2YyN3hiUysvbGNGNmZsME9jRUNXa091SjJqemw2VDJmOHJoR0gwOGtsU2hoWFhnVHhCSm05MG5ZbXZ5VnRKSU09S0/d20rSjk3OUpqSDFRMmNyODhsRmYrZjVuVFFpQWp4aUdQZCtQSkFnRVJON01VLy96TEVhL0lFUXM5NURSaTBYZlhWNWM2THVSb2t4cXQ2QmhEV2lrMHc9PQS2 ? ? ? ? https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/k_ypTVyG82QW/eW93citpUjJ2OG5FZlgyWkJMNDNUUU9Zd2JDUkp3Z2RLRzZETVE3dHN4Q2YyN3hiUysvbGNGNmZsME9jRUNXa091SjJqemw2VDJmOHJoR0gwOGtsU2hoWFhnVHhCSm05MG5ZbXZ5VnRKSU09S0/

name: Lizzie Pannill Fletcher
subject: It’s official—I’m on the ballot for 2024!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
This weekend, I filed the paperwork for re-election to continue serving the people of Texas’ Seventh Congressional District. That means it’s official—my name will be on the 2024 ballot!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231113?refcode=lpfe231113_non-op [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231113?refcode=lpfe231113_non-op]
In 2018, we built a broad and diverse coalition together to bring a little more Houston to Washington, D.C. As the first Democrat in more than 50 years, and the first woman ever, to represent Texas’ Seventh Congressional District, I am proud to work with partners across our cities, counties, state, and country to make meaningful progress and to protect our democracy. I am honored to have the support of so many community leaders and organizations who have already endorsed my re-election.
I will continue to bring people together to do the critical work ahead to defend our democracy, ensure equality, and restore our rights, all of which are on the ballot in 2024.
RE-ELECT LIZZIE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231113?refcode=lpfe231113_non-op]
Contributions of all kinds matter—from sending postcards and making phone calls to contributing money to help us get the message out. These contributions are all essential to winning. And that’s what we do on #TeamLizzie.
Today, I’d be thrilled if you could make a contribution of $20.24 to mark the moment and prepare for the work ahead. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231113?refcode=lpfe231113_non-op&amount=20.24]
It’s all on the line in 2024. Let’s get to work!
Together, we can do anything,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231113?refcode=lpfe231113_non-op]
PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
Don't want to receive these emails anymore? unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/yiT4vmtXrUCBvy-D5k60rg2?unsubscribedata=f%2BsTIVu%2FSlBrAmS8KiFJwumB0MezGpZ3QQg8PU9KuAkricDZUfWHL%2FfCZblsscXWnkFSCFUipthbJBlxFPaYqgPvTbkICWHfoDQoFnfkwdLluGDBHj%2FjMYbJqgXkqFTpQTwAoNK%2FjWHlRiCC53THDROfLqANXBLo8mG5h8pbSSXMsdrJEBoeBsOYWgFR5pbmAREeaTozTvHwPgsFW%2FIZta3uZSL%2BI1GZ6GiE19e2ssiyRVYi%2BwtUeVYnyfbAz1tZXAZLuM5wW9vjE68gq5UR9FX3LfDV8Co1gMaPvUfIU1iGyUWZkY%2FIbkw%2Fh7Cw3IJ1qSR6nv7NJZLC%2FPcZ1IiWXRTXkyy6f2LFNg8C%2Fr%2BqNIy5SIa2sNlnhI120mxeMDcetAbr8LCzF8p74vYmkeZ1AcC5R8uSVyuvHCR5m62I5HoNqBeOUw86kv2jXeVi0Ihg www.lizziefletcher.com [https://lizziefletcher.com/]
